Non-compliance to this document and/or instruction may result in disciplinary action. Should you have any queries in regard to this SOP, you are required to address same with management immediately.\nPURPOSE\nThis SOP outlines how to handle CMS Service Requests (SRs) routed to the CC Admin Queue using specific escalation dropdowns. It ensures these administrative tasks are processed accurately, consistently, and in line with company standards, reducing delays and improving the customer experience.\nSummary\nRefer to the list of administrative dropdown options available to the Customer Care team.\nCMS - Customer Care Department DropDowns SOP\nNumber Change ESC\nTo process a manual number change escalation when\nno\nvalid contact details (Main Tel, Alternative Tel, or Email) are available to complete the system-driven OTP process.\nCC Supervisor Checks:\nConfirm the new number is not linked to any other code (no duplicates).\nConfirm the customer has been recently verified by checking the\nLast Customer Verified Date\n. Ensure the verification date falls within an acceptable timeframe relative to the number change request.\nCustomer Care Checks:\n3. Confirm the new number is registered via SmartRICA.\n4. Attempt a call to the old number (e.g. voicemail or unreachable is acceptable outcome).\n5. Call the new number and complete required security questions as per SOP.\n6. All manual number changes require re-verification, regardless of when the original verification was done. If the customer was previously verified, only the profile photo is needed for facial comparison—no need to re-upload all documents.\nOutcome:\nSystem sends SMS confirmation to both the old and new numbers.\nSR Comment:\n27784785960 replaced with 27747537503. [Checked: not on any other code(s) in CRM].\nDropDown:\nRouting dependent on source of communication\nCMS - Customer Care Department DropDowns SOP\nDropDown:\nRESOLVED\nOr dependent on any outstanding SR Handling communication\nBASE CHANGE ESC\nAn SR is escalated to CC Admin for changes to the Delivery Method and Sales Person (e.g., base change from\nGEN Inhouse\nto\nSales Base or vice versa\n)\nCheck customer history to confirm that Customer Care (CC) has\ncalled the agent telephonically\nto confirm the base change, and that the agent is\nhappy with moving from GEN Inhouse to a Sales Rep (Sales Base)\n.\nCheck the\nFile Verification\nstatus: Customer Verified with Date\nIf Base Change is to a Sales Rep – confirm that the agent’s delivery address (region) is serviced by the Sales Rep.\nSales Rep Listing\nSR Comment:\nDelivery Method and SalesPerson changes needed. Cust Verified. DOT to be updated.\nDropDown:\nRouting dependent on SalesPerson\nCMS - Customer Care Department DropDowns SOP\nComplete any other requests in the Service Request (SR) linked to possible other DropDown actionables. Example: Number Change Esc\nSR Comment: Delivery Method and SalesPerson changes needed. SR # 4201941 Moses Ramabulana - S53. Cust Verified. DOT to be updated. 27822381146 replaced with 27724035541. [Checked: not on any other code(s) in CRM].\nNote:\nA base change request can still be processed if outstanding and /or pending verification.\nIn such cases, please\nadd a comment\nto the escalation instructing the Line Manager (LM) to ensure the Sales Rep completes agent verification.\nVerify ID Docs ESC\nSource:\nIN FIELD / New request\nSteps:\nCheck \\\"Customer Verified\\\" Indicator\nPending Verification – No green tick or verification date\nSR Comment:\nVerification Pending CC Amb.\nDropDown:\nTO CALL CENTRE ADMIN\nCustomer Verified - Green tick mark and date verified\nSR Comment:\nCustomer Verified. Date: 2026-04-21.\nDropDown:\nRESOLVED\nIf further actions are needed to reactivate the account, see actional actionables and select the appropriate additional\ndropdown\nrouting options.\nExample:\nSR Comment:\nCode unheld. [EX] DLS: 2019-08-14. Customer Verified. Date: 2026-04-21. Base Change (account reactivation) will be dealt with on SR # 4201933.\nInfield - Sales Rep did not upload after Creation\nSystem Generated SR (3 days after)\nSR Comment:\nAtt RTL - Please follow up with Sales Rep to Upload Verification docs (MM05789). Date Customer Added: 2026-05-22\nDropDown\n: TO REG TEAM LEAD\nUNHOLD ESC\nCheck\nReason\nfor the On Hold - before removing any On Hold.\nSummary of Reasons:\n1. On Hold due to Last Invoice Return to Sender (RTS)\nUNHOLD ESC - DUE TO LAST INVOICE RTS\nSee\nSR Handling Returned Parcels (RTS) – Awesim Telecoms SOP\nScenario 1\n1.1. RTS Count = 1 x\nSR Comment:\nCode Unheld due to RTS. RTS Count = 1 x. (Last INV: E00000000741998). Capture the same quantities that were returned. Reason: XXXX. RTS reason fixed.\nDropDown: Return Chat/ Reinstate Call Centre\n1.2. RTS Count = 2 x and greater (repeat)\nSR Comment:\n2 x and greater (Repeat) - Waiting on feedback from Slack Stock Code Flag (Buy SIMs) workflow - add Buy SIMs\nCOO will pull SR from the queue, add feedback and route SR back to Call Centre to share next steps with the agent.\nScenario 2\nSR Comment:\nCode Unheld due to RTS. New Allowed Balances (Stock Order Table = New Allowed Balances) FT Order.\nUNHOLD ESC - EXPIRED ACCOUNT\nCust Verified\nDelivery Address Google Verified\nIf Expired - only one account can be reactivated\nCode unheld. [EX] Cust Code verified. DLS: 2023-01-12.\nGood Lifetime Performance: Free SIMs on Stock Order Table = FT Order. Process EXPIRED (04) ESC\nPoor (Underperforming) Lifetime Performance: Expired Returning Agent (RA) = Buy SIMs. Process EXPIRED (04) ESC\nOpt Out ESC\nTrigger:\nSR escalated due to customer request to opt-out.\nSteps:\nReview customer history and reason for Opt-Out.\nConfirm opt-out conditions (e.g. temporary pause, unreachable, internal investigation).\nLL list - No customer code\nUpdate:\nGoogle Sheet\nShared Folder Drive - - > Order Processing - - > Incoming - - >\nZ:\\\\ORDER PROCESSING\\\\1_Incoming\\\\\n2020_02_DO NOT CONTACT_MSISDNs\nComment:\nAdded to DNC List (Z:\\\\ORDER PROCESSING\\\\1_Incoming)\nDropDown:\nResolved\nOpt Out with customer code\nOn CMS place account on hold and opt out.\nComments\n:\nCode placed On Hold and marked as Opt Out.\nCode placed On Hold and marked as Opt Out. Att Sales Rep - please take note of agent feedback.\nDropDown (based on SalesPerson field):\nGEN = Resolved  / Sales= Return to Sales\nCMS ESCALATIONS\nEscalation Handler - CALL CENTRE ADMIN (CCA):\nReview and action all SRs escalated under the above categories on the same business day.\nEnsure all required verification documents are uploaded and valid.\nLog appropriate SRs using the correct dropdown options and standardized comments.\nCommunicate with relevant agents or internal departments when additional information or actions are needed.\nReject, approve, or escalate SRs further based on document validity and system status.\nMaintain accurate documentation and resolution records for audit and reporting purposes.\nCustomer Care / Sales / Field Agents:\nUpload required documents promptly.\nEnsure customer details are correct prior to SR Escalation.\nFollow up on requests as per internal workflows.\nUNHOLD – Dealer Accounts (Do Not Remove On Hold)\nImportant Restriction:\nDo not remove the\nOn Hold\nstatus for any Dealer Accounts.\nThese accounts are tied to specific commercial agreements and structures, and may not be reactivated through standard unhold procedures.\nExample Case:\nCustomer Code:\nHALA001\nSR Number:\n3953172\nDOT:\nDealers Ongoing (02) – Paid to RICA #\nDLS (Date Last Sale):\n2021-06-09\nPrice Code:\nHalf Price [C]\nKey Notes:\nDealer accounts\nare only activated upon signing a valid agreement with\nAwesim\n.\nIf a dealer account is marked\nExpired\nor\nOn Hold\n, this indicates that:\nThe dealer has not met the required criteria, OR\nThere is no current signed agreement in place.\nUnhold actions should not be taken\non Dealer Accounts under any circumstances unless explicitly instructed.\nWhat to Do Instead:\nIf a Dealer queries account reactivation:\nInform them that a\nnew agreement\nmust be signed.\nEscalate or consult your manager (\nBernadine\n) if uncertain.\nDo not change the\nDefault Order Type (DOT)\nor\nPrice Code\nfor Dealer Accounts.\nThe current DOT “Paid to RICA #” is linked to specific agreement terms.\nPrice Code C is no longer offered to new Dealers.\nSystem Handling Note:\nIf a Dealer Account remains inactive for\n6+ months\n, the SR will be routed to\nFinance\nfor database clean-up and formal expiration.\nSummary:\n✅\nDo not unhold Dealer accounts.\n✅\nNo changes to DOT or Price Code.\n✅\nConsult LM if unsure.\n✅\nSRs for expired Dealer accounts are routed to Finance\nFootsoldier in Business Partner Structure\nKeep in mind that Footsoldiers\nDO NOT\nhave access to their agent accounts on My.Awesim/Awesim App and should refer queries through their dealer channel (1st point of contact is their Dealer).\n1.      A Footsoldier will always be linked to a Master Account. In a Business Partner structure, the Master will be the Major Dealer who the Footsoldier and the rest of the structure reports to.\n2.      The Default Order type will indicate the type of structure. 09 – Paid to Code, meaning activation payments are made to the main customer of that account.\n3.      Sales Person could be S42 or a Sales Rep. Please check who the sales person is to be able to direct any further queries or escalations to the correct person.\n4.      Price Code is always A for Business Partners and Major Dealers\n*Note*\nFootsoldier queries or requests such as change of payment method, updating cell number or address details should only come from the Major Dealer or Business Partner of the structure. Footsoldiers should be referred to their Dealer in such cases or the Dealer should be contacted to confirm the change request and verify the details.\nUNHOLD ESC – Address Verification Requirement\nBefore removing the On Hold status for any UNHOLD ESC SR's related to EX (Expired) / RTS (Return to Sender), please ensure the following:\nDelivery Address Verification\nConfirm that the delivery address has been Google Verified. This verification helps to prevent potential RTS occurrences by ensuring the address is valid and deliverable as pe\nr\nDelivery Address - Google Co-Ordinates ++ Geo Location Sharing.\n﻿\n﻿\nCC - Steps to Verify\nUse Google Maps or the Genarate Location Share Link [Google address verification tool embeded on WhatsApp Chat] to check the exact delivery location.\nIf the address cannot be verified or appears invalid, do not remove the On Hold status.\nEscalate or request updated / correct delivery details before proceeding.\nOnly after successful address verification should the On Hold status be removed to continue with delivery processing.\nUnhold Escalate Process – Expired AND RTS’ed customer Codes\nWhen handling Expired or RTS’ed Customer Codes, follow the steps below:\nRequest Return Agent (RA) Verification Documents:\nA clear photo of the RA / RTS'ed agent holding their ID next to their face.\nThe first Customer Care Consultant (CC) to Receive the Image Must:\n📤 Upload the document to my.awesim.\nAddress Confirmation: Checks\n🔍 Ensure the RA & / RTS'ed agent's delivery address is Google Verified.\n📍 Update the comments section with the location coordinates (e.g. from Google Maps).\n📌 Route the SR to the \\\"Unhold Esc\\\" queue (CC Admin).\n📝\nSR Comment:\nUhold [Add Reason] i.e RTS / EX. DLS: XXX\n✅ Once Unhold is complete, confirm the order.\nCCA SR Comments: Unhold reason verified.\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"22759e11-3702-4e71-a25b-1d2ea8bc39e3\",\"title\":\"CC Admin Queue Escalations SOP \",\"content\":\"

STANDARD OPERATING PROCEDURE

The following is a Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) that must be followed as of the date of issue. Non-compliance to this document and/or instruction may result in disciplinary action. Should you have any queries in regard to this SOP, you are required to address same with management immediately.


PURPOSE

This SOP outlines how to handle CMS Service Requests (SRs) routed to the CC Admin Queue using specific escalation dropdowns. It ensures these administrative tasks are processed accurately, consistently, and in line with company standards, reducing delays and improving the customer experience.

Summary

Refer to the list of administrative dropdown options available to the Customer Care team.
CMS - Customer Care Department DropDowns SOP


Number Change ESC

To process a manual number change escalation when no valid contact details (Main Tel, Alternative Tel, or Email) are available to complete the system-driven OTP process.

CC Supervisor Checks:

  1. Confirm the new number is not linked to any other code (no duplicates).
  2. Confirm the customer has been recently verified by checking the Last Customer Verified Date. Ensure the verification date falls within an acceptable timeframe relative to the number change request.

Customer Care Checks:
3. Confirm the new number is registered via SmartRICA.
4. Attempt a call to the old number (e.g. voicemail or unreachable is acceptable outcome).
5. Call the new number and complete required security questions as per SOP.
6. All manual number changes require re-verification, regardless of when the original verification was done. If the customer was previously verified, only the profile photo is needed for facial comparison—no need to re-upload all documents.

Outcome:
System sends SMS confirmation to both the old and new numbers.

SR Comment: 27784785960 replaced with 27747537503. [Checked: not on any other code(s) in CRM].
DropDown: Routing dependent on source of communication CMS - Customer Care Department DropDowns SOP

DropDown: RESOLVED
Or dependent on any outstanding SR Handling communication

BASE CHANGE ESC

An SR is escalated to CC Admin for changes to the Delivery Method and Sales Person (e.g., base change from GEN Inhouse to Sales Base or vice versa)

  1. Check customer history to confirm that Customer Care (CC) has called the agent telephonically to confirm the base change, and that the agent is happy with moving from GEN Inhouse to a Sales Rep (Sales Base).
  2. Check the File Verification status: Customer Verified with Date
  3. If Base Change is to a Sales Rep – confirm that the agent’s delivery address (region) is serviced by the Sales Rep. Sales Rep Listing
  4. SR Comment: Delivery Method and SalesPerson changes needed. Cust Verified. DOT to be updated.
    DropDown: Routing dependent on SalesPerson CMS - Customer Care Department DropDowns SOP

Complete any other requests in the Service Request (SR) linked to possible other DropDown actionables. Example: Number Change Esc

SR Comment: Delivery Method and SalesPerson changes needed. SR # 4201941 Moses Ramabulana - S53. Cust Verified. DOT to be updated. 27822381146 replaced with 27724035541. [Checked: not on any other code(s) in CRM].

Note:
A base change request can still be processed if outstanding and /or pending verification.
In such cases, please add a comment to the escalation instructing the Line Manager (LM) to ensure the Sales Rep completes agent verification.

Verify ID Docs ESC

Source:
IN FIELD / New request

Steps:

  1. Check \\\"Customer Verified\\\" Indicator

Pending Verification – No green tick or verification date

SR Comment: Verification Pending CC Amb.
DropDown: TO CALL CENTRE ADMIN

Customer Verified - Green tick mark and date verified

SR Comment: Customer Verified. Date: 2026-04-21.
DropDown: RESOLVED

If further actions are needed to reactivate the account, see actional actionables and select the appropriate additional dropdown routing options.

Example:
SR Comment: Code unheld. [EX] DLS: 2019-08-14. Customer Verified. Date: 2026-04-21. Base Change (account reactivation) will be dealt with on SR # 4201933.

Infield - Sales Rep did not upload after Creation
System Generated SR (3 days after)

SR Comment:
Att RTL - Please follow up with Sales Rep to Upload Verification docs (MM05789). Date Customer Added: 2026-05-22
DropDown: TO REG TEAM LEAD

UNHOLD ESC

Check Reason for the On Hold - before removing any On Hold.

Summary of Reasons:
1. On Hold due to Last Invoice Return to Sender (RTS)

UNHOLD ESC - DUE TO LAST INVOICE RTS

See SR Handling Returned Parcels (RTS) – Awesim Telecoms SOP


Scenario 1

1.1. RTS Count = 1 x
SR Comment:
Code Unheld due to RTS. RTS Count = 1 x. (Last INV: E00000000741998). Capture the same quantities that were returned. Reason: XXXX. RTS reason fixed.

DropDown: Return Chat/ Reinstate Call Centre

1.2. RTS Count = 2 x and greater (repeat)
SR Comment: 2 x and greater (Repeat) - Waiting on feedback from Slack Stock Code Flag (Buy SIMs) workflow - add Buy SIMs
COO will pull SR from the queue, add feedback and route SR back to Call Centre to share next steps with the agent.

Scenario 2
SR Comment: Code Unheld due to RTS. New Allowed Balances (Stock Order Table = New Allowed Balances) FT Order.


UNHOLD ESC - EXPIRED ACCOUNT

Cust Verified
Delivery Address Google Verified
If Expired - only one account can be reactivated


Code unheld. [EX] Cust Code verified. DLS: 2023-01-12.

Good Lifetime Performance: Free SIMs on Stock Order Table = FT Order. Process EXPIRED (04) ESC
Poor (Underperforming) Lifetime Performance: Expired Returning Agent (RA) = Buy SIMs. Process EXPIRED (04) ESC

Opt Out ESC

Trigger: SR escalated due to customer request to opt-out.

Steps:

  1. Review customer history and reason for Opt-Out.
  2. Confirm opt-out conditions (e.g. temporary pause, unreachable, internal investigation).

LL list - No customer code 

Update:

  1. Google Sheet
  2. Shared Folder Drive - - > Order Processing - - > Incoming - - >
    Z:\\\\ORDER PROCESSING\\\\1_Incoming\\\\ 2020_02_DO NOT CONTACT_MSISDNs
  3. Comment: Added to DNC List (Z:\\\\ORDER PROCESSING\\\\1_Incoming)
  4. DropDown: Resolved

Opt Out with customer code 

  1. On CMS place account on hold and opt out.   
  2. Comments:
    Code placed On Hold and marked as Opt Out.
    Code placed On Hold and marked as Opt Out. Att Sales Rep - please take note of agent feedback.
  3. DropDown (based on SalesPerson field): GEN = Resolved  / Sales= Return to Sales

CMS ESCALATIONS

Escalation Handler - CALL CENTRE ADMIN (CCA):

  • Review and action all SRs escalated under the above categories on the same business day.
  • Ensure all required verification documents are uploaded and valid.
  • Log appropriate SRs using the correct dropdown options and standardized comments.
  • Communicate with relevant agents or internal departments when additional information or actions are needed.
  • Reject, approve, or escalate SRs further based on document validity and system status.
  • Maintain accurate documentation and resolution records for audit and reporting purposes.

Customer Care / Sales / Field Agents:

  • Upload required documents promptly.
  • Ensure customer details are correct prior to SR Escalation.
  • Follow up on requests as per internal workflows.

UNHOLD – Dealer Accounts (Do Not Remove On Hold)

Important Restriction:
Do not remove the On Hold status for any Dealer Accounts. These accounts are tied to specific commercial agreements and structures, and may not be reactivated through standard unhold procedures.

Example Case:

  • Customer Code: HALA001
  • SR Number: 3953172
  • DOT: Dealers Ongoing (02) – Paid to RICA #
  • DLS (Date Last Sale): 2021-06-09
  • Price Code: Half Price [C]

Key Notes:

  1. Dealer accounts are only activated upon signing a valid agreement with Awesim.
  2. If a dealer account is marked Expired or On Hold, this indicates that:
  3. The dealer has not met the required criteria, OR
  4. There is no current signed agreement in place.
  5. Unhold actions should not be taken on Dealer Accounts under any circumstances unless explicitly instructed.

What to Do Instead:

  • If a Dealer queries account reactivation:
  • Inform them that a new agreement must be signed.
  • Escalate or consult your manager (Bernadine) if uncertain.

  • Do not change the Default Order Type (DOT) or Price Code for Dealer Accounts.
  • The current DOT “Paid to RICA #” is linked to specific agreement terms.
  • Price Code C is no longer offered to new Dealers.

System Handling Note:

  • If a Dealer Account remains inactive for 6+ months, the SR will be routed to Finance for database clean-up and formal expiration.

Summary:
✅ Do not unhold Dealer accounts.
✅ No changes to DOT or Price Code.
✅ Consult LM if unsure.
✅ SRs for expired Dealer accounts are routed to Finance

Footsoldier in Business Partner Structure

Keep in mind that Footsoldiers DO NOT have access to their agent accounts on My.Awesim/Awesim App and should refer queries through their dealer channel (1st point of contact is their Dealer).

1.      A Footsoldier will always be linked to a Master Account. In a Business Partner structure, the Master will be the Major Dealer who the Footsoldier and the rest of the structure reports to.

2.      The Default Order type will indicate the type of structure. 09 – Paid to Code, meaning activation payments are made to the main customer of that account.

3.      Sales Person could be S42 or a Sales Rep. Please check who the sales person is to be able to direct any further queries or escalations to the correct person.

4.      Price Code is always A for Business Partners and Major Dealers

*Note*Footsoldier queries or requests such as change of payment method, updating cell number or address details should only come from the Major Dealer or Business Partner of the structure. Footsoldiers should be referred to their Dealer in such cases or the Dealer should be contacted to confirm the change request and verify the details.

UNHOLD ESC – Address Verification Requirement

Before removing the On Hold status for any UNHOLD ESC SR's related to EX (Expired) / RTS (Return to Sender), please ensure the following:

  1. Delivery Address Verification

Confirm that the delivery address has been Google Verified. This verification helps to prevent potential RTS occurrences by ensuring the address is valid and deliverable as per Delivery Address - Google Co-Ordinates ++ Geo Location Sharing. ﻿

﻿

  1. CC - Steps to Verify
  2. Use Google Maps or the Genarate Location Share Link [Google address verification tool embeded on WhatsApp Chat] to check the exact delivery location.
  3. If the address cannot be verified or appears invalid, do not remove the On Hold status.
  4. Escalate or request updated / correct delivery details before proceeding.
  5. Only after successful address verification should the On Hold status be removed to continue with delivery processing.

Unhold Escalate Process – Expired AND RTS’ed customer Codes

When handling Expired or RTS’ed Customer Codes, follow the steps below:

  1. Request Return Agent (RA) Verification Documents:
  2. A clear photo of the RA / RTS'ed agent holding their ID next to their face.
  3. The first Customer Care Consultant (CC) to Receive the Image Must:

📤 Upload the document to my.awesim.

Address Confirmation: Checks

🔍 Ensure the RA & / RTS'ed agent's delivery address is Google Verified.

📍 Update the comments section with the location coordinates (e.g. from Google Maps).

📌 Route the SR to the \\\"Unhold Esc\\\" queue (CC Admin).

📝 SR Comment: Uhold [Add Reason] i.e RTS / EX. DLS: XXX

✅ Once Unhold is complete, confirm the order.

  • CCA SR Comments: Unhold reason verified.

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [ { "value": "cc admin", "id": "3cda810e-3ed0-47c4-98de-ee37d5262dbf", "categoryId": "e0751ef6-b3fd-4bd0-babb-3bc7619c24e1", "categoryName": "Support Tags" } ], "last_modified": "2026-05-29T05:49:06.428+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/22759e11-3702-4e71-a25b-1d2ea8bc39e3" }, { "id": "ffac62b4-4845-4d53-8f19-a1decf13116c", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"ffac62b4-4845-4d53-8f19-a1decf13116c\",\"title\":\"SR Handling Returned Parcels (RTS) – Awesim Telecoms SOP\",\"content\":\"\nSTANDARD OPERATING PROCEDURE\nThis Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) is effective immediately and compliance is mandatory. Please note this is not exhaustive and may not cover every possible scenario, process or detail. Non-compliance with the guidelines or instructions outlined herein may result in disciplinary measures. Should you have any questions or need further clarification, you are responsible for consulting with your Line Manager promptly.\nScope/Objective\nThis SOP outlines the process for Service Request handling following parcels\nReturned to Sender (RTS)\nto\nAwesim Head Office\nafter failed courier delivery attempts.\nIt explains how to review RTS reasons, correct delivery details, and assist the agent with account reactivation and / or replacement stock.\nSystem Reference\nCMS Table - see below visual navigation demonstration:\nLast Invoice = RTS Authorized\nWhen a parcel is returned:\nThe\nAgent Code\nis set to\nOn Hold\n.\nRTS Reason and correction\nGetGuru: Customer Care / SOP: SR Handling Returned Parcels (RTS) – Awesim Telecoms\nby Bernadine Bothwell\\\" height=\\\"413\\\" width=\\\"734\\\" data-ghq-card-content-is-full-width=\\\"false\\\" id=\\\"kpEiypRSTXZ6\\\">\nsystem indicators and actionables\nScenario 1 – No Allowed Balances (Stock Order Table = Zero)\nApplies when agent has no available stock to reorder.\ncheck RTS Count\nSee CMS Customer Info Table \\\"RTS Count\\\"\nThe RTS Count reflects\nthe last 12 months from today’s date\n.\n🟢 Scenario 1.1. - RTS Count =\n1 x\nStep 1: Investigate the Return\nOpen the\nInvoice History\n.\nCheck why it was returned (e.g. wrong address, unreachable contact, invalid Google location).\nVerify and update the customer’s delivery information — address, contact number, and map/location pin — and confirm it is accurate.\nStep 2: Replace Stock\nStock Order Table = Zero\nCapture the\nsame quantities\nthat were returned.\nUpdate the RTS reason to\n“Corrected.”\nStep 3: Educate the Agent\nRemind:\n“Please ensure you’re available to receive your delivery.\nIf your parcel is returned again, you’ll need to buy the replacement stock.”\nExample:\n🔴\nScenario 1.2. - 2 x and greater (RepeaT)\nStep 1: No Free Replacement and offer 2nd chance Buy SIMs\nInform the agent that free stock will not be resent and offer agent 2nd chance to Buy SIMs:\n“Because previous deliveries were returned, we can’t resend free stock right now. You’ll need to purchase the replacement stock as a second chance. After a successful delivery and active use of the SIMs, you can qualify for free stock again.\\\"\nStep 2: Record and Escalate\nOnce agent agrees to Buy SIMs\nInvestigate the Return and Update\nCheck why it was returned (e.g. wrong address, unreachable contact, invalid Google location).\nVerify and update the customer’s delivery information — address, contact number, and map/location pin — and confirm it is accurate.\nEnsure the RTS reason is\ncorrected\nand recorded. Update the RTS reason to\n“Corrected.”\nLog the workflow in\nSlack, \\\"\nStock Code FLAG Query\\\" - Buy SIMs with Networks & Qtys\nInform agent accordingly - Chat Waiting\nScenario 2 – New Allowed Balances (Stock Order Table = New Allowed Balances)\nApplies when system has refreshed the agent’s Free / Buy allowances after RTS activity.\nAction Steps\nVerify New Balances\nConfirm that new\nAllowed Balances\nappear in the\nStock Order Table\n.\nRTS activity has impacted the agent’s\nperformance stats\n, triggering new limits.\nInvestigate the Return and Update\nCheck why it was returned (e.g. wrong address, unreachable contact, invalid Google location).\nVerify and update the customer’s delivery information — address, contact number, and map/location pin — and confirm it is accurate.\nEnsure the RTS reason is\ncorrected\nand recorded. Update the RTS reason to\n“Corrected.”\nUnhold the Code\nOnce verified, request that the\nAgent Code be Unheld\n.\nThe agent can now place a\nFresh Order (FT)\nvia the App, using their new\nFree and Buy balances\n.\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"ffac62b4-4845-4d53-8f19-a1decf13116c\",\"title\":\"SR Handling Returned Parcels (RTS) – Awesim Telecoms SOP\",\"content\":\"

STANDARD OPERATING PROCEDURE

This Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) is effective immediately and compliance is mandatory. Please note this is not exhaustive and may not cover every possible scenario, process or detail. Non-compliance with the guidelines or instructions outlined herein may result in disciplinary measures. Should you have any questions or need further clarification, you are responsible for consulting with your Line Manager promptly.

Scope/Objective

This SOP outlines the process for Service Request handling following parcels Returned to Sender (RTS) to Awesim Head Office after failed courier delivery attempts.

It explains how to review RTS reasons, correct delivery details, and assist the agent with account reactivation and / or replacement stock.

System Reference

  • CMS Table - see below visual navigation demonstration:
    Last Invoice = RTS Authorized
  • When a parcel is returned:
    • The Agent Code is set to On Hold.

RTS Reason and correction

GetGuru: Customer Care &#x2F; SOP: SR Handling Returned Parcels (RTS) – Awesim Telecoms by Bernadine Bothwell\\\" height=\\\"413\\\" width=\\\"734\\\" data-ghq-card-content-is-full-width=\\\"false\\\" id=\\\"kpEiypRSTXZ6\\\">

system indicators and actionables

Scenario 1 – No Allowed Balances (Stock Order Table = Zero)

Applies when agent has no available stock to reorder.

check RTS Count

See CMS Customer Info Table \\\"RTS Count\\\"
The RTS Count reflects the last 12 months from today’s date.


🟢 Scenario 1.1. - RTS Count = 1 x

Step 1: Investigate the Return

  • Open the Invoice History.
  • Check why it was returned (e.g. wrong address, unreachable contact, invalid Google location).
  • Verify and update the customer’s delivery information — address, contact number, and map/location pin — and confirm it is accurate.

Step 2: Replace Stock

  • Stock Order Table = Zero
  • Capture the same quantities that were returned.
  • Update the RTS reason to “Corrected.”

Step 3: Educate the Agent

  • Remind:
    “Please ensure you’re available to receive your delivery.
    If your parcel is returned again, you’ll need to buy the replacement stock.”

Example:

🔴 Scenario 1.2. - 2 x and greater (RepeaT)

Step 1: No Free Replacement and offer 2nd chance Buy SIMs

  • Inform the agent that free stock will not be resent and offer agent 2nd chance to Buy SIMs:
    “Because previous deliveries were returned, we can’t resend free stock right now. You’ll need to purchase the replacement stock as a second chance. After a successful delivery and active use of the SIMs, you can qualify for free stock again.\\\"

Step 2: Record and Escalate

  • Once agent agrees to Buy SIMs
  • Investigate the Return and Update
      • Check why it was returned (e.g. wrong address, unreachable contact, invalid Google location).
      • Verify and update the customer’s delivery information — address, contact number, and map/location pin — and confirm it is accurate.
      • Ensure the RTS reason is corrected and recorded. Update the RTS reason to “Corrected.”
  • Log the workflow in Slack, \\\"Stock Code FLAG Query\\\" - Buy SIMs with Networks & Qtys
  • Inform agent accordingly - Chat Waiting

Scenario 2 – New Allowed Balances (Stock Order Table = New Allowed Balances)

Applies when system has refreshed the agent’s Free / Buy allowances after RTS activity.

Action Steps

  1. Verify New Balances
    • Confirm that new Allowed Balances appear in the Stock Order Table.
    • RTS activity has impacted the agent’s performance stats, triggering new limits.
  2. Investigate the Return and Update
    • Check why it was returned (e.g. wrong address, unreachable contact, invalid Google location).
    • Verify and update the customer’s delivery information — address, contact number, and map/location pin — and confirm it is accurate.
    • Ensure the RTS reason is corrected and recorded. Update the RTS reason to “Corrected.”
  3. Unhold the Code
    • Once verified, request that the Agent Code be Unheld.
    • The agent can now place a Fresh Order (FT) via the App, using their new Free and Buy balances.


\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2026-05-28T09:17:56.756+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/ffac62b4-4845-4d53-8f19-a1decf13116c" }, { "id": "162e46b5-1ee2-44c3-a6a2-5e9bc4bc4ae6", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"162e46b5-1ee2-44c3-a6a2-5e9bc4bc4ae6\",\"title\":\"Standard Operating Procedure: Customer Care Minimal Acceptable Standards (MAS)\",\"content\":\"\nEffective Date: 08 January 2025\nPURPOSE:\nTo set clear daily performance targets and rules for Customer Care Consultants and Ambassadors to ensure high-quality, consistent service.\nWHEN TO USE:\nUse this daily to track your targets, log your working hours, and complete your assigned rotation tasks.\nSTEPS:\nPerformance Tracking (All CC Staff)\n●\nCheck\nyour daily stats at the start and end of every shift.\n●\nOpen\nLooker Studio\nCustomer Care Stats\nor the #cc_stats Slack channel to view your performance.\n●\nCalculate\nyour daily target shortfall if you miss a target.\nAdd\nthat missed amount to your target for the next day to catch up.\n●\nDo\nnot stay idle in queues to inflate system hours.\n●\nLimit\npause codes (Meetings, Training, Admin (HR reviews), Tech downtime) to a maximum of 1 hour per day (or 5 hours per week).\n1. Customer Care Consultants - Core Targets\n●\nProcess\nat least 140 Service Requests (SRs) daily.\n●\nScore\na minimum of 85% on all Quality Assurance (QA) call reviews. SRs must align with:\nCustomer Care Service Request (SR) Handling SOP\n. QA reviews will be based on using the:\nQuality Assurance (QA) Scorecard\n●\nWork\nat least 7 hours of active Time in System (TiS) daily.\n2. Customer Care Ambassadors - Rotation 1 Tasks\n●\nProcess\nat least 94 Service Requests (SRs) daily.\n●\nScore\na minimum of 85% on all QA call reviews.\n●\nWork\nat least 6 hours 15 minutes of active Time in System (TiS) daily.\n●\nSend\nthe Daily Stats report every morning to the cc_stats Slack channel. Use format: Daily Stats: DD-MM-YYYY\n●\nSend\nthe Weekly Stats report every Monday to the cc_stats Slack channel. Use format: Weekly Stats: DD-MM-YYYY - DD-MM-YYYY\n●\nCheck\nand reply on the Facebook page at least 5 times a day.\n●\nMonitor\nthe Info@ inbox constantly.\nLog\nyour time in Toggl under the Info@ project when fixing RICA issues.\nRespond\nto customer queries. Forward internal team questions to the correct department.\n●\nTest\nthe SMS Line every Thursday to make sure all networks can receive messages.\n●\nTest\nSIM cards once a month to check RICA, recharges, and active promotions referring to the\nAwesim Monthly Test SIMs SOP\n●\nCheck\nthe File Upload queue 3 times a day to match customer IDs against CMS records using the\nFile Upload Verification Checks SOP\n3. Customer Care Ambassadors - Rotation 2 Tasks\n●\nProcess\nat least 94 Service Requests (SRs) daily.\n●\nScore\na minimum of 85% on all QA call reviews.\n●\nWork\nat least 6 hours 15 minutes of active Time in System (TiS) daily.\n●\nManage\nRAM deliveries daily:\n○\nCheck\nthe RAM system to see if packages are delivered.\n○\nFind\nthe reason for any delayed package.\n○\nCall\nthe customer to confirm when they are free to receive the package.\n○\nUpdate\nthe RAM system with the customer's delivery availability.\nEXPECTED OUTCOME:\nAll Customer Care staff hit their daily targets. Email, social media, and delivery issues are resolved quickly. Individual performance is fully tracked and missed targets are recovered the next day.\nHELP CENTRE IMPACT:\nYes\nCUSTOMER IMPACT:\n●       Faster response times on Facebook, emails, and Service Requests.\n●       Quicker deliveries and updates on delayed RAM packages.\n●       Faster SIM activation due to regular file upload checks.\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"162e46b5-1ee2-44c3-a6a2-5e9bc4bc4ae6\",\"title\":\"Standard Operating Procedure: Customer Care Minimal Acceptable Standards (MAS)\",\"content\":\"

Effective Date: 08 January 2025

PURPOSE:

To set clear daily performance targets and rules for Customer Care Consultants and Ambassadors to ensure high-quality, consistent service.

WHEN TO USE:

Use this daily to track your targets, log your working hours, and complete your assigned rotation tasks.

STEPS:

Performance Tracking (All CC Staff)

●      Check your daily stats at the start and end of every shift.

●       Open Looker Studio Customer Care Stats or the #cc_stats Slack channel to view your performance.

●       Calculate your daily target shortfall if you miss a target. Add that missed amount to your target for the next day to catch up.

●       Do not stay idle in queues to inflate system hours.

●       Limit pause codes (Meetings, Training, Admin (HR reviews), Tech downtime) to a maximum of 1 hour per day (or 5 hours per week).

1. Customer Care Consultants - Core Targets

●       Process at least 140 Service Requests (SRs) daily.

●       Score a minimum of 85% on all Quality Assurance (QA) call reviews. SRs must align with: Customer Care Service Request (SR) Handling SOP. QA reviews will be based on using the: Quality Assurance (QA) Scorecard

●       Work at least 7 hours of active Time in System (TiS) daily.

2. Customer Care Ambassadors - Rotation 1 Tasks

●       Process at least 94 Service Requests (SRs) daily.

●       Score a minimum of 85% on all QA call reviews.

●       Work at least 6 hours 15 minutes of active Time in System (TiS) daily.

●       Send the Daily Stats report every morning to the cc_stats Slack channel. Use format: Daily Stats: DD-MM-YYYY

●       Send the Weekly Stats report every Monday to the cc_stats Slack channel. Use format: Weekly Stats: DD-MM-YYYY - DD-MM-YYYY

●       Check and reply on the Facebook page at least 5 times a day.

●       Monitor the Info@ inbox constantly. Log your time in Toggl under the Info@ project when fixing RICA issues. Respond to customer queries. Forward internal team questions to the correct department.

●       Test the SMS Line every Thursday to make sure all networks can receive messages.

●       Test SIM cards once a month to check RICA, recharges, and active promotions referring to the Awesim Monthly Test SIMs SOP

●       Check the File Upload queue 3 times a day to match customer IDs against CMS records using the File Upload Verification Checks SOP

3. Customer Care Ambassadors - Rotation 2 Tasks

●       Process at least 94 Service Requests (SRs) daily.

●       Score a minimum of 85% on all QA call reviews.

●       Work at least 6 hours 15 minutes of active Time in System (TiS) daily.

●       Manage RAM deliveries daily:

○       Check the RAM system to see if packages are delivered.

○       Find the reason for any delayed package.

○       Call the customer to confirm when they are free to receive the package.

○       Update the RAM system with the customer's delivery availability.

EXPECTED OUTCOME:

All Customer Care staff hit their daily targets. Email, social media, and delivery issues are resolved quickly. Individual performance is fully tracked and missed targets are recovered the next day.

HELP CENTRE IMPACT:

Yes

CUSTOMER IMPACT:

●       Faster response times on Facebook, emails, and Service Requests.

●       Quicker deliveries and updates on delayed RAM packages.

●       Faster SIM activation due to regular file upload checks.

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [ { "value": "procedure", "id": "17e9a5c6-5b5d-46d4-8964-c4af9d3296ae", "categoryId": "877b2ec0-0822-48f7-ac44-e37af6584b8d", "categoryName": "Tags" }, { "value": "SOP Template", "id": "20027f4a-e23a-4c23-bd9d-c28d2bd2dbc7", "categoryId": "e0751ef6-b3fd-4bd0-babb-3bc7619c24e1", "categoryName": "Support Tags" } ], "last_modified": "2026-05-27T06:52:23.428+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/162e46b5-1ee2-44c3-a6a2-5e9bc4bc4ae6" }, { "id": "c36e8c73-5f86-44f6-9fca-1210016c0993", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"c36e8c73-5f86-44f6-9fca-1210016c0993\",\"title\":\"My Switched 30 LED Emergency Light won't turn on - what should I do?\",\"content\":\"\nQuick AnswerHelp the customer fix their emergency light by giving them 5 simple charging steps. If the light is still broken after charging, change the CMS status to escalate it to the Rewards team.\nWhat This Means for You\nYou must send the exact charging steps to the customer via WhatsApp, SMS, or email.\nYou must wait 24 to 48 hours for the customer to test the light before closing the ticket.\nYou must change the CMS status based on whether the light is fixed or still broken.\nDo not offer a replacement yourself; the Rewards team handles all replacements.\nWhat should I do?Step 1: Open CMS and log a Service Request under the customer's profile.Step 2: Send these exact steps to the customer:\nTurn the light completely OFF.\nPlug it straight into a working wall socket.\nLeave it to charge for 24 hours (up to 48 hours if it is brand new or stored for a long time). Do not turn it on or test it while it charges.\nUnplug the light from the wall completely.\nSwitch it to ON, LOW, or HIGH to test it.Step 3: Tell the customer that the light will not turn on while it is plugged into the wall.Step 4: Change the CMS status to CHAT WAITING while the customer finishes the charge test.Step 5: Check the customer’s reply after the test:\nIf the light works: Select RESOLVED in CMS and close the ticket.\nIf the light stays broken: Apologize, select TO REWARDS in CMS to escalate, and tell the customer the Rewards team will contact them.\nImportant to know\nThe light must be unplugged from the wall socket to test it, or it won't turn on.\nA completely flat battery needs up to 48 hours of continuous charging to wake up.\nNever promise a direct replacement, refund, or courier swap. The Rewards team decides this case-by-case.\nCommon QuestionsQ: What if it still doesn’t work after charging?A: Apologize to the customer, set the CMS dropdown to TO REWARDS, and tell them the Rewards team will contact them directly.\nQ: What must I not do?A: Do not promise a replacement light or points credit to the customer. Only the Rewards team can do this.\nQ: What do I tell the customer?A: Give them the 5 charging steps, remind them to unplug it to test it, and ask them to reply once the test is done.\nIf it doesn’t workCheck if the customer unplugged the light before testing.If it still fails after a 48-hour charge, change the CMS status to TO REWARDS.\nWhen to ask for helpIf you are still stuck, contact the support team:WhatsApp: 0600702666 Visit: Contact Us Page\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"c36e8c73-5f86-44f6-9fca-1210016c0993\",\"title\":\"My Switched 30 LED Emergency Light won't turn on - what should I do?\",\"content\":\"

Quick AnswerHelp the customer fix their emergency light by giving them 5 simple charging steps. If the light is still broken after charging, change the CMS status to escalate it to the Rewards team.

What This Means for You

  • You must send the exact charging steps to the customer via WhatsApp, SMS, or email.

  • You must wait 24 to 48 hours for the customer to test the light before closing the ticket.

  • You must change the CMS status based on whether the light is fixed or still broken.

  • Do not offer a replacement yourself; the Rewards team handles all replacements.

What should I do?Step 1: Open CMS and log a Service Request under the customer's profile.Step 2: Send these exact steps to the customer:

  • Turn the light completely OFF.

  • Plug it straight into a working wall socket.

  • Leave it to charge for 24 hours (up to 48 hours if it is brand new or stored for a long time). Do not turn it on or test it while it charges.

  • Unplug the light from the wall completely.

  • Switch it to ON, LOW, or HIGH to test it.Step 3: Tell the customer that the light will not turn on while it is plugged into the wall.Step 4: Change the CMS status to CHAT WAITING while the customer finishes the charge test.Step 5: Check the customer’s reply after the test:

  • If the light works: Select RESOLVED in CMS and close the ticket.

  • If the light stays broken: Apologize, select TO REWARDS in CMS to escalate, and tell the customer the Rewards team will contact them.

Important to know

  • The light must be unplugged from the wall socket to test it, or it won't turn on.

  • A completely flat battery needs up to 48 hours of continuous charging to wake up.

  • Never promise a direct replacement, refund, or courier swap. The Rewards team decides this case-by-case.

Common QuestionsQ: What if it still doesn’t work after charging?A: Apologize to the customer, set the CMS dropdown to TO REWARDS, and tell them the Rewards team will contact them directly.

Q: What must I not do?A: Do not promise a replacement light or points credit to the customer. Only the Rewards team can do this.

Q: What do I tell the customer?A: Give them the 5 charging steps, remind them to unplug it to test it, and ask them to reply once the test is done.

If it doesn’t workCheck if the customer unplugged the light before testing.If it still fails after a 48-hour charge, change the CMS status to TO REWARDS.

When to ask for helpIf you are still stuck, contact the support team:WhatsApp: 0600702666 Visit: Contact Us Page

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2026-05-26T13:06:16.339+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/c36e8c73-5f86-44f6-9fca-1210016c0993" }, { "id": "7015d89e-ac0b-4db6-9c1f-1d3d2dfe506e", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"7015d89e-ac0b-4db6-9c1f-1d3d2dfe506e\",\"title\":\"Awesim Monthly Test SIMs SOP\",\"content\":\"\nSTANDARD OPERATING PROCEDURE\nThe following is a Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) that must be followed as of the date of issue. Non-compliance to this document and/or instruction may result in disciplinary action. Should you have any queries in regard to this SOP, you are required to address same with management immediately.\nPURPOSE\nTo verify that all Awesim sim cards are fully functional by assessing their connectivity, recharge capability, and the value they provide.\nSCOPE\nThis process will take place once during the first week of each month, conducted by the assigned CC Ambassador according to the\nCC Amb_Rotation\nschedule, in collaboration with the CC Supervisor, who serves as the authorizer. All test results will be recorded and stored in the\nAwesim_Test_Sims_Database_New\nworkbook for tracking and reference.\nTo conduct the testing, the John Doe cell phone will be used to verify sim functionality. Additionally, the John Doe\nTest003\ncustomer code will be utilized as the designated account for ordering sim cards through the CMS system.\nThe\nFinance Department\nis responsible for approving and loading the sim testing funds necessary to complete the process.\nProcess Steps:\nstep 1. Service Request Logging on\nCMS\n1.1\nThe CC Ambassador will open a new request and search Test003.\n1.2\nNavigate to the stock order table and accurately add the following sim quantities:\n1.2.1\nIf any network has a flag please navigate to\n#general\non slack, complete the Stock Code FLAG Query for the flag to be removed and wait for feedback from management for the flag review before capturing quantities, once flag has been removed, proceed to capture quantities as shown below.\n1.2.2\nIf there are no flags on any networks accurately add the following sim quantities:\nCell C → 1\nMTN → 2\nTelkom → 1\nVodacom → 2\n1.3\nNavigate to\n#invoicing_walk-in\non slack, complete the walk in workflow, update fields\nAgent code (Test003)\nand\nService Request,\nand under\nTake to?\nclick on drop down\nReception.\nOnce completed click on\nSubmit\n.\n1.4\nNavigate to CMS and update the comments section with 'Monthly test sims, please bring to my desk'\n1.5\nOnce completed select dropdown\n'WALK- IN INVOICE'.\nContinue with\nstep 2\n.\nStep 2. Supervisor Approval\n2.1\nThe CC supervisor will open the Test003 SR in CMS and navigate to the stock order table to:\n2.2.1 Review and ensure completeness of the quantity order that was added in step 1.\n2.2\nSave the screenshot under the share-drive at:\n\\\\\\\\awesimvault\\\\Test Sims\\\\CC_Monthly_Test Sims_CMS Order_QTY.\n2.3\nNavigate to the opened SR and update the comments section with\n'Test sims approved, please hand (write the responsible persons name) for testing\n'.\n2.4\nSelect drop down '\nWalk in approved\n'.\n2.5\nCopy the SR and navigate to the reprioritize queue field, search the SR, click on the box on the far right of the table and select prioritize.\n2.6\nNotify Invoicing team of approved test sims:\nNavigate to the\n#invoicing_walk-in\nchannel on Slack.\nLocate the thread related to the specific Service Request (SR).\nIn the thread, post a message to notify the invoicing team that the test SIMs have been approved.\nInclude a ✅ (check mark emoji) in the message to visually indicate approval. Continue with\nstep 3\n.\nSTEP 3:RICA REGISTRATION\nThe CC ambassador will send an email to\nFINANCE\n(accounts@awesim.co.za), making sure to copy (CC) the finance members except the Procurement Officer and Fleet Administrator, requesting R120 to be loaded in the John Doe Smartload account and R15 to be loaded to the Awesim WhatsApp account for the purpose of conducting test sims.\n.\n3.1\nOnce the sims have been provided and the smartload account recharged, the CC ambassador will access the\nAwesim_Test_Sims_Database_New\nworkbook and click on worksheet TEST003.\n3.2\nUpdate columns A - H with information in accordance to the set headers.\n3.3\nClick on the cell relating to the network you are updating under serial# and scan all the ICCID sim card serials.\n3.4\nOnce updated login to the Awesim app and click on the RICA option.\n3.5 Scan the sim card serial using the scan option ICCID.\n3.6\nCapture your ID, full name, Address and postal code, then repeat process for each sim card and submit.\n3.7\nView the statuses of the RICA outcome under reports\n3.9\nIndividually insert the sim cards in the John Doe cell phone to retrieve the MSISDN.\n3.10\nNavigate to the\nAwesim_Test_Sims_Database_New\nworkbook and update columns RICA system, Any RICA issues?, RICA'ed date, and Connected date. Continue with\nstep 4\n.\nstep 4. Initial recharge loading and Verification\n4.1\nThe CC ambassador will continue with loading airtime as specified below;\nNetwork\nHow much per SIM\nCell C\n20\nVodacom\n15\nMTN\n25\nTelkom\n20\nAwesim WhatsApp Channel\n0765998655 (Voda)\n15\n4.2\nLogin to the John Doe\nsmartcall online\naccount and click on recharge airtime, data & electricity option.\n4.3\nClick on the network that is pending airtime recharge.\nEnsure that the relevant sim is inserted.\n4.4\nUpdate the rand amount, Cell Number to Recharge and enter the smartload pin(For smartload pin,navigate to\n#cc_ambassadors\non slack,go to canvas), click on next and confirm recharge. The recharge amount will be reflected under the messages.\nIn an instance where the SMS is not reflecting, dial the below USSDs to view recharge status.\nVodacom: *\n100#\nTelkom:\n*188#\nMTN:\n*136#\nCell C:\n*101# or *147#\n4.5\nVerify if all network free value promotions are received and Navigate to the\nAwesim_Test_Sims_Database_New\nand update the cell with the type of\nfree value\nthat was received - leave blank if none was received.\n4.6\nPlease ensure that you complete a Billable Event on SIM # 2 (Dual SIM in Ops Test Phone)\nLoad Standard Voda Top Up to: 0765998655\nImportant to ensure the number remains active and is not recycled\n4.7\nOpen the\nCC Amb_Rotation\nworkbook and update the\nQuestions/ Feedback / Suggestions\nwith either successful or with the error findings that were experienced in point\n3.7, 4.4 and 4.5\n.\n4.8\nProvide an update on the\ncc_ambassadors\nchannel slack notifying the team that the test sim task is completed and attached the\nCC Amb_Rotation\nworkbook.\nProcess End.\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"7015d89e-ac0b-4db6-9c1f-1d3d2dfe506e\",\"title\":\"Awesim Monthly Test SIMs SOP\",\"content\":\"

STANDARD OPERATING PROCEDURE

The following is a Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) that must be followed as of the date of issue. Non-compliance to this document and/or instruction may result in disciplinary action. Should you have any queries in regard to this SOP, you are required to address same with management immediately.


PURPOSE

To verify that all Awesim sim cards are fully functional by assessing their connectivity, recharge capability, and the value they provide.

SCOPE

This process will take place once during the first week of each month, conducted by the assigned CC Ambassador according to the CC Amb_Rotation schedule, in collaboration with the CC Supervisor, who serves as the authorizer. All test results will be recorded and stored in the Awesim_Test_Sims_Database_New workbook for tracking and reference.

To conduct the testing, the John Doe cell phone will be used to verify sim functionality. Additionally, the John Doe Test003 customer code will be utilized as the designated account for ordering sim cards through the CMS system.

The Finance Department is responsible for approving and loading the sim testing funds necessary to complete the process.

Process Steps:

step 1. Service Request Logging on CMS

1.1 The CC Ambassador will open a new request and search Test003.

1.2 Navigate to the stock order table and accurately add the following sim quantities:
1.2.1 If any network has a flag please navigate to #general on slack, complete the Stock Code FLAG Query for the flag to be removed and wait for feedback from management for the flag review before capturing quantities, once flag has been removed, proceed to capture quantities as shown below.
1.2.2 If there are no flags on any networks accurately add the following sim quantities:

    • Cell C → 1
    • MTN → 2
    • Telkom → 1
    • Vodacom → 2

1.3 Navigate to #invoicing_walk-in on slack, complete the walk in workflow, update fields Agent code (Test003) and Service Request, and under Take to? click on drop down Reception. Once completed click on Submit.

1.4 Navigate to CMS and update the comments section with 'Monthly test sims, please bring to my desk'

1.5 Once completed select dropdown 'WALK- IN INVOICE'. Continue with step 2.

Step 2. Supervisor Approval

2.1 The CC supervisor will open the Test003 SR in CMS and navigate to the stock order table to:

2.2.1 Review and ensure completeness of the quantity order that was added in step 1.

2.2 Save the screenshot under the share-drive at: \\\\\\\\awesimvault\\\\Test Sims\\\\CC_Monthly_Test Sims_CMS Order_QTY.

2.3 Navigate to the opened SR and update the comments section with 'Test sims approved, please hand (write the responsible persons name) for testing'.

2.4 Select drop down 'Walk in approved'.

2.5 Copy the SR and navigate to the reprioritize queue field, search the SR, click on the box on the far right of the table and select prioritize.

2.6 Notify Invoicing team of approved test sims:

    • Navigate to the #invoicing_walk-in channel on Slack.
    • Locate the thread related to the specific Service Request (SR).
    • In the thread, post a message to notify the invoicing team that the test SIMs have been approved.
    • Include a ✅ (check mark emoji) in the message to visually indicate approval. Continue with step 3.
STEP 3:RICA REGISTRATION

The CC ambassador will send an email to FINANCE(accounts@awesim.co.za), making sure to copy (CC) the finance members except the Procurement Officer and Fleet Administrator, requesting R120 to be loaded in the John Doe Smartload account and R15 to be loaded to the Awesim WhatsApp account for the purpose of conducting test sims.

.


3.1 Once the sims have been provided and the smartload account recharged, the CC ambassador will access the Awesim_Test_Sims_Database_New workbook and click on worksheet TEST003.

3.2 Update columns A - H with information in accordance to the set headers.

3.3 Click on the cell relating to the network you are updating under serial# and scan all the ICCID sim card serials.

3.4 Once updated login to the Awesim app and click on the RICA option.

3.5 Scan the sim card serial using the scan option ICCID.

3.6 Capture your ID, full name, Address and postal code, then repeat process for each sim card and submit.

3.7 View the statuses of the RICA outcome under reports

3.9 Individually insert the sim cards in the John Doe cell phone to retrieve the MSISDN.

3.10 Navigate to the Awesim_Test_Sims_Database_New workbook and update columns RICA system, Any RICA issues?, RICA'ed date, and Connected date. Continue with step 4.

step 4. Initial recharge loading and Verification

4.1 The CC ambassador will continue with loading airtime as specified below;

Network

How much per SIM

Cell C

20

Vodacom

15

MTN

25

Telkom

20

Awesim WhatsApp Channel

0765998655 (Voda)

15

4.2 Login to the John Doe smartcall online account and click on recharge airtime, data & electricity option.

4.3 Click on the network that is pending airtime recharge.

    • Ensure that the relevant sim is inserted.

4.4 Update the rand amount, Cell Number to Recharge and enter the smartload pin(For smartload pin,navigate to #cc_ambassadors on slack,go to canvas), click on next and confirm recharge. The recharge amount will be reflected under the messages.

    • In an instance where the SMS is not reflecting, dial the below USSDs to view recharge status.
    • Vodacom: *100#
    • Telkom: *188#
    • MTN: *136#
    • Cell C: *101# or *147#

4.5 Verify if all network free value promotions are received and Navigate to the Awesim_Test_Sims_Database_New and update the cell with the type of free value that was received - leave blank if none was received.

4.6 Please ensure that you complete a Billable Event on SIM # 2 (Dual SIM in Ops Test Phone)

  • Load Standard Voda Top Up to: 0765998655
  • Important to ensure the number remains active and is not recycled

4.7 Open the CC Amb_Rotation workbook and update the Questions/ Feedback / Suggestions with either successful or with the error findings that were experienced in point 3.7, 4.4 and 4.5.

4.8 Provide an update on the cc_ambassadors channel slack notifying the team that the test sim task is completed and attached the CC Amb_Rotation workbook. Process End.

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2026-05-22T11:43:51.474+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/7015d89e-ac0b-4db6-9c1f-1d3d2dfe506e" }, { "id": "eec19df5-2a77-4302-be60-0ac3daa655d8", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"eec19df5-2a77-4302-be60-0ac3daa655d8\",\"title\":\"Stock Order (Networks) request\",\"content\":\"\nStarter Package\nWe supply Cell C, MTN, Telkom and Vodacom SIMs. Please mention which networks are best for your area or reply with All networks?\nExisting Agent Stock request\nAllowed Balance (Free): 30+ SIMs needed to qualify for shipping & place Fast Track (FT) Order\nYou currently qualify for Free SIMs:\nXX\nCell C,\nXX\nMTN,\nXX\nTelkom and\nXX\nVodacom\nWould you prefer to order on our Awesim App instead?\nClick the link to download the Awesim App from Google or Huawei App Store:\nhttps://app.getguru.com/card/cL86oEXi/Download-the-Awesim-app-Android-and-Huawei-Links-\nRemember:\nEarn\n60 Reward Points\nwhen you order on the Awesim App and confirm delivery after receiving your order.\nOr\nIf you order on our USSD *130*43203# earn 30 Rewards Points, when you confirm delivery.\nIf not, please reply to this and we'll process your order for you, but you won't earn any points.\nIf Yes to Fast Track Order - please include:\nSR Comment:\nFT Order\nDropDown:\n[INFO SMS]\nNo - process as per SOP\nSR Comment:\nReason for HO Order\nResponse: If, no (Example: no access to a Smartphone)\nDropDown:\n[TO INVOICE]\nExisting Agent Stock request\nIf under 30 Free SIMs: encouraged to place Free + Buy order\nTo order, please visit the Awesim App. Combine your Free SIMs + Buy SIMs using Reward Points to reach the 30 minimum Qty to qualify for shipping.\nYou currently qualify for:\n•\nFree SIMs:\nXX\nCell C,\nXX\nMTN,\nXX\nTelkom,\nXX\nVodacom\n•\nBuy SIMs:\nXX\nCell C,\nXX\nMTN,\nXX\nTelkom,\nXX\nVodacom\n•\nBuy eSIMs:\nXX\nCell C eSIM,\nXX\nTelkom eSIM,\nXX\nVodacom eSIM\nBuy SIMs Points System:\n• Normal SIMs = XX Reward Points each (based on performance)\n• eSIM = 10 Reward Points each\nLow on Reward Points? No problem — buy (top up) RPs in the App.\nClick the link to download the Awesim App from Google or Huawei App Store:\nhttps://app.getguru.com/card/cL86oEXi/Download-the-Awesim-app-Android-and-Huawei-Links-\nRemember:\nEarn\n60 Reward Points\nwhen you order on the Awesim App and confirm delivery after receiving your order.\nPoor-performing\nExpired\nReturning Agent (RA)\nSee SOP:\nReturning Agent (RA): Stock Order Qtys\nDOT: Expired Accounts (04) NOT Paid\nAllowed Balance: Nil\nAvailable Paid Qty: Paid SIMs available: Max 10 per stock code / 3 RPs per SIM\nDue to past Free Stock performance, you don’t qualify for the Free Returning Agent Starter Package.\n👉 But here’s a 2nd chance: once your account is reactivated, you can\nbuy up to 40 SIMs\non the Awesim App (max 10 per stock code, 3 RPs per SIM).\n📌 If you show good performance on this package by\nconnecting\nReal Customers\nwho recharge & use the SIMs regularly\n(beyond the free airtime/data), you may qualify for future free stock.\nCan we get started with reactivating your account today?\nIf No;\nPlease contact us when you are ready to reactivate your Awesim Account and buy your 2nd-chance Starter Package.\nIf Yes;\nGreat! We’ll first verify your account and delivery address. Once verified, we’ll reactivate your account and send you an INFO SMS with a link to the Awesim App. This SMS is confirmation that your account is active again and ready for you to log in and purchase your 2nd-chance Starter Package.\nYou will have until the end of the week to complete an order. If there is no activity, the system will automatically deactivate your account.\nGood-performing Expired Returning Agent (RA)\nSee SOP:\nReturning Agent (RA): Stock Order Qtys\nBecause of your good performance with past Free Stock shipped, you now qualify for another Free SIM Starter Package.\nWe’ll first verify your account and delivery address.\nOnce verified, we’ll reactivate your account and send you an INFO SMS with a link to the Awesim App. This SMS is confirmation that your account is active again and ready for you to log in and place your free SIM order.\nYou will have until the end of the week to complete an order. If there is no activity, the system will automatically deactivate your account.\nInsufficient Allowed Balance\nScenario 1 – Still have stock available\nPolite reminder when customer hasn’t used enough of last stock order yet:\nWe’ve reviewed your last stock order and see that not enough SIMs have been connected, recharged, or activated yet. Please use the SIMs you still have on hand, and continue to RICA and connect Real Customers who will recharge and actively use (spend on) the SIMs.\nIn the meantime, download and log in to the Awesim App to track your allowed balances and see when you qualify for your next order.\nClick the link to download the Awesim App from Google or Huawei App Store:\nhttps://app.getguru.com/card/cL86oEXi/Download-the-Awesim-app-Android-and-Huawei-Links-\nScenario 2 – NO Stock Available (Free + Buy) Waiting for more activity\nCustomer must wait until usage improves before qualifying for new stock:\nWe’ve reviewed your last stock order and noticed not enough SIMs have been connected, recharged, or activated yet.\nReports show more activity is still needed — you will need to wait until the Real Customers you’ve already RICA’d, connected, and recharged show increased usage before qualifying for more stock.\nIn the meantime, download and log in to the Awesim App to track your allowed balances and see when you qualify for your next order.\nClick the link to download the Awesim App from Google or Huawei App Store:\nhttps://app.getguru.com/card/cL86oEXi/Download-the-Awesim-app-Android-and-Huawei-Links-\nInsufficient / Allowed Balance\nwith Stock Code Flag(s)\nImportant Note:\nIf an agent asks for stock and / or to order, and\nany\nFlag(s) appear under the Stock Code(s) and /or network(s)\nFlag Review Process\nSee\nStock Code FLAG Query\nSOP\nRequirements:\nCustomer account is\nverified\nDelivery address is\nGoogle Verified\nQuestions to Ask the Agent:\nExplain why you believe you deserve a second chance.\nWhat will you do differently with the stock?\nSee below\nCanned Response\nSR with comment:\nStock Code Flag Query submitted, pending outcome.\nDropDown: Escalate Call\nWe have reviewed your Stock Order Allowances and notice you have been flagged for\n[Insert Flag - see\nStock Code Flags]\non\n[Insert Stock Code \\\"Network(s)\\\" Example: Vodacom, Cell C, Telkom, or MTN]\nwhich means:\n[Insert Description - reason of\nStock Code Flags\n]\nExplain why you believe you deserve a second chance.\nWhat will you do differently with the stock?\nOnce agent replies with:\nReason(s) as to why you or the agent needs the Flag to be reviewed?\nWe will log a request for management to review the Stock Code Flag based on your performance and will share feedback with you once received.\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"eec19df5-2a77-4302-be60-0ac3daa655d8\",\"title\":\"Stock Order (Networks) request\",\"content\":\"

Starter Package

We supply Cell C, MTN, Telkom and Vodacom SIMs. Please mention which networks are best for your area or reply with All networks?


Existing Agent Stock request

Allowed Balance (Free): 30+ SIMs needed to qualify for shipping & place Fast Track (FT) Order


You currently qualify for Free SIMs: XX Cell C, XX MTN, XX Telkom and XX Vodacom

Would you prefer to order on our Awesim App instead?

Click the link to download the Awesim App from Google or Huawei App Store:
https://app.getguru.com/card/cL86oEXi/Download-the-Awesim-app-Android-and-Huawei-Links-

Remember: Earn 60 Reward Points when you order on the Awesim App and confirm delivery after receiving your order.

Or
If you order on our USSD *130*43203# earn 30 Rewards Points, when you confirm delivery.

If not, please reply to this and we'll process your order for you, but you won't earn any points.

If Yes to Fast Track Order - please include:
SR Comment: FT Order
DropDown: [INFO SMS]

No - process as per SOP
SR Comment: Reason for HO Order Response: If, no (Example: no access to a Smartphone)
DropDown: [TO INVOICE]

Existing Agent Stock request

If under 30 Free SIMs: encouraged to place Free + Buy order

To order, please visit the Awesim App. Combine your Free SIMs + Buy SIMs using Reward Points to reach the 30 minimum Qty to qualify for shipping.

You currently qualify for:
• Free SIMs: XX Cell C, XX MTN, XX Telkom, XX Vodacom
• Buy SIMs: XX Cell C, XX MTN, XX Telkom, XX Vodacom
• Buy eSIMs: XX Cell C eSIM, XX Telkom eSIM, XX Vodacom eSIM

Buy SIMs Points System:
• Normal SIMs = XX Reward Points each (based on performance)
• eSIM = 10 Reward Points each

Low on Reward Points? No problem — buy (top up) RPs in the App.

Click the link to download the Awesim App from Google or Huawei App Store:
https://app.getguru.com/card/cL86oEXi/Download-the-Awesim-app-Android-and-Huawei-Links-

Remember: Earn 60 Reward Points when you order on the Awesim App and confirm delivery after receiving your order.


Poor-performing Expired Returning Agent (RA)

See SOP: Returning Agent (RA): Stock Order Qtys

DOT: Expired Accounts (04) NOT Paid
Allowed Balance: Nil
Available Paid Qty: Paid SIMs available: Max 10 per stock code / 3 RPs per SIM


Due to past Free Stock performance, you don’t qualify for the Free Returning Agent Starter Package.

👉 But here’s a 2nd chance: once your account is reactivated, you can buy up to 40 SIMs on the Awesim App (max 10 per stock code, 3 RPs per SIM).

📌 If you show good performance on this package by connecting Real Customers who recharge & use the SIMs regularly (beyond the free airtime/data), you may qualify for future free stock.

Can we get started with reactivating your account today?

If No;

Please contact us when you are ready to reactivate your Awesim Account and buy your 2nd-chance Starter Package.


If Yes;

Great! We’ll first verify your account and delivery address. Once verified, we’ll reactivate your account and send you an INFO SMS with a link to the Awesim App. This SMS is confirmation that your account is active again and ready for you to log in and purchase your 2nd-chance Starter Package.

You will have until the end of the week to complete an order. If there is no activity, the system will automatically deactivate your account.


Good-performing Expired Returning Agent (RA)

See SOP: Returning Agent (RA): Stock Order Qtys

Because of your good performance with past Free Stock shipped, you now qualify for another Free SIM Starter Package.

We’ll first verify your account and delivery address.

Once verified, we’ll reactivate your account and send you an INFO SMS with a link to the Awesim App. This SMS is confirmation that your account is active again and ready for you to log in and place your free SIM order.

You will have until the end of the week to complete an order. If there is no activity, the system will automatically deactivate your account.

Insufficient Allowed Balance

Scenario 1 – Still have stock available

Polite reminder when customer hasn’t used enough of last stock order yet:

We’ve reviewed your last stock order and see that not enough SIMs have been connected, recharged, or activated yet. Please use the SIMs you still have on hand, and continue to RICA and connect Real Customers who will recharge and actively use (spend on) the SIMs.
In the meantime, download and log in to the Awesim App to track your allowed balances and see when you qualify for your next order.
Click the link to download the Awesim App from Google or Huawei App Store:
https://app.getguru.com/card/cL86oEXi/Download-the-Awesim-app-Android-and-Huawei-Links-

Scenario 2 – NO Stock Available (Free + Buy) Waiting for more activity

Customer must wait until usage improves before qualifying for new stock:

We’ve reviewed your last stock order and noticed not enough SIMs have been connected, recharged, or activated yet.
Reports show more activity is still needed — you will need to wait until the Real Customers you’ve already RICA’d, connected, and recharged show increased usage before qualifying for more stock.
In the meantime, download and log in to the Awesim App to track your allowed balances and see when you qualify for your next order.
Click the link to download the Awesim App from Google or Huawei App Store:
https://app.getguru.com/card/cL86oEXi/Download-the-Awesim-app-Android-and-Huawei-Links-

Insufficient / Allowed Balance with Stock Code Flag(s)

Important Note:
If an agent asks for stock and / or to order, and any Flag(s) appear under the Stock Code(s) and /or network(s)

Flag Review Process

See Stock Code FLAG Query SOP

Requirements:

  • Customer account is verified
  • Delivery address is Google Verified

Questions to Ask the Agent:

  1. Explain why you believe you deserve a second chance.
  2. What will you do differently with the stock?

See below Canned Response
SR with comment: Stock Code Flag Query submitted, pending outcome.
DropDown: Escalate Call

We have reviewed your Stock Order Allowances and notice you have been flagged for
[Insert Flag - see Stock Code Flags]
on [Insert Stock Code \\\"Network(s)\\\" Example: Vodacom, Cell C, Telkom, or MTN]
which means: [Insert Description - reason of Stock Code Flags]

  1. Explain why you believe you deserve a second chance.
  2. What will you do differently with the stock?

Once agent replies with:
Reason(s) as to why you or the agent needs the Flag to be reviewed?


We will log a request for management to review the Stock Code Flag based on your performance and will share feedback with you once received.

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [ { "value": "Cell C", "id": "be462564-836d-43a8-b64c-d3829a1aa440", "categoryId": "e0751ef6-b3fd-4bd0-babb-3bc7619c24e1", "categoryName": "Support Tags" }, { "value": "networks", "id": "35b7376a-7f87-4e76-bae9-96aee3924e72", "categoryId": "e0751ef6-b3fd-4bd0-babb-3bc7619c24e1", "categoryName": "Support Tags" }, { "value": "order", "id": "48dc88f0-7a0d-4e08-b789-22c66dadb23e", "categoryId": "e0751ef6-b3fd-4bd0-babb-3bc7619c24e1", "categoryName": "Support Tags" } ], "last_modified": "2026-05-20T07:39:00.174+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/eec19df5-2a77-4302-be60-0ac3daa655d8" }, { "id": "9f7af6b3-07c0-4cd5-b00b-f8b8e4101b01", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"9f7af6b3-07c0-4cd5-b00b-f8b8e4101b01\",\"title\":\"Stock Code FLAG Query \",\"content\":\"\nSTANDARD OPERATING PROCEDURE\nThe following is a Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) that must be followed as of the date of issue. Non-compliance to this document and/or instruction may result in disciplinary action. Should you have any queries in regard to this SOP, you are required to address same with management immediately.\nPURPOSE\nTo ensure a structured, timely, and accurate process for managing fraud-related service requests.\nProcedure and Responsibilities\nRemoving Stock Code Flag request synopsis:\nSystem Entry\n: Identify and accurately input the agents details into the system, ensuring all fields are properly completed on CMS. This is inclusive of submitting the Stock Code Flag Query workflow on\nSlack #general\n.\nConfirmation\n: Provide the agent with a confirmation of their order and the next steps in the process.\nSTEP BY STEP GUIDE\nA request to order sims is initiated by the agent.\nReview the customer info history and stock order table as per the\nSR handling SOP\n2.1 There will be an update on the stock order table under the column named 'Reason' updated to \\\"Blocked stock until 2099-12-31\\\".\n2.2 This indicates that the respective network(s) have been blocked and requires reviewing.\nInform the agent that their account has been blocked as a result of\nname the specific flag type.\nNavigate & access Slack #general and complete the stock code flag query workflow.\nOnce the workflow has been submitted navigate to CMS and update the comments section with \\\"Stock Code Flag Query submitted, pending outcome\\\" and escalate the SR using the \\\"Escalate Call\\\" dropdown.\nThe supervisor will review the submitted stock code flag workflow and update under comments 'Stock Code Flag Query completed.\nThe assisgned manager (Example: COO) will revert with a decision and update the comments section with the feedback and reinstate the SR to customer care queue to process.\nThe CC consultant will call / reply to the agent updating and educating them about the flag and feedback.\nFlag Review Process\nIf an agent requests a\nflag review\n, the following steps\nmust\nbe completed\nbefore\nthe review is submitted:\nRequirements:\nCustomer account is\nverified\nDelivery address is\nGoogle Verified\nQuestions to Ask the Agent:\nExplain why you believe you deserve a second chance.\nWhat will you do differently with the stock?\nLegend\nCC\nCustomer Care\nCMS\nCustomer Management System\nCRM\nCustomer Relationship Management \\\"System\\\"\nSR\nService Request\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"9f7af6b3-07c0-4cd5-b00b-f8b8e4101b01\",\"title\":\"Stock Code FLAG Query \",\"content\":\"

STANDARD OPERATING PROCEDURE

The following is a Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) that must be followed as of the date of issue. Non-compliance to this document and/or instruction may result in disciplinary action. Should you have any queries in regard to this SOP, you are required to address same with management immediately.


PURPOSE

To ensure a structured, timely, and accurate process for managing fraud-related service requests.

Procedure and Responsibilities

  1. Removing Stock Code Flag request synopsis:
      • System Entry: Identify and accurately input the agents details into the system, ensuring all fields are properly completed on CMS. This is inclusive of submitting the Stock Code Flag Query workflow on Slack #general.
      • Confirmation: Provide the agent with a confirmation of their order and the next steps in the process.

STEP BY STEP GUIDE

  1. A request to order sims is initiated by the agent.
  2. Review the customer info history and stock order table as per the SR handling SOP

2.1 There will be an update on the stock order table under the column named 'Reason' updated to \\\"Blocked stock until 2099-12-31\\\".

2.2 This indicates that the respective network(s) have been blocked and requires reviewing.

  1. Inform the agent that their account has been blocked as a result of name the specific flag type.
  2. Navigate & access Slack #general and complete the stock code flag query workflow.

  1. Once the workflow has been submitted navigate to CMS and update the comments section with \\\"Stock Code Flag Query submitted, pending outcome\\\" and escalate the SR using the \\\"Escalate Call\\\" dropdown.
  2. The supervisor will review the submitted stock code flag workflow and update under comments 'Stock Code Flag Query completed.
  3. The assisgned manager (Example: COO) will revert with a decision and update the comments section with the feedback and reinstate the SR to customer care queue to process.
  4. The CC consultant will call / reply to the agent updating and educating them about the flag and feedback.

Flag Review Process

If an agent requests a flag review, the following steps must be completed before the review is submitted:

Requirements:

  • Customer account is verified
  • Delivery address is Google Verified

Questions to Ask the Agent:

  1. Explain why you believe you deserve a second chance.
  2. What will you do differently with the stock?

Legend

CC

Customer Care

CMS

Customer Management System

CRM

Customer Relationship Management \\\"System\\\"

SR

Service Request


\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2026-05-20T07:25:50.443+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/9f7af6b3-07c0-4cd5-b00b-f8b8e4101b01" }, { "id": "f8ea6a7e-070d-4f39-b26c-ebc6f0e38ca6", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"f8ea6a7e-070d-4f39-b26c-ebc6f0e38ca6\",\"title\":\"CMS - Customer Care Department DropDowns SOP\",\"content\":\"\nSTANDARD OPERATING PROCEDURE\nThis Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) is effective immediately and compliance is mandatory. Please note this is not exhaustive and may not cover every possible scenario, process or detail. Non-compliance with the guidelines or instructions outlined herein may result in disciplinary measures. Should you have any questions or need further clarification, you are responsible for consulting with your Line Manager promptly.\nPURPOSE\nThe purpose of this Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) is to establish a clear framework for Customer Care (CC) Consultants to efficiently handle and route delivery service requests, ensuring timely outcomes in compliance with the defined process.\nCMS ESCALATION DROPDOWNS\nDROPDOWN\nDROPDOWN ACTIONABLE\nROUTING\nTO CALL CENTRE ADMIN QUEUE\nROUTING\nTO CALL CENTRE SUP (GEN)\nROUTING\nTO CALL CENTRE MANAGER\nBASE CHANGE ESC\nBase Change Request following confirmation Courtesty Call or Chat\nGEN > SALES > TO SALES MANAGER\nSALES > GEN > TO SALES MANAGER\nSALES (incl.
