Resigned Sales Codes) > SALES > TO RTL (TO REG TEAM LEAD)\nS42 > GEN > TO DEALER SUP\nS42 > SALES > TO DEALER SUP\nFoot Soldier (FS) **\nRequest to move out of Business Partner / Major Dealer Structure**\n> TO DEALER SUP\nX\nNUMBER CHANGE ESC\nManual Number Changes\nX\nVERIFY ID DOCS ESC\nFile Upload Verification Query\nX\nOPT OUT ESC\nOpt out from communication and / or Code to be be suspended\nX\nUNHOLD ESC\nRequests to add or remove On Hold\nThe SR comment must clearly state the reason for the On Hold — for reference and/or evaluation when escalated to be Unheld.\nSR Comment:\nPlease Unhold Acc. Reason:\nSee below\nTemplates:\nExpired [EX]. DLS: XXX\nRTS due to XXX. Delivery Address Google Verified / Agent Contact Details Verified.\nUnreachable On Hold.\nExpired [EX] Move from Expired to Agent because of payment. DLS: XXX\nX\nLANGUAGE ESC\nThe agent is unable to communicate in English or in your language of proficiency.\nPlease specify in the SR Comment the language the agent speaks so we can assign a suitable CC Consultant.\nX\nEXPIRED (04) ESC\nGood/Poor-Performing: Expired Returning Agent (RA)\nEscalate to CC Ambassador to update\nDefault Order Type\nfrom\nExpired (04)\n→\nAccount Agent (0)\nReturning Agent (RA): Stock Order Qtys\nESCALATE CALL\nSR Handling Escalation to engage the appropriate support teams or supervisors\nX\nTO INVOICE\nINFLATED ORDERS\nX\nRAM ESCALATE\n**Only CC Ambassador\nRTS QUERIES\nX\nTO CALL CENTRE MANAGER\nAvailable to the CC Supervisor for escalation to the next level of support.\nX\nKEY DEFINITION\n*ESC = Escalate\nDROPDOWN\nDROPDOWN ACTIONABLE\nROUTING\nCHAT WAITING\nCONTACT AFTER 3\nFOLLOW UP 4hr\nFOLLOW UP 24hr\nINFO SMS\nLATER\nLINKING\nTO FINANCE\nNOT ANSWERING\nRESOLVED\nTO CREATE\nTO DEALER SUP\nTO FINANCE\nFinance Queries\nIncluding:\nDefault Order Type (DOT) Changes\nExample:\nChange from\nPaid to RICA #\nto\nPaid to CODE\n(or vice versa)\n(excl. DOT: Expired - see EXPIRED (04) ESC)\nFINANCE DEPARTMENT\nTO INVOICE\nTO RAM\nTO RAM QUERIES\nTO REWARDS\nSee\nReward items - Return policies for\ndetails:\nhttps://awesim.co.za/Terms\nTemplate to Use\n:\nAtt Stores – Rewards Issue. INV: [Invoice Number] - Dated: [Invoice Date] - [Issue Description].\nRewards Administrator\nTO SALES\nSee CMS SalesPerson for Routing: GEN / Sales Person Code\nTOMORROW\nWALK IN INVOICE\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"f8ea6a7e-070d-4f39-b26c-ebc6f0e38ca6\",\"title\":\"CMS - Customer Care Department DropDowns SOP\",\"content\":\"

STANDARD OPERATING PROCEDURE

This Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) is effective immediately and compliance is mandatory. Please note this is not exhaustive and may not cover every possible scenario, process or detail. Non-compliance with the guidelines or instructions outlined herein may result in disciplinary measures. Should you have any questions or need further clarification, you are responsible for consulting with your Line Manager promptly.

PURPOSE

The purpose of this Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) is to establish a clear framework for Customer Care (CC) Consultants to efficiently handle and route delivery service requests, ensuring timely outcomes in compliance with the defined process.

CMS ESCALATION DROPDOWNS

DROPDOWN

DROPDOWN ACTIONABLE

ROUTING
TO CALL CENTRE ADMIN QUEUE

ROUTING
TO CALL CENTRE SUP (GEN)

ROUTING
TO CALL CENTRE MANAGER

  • BASE CHANGE ESC

Base Change Request following confirmation Courtesty Call or Chat

GEN > SALES > TO SALES MANAGER
SALES > GEN > TO SALES MANAGER

SALES (incl. Resigned Sales Codes) > SALES > TO RTL (TO REG TEAM LEAD)

S42 > GEN > TO DEALER SUP
S42 > SALES > TO DEALER SUP

Foot Soldier (FS) **Request to move out of Business Partner / Major Dealer Structure** > TO DEALER SUP

X

  • NUMBER CHANGE ESC

Manual Number Changes

X

  • VERIFY ID DOCS ESC

File Upload Verification Query

X

  • OPT OUT ESC

Opt out from communication and / or Code to be be suspended

X

  • UNHOLD ESC

Requests to add or remove On Hold

The SR comment must clearly state the reason for the On Hold — for reference and/or evaluation when escalated to be Unheld.

SR Comment: Please Unhold Acc. Reason: See below

Templates:

  • Expired [EX]. DLS: XXX
  • RTS due to XXX. Delivery Address Google Verified / Agent Contact Details Verified.
  • Unreachable On Hold.
  • Expired [EX] Move from Expired to Agent because of payment. DLS: XXX

X

  • LANGUAGE ESC

The agent is unable to communicate in English or in your language of proficiency.

Please specify in the SR Comment the language the agent speaks so we can assign a suitable CC Consultant.

X

  • EXPIRED (04) ESC

Good/Poor-Performing: Expired Returning Agent (RA)
Escalate to CC Ambassador to update Default Order Type from Expired (04) → Account Agent (0)

Returning Agent (RA): Stock Order Qtys

  • ESCALATE CALL

SR Handling Escalation to engage the appropriate support teams or supervisors

X

  • TO INVOICE

INFLATED ORDERS

X

  • RAM ESCALATE
    **Only CC Ambassador

RTS QUERIES

X

  • TO CALL CENTRE MANAGER

Available to the CC Supervisor for escalation to the next level of support.

X

KEY DEFINITION

*ESC = Escalate

DROPDOWN

DROPDOWN ACTIONABLE

ROUTING

CHAT WAITING

CONTACT AFTER 3

FOLLOW UP 4hr

FOLLOW UP 24hr

INFO SMS

LATER

LINKING

TO FINANCE

NOT ANSWERING

RESOLVED

TO CREATE

TO DEALER SUP

TO FINANCE

Finance Queries
Including:
Default Order Type (DOT) Changes

Example:

Change from Paid to RICA # to Paid to CODE (or vice versa)

(excl. DOT: Expired - see EXPIRED (04) ESC)

FINANCE DEPARTMENT

TO INVOICE

TO RAM

TO RAM QUERIES

TO REWARDS

See Reward items - Return policies for details:
https://awesim.co.za/Terms

Template to Use:

Att Stores – Rewards Issue. INV: [Invoice Number] - Dated: [Invoice Date] - [Issue Description].

Rewards Administrator

TO SALES

See CMS SalesPerson for Routing: GEN / Sales Person Code

TOMORROW

WALK IN INVOICE

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2026-05-18T13:42:49.863+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/f8ea6a7e-070d-4f39-b26c-ebc6f0e38ca6" }, { "id": "d81268c9-d123-4504-b611-5c51e2f815b4", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"d81268c9-d123-4504-b611-5c51e2f815b4\",\"title\":\"Payment timelines and processing\",\"content\":\"\nDepartment:\nFinance\nProcess Owner:\nChief Financial Officer\nPURPOSE:\nTo define the standardized timelines and procedures for processing normal and urgent payments, meal allowances, and expense claims.\nWHEN TO USE:\nUse this SOP when processing any outgoing payments to suppliers, sales representatives, or employees for business-related expenses.\nSTEPS:\nProcessing Normal Payments\nSubmit\nvalid Tax Invoices with the correct approval before 12:00 via the designated payment system (currently Expensify).\nAllow\nfor a one-hour lead time for Finance processing.\nConduct\nthe daily payment run at 13:00.\nSchedule\ninvoices submitted or approved after 12:00 for inclusion in the next business day’s 13:00 batch.\nVerify\ncredit terms for specific suppliers to ensure payment aligns with their respective agreements.\n2. Processing Urgent Payments\nSubmit\nthe Tax Invoice via the designated payment system (currently Expensify) before the 15:00 cut-off time.\nNotify\nthe Finance Team immediately that the payment is urgent and requires prioritization.\nMonitor\nfor a one-hour turnaround time from submission to final payment.\nConfirm\nnew timelines if the Finance Team identifies delays due to critical business matters (e.g., month-end).\n3. Processing Recurring Allowances and Claims\nProcess\nMeal Allowances once a week on Fridays for the following week.\nSubmit\nExpense Claims (e.g., car washes, airport parking, printing refunds) via the designated payment system (currently Expensify) to be processed once a week on Fridays.\nSYSTEM ACTIONS:\nSystems used:\nDesignated payment system (currently Expensify).\nRequired updates:\nUpload Tax Invoice; Ensure approval workflow is completed within the system.\nEXPECTED OUTCOME:\nAll payments are processed accurately within defined daily and weekly windows, ensuring suppliers and staff are paid on time while maintaining Finance Team capacity.\nIMPORTANT NOTES:\nResponsibility Disclaimer:\nIt is the responsibility of the submitter and the respective approvers to ensure the accuracy, validity, and completeness of all data and documentation submitted. Finance processes payments based on approved system data.\nUrgency Judgement:\nWhile submitters' determine urgency, urgent payments should not be used as a substitute for proper planning.\nBusiness Priorities:\nCritical matters like month-end payments take precedence and may delay urgent requests.\nNotifications:\nFinance will notify relevant parties in advance of any changes to the standard 13:00 payment run.\nLate Cut-offs:\nNo payments can be made after 16:00.\nRepresentative Responsibility:\nSales representatives are responsible for the appropriate use of their meal allowances.\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"d81268c9-d123-4504-b611-5c51e2f815b4\",\"title\":\"Payment timelines and processing\",\"content\":\"

Department: Finance

Process Owner: Chief Financial Officer

PURPOSE: To define the standardized timelines and procedures for processing normal and urgent payments, meal allowances, and expense claims.

WHEN TO USE: Use this SOP when processing any outgoing payments to suppliers, sales representatives, or employees for business-related expenses.

STEPS:

  1. Processing Normal Payments
  2. Submit valid Tax Invoices with the correct approval before 12:00 via the designated payment system (currently Expensify).
  3. Allow for a one-hour lead time for Finance processing.
  4. Conduct the daily payment run at 13:00.
  5. Schedule invoices submitted or approved after 12:00 for inclusion in the next business day’s 13:00 batch.
  6. Verify credit terms for specific suppliers to ensure payment aligns with their respective agreements.

2. Processing Urgent Payments

  • Submit the Tax Invoice via the designated payment system (currently Expensify) before the 15:00 cut-off time.
  • Notify the Finance Team immediately that the payment is urgent and requires prioritization.
  • Monitor for a one-hour turnaround time from submission to final payment.
  • Confirm new timelines if the Finance Team identifies delays due to critical business matters (e.g., month-end).

3. Processing Recurring Allowances and Claims

  • Process Meal Allowances once a week on Fridays for the following week.
  • Submit Expense Claims (e.g., car washes, airport parking, printing refunds) via the designated payment system (currently Expensify) to be processed once a week on Fridays.

SYSTEM ACTIONS:

  • Systems used: Designated payment system (currently Expensify).
  • Required updates: Upload Tax Invoice; Ensure approval workflow is completed within the system.

EXPECTED OUTCOME: All payments are processed accurately within defined daily and weekly windows, ensuring suppliers and staff are paid on time while maintaining Finance Team capacity.

IMPORTANT NOTES:

  • Responsibility Disclaimer: It is the responsibility of the submitter and the respective approvers to ensure the accuracy, validity, and completeness of all data and documentation submitted. Finance processes payments based on approved system data.
  • Urgency Judgement: While submitters' determine urgency, urgent payments should not be used as a substitute for proper planning.
  • Business Priorities: Critical matters like month-end payments take precedence and may delay urgent requests.
  • Notifications: Finance will notify relevant parties in advance of any changes to the standard 13:00 payment run.
  • Late Cut-offs: No payments can be made after 16:00.
  • Representative Responsibility: Sales representatives are responsible for the appropriate use of their meal allowances.

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [ { "value": "SOP Template", "id": "20027f4a-e23a-4c23-bd9d-c28d2bd2dbc7", "categoryId": "e0751ef6-b3fd-4bd0-babb-3bc7619c24e1", "categoryName": "Support Tags" } ], "last_modified": "2026-05-14T13:37:47.532+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/d81268c9-d123-4504-b611-5c51e2f815b4" }, { "id": "f99d8cba-b891-4b09-9bbf-9ee8bf56c28b", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"f99d8cba-b891-4b09-9bbf-9ee8bf56c28b\",\"title\":\" SmartLoad Transaction Process -SOP\",\"content\":\"\nDepartment:\nFinance / Operations\nProcess Owner:\nFinancial Manager\nEffective Date:\n1 March 2026\nVersion:\n1.0 (February 2026)\nPURPOSE:\nTo establish a controlled, efficient, and transparent process for the request, approval, disbursement, and tracking of all payments processed through the SmartLoad system.\nWHEN TO USE:\nUse this process whenever a payment needs to be loaded onto SmartLoad, including but not limited to:\nPeriodic payments (25th and Month-end commissions/bonuses).\nOperational advances (Sales promotions, airtime transfers).\nExpense reimbursements (Carwash, parking, repairs).\nAdministrative adjustments (Payment rejections, dealer refunds, test SIMs).\nSTEPS:\nPeriodic Commission & Bonus Payments\nPrepare\nthe payment files for 25th payments (Rica/Sales commissions) or Month-end payments (Dealer bonuses, Port bonuses).\nSubmit\nthe completed files to the\nCFO\nfor final approval.\nDocumentation for Daily & Ad-hoc Payments\nFor all other SmartLoad payments, you must compile a \\\"Payment File\\\" containing:\nExport\nthe approved report from\nExpensify\n.\nPrepare\na Batch Excel file formatted for SmartLoad upload.\nGenerate\na PDF version of the Batch Excel file.\nObtain\nthree signatures on the PDF file:\nPreparer\nReviewer\nFinal Reviewer\nVerification of Specific Approvals\nBefore loading, confirm the Expensify export contains the correct management approval based on the payment type:\nPayment Type\nRequired Manager Approval (Expensify)\nPayment Rejections / Dealer Refunds\nFinancial Manager\nInactive Commission / Blocked Payments\nFinancial Manager (must include CMS support)\nSmartLoad Advances (Promotions)\nCSO\nMeal Allowances / Expense Reimbursements\nCSO\nSales Work Transfer / Ad-hoc Payments\nRespective Line Manager\nTest SIMs\nCFO\nSpecialized Tracking (Advances Only)\nUpdate\nthe\nSmartLoad Advance Tracker\nimmediately for any promotional advances.\nMonitor\nthe running balance to ensure the advance is promptly recovered from the sales representative.\nLoading and Processing\nUpload\nthe Batch Excel file into the\nSmartLoad\nsystem.\nProcess\nthe payment only after all signatures are secured and the correct manager has approved the Expensify export.\nSYSTEM ACTIONS:\nSmartLoad:\nUpload Batch Excel files and execute disbursements.\nExpensify:\nExport approved expense reports.\nCMS:\nExtract support data for inactive or blocked commission reloads.\nExcel:\nMaintain the \\\"SmartLoad Advance Tracker.\\\"\nEXPECTED OUTCOME:\nAll payments are disbursed accurately to the correct recipients, supported by a clear audit trail of approvals and signatures, with zero unauthorized transactions.\nIMPORTANT NOTES:\nStrict Approval:\nNo payment may be loaded or processed without the physical/digital signatures of the Preparer, Reviewer, and Final Reviewer.\nDaily Cadence:\nMost ad-hoc payments and rejections must be included in the \\\"Daily Payment Files.\\\"\nRecovery:\nFinance is responsible for tracking the recovery of all SmartLoad advances to sales reps\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"f99d8cba-b891-4b09-9bbf-9ee8bf56c28b\",\"title\":\" SmartLoad Transaction Process -SOP\",\"content\":\"

Department: Finance / Operations

Process Owner: Financial Manager

Effective Date: 1 March 2026

Version: 1.0 (February 2026)

PURPOSE:

To establish a controlled, efficient, and transparent process for the request, approval, disbursement, and tracking of all payments processed through the SmartLoad system.

WHEN TO USE:

Use this process whenever a payment needs to be loaded onto SmartLoad, including but not limited to:

  • Periodic payments (25th and Month-end commissions/bonuses).
  • Operational advances (Sales promotions, airtime transfers).
  • Expense reimbursements (Carwash, parking, repairs).
  • Administrative adjustments (Payment rejections, dealer refunds, test SIMs).

STEPS:

  1. Periodic Commission & Bonus Payments
    • Prepare the payment files for 25th payments (Rica/Sales commissions) or Month-end payments (Dealer bonuses, Port bonuses).
    • Submit the completed files to the CFO for final approval.

  1. Documentation for Daily & Ad-hoc Payments

For all other SmartLoad payments, you must compile a \\\"Payment File\\\" containing:

  • Export the approved report from Expensify.
  • Prepare a Batch Excel file formatted for SmartLoad upload.
  • Generate a PDF version of the Batch Excel file.
  • Obtain three signatures on the PDF file:
    1. Preparer
    2. Reviewer
    3. Final Reviewer

  1. Verification of Specific Approvals

Before loading, confirm the Expensify export contains the correct management approval based on the payment type:

Payment Type

Required Manager Approval (Expensify)

Payment Rejections / Dealer Refunds

Financial Manager

Inactive Commission / Blocked Payments

Financial Manager (must include CMS support)

SmartLoad Advances (Promotions)

CSO

Meal Allowances / Expense Reimbursements

CSO

Sales Work Transfer / Ad-hoc Payments

Respective Line Manager

Test SIMs

CFO

  1. Specialized Tracking (Advances Only)
    • Update the SmartLoad Advance Tracker immediately for any promotional advances.
    • Monitor the running balance to ensure the advance is promptly recovered from the sales representative.

  1. Loading and Processing
    • Upload the Batch Excel file into the SmartLoad system.
    • Process the payment only after all signatures are secured and the correct manager has approved the Expensify export.

SYSTEM ACTIONS:

  • SmartLoad: Upload Batch Excel files and execute disbursements.
  • Expensify: Export approved expense reports.
  • CMS: Extract support data for inactive or blocked commission reloads.
  • Excel: Maintain the \\\"SmartLoad Advance Tracker.\\\"

EXPECTED OUTCOME:

All payments are disbursed accurately to the correct recipients, supported by a clear audit trail of approvals and signatures, with zero unauthorized transactions.

IMPORTANT NOTES:

  • Strict Approval: No payment may be loaded or processed without the physical/digital signatures of the Preparer, Reviewer, and Final Reviewer.
  • Daily Cadence: Most ad-hoc payments and rejections must be included in the \\\"Daily Payment Files.\\\"
  • Recovery: Finance is responsible for tracking the recovery of all SmartLoad advances to sales reps

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [ { "value": "SOP Template", "id": "20027f4a-e23a-4c23-bd9d-c28d2bd2dbc7", "categoryId": "e0751ef6-b3fd-4bd0-babb-3bc7619c24e1", "categoryName": "Support Tags" } ], "last_modified": "2026-05-08T12:52:20.738+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/f99d8cba-b891-4b09-9bbf-9ee8bf56c28b" }, { "id": "c4b71600-e260-45cb-ad68-1d254495e430", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"c4b71600-e260-45cb-ad68-1d254495e430\",\"title\":\"FNB eWallet Pro Card Management - SOP\",\"content\":\"\nSUBTITLE FORMATTING:\nDepartment:\nFinance / Operations\nProcess Owner:\nChief Financial Officer\nVersion:\n3.0 (May 2026)\nSystems:\nFNB Online Banking Portal, CMS, SYSPRO, Internal Shared Drive (Y: Drive)\nPURPOSE:\nTo define the end-to-end process for qualifying agents, issuing individual or batch FNB eWallet Pro Cards, managing PIN resets, processing payments (individual and CSV), and handling card reversals or cancellations.\nWHEN TO USE:\nWhen an agent requests a card via email.\nWhen monthly or ad-hoc payments need to be loaded to cards.\nWhen a card PIN needs to be reset or a card needs to be replaced.\nWhen a cardholder is terminated and funds need to be reversed.\nSTEPS:\n1. Agent Qualification & Pre-Check\nReceive Request:\nMonitor\naccounts@awesim.co.za\nfor agent card requests.\nVerify Identity:\nConfirm the ID/Passport copy is clear and matches the details on\nCMS\n.\nCheck Performance:\nVerify the agent has a minimum of 3 months with >10 activations per month.\nConfirm Timeline:\nInform the agent that allocation takes 2 to 3 working days.\nCommunicate:\nNotify the agent/sales representative if they qualify or not.\n2. Issuing Individual eWallet Pro Cards\nUpdate Register:\nCapture agent details in the \\\"FNB eWallet ProCard Register\\\" on the Finance drive.\nFile Documents:\nSave the ID/Passport copy in the\nPassports-ID’s\nfolder and hyperlink it to the Register.\nNavigate FNB Portal:\nLog in and select\nRecipients\n>\neWallet Pro\n>\nActive Contracts\n>\nAwesim Telecoms\n.\nAdd Recipient:\nSelect\nAdd\n>\nAdd Recipient\n.\nEnter Details:\nComplete all fields including SYSPRO code, Full Name, Cell number, ID Type, and Date of Birth.\nSet Access:\nUnder \\\"Access Details,\\\" select\nCard and Pin\n.\nSave Location:\nSelect\nSave to Folder\n>\nExisting\n>\nAwesim Agents\n(or \\\"Awesim E-wallet\\\" for staff).\nSubmit & Authorise:\nClick\nSubmit\n. Then, navigate to\nRecipient Folders\n, tick the\nSubmit\nbox for the folder, and notify the authoriser.\n3. PIN Management & Resets\nInitial Issuance:\nNote that the PIN is included in the original FNB card envelope; no system action is required for new cards.\nReset Request:\nUpon agent request, navigate to\nRecipients\n>\neWallet Pro\n>\nActive Contracts\n>\nAwesim Telecoms\n>\nActive Wallet\n.\nInitiate Reset:\nSelect\nMaintain\nnext to the specific recipient.\nEnter Mailer Number:\nRetrieve a new sealed FNB PIN envelope. Enter the 9-digit\nMailer Number\nfrom the front of the envelope into the \\\"Pin Mailer Number\\\" field.\nRecord & Log:\nUpdate the Card Register with the Mailer Number and add a comment on\nCMS\n:\n\\\"FNB eWallet Pin reset at Agent request after verifying Agent details.\\\"\nAuthorise:\nSubmit the change for system authorisation.\n4. Loading Payments (Individual)\nOpen Payments:\nSelect\nPayments\nfrom the FNB menu.\nAdd Payment:\nSelect\n+Add\n>\nFrom Folder\n.\nSelect Recipient:\nChoose the \\\"Awesim Agents\\\" folder.\nSet Execution:\nSelect\nSame Day\nservice type (Mandatory for eWallet).\nEnter Amount:\nInput the payment amount and submit for authorisation.\n5. Loading Payments (Batch CSV)\nPrepare File:\nUse the \\\"FNB eWallet Payments - Import Guide Concatenate\\\" template.\nSave Format:\nEnsure the file is saved as a\n.csv\n.\nImport:\nIn the FNB Portal, go to\nBatch Payments\n>\n+Add\n>\nImport\n.\nConfigure:\nSet Statement Entry to\nConsolidated\nand Service Type to\nSame Day\n.\nVerify Upload:\nCheck the FNB\nInbox\nfor the \\\"File import report.\\\" Ensure the status is \\\"SUCCESS.\\\"\nAuthorise:\nNotify two (2) authorisers on Slack (#finance) to approve the batch.\n6. Reversals & Cancellations\nReverse Funds:\nGo to\nRecipients\n>\nAwesim Agents\n>\nActive Wallet\n. Select the recipient and click\nReverse\n. Enter the amount to return funds to the Awesim account.\nDelete Recipient:\nOnce the balance is zero, select the recipient in the Active Wallet and click\nDelete\n.\n7. Issuing Replacement Cards\nNavigate:\nGo to\nRecipients\n>\neWallet Pro\n>\nActive Contracts\n> Click the Contract Name.\nMaintain:\nClick\nMaintain\nnext to the recipient needing a replacement.\nUpdate Card:\nEnter the new card details and\nSubmit\n.\nDispatch:\nFollow the physical dispatch process (Label envelope and hand to Stores).\nSYSTEM ACTIONS:\nFNB Portal:\nRecipient Management, Batch Imports, Payment Authorisation.\nCMS:\nUpdate bank details; Add PIN reset comments.\nFinance Drive:\nUpdate \\\"FNB eWallet ProCard Register\\\"; Archive ID copies.\nCRM:\nUpdate agent banking details once card account numbers are generated.\nDropdown Selections:\nService Type:\nAlways select \\\"Same Day\\\".\nAccess Mechanism:\nAlways select \\\"Card and Pin\\\".\nStatement Entry:\n\\\"Consolidated\\\" for batches.\nEXPECTED OUTCOME:\nAgents receive functional cards and PINs within 3 working days of a valid request.\nPayments are accurately loaded with correct fee deductions (R25 issue fee / R10 bank fee).\nRegisters and CMS records are kept 100% up to date.\nIMPORTANT NOTES:\nFees:\nA R25 issuance fee is deducted from the\nfirst\npayment. A R10 bank fee applies to\nevery\npayment.\nSafety:\nNever select \\\"Cellphone\\\" access; \\\"Card and Pin\\\" is mandatory to prevent unauthorized withdrawals.\nAuthorisation:\nCard issuance and payments require two levels of approval.\nCSV Formatting:\nID numbers must be 13 digits (pad with zeros if necessary). Telephone prefixes must be 3 digits (e.g., 083).\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"c4b71600-e260-45cb-ad68-1d254495e430\",\"title\":\"FNB eWallet Pro Card Management - SOP\",\"content\":\"

SUBTITLE FORMATTING:

Department: Finance / Operations

Process Owner: Chief Financial Officer

Version: 3.0 (May 2026)

Systems: FNB Online Banking Portal, CMS, SYSPRO, Internal Shared Drive (Y: Drive)

PURPOSE:

To define the end-to-end process for qualifying agents, issuing individual or batch FNB eWallet Pro Cards, managing PIN resets, processing payments (individual and CSV), and handling card reversals or cancellations.

WHEN TO USE:

  • When an agent requests a card via email.
  • When monthly or ad-hoc payments need to be loaded to cards.
  • When a card PIN needs to be reset or a card needs to be replaced.
  • When a cardholder is terminated and funds need to be reversed.

STEPS:

1. Agent Qualification & Pre-Check

  1. Receive Request: Monitor accounts@awesim.co.za for agent card requests.
  2. Verify Identity: Confirm the ID/Passport copy is clear and matches the details on CMS.
  3. Check Performance: Verify the agent has a minimum of 3 months with >10 activations per month.
  4. Confirm Timeline: Inform the agent that allocation takes 2 to 3 working days.
  5. Communicate: Notify the agent/sales representative if they qualify or not.

2. Issuing Individual eWallet Pro Cards

  1. Update Register: Capture agent details in the \\\"FNB eWallet ProCard Register\\\" on the Finance drive.
  2. File Documents: Save the ID/Passport copy in the Passports-ID’s folder and hyperlink it to the Register.
  3. Navigate FNB Portal: Log in and select Recipients > eWallet Pro > Active Contracts > Awesim Telecoms.
  4. Add Recipient: Select Add > Add Recipient.
  5. Enter Details: Complete all fields including SYSPRO code, Full Name, Cell number, ID Type, and Date of Birth.
  6. Set Access: Under \\\"Access Details,\\\" select Card and Pin.
  7. Save Location: Select Save to Folder > Existing > Awesim Agents (or \\\"Awesim E-wallet\\\" for staff).
  8. Submit & Authorise: Click Submit. Then, navigate to Recipient Folders, tick the Submit box for the folder, and notify the authoriser.

3. PIN Management & Resets

  1. Initial Issuance: Note that the PIN is included in the original FNB card envelope; no system action is required for new cards.
  2. Reset Request: Upon agent request, navigate to Recipients > eWallet Pro > Active Contracts > Awesim Telecoms > Active Wallet.
  3. Initiate Reset: Select Maintain next to the specific recipient.
  4. Enter Mailer Number: Retrieve a new sealed FNB PIN envelope. Enter the 9-digit Mailer Number from the front of the envelope into the \\\"Pin Mailer Number\\\" field.
  5. Record & Log: Update the Card Register with the Mailer Number and add a comment on CMS: \\\"FNB eWallet Pin reset at Agent request after verifying Agent details.\\\"
  6. Authorise: Submit the change for system authorisation.

4. Loading Payments (Individual)

  1. Open Payments: Select Payments from the FNB menu.
  2. Add Payment: Select +Add > From Folder.
  3. Select Recipient: Choose the \\\"Awesim Agents\\\" folder.
  4. Set Execution: Select Same Day service type (Mandatory for eWallet).
  5. Enter Amount: Input the payment amount and submit for authorisation.

5. Loading Payments (Batch CSV)

  1. Prepare File: Use the \\\"FNB eWallet Payments - Import Guide Concatenate\\\" template.
  2. Save Format: Ensure the file is saved as a .csv.
  3. Import: In the FNB Portal, go to Batch Payments > +Add > Import.
  4. Configure: Set Statement Entry to Consolidated and Service Type to Same Day.
  5. Verify Upload: Check the FNB Inbox for the \\\"File import report.\\\" Ensure the status is \\\"SUCCESS.\\\"
  6. Authorise: Notify two (2) authorisers on Slack (#finance) to approve the batch.

6. Reversals & Cancellations

  1. Reverse Funds: Go to Recipients > Awesim Agents > Active Wallet. Select the recipient and click Reverse. Enter the amount to return funds to the Awesim account.
  2. Delete Recipient: Once the balance is zero, select the recipient in the Active Wallet and click Delete.

7. Issuing Replacement Cards

  1. Navigate: Go to Recipients > eWallet Pro > Active Contracts > Click the Contract Name.
  2. Maintain: Click Maintain next to the recipient needing a replacement.
  3. Update Card: Enter the new card details and Submit.
  4. Dispatch: Follow the physical dispatch process (Label envelope and hand to Stores).

SYSTEM ACTIONS:

  • FNB Portal: Recipient Management, Batch Imports, Payment Authorisation.
  • CMS: Update bank details; Add PIN reset comments.
  • Finance Drive: Update \\\"FNB eWallet ProCard Register\\\"; Archive ID copies.
  • CRM: Update agent banking details once card account numbers are generated.

Dropdown Selections:

  • Service Type: Always select \\\"Same Day\\\".
  • Access Mechanism: Always select \\\"Card and Pin\\\".
  • Statement Entry: \\\"Consolidated\\\" for batches.

EXPECTED OUTCOME:

  • Agents receive functional cards and PINs within 3 working days of a valid request.
  • Payments are accurately loaded with correct fee deductions (R25 issue fee / R10 bank fee).
  • Registers and CMS records are kept 100% up to date.

IMPORTANT NOTES:

  • Fees: A R25 issuance fee is deducted from the first payment. A R10 bank fee applies to every payment.
  • Safety: Never select \\\"Cellphone\\\" access; \\\"Card and Pin\\\" is mandatory to prevent unauthorized withdrawals.
  • Authorisation: Card issuance and payments require two levels of approval.
  • CSV Formatting: ID numbers must be 13 digits (pad with zeros if necessary). Telephone prefixes must be 3 digits (e.g., 083).

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [ { "value": "Help_Centre", "id": "74bde7f7-b10f-4f0b-b19d-818ac541c4b5", "categoryId": "e0751ef6-b3fd-4bd0-babb-3bc7619c24e1", "categoryName": "Support Tags" } ], "last_modified": "2026-05-08T07:17:20.697+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/c4b71600-e260-45cb-ad68-1d254495e430" }, { "id": "ce79205a-0fd7-48af-9160-c30068c91b82", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"ce79205a-0fd7-48af-9160-c30068c91b82\",\"title\":\"Awesim's Telkom Winter 50/50 incentive - is back! \",\"content\":\"\nAwesim's Telkom Winter 50/50 Special is back! Live as of 1 May 2026\nGet R50* per activation for at least R50 spend. ONLY on Awesim's Telkom SIMs (\nexcluding\npre-loaded Klipa SIMs)\nFor 3 months ONLY:-\nMay 2026\nJune 2026\nJuly 2026\n*R50 payment = R30 normal activation payment\nPLUS R20 extra payment!\nExtra R20 paid\nseparately\n, before the end of the month, after activation.\nFor example:-\nA May activation that spent at least R50 and is a REAL customer\n= R30 activation payment on the 25th June\n+ R20 extra payment before the end of June\nImportant Details:\nImportant to RICA, Connect and Recharge the Telkom Starters to\nREAL Customers Only\n, in order to qualify.\nREAL Customers continue to recharge and use the SIM.\nSIMs must activate and spend at least R50 in the SAME MONTH.\nIt will be paid the same way as you get paid your activation payments. Example: SmartLoad\nView our\nTerms & Conditions\nE&OE – We do our best to keep details accurate.\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"ce79205a-0fd7-48af-9160-c30068c91b82\",\"title\":\"Awesim's Telkom Winter 50/50 incentive - is back! \",\"content\":\"

Awesim's Telkom Winter 50/50 Special is back! Live as of 1 May 2026

Get R50* per activation for at least R50 spend. ONLY on Awesim's Telkom SIMs (excluding pre-loaded Klipa SIMs)

For 3 months ONLY:-

  • May 2026
  • June 2026
  • July 2026

*R50 payment = R30 normal activation payment PLUS R20 extra payment!
Extra R20 paid separately, before the end of the month, after activation.

For example:-
A May activation that spent at least R50 and is a REAL customer

= R30 activation payment on the 25th June
+ R20 extra payment before the end of June

Important Details:

  • Important to RICA, Connect and Recharge the Telkom Starters to REAL Customers Only, in order to qualify.
  • REAL Customers continue to recharge and use the SIM.
  • SIMs must activate and spend at least R50 in the SAME MONTH.
  • It will be paid the same way as you get paid your activation payments. Example: SmartLoad


View our Terms & Conditions
E&OE – We do our best to keep details accurate.

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [ { "value": "promotion", "id": "782a8068-7585-44c1-8828-7ba6d78155ef", "categoryId": "877b2ec0-0822-48f7-ac44-e37af6584b8d", "categoryName": "Tags" }, { "value": "Telkom", "id": "56efb4ed-0f90-4d14-b2fd-cb730b3d2b9a", "categoryId": "e0751ef6-b3fd-4bd0-babb-3bc7619c24e1", "categoryName": "Support Tags" } ], "last_modified": "2026-05-07T14:10:36.891+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/ce79205a-0fd7-48af-9160-c30068c91b82" }, { "id": "0532df50-d82d-4459-a220-d4e56601a365", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"0532df50-d82d-4459-a220-d4e56601a365\",\"title\":\"WhatsApp (via Twilio) Auto Response \",\"content\":\"\nHello!\nThank you for contacting AWESIM!\nYour message has been received and is now in the queue.\nPlease reply based on how we can help you:\n1.\n\\t\nNEW AGENT: If you’re interested in joining us as a RICA Agent, **please send** us the required information found here: [Getting Started Guide](\nhttps://app.getguru.com/card/iMzAAxET/AWESIM-RICA-Agent-Getting-Started-\n)\n\\t\n•\n\\t\nThe **cellphone number** for RICA registration\n\\t\n•\n\\t\nA clear **photo** of your **ID / Passport**\n\\t\n•\n\\t\nA **photo** of you holding your **ID / Passport next to your face**\n\\t\n•\n\\t\n**Proof of address** which must display your name and be no older than 3 months.\n2.\n\\t\nEXISTING AGENT: **Reply \\\"Order\\\"** if you are unable to order on the App.\nOtherwise download, order and confirm delivery on the App for 60 Reward Points.\nDownload on the [Google Play Store](\nhttps://tinyurl.com/Awesim-App-Google-Play\n) or [Huawei App Store](\nhttps://tinyurl.com/Huawei-App-Store\n)\n3.\n\\t\nEXISTING AGENT: **Reply \\\"Support\\\"** for customer care assistance.\nOur Business Hours are Monday to Friday, 08:00 - 17:00.\nThank you for your patience.\nChat Extension – No Reply\nTo prevent WhatsApp chat closure due to WhatsApp Business Platform customer service window rules, an approved WhatsApp template message (“via Twilio”) will automatically be sent if the agent has not responded within approximately 24 hours from their last inbound message.\nThe automated message will contain two response buttons for the agent to select from.\nTemplate Message:\nHello AWESIM AGENT: {{1}} [CODE or MSISDN].\nWe replied to your query on SR #{{2}} and need a reply.\nPlease click one of the options below:\nButton 1: Yes, I was helped\nThe SR will automatically be closed and Customer Service rating survey link sent.\nTemplate Message:\nThank you for confirming that you were helped. This session has been closed. Kindly rate our service here: https://www.surveymonkey.com/r/BGDNK6Z\nButton 2: No, I need help\nThe SR will reappear in the active queue for further assistance.\nWhatsApp CHAT Opt-In / Re-initiation RULE\nIn line with WhatsApp Business Platform (via Twilio) messaging rules, Awesim may only send WhatsApp chat responses within an active 24-hour customer service window.\nIf there is no active chat, or the agent has not replied within the required timeframe and the WhatsApp session closes, Awesim will send an\napproved\nWhatsApp template message via Twilio to initiate or re-initiate contact using the CMS Awesim Messenger\n\\\"Start Chat\\\"\nbutton.\nThe agent must respond (Opt In) to the template message (example: “CHAT”) to reopen the WhatsApp customer service window. Once the agent replies, the consultant may continue assisting the agent via normal WhatsApp chat.\nTemplate Message:\nHello AWESIM AGENT: {{1}} [CODE or MSISDN]. We recently tried to contact you about SR # {{2}}. If you would rather WhatsApp chat, reply with the word CHAT.\nEnd Chat Button\nTemplate Message:\nWe have closed this Service Request because we believe we have resolved your query. Kindly rate our service here: https://www.surveymonkey.com/r/BGDNK6Z Need more help? Send us a WhatsApp message to start a new session. WhatsApp Message\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"0532df50-d82d-4459-a220-d4e56601a365\",\"title\":\"WhatsApp (via Twilio) Auto Response \",\"content\":\"


Hello!

Thank you for contacting AWESIM!

Your message has been received and is now in the queue.

Please reply based on how we can help you:

1.\\tNEW AGENT: If you’re interested in joining us as a RICA Agent, **please send** us the required information found here: [Getting Started Guide](https://app.getguru.com/card/iMzAAxET/AWESIM-RICA-Agent-Getting-Started-)

\\t•\\tThe **cellphone number** for RICA registration

\\t•\\tA clear **photo** of your **ID / Passport**

\\t•\\tA **photo** of you holding your **ID / Passport next to your face**

\\t•\\t**Proof of address** which must display your name and be no older than 3 months.

2.\\tEXISTING AGENT: **Reply \\\"Order\\\"** if you are unable to order on the App.

Otherwise download, order and confirm delivery on the App for 60 Reward Points.

Download on the [Google Play Store](https://tinyurl.com/Awesim-App-Google-Play) or [Huawei App Store](https://tinyurl.com/Huawei-App-Store)

3.\\tEXISTING AGENT: **Reply \\\"Support\\\"** for customer care assistance.

Our Business Hours are Monday to Friday, 08:00 - 17:00.

Thank you for your patience.

Chat Extension – No Reply

To prevent WhatsApp chat closure due to WhatsApp Business Platform customer service window rules, an approved WhatsApp template message (“via Twilio”) will automatically be sent if the agent has not responded within approximately 24 hours from their last inbound message.

The automated message will contain two response buttons for the agent to select from.

Template Message:

Hello AWESIM AGENT: {{1}} [CODE or MSISDN].

We replied to your query on SR #{{2}} and need a reply.

Please click one of the options below:

Button 1: Yes, I was helped

  • The SR will automatically be closed and Customer Service rating survey link sent.

Template Message:

Thank you for confirming that you were helped. This session has been closed. Kindly rate our service here: https://www.surveymonkey.com/r/BGDNK6Z

Button 2: No, I need help

  • The SR will reappear in the active queue for further assistance.



WhatsApp CHAT Opt-In / Re-initiation RULE

In line with WhatsApp Business Platform (via Twilio) messaging rules, Awesim may only send WhatsApp chat responses within an active 24-hour customer service window.

If there is no active chat, or the agent has not replied within the required timeframe and the WhatsApp session closes, Awesim will send an approved WhatsApp template message via Twilio to initiate or re-initiate contact using the CMS Awesim Messenger \\\"Start Chat\\\" button.

The agent must respond (Opt In) to the template message (example: “CHAT”) to reopen the WhatsApp customer service window. Once the agent replies, the consultant may continue assisting the agent via normal WhatsApp chat.

Template Message:

Hello AWESIM AGENT: {{1}} [CODE or MSISDN]. We recently tried to contact you about SR # {{2}}. If you would rather WhatsApp chat, reply with the word CHAT.

End Chat Button


Template Message:

We have closed this Service Request because we believe we have resolved your query. Kindly rate our service here: https://www.surveymonkey.com/r/BGDNK6Z Need more help? Send us a WhatsApp message to start a new session. WhatsApp Message

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2026-05-07T09:19:58.664+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/0532df50-d82d-4459-a220-d4e56601a365" }, { "id": "7b811e18-8f41-4417-a6b3-fef679872789", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"7b811e18-8f41-4417-a6b3-fef679872789\",\"title\":\"FNB eWallet Pro Card Balance Enquiry\",\"content\":\"\nYou can check your balance directly on the FNB site:\nGo to:\nCheck eWallet Pro Balance\nEnter:\nYour\ncard number\nYour\nPIN\nClick\n“View Balance”\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"7b811e18-8f41-4417-a6b3-fef679872789\",\"title\":\"FNB eWallet Pro Card Balance Enquiry\",\"content\":\"

You can check your balance directly on the FNB site:

  • Go to: Check eWallet Pro Balance
  • Enter:
    • Your card number
    • Your PIN
  • Click “View Balance”

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2026-05-05T10:34:20.099+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/7b811e18-8f41-4417-a6b3-fef679872789" }, { "id": "b1ceac79-29ab-43bf-9498-c655fb372b84", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"b1ceac79-29ab-43bf-9498-c655fb372b84\",\"title\":\"CC SUP SR Handling: Expired & On Hold Account – Recycled Number Handling SOP \",\"content\":\"\nThis Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) is effective immediately and compliance is mandatory. Please note this SOP is not exhaustive and may not cover every possible scenario. Non-compliance may result in disciplinary action.\nPURPOSE\nTo outline the correct steps when a recycled mobile number is linked to an expired or \\\"on-hold\\\" account, ensuring the number is accurately reassigned to the verified agent and service continuity is maintained.\nWHEN TO USE\nWhen a mobile number previously linked to an expired/on-hold account has been recycled.\nWhen a new or existing agent has successfully verified ownership of that recycled number using valid identification documents.\nSTEPS\n1. Verify Ownership\nConfirm\nagent ownership by matching the provided ID documents against the applicant.\nCross-check\nthat these details match existing CRM or CMS records.\n2. Remove Number from the Expired Account\nSearch\nfor the expired agent code or account in the\nCRM\n.\nSelect\n\\\"Edit\\\" on the account profile.\nDelete\nthe mobile number from the CRM record to blank.\nClick\n\\\"Save.\\\"\nReturn to CMS -\nOpen\na new Service Request (SR) \\\"Old Code\\\" to track the reassignment.\nCapture SR Comment for audit purposes.\nCMS SR Comment:\n27846481820 removed from Expired Code: RKZ0426. DLS: 2019-02-19. Number recycled. See active Code AWA2377 for history.\nDropDown:\nRESOLVED\n3. add Number to the Correct Account\nDoes agent have an active account?\n→ YES → Add number + route Live SR = Active interaction where chat continues with correct account after relinking.\n→ NO → Route \\\"Blank\\\" Code to CC → Create new account\nCapture SR Comment for audit purposes.\nCMS SR Comment:\n27846481820 removed from Expired Code: RKZ0426. Chat linked to verified Code: AWA2377. Please proceed to revive account (upload Verification Docs needed)\nDropDown:\nRETURN CHAT\n⚠️ IMPORTANT RULE\nTwilio relinking must be done\noutside\nof the Live SR.\nDo NOT attempt to relink while inside an active SR.\n4. Update Twilio Linking\n(CRITICAL)\nUnlink\nand /or\nRelink\nthe number to the new/correct agent code. See \\\"Twilio Linking SOP\\\"\nReturn to the Live SR\nRe-open the Service Request\nContinue handling\nEXPECTED OUTCOME\nThe recycled number is successfully moved from the defunct account to the verified agent's account. Previous chat history links automatically, and the agent can resume operations under a Live SR.\nIMPORTANT NOTES\nVerification First:\nNever proceed with reassignment if ID verification is incomplete or unclear.\nTraceability:\nEnsure clear comments are left on the SR at every stage for audit purposes.\nHELP CENTRE IMPACT\n[Yes]\nCUSTOMER IMPACT:\nAgents with recycled numbers may experience a delay in app access or communication until the manual linking is corrected.\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"b1ceac79-29ab-43bf-9498-c655fb372b84\",\"title\":\"CC SUP SR Handling: Expired & On Hold Account – Recycled Number Handling SOP \",\"content\":\"

This Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) is effective immediately and compliance is mandatory. Please note this SOP is not exhaustive and may not cover every possible scenario. Non-compliance may result in disciplinary action.

PURPOSE

To outline the correct steps when a recycled mobile number is linked to an expired or \\\"on-hold\\\" account, ensuring the number is accurately reassigned to the verified agent and service continuity is maintained.

WHEN TO USE

  • When a mobile number previously linked to an expired/on-hold account has been recycled.
  • When a new or existing agent has successfully verified ownership of that recycled number using valid identification documents.

STEPS

1. Verify Ownership

  • Confirm agent ownership by matching the provided ID documents against the applicant.
  • Cross-check that these details match existing CRM or CMS records.

2. Remove Number from the Expired Account

  • Search for the expired agent code or account in the CRM.
  • Select \\\"Edit\\\" on the account profile.
  • Delete the mobile number from the CRM record to blank.
  • Click \\\"Save.\\\"
  • Return to CMS - Open a new Service Request (SR) \\\"Old Code\\\" to track the reassignment.

Capture SR Comment for audit purposes.
CMS SR Comment: 27846481820 removed from Expired Code: RKZ0426. DLS: 2019-02-19. Number recycled. See active Code AWA2377 for history.
DropDown: RESOLVED

3. add Number to the Correct Account

  • Does agent have an active account?
    → YES → Add number + route Live SR = Active interaction where chat continues with correct account after relinking.
    → NO → Route \\\"Blank\\\" Code to CC → Create new account

Capture SR Comment for audit purposes.
CMS SR Comment: 27846481820 removed from Expired Code: RKZ0426. Chat linked to verified Code: AWA2377. Please proceed to revive account (upload Verification Docs needed)
DropDown: RETURN CHAT

⚠️ IMPORTANT RULE

Twilio relinking must be done outside of the Live SR.
Do NOT attempt to relink while inside an active SR.

4. Update Twilio Linking (CRITICAL)

  • Unlink and /or Relink the number to the new/correct agent code. See \\\"Twilio Linking SOP\\\"
  • Return to the Live SR
    • Re-open the Service Request
    • Continue handling

EXPECTED OUTCOME

The recycled number is successfully moved from the defunct account to the verified agent's account. Previous chat history links automatically, and the agent can resume operations under a Live SR.

IMPORTANT NOTES

  • Verification First: Never proceed with reassignment if ID verification is incomplete or unclear.
  • Traceability: Ensure clear comments are left on the SR at every stage for audit purposes.

HELP CENTRE IMPACT

[Yes]

  • CUSTOMER IMPACT: Agents with recycled numbers may experience a delay in app access or communication until the manual linking is corrected.

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2026-04-22T10:13:58.382+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/b1ceac79-29ab-43bf-9498-c655fb372b84" }, { "id": "9dad711b-63f6-4e44-92a9-6ef38071f6c8", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"9dad711b-63f6-4e44-92a9-6ef38071f6c8\",\"title\":\"Customer Care Lunch Break Schedule\",\"content\":\"\nSTANDARD OPERATING PROCEDURE\nThe following is a Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) that must be followed as of the date of issue. Non-compliance to this document and/or instruction may result in disciplinary action. Should you have any queries in regard to this SOP, you are required to address same with management immediately.\nPURPOSE\nTo outline clear guidelines for lunch breaks within the Customer Care unit to ensure employee well-being, maintain productivity, and provide continuous service to agents and internal stakeholders.\nPolicy Guidelines\nBreak duration and Timing:\nEmployees are entitled to 1 hour lunch break per shift of which is inclusive of tea/coffee/restroom and smoke breaks.\nThe hour can be split throughout the production day as needed.\nThis should occur in conjunction with the Awesim\ncode of conduct\n.\nLunch coverage should not at anytime interrupt and stagnant operational workflow.\nConfirmed Lunch Schedule\nEmployees must follow the below mentioned assigned lunch break schedule to maintain adequate team coverage;\nName & Surname\nStart Shift\nStart Lunch\nEnd Lunch\nEnd Shift\nLanguages\nDavid Mokopela\n08H00am\n13H00pm\n14H00pm\n17H00pm\nXitsonga & Venda\nJabulile Dlamini\n07H00am\nAd Hoc (07H40):\nMonday\nWednesday\nThursday\n13H00pm\n14H00pm\n16H00pm\nIsizulu\nPheteni Mhlongo\n07H00am\n13H00pm\n14H00pm\n16H00pm\nEnglish & Vernacular\nPulane Mabala\n08H00am\n13H00pm\n14H00pm\n16H00pm\nEnglish, Sesotho & Setswana\nRiaan Rikhotso\n08H00am\n12H00pm\n13H00pm\n17H00pm\nEnglish, isizulu, Sepedi, Sesotho & Setswana\nSophie Hlokwe\n07H00am\n12H00pm\n13H00pm\n16H00pm\nIsixhosa, Sesotho, Setswana, Sepedi & English\nThandi Ndinisa\n08H00am\n12H00pm\n13H00pm\n17H00pm\nEnglish, Isixhosa, Isizulu, Sepedi, Sesotho & Setswana\nVusi Tshabalala\n08H00am\n12H30pm\n13H30pm\n17H00pm\nIsizulu, English & Setswana\nCarolina Mahlangu\n08H00am\n11H00am\n12H00pm\n17H00pm\nEnglish, Isizulu & Sotho\nMelida Mashori\n07H00am\n12H00pm\n13H00pm\n16H00pm\nEnglish, Isizulu, Sotho, Setswana & Sepedi\nEuphoria pause codes during lunch and office spring cleaning\nAs part of our standard operating procedures, employees must use the appropriate below stipulated\nEuphoria pause codes\nwhen taking a lunch break and when there is office spring cleaning - to ensure accurate status tracking and operational efficiency;\nTake note of the below office spring cleaning schedule:\nCLEANING TIME SLOTS\nWEDNESDAY\n10H30am - 10H45am\nReception Area\n10H45am - 11H15am\nCC Office\nBelow are the recess type along with related Euphoria pause code:\nRECESS TYPE\nEUPHORIA PAUSE CODE TO USE\nOffice Cleaning\nOffice Spring Clean\nWater / Coffee / Break\nCoffee / Tea Break\nLunch Break\nLunch Break\nSmoke Break\nSmoke Break\nBathroom\nLoo Break\nResume Work and Update Status\nOnce the break is over, employees must log back in and update their status to indicate availability.\nIf there are system issues preventing status updates, employees must notify their supervisor immediately.\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"9dad711b-63f6-4e44-92a9-6ef38071f6c8\",\"title\":\"Customer Care Lunch Break Schedule\",\"content\":\"

STANDARD OPERATING PROCEDURE

The following is a Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) that must be followed as of the date of issue. Non-compliance to this document and/or instruction may result in disciplinary action. Should you have any queries in regard to this SOP, you are required to address same with management immediately.

PURPOSE

To outline clear guidelines for lunch breaks within the Customer Care unit to ensure employee well-being, maintain productivity, and provide continuous service to agents and internal stakeholders.

Policy Guidelines

  1. Break duration and Timing:
    1. Employees are entitled to 1 hour lunch break per shift of which is inclusive of tea/coffee/restroom and smoke breaks.
      1. The hour can be split throughout the production day as needed.
      2. This should occur in conjunction with the Awesim code of conduct.
  2. Lunch coverage should not at anytime interrupt and stagnant operational workflow.

Confirmed Lunch Schedule

  1. Employees must follow the below mentioned assigned lunch break schedule to maintain adequate team coverage;

Name & Surname

Start Shift

Start Lunch

End Lunch

End Shift

Languages

David Mokopela

08H00am

13H00pm

14H00pm

17H00pm

Xitsonga & Venda

Jabulile Dlamini

07H00am

Ad Hoc (07H40):
Monday
Wednesday
Thursday

13H00pm

14H00pm

16H00pm

Isizulu

Pheteni Mhlongo

07H00am

13H00pm

14H00pm

16H00pm

English & Vernacular

Pulane Mabala

08H00am

13H00pm

14H00pm

16H00pm

English, Sesotho & Setswana

Riaan Rikhotso

08H00am

12H00pm

13H00pm

17H00pm

English, isizulu, Sepedi, Sesotho & Setswana

Sophie Hlokwe

07H00am

12H00pm

13H00pm

16H00pm

Isixhosa, Sesotho, Setswana, Sepedi & English

Thandi Ndinisa

08H00am

12H00pm

13H00pm

17H00pm

English, Isixhosa, Isizulu, Sepedi, Sesotho & Setswana

Vusi Tshabalala

08H00am

12H30pm

13H30pm

17H00pm

Isizulu, English & Setswana

Carolina Mahlangu

08H00am

11H00am

12H00pm

17H00pm

English, Isizulu & Sotho

Melida Mashori

07H00am

12H00pm

13H00pm

16H00pm

English, Isizulu, Sotho, Setswana & Sepedi

Euphoria pause codes during lunch and office spring cleaning

  1. As part of our standard operating procedures, employees must use the appropriate below stipulated Euphoria pause codes when taking a lunch break and when there is office spring cleaning - to ensure accurate status tracking and operational efficiency;
  2. Take note of the below office spring cleaning schedule:

CLEANING TIME SLOTS

WEDNESDAY

10H30am - 10H45am

Reception Area

10H45am - 11H15am

CC Office

  1. Below are the recess type along with related Euphoria pause code:

RECESS TYPE

EUPHORIA PAUSE CODE TO USE

Office Cleaning

Office Spring Clean

Water / Coffee / Break

Coffee / Tea Break

Lunch Break

Lunch Break

Smoke Break

Smoke Break

Bathroom

Loo Break

Resume Work and Update Status

  1. Once the break is over, employees must log back in and update their status to indicate availability.
  2. If there are system issues preventing status updates, employees must notify their supervisor immediately.

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2026-04-21T11:13:07.709+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/9dad711b-63f6-4e44-92a9-6ef38071f6c8" }, { "id": "4a03820b-ebef-483a-b7e7-012f19ab9b14", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"4a03820b-ebef-483a-b7e7-012f19ab9b14\",\"title\":\"RICA Requirement: Update Expired Passport & Selfie (From 1 May 2026)\",\"content\":\"\nIMPORTANT\nNotice from Smartcall - don't be blocked from RICA!\nFrom 1 MAY 2026\nTo be able to RICA, Agents must have uploaded a valid passport and selfie with the passport on\nonline.smartcall.co.za\n>\nSteps:\n> Smartload\n> Dealer Registration\n> Upload docs\nContact\nSmartcall Support\nif you have any questions.\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"4a03820b-ebef-483a-b7e7-012f19ab9b14\",\"title\":\"RICA Requirement: Update Expired Passport & Selfie (From 1 May 2026)\",\"content\":\"

IMPORTANT

Notice from Smartcall - don't be blocked from RICA!

From 1 MAY 2026

To be able to RICA, Agents must have uploaded a valid passport and selfie with the passport on online.smartcall.co.za>

Steps:
> Smartload
> Dealer Registration
> Upload docs

Contact Smartcall Support if you have any questions.

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2026-04-20T12:23:13.783+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/4a03820b-ebef-483a-b7e7-012f19ab9b14" }, { "id": "c0d650c8-0fc2-49a6-8d01-354aa478a1f8", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"c0d650c8-0fc2-49a6-8d01-354aa478a1f8\",\"title\":\"Pre-Loaded LTE Data Sims available to buy on the app\",\"content\":\"\nTop-performing agents can now order\nPre-loaded LTE Data SIMs\nfor\nReward Points\nonly on the\nAwesim app!\nSim Type\nData Included\nValidity of Data\nRewards Points Cost\nRecommended Selling Price\nTelkom Pre-Loaded LTE Data Sim (Klipa)\n6GB\n(3 GB Anytime + 3 GB Night)\n14 Days\n30\nR49\nCell C Pre-Loaded LTE Data Sim\n4GB\n(2 GB Anytime + 2 GB Night)\n14 Days\n25\nR45\nVodacom Pre-Loaded LTE Data Sim\n4GB\n(2 GB Anytime + 2 GB Night)\n7 Days\n20\nR35\nTelkom Sims - Extra info:\nEach KLIPA SIM comes pre-loaded with\n6 GB LTE data\n(3 GB Anytime + 3 GB Night) valued at\nR49\n.\nSome KLIPA SIMs are\nLucky SIMs\n🎉 — these include\n15 GB LTE data\n(7.5 GB Anytime + 7.5 GB Night) valued at\nR99\n.\nHow long is my data valid?\n3GB (Anytime) + 3GB (Night) Bundle:\n14 days from the date it is loaded.\n7.5GB + 7.5GB (Lucky KLIPA):\nAnytime data: 61 days from the date it is loaded\nNight Surfer data: 31 days from the date it is loaded\nDo SIM cards expire?\nSIM cards do not expire, but\nPre-Loaded LTE Data SIMs can be\ndeactivated and the number recycled\nif the SIM has\nno usage for a long period.\nMake sure you use or recharge your SIM regularly so it stays active.\n📢 Important Information\nPre-Loaded LTE Data should\nbe sold for cash\nby the agent and the agent gets to keep that cash.\nPre-Loaded LTE Data SIMs\ndo not\nqualify\nfor activation payments on the 25th.\nPre-Loaded LTE Data SIMs\ndo not\nqualify\nfor 50/50 payments.\nPre-Loaded LTE Data SIMs\ndo qualify\nfor\nMonth-End Bonuses\n.\n💸\nThere is a\nlimited number available\nper agent each month. Limited to 50 SIMs per agent.\nPre-Loaded LTE Data SIMs are available as\nBuy SIMs\nin the Awesim App — listed under:\nTelkom LTE Data Starters\nVodacom LTE Data Starters\nCell C LTE Data Starters\n⭐\nTop-performing agents\nwho already receive Pre-Loaded LTE Data SIMs for free will continue to do so — and can also buy extra.\nView our\nTerms & Conditions\nE&OE – We do our best to keep details accurate.\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"c0d650c8-0fc2-49a6-8d01-354aa478a1f8\",\"title\":\"Pre-Loaded LTE Data Sims available to buy on the app\",\"content\":\"

Top-performing agents can now order Pre-loaded LTE Data SIMs for Reward Points only on the Awesim app!

Sim Type

Data Included

Validity of Data

Rewards Points Cost

Recommended Selling Price

Telkom Pre-Loaded LTE Data Sim (Klipa)

6GB
(3 GB Anytime + 3 GB Night)

14 Days

30

R49

Cell C Pre-Loaded LTE Data Sim

4GB
(2 GB Anytime + 2 GB Night)

14 Days

25

R45

Vodacom Pre-Loaded LTE Data Sim

4GB
(2 GB Anytime + 2 GB Night)

7 Days

20

R35

Telkom Sims - Extra info:

Each KLIPA SIM comes pre-loaded with 6 GB LTE data (3 GB Anytime + 3 GB Night) valued at R49.
Some KLIPA SIMs are Lucky SIMs 🎉 — these include 15 GB LTE data (7.5 GB Anytime + 7.5 GB Night) valued at R99.

How long is my data valid?

  • 3GB (Anytime) + 3GB (Night) Bundle: 14 days from the date it is loaded.
  • 7.5GB + 7.5GB (Lucky KLIPA):
    • Anytime data: 61 days from the date it is loaded
    • Night Surfer data: 31 days from the date it is loaded

Do SIM cards expire?

  • SIM cards do not expire, but
  • Pre-Loaded LTE Data SIMs can be deactivated and the number recycled if the SIM has no usage for a long period. Make sure you use or recharge your SIM regularly so it stays active.

📢 Important Information

  • Pre-Loaded LTE Data should be sold for cash by the agent and the agent gets to keep that cash.
  • Pre-Loaded LTE Data SIMs do not qualify for activation payments on the 25th.
  • Pre-Loaded LTE Data SIMs do not qualify for 50/50 payments.
  • Pre-Loaded LTE Data SIMs do qualify for Month-End Bonuses. 💸
  • There is a limited number available per agent each month. Limited to 50 SIMs per agent.
  • Pre-Loaded LTE Data SIMs are available as Buy SIMs in the Awesim App — listed under:
    • Telkom LTE Data Starters
    • Vodacom LTE Data Starters
    • Cell C LTE Data Starters

⭐ Top-performing agents who already receive Pre-Loaded LTE Data SIMs for free will continue to do so — and can also buy extra.

View our Terms & Conditions
E&OE – We do our best to keep details accurate.

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2026-04-20T07:25:17.999+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/c0d650c8-0fc2-49a6-8d01-354aa478a1f8" }, { "id": "0dfa02b3-8ae5-42da-95e3-a16b321730e4", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"0dfa02b3-8ae5-42da-95e3-a16b321730e4\",\"title\":\"Cell C Weekly iPhone Draw\",\"content\":\"\nGet rewarded for finding real customers!\nEvery week until the end of May 2026, Awesim is giving away a pre-owned iPhone SE 64GB to one lucky agent. The more real Cell C customers you sign up and help recharge, the better your chances of winning.\nWhat This Means for You\nWeekly Prizes:\nOne iPhone is given away every single week until the end of May 2026.\nEntries Based on Sales:\nYou get entries into the draw by signing up Cell C customers who recharge their SIMs.\nOpen to Everyone:\nAny agent using Awesim Cell C systems can win.\nFair Play:\nTo keep it fair for everyone, the maximum number of entries any agent can get per week is two.\nQuality Phones:\nThese are high-quality, refurbished iPhones from iStore with a 2-year warranty.\nWhat You Need to Do\nFind Real Customers:\nFocus on customers who will actually use their SIM and recharge it regularly.\nHit Your Targets:\n* Get\n5 or more\nrecharged Cell C customers in a week to get\n1 entry\n.\nGet\n10 or more\nrecharged Cell C customers in a week to get\n2 entries\n.\nCheck Facebook:\nVisit the\nAwesim Facebook page\nevery Friday to see if you are the winner.\nReceive Your Prize:\nIf you win, your iPhone will be sent to you automatically with your next SIM card stock delivery.\nImportant Things to Remember\n\\\"Real\\\" Customers Only:\nA customer must recharge and keep using the SIM to count toward your entry.\nEntry Limit:\nYou cannot get more than 2 entries per week, even if you sign up more than 10 customers.\nPhone Details:\nThe phone comes with a charging cable and a 2-year iStore warranty, but it does\nnot\ninclude earphones.\nRandom Colours:\nYou cannot choose the colour of the iPhone; it depends on what is available.\nSimple Analogy\nThink of it like\nraffle tickets at a school fair\n. If you do a good job (find 5 customers), you get one ticket in the hat. If you do an extra-special job (find 10 customers), you get two tickets in the hat. Even if you do ten times the work, you still only get two tickets so that everyone has a fair chance to win the big prize!\nCommon Questions\nHow do I know if I won?\nWinners are announced every Friday on the Awesim Facebook page. Make sure you follow the page so you don’t miss it!\nWhat is a \\\"pre-owned\\\" iPhone?\nIt is a phone that was used before but has been completely fixed and tested by iStore. It works like new and comes with a 100% functional guarantee.\nHow do I get my prize if I win?\nYou don't need to travel to collect it. We will pack the iPhone safely inside your next order of SIM cards and ship it to you.\nDo I need to pay for the phone or the entry?\nNo. This is a free draw for Awesim agents. You just need to do your normal work of activating and recharging Cell C SIMs.\nWhat happens if the phone stops working?\nThe iPhone comes with a 2-year warranty from iStore. This means if there is a factory fault, it is covered for two years.\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"0dfa02b3-8ae5-42da-95e3-a16b321730e4\",\"title\":\"Cell C Weekly iPhone Draw\",\"content\":\"



Get rewarded for finding real customers! Every week until the end of May 2026, Awesim is giving away a pre-owned iPhone SE 64GB to one lucky agent. The more real Cell C customers you sign up and help recharge, the better your chances of winning.

What This Means for You

  • Weekly Prizes: One iPhone is given away every single week until the end of May 2026.
  • Entries Based on Sales: You get entries into the draw by signing up Cell C customers who recharge their SIMs.
  • Open to Everyone: Any agent using Awesim Cell C systems can win.
  • Fair Play: To keep it fair for everyone, the maximum number of entries any agent can get per week is two.
  • Quality Phones: These are high-quality, refurbished iPhones from iStore with a 2-year warranty.

What You Need to Do

  1. Find Real Customers: Focus on customers who will actually use their SIM and recharge it regularly.
  2. Hit Your Targets: * Get 5 or more recharged Cell C customers in a week to get 1 entry.
    • Get 10 or more recharged Cell C customers in a week to get 2 entries.
  3. Check Facebook: Visit the Awesim Facebook page every Friday to see if you are the winner.
  4. Receive Your Prize: If you win, your iPhone will be sent to you automatically with your next SIM card stock delivery.

Important Things to Remember

  • \\\"Real\\\" Customers Only: A customer must recharge and keep using the SIM to count toward your entry.
  • Entry Limit: You cannot get more than 2 entries per week, even if you sign up more than 10 customers.
  • Phone Details: The phone comes with a charging cable and a 2-year iStore warranty, but it does not include earphones.
  • Random Colours: You cannot choose the colour of the iPhone; it depends on what is available.

Simple Analogy

Think of it like raffle tickets at a school fair. If you do a good job (find 5 customers), you get one ticket in the hat. If you do an extra-special job (find 10 customers), you get two tickets in the hat. Even if you do ten times the work, you still only get two tickets so that everyone has a fair chance to win the big prize!

Common Questions

How do I know if I won? Winners are announced every Friday on the Awesim Facebook page. Make sure you follow the page so you don’t miss it!

What is a \\\"pre-owned\\\" iPhone? It is a phone that was used before but has been completely fixed and tested by iStore. It works like new and comes with a 100% functional guarantee.

How do I get my prize if I win? You don't need to travel to collect it. We will pack the iPhone safely inside your next order of SIM cards and ship it to you.

Do I need to pay for the phone or the entry? No. This is a free draw for Awesim agents. You just need to do your normal work of activating and recharging Cell C SIMs.

What happens if the phone stops working? The iPhone comes with a 2-year warranty from iStore. This means if there is a factory fault, it is covered for two years.

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2026-04-16T14:10:47.613+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/0dfa02b3-8ae5-42da-95e3-a16b321730e4" }, { "id": "75fe4eb1-4b83-4dcb-a49a-88f4bdda85bd", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"75fe4eb1-4b83-4dcb-a49a-88f4bdda85bd\",\"title\":\"SmartLoad Reversal Process\",\"content\":\"\nThis Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) is effective immediately and compliance is mandatory. Please note this SOP is not exhaustive and may not cover every possible scenario. Non-compliance may result in disciplinary action.\nPURPOSE:\nTo define the end-to-end process for recovering and transferring funds from an agent's inaccessible SmartLoad wallet to a new, active mobile number.\nWHEN TO USE:\nAn agent can no longer access their SmartLoad wallet (e.g., lost SIM, blocked number).\nStandard recovery methods (SIM swap or unblocking via SmartLoad call centre) have failed.\nException:\nIn the event of an agent's death (requires escalation to Finance).\nSTEPS:\n1. Pre-Verification\nConfirm\nwith the agent that they have attempted to unblock the number directly with SmartLoad or via a SIM swap.\nExplain\nthat this reversal process is a \\\"last resort\\\" and carries a 3-business-day turnaround time.\n2. Information Collection\nIdentify\nthe old mobile number (the one currently holding the balance).\nIdentify\nthe new mobile number (the verified primary number where funds must be sent).\nDetermine\nthe specific timeline or commission months requiring reversal (e.g., \\\"February commission paid in March\\\").\nClarify\nthat while Awesim cannot see the exact balance, the request will include \\\"all additional funds\\\" found in the wallet.\n3. Service Request (SR) Initiation\nCreate\nan SR in the CRM/CMS.\nRoute\nthe SR to the\nFinance\ndepartment.\nInclude\nthe following mandatory details in the SR description:\nOld Mobile Number.\nNew Mobile Number.\nSpecific payments or months to be reversed.\nReason for inaccessibility (e.g., SIM lost/stolen).\n4. Affidavit & Submission (Finance Action)\nGenerate\na manual affidavit on an Awesim letterhead.\nDetail\nthe verified payments made by Awesim into that specific wallet.\nCommission\nthe affidavit (must be stamped/signed by Sean Gilbride or Babek).\nSubmit\nthe affidavit to SmartLoad within 24 hours of the SR being raised.\n5. Reversal & Agent Notification\nUpdate\nthe SR to inform the agent: \\\"Affidavit sent to SmartLoad. Please expect payment within 3 business days.\\\"\nMonitor\nthe Awesim SmartLoad account for the incoming reversal (average turnaround from SmartLoad is 24 hours).\n6. Final Payment Execution\nProcess\nthe payment to the agent’s new primary number during the daily run.\nAdhere\nto the daily cut-off:\nReversals received\nbefore 12:00\n: Included in the same day's payment.\nReversals received\nafter 12:00\n: Included in the next business day's payment.\nClose\nthe SR once payment is confirmed.\nSYSTEM ACTIONS:\nSystems used:\nCRM/CMS (SR Management), Finance Payment System.\nRequired updates:\nLog Old Number, New Number, and Payment History in the SR.\nDropdown selections:\nSet SR Department to \\\"Finance\\\".\nEXPECTED OUTCOME:\nThe agent receives their full SmartLoad balance on their new mobile number within three business days of the initial request.\nIMPORTANT NOTES:\nVisibility Limit:\nAwesim cannot see the agent's total wallet balance; we only verify the payments we have personally made.\nManual Process:\nThis is a manual, time-consuming process involving legal affidavits; agents must be managed regarding the 3-day timeline.\nPayment Window:\nDaily payments are typically executed between\n13:00 and 14:00\n.\nHELP CENTRE IMPACT:\nYES\nCUSTOMER IMPACT:\nAgents will be without their funds for up to 3 business days and must provide historical payment details.\nCC ACTION REQUIRED:\nCall Centre agents must clearly communicate the 3-day SLA and ensure the agent knows they must have a new, verified number active on their profile before the reversal starts.\nGAPS IDENTIFIED:\nVerification Step:\nThere is no explicit step for CC to verify if the \\\"New Number\\\" has already been RICA'd and set as the \\\"Primary Number\\\" in CMS before Finance attempts payment.\nSmartLoad Contact Point:\nThe specific submission channel (email or portal) for the affidavit to SmartLoad is not defined.\nDeceased Agent Requirements:\nThe transcript mentions \\\"Death Certificate\\\" and \\\"Family documents\\\" for exceptions, but a specific checklist for these documents is missing.\nSR Categorisation:\nThe specific SR \\\"Type\\\" or \\\"Sub-type\\\" for \\\"SmartLoad Reversal\\\" needs to be confirmed in the CRM to ensure accurate reporting.\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"75fe4eb1-4b83-4dcb-a49a-88f4bdda85bd\",\"title\":\"SmartLoad Reversal Process\",\"content\":\"

This Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) is effective immediately and compliance is mandatory. Please note this SOP is not exhaustive and may not cover every possible scenario. Non-compliance may result in disciplinary action.

PURPOSE:

To define the end-to-end process for recovering and transferring funds from an agent's inaccessible SmartLoad wallet to a new, active mobile number.

WHEN TO USE:

  • An agent can no longer access their SmartLoad wallet (e.g., lost SIM, blocked number).
  • Standard recovery methods (SIM swap or unblocking via SmartLoad call centre) have failed.
  • Exception: In the event of an agent's death (requires escalation to Finance).

STEPS:

1. Pre-Verification

  • Confirm with the agent that they have attempted to unblock the number directly with SmartLoad or via a SIM swap.
  • Explain that this reversal process is a \\\"last resort\\\" and carries a 3-business-day turnaround time.

2. Information Collection

  • Identify the old mobile number (the one currently holding the balance).
  • Identify the new mobile number (the verified primary number where funds must be sent).
  • Determine the specific timeline or commission months requiring reversal (e.g., \\\"February commission paid in March\\\").
  • Clarify that while Awesim cannot see the exact balance, the request will include \\\"all additional funds\\\" found in the wallet.

3. Service Request (SR) Initiation

  • Create an SR in the CRM/CMS.
  • Route the SR to the Finance department.
  • Include the following mandatory details in the SR description:
    • Old Mobile Number.
    • New Mobile Number.
    • Specific payments or months to be reversed.
    • Reason for inaccessibility (e.g., SIM lost/stolen).

4. Affidavit & Submission (Finance Action)

  • Generate a manual affidavit on an Awesim letterhead.
  • Detail the verified payments made by Awesim into that specific wallet.
  • Commission the affidavit (must be stamped/signed by Sean Gilbride or Babek).
  • Submit the affidavit to SmartLoad within 24 hours of the SR being raised.

5. Reversal & Agent Notification

  • Update the SR to inform the agent: \\\"Affidavit sent to SmartLoad. Please expect payment within 3 business days.\\\"
  • Monitor the Awesim SmartLoad account for the incoming reversal (average turnaround from SmartLoad is 24 hours).

6. Final Payment Execution

  • Process the payment to the agent’s new primary number during the daily run.
  • Adhere to the daily cut-off:
    • Reversals received before 12:00: Included in the same day's payment.
    • Reversals received after 12:00: Included in the next business day's payment.
  • Close the SR once payment is confirmed.

SYSTEM ACTIONS:

  • Systems used: CRM/CMS (SR Management), Finance Payment System.
  • Required updates: Log Old Number, New Number, and Payment History in the SR.
  • Dropdown selections: Set SR Department to \\\"Finance\\\".

EXPECTED OUTCOME:

The agent receives their full SmartLoad balance on their new mobile number within three business days of the initial request.

IMPORTANT NOTES:

  • Visibility Limit: Awesim cannot see the agent's total wallet balance; we only verify the payments we have personally made.
  • Manual Process: This is a manual, time-consuming process involving legal affidavits; agents must be managed regarding the 3-day timeline.
  • Payment Window: Daily payments are typically executed between 13:00 and 14:00.

HELP CENTRE IMPACT:

YES

  • CUSTOMER IMPACT: Agents will be without their funds for up to 3 business days and must provide historical payment details.
  • CC ACTION REQUIRED: Call Centre agents must clearly communicate the 3-day SLA and ensure the agent knows they must have a new, verified number active on their profile before the reversal starts.

GAPS IDENTIFIED:

  • Verification Step: There is no explicit step for CC to verify if the \\\"New Number\\\" has already been RICA'd and set as the \\\"Primary Number\\\" in CMS before Finance attempts payment.
  • SmartLoad Contact Point: The specific submission channel (email or portal) for the affidavit to SmartLoad is not defined.
  • Deceased Agent Requirements: The transcript mentions \\\"Death Certificate\\\" and \\\"Family documents\\\" for exceptions, but a specific checklist for these documents is missing.
  • SR Categorisation: The specific SR \\\"Type\\\" or \\\"Sub-type\\\" for \\\"SmartLoad Reversal\\\" needs to be confirmed in the CRM to ensure accurate reporting.

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [ { "value": "Help_Centre", "id": "74bde7f7-b10f-4f0b-b19d-818ac541c4b5", "categoryId": "e0751ef6-b3fd-4bd0-babb-3bc7619c24e1", "categoryName": "Support Tags" } ], "last_modified": "2026-04-15T12:32:26.113+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/75fe4eb1-4b83-4dcb-a49a-88f4bdda85bd" }, { "id": "376f4ea6-a0a0-4671-be3b-7951e2bc2a2d", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"376f4ea6-a0a0-4671-be3b-7951e2bc2a2d\",\"title\":\"Awesim Leave Policy & Procedure\",\"content\":\"\nScope/Objective\nThis policy outlines the guidelines and procedures for all employees of Awesim Telecoms (Pty) Ltd regarding various types of leave. Our aim is to ensure a healthy work-life balance and foster a positive work environment, aligning with the Basic Conditions of Employment Act (BCEA) 75 of 1997.\nThis policy applies to all employees, with the exception of those working less than 24 hours per month for Awesim Telecoms (Pty) Ltd or sub-contractors, who do not accrue annual leave.\nDefinitions\nFor the purpose of this policy:\nLeave:\nApproved absence from work, applied for through the prescribed method.\nPublic Holiday:\nA public holiday as defined by the Public Holidays Act 1994 (Act 36 of 1994) or any other day designated as such by Awesim Telecoms.\nLeave Cycle:\nA 12-month period calculated from your employment start date (anniversary date of joining Awesim Telecoms).\nSick Leave Cycle:\nA 36-month period calculated from your employment start date (anniversary date of joining Awesim Telecoms).\nBCEA:\nRefers to the Basic Conditions of Employment Act and its Regulations (75/1997).\nLeave Types and Procedures\nLeave Application Approvals\nAll leave must be recorded and approved in the\nEmployee Self-Service (ESS) system in BCX.\nTo ensure timely processing of leave requests,\nline managers must approve their subordinates' leave applications within four (4) working days\n. If no action is taken within this timeframe, the system will automatically forward the application to the next designated approver.\nWhen a manager is on leave for\ntwo (2) or more consecutive days\n, they are required to activate their\n\\\"Out of Office\\\" setting\nin the ESS system within BCX. This setting, found at the bottom of the left navigation panel in each individual's ESS account, will automatically redirect any incoming leave applications to an alternative leave approver for review and decision.\nAnnual Leave\nAwesim Telecoms encourages employees to take regular annual leave for rest and rejuvenation.\nAccrual:\nYour annual leave entitlement is specified in your employment contract. Your monthly accrual will load on the 1st of every month from your employment start date.\nApplication:\nAll annual leave requests must be submitted via the\nEmployee Self-Service (ESS) system in BCX\nat least\nseven (7) days\nbefore your intended leave start date.\nApproval:\nLeave approval is subject to your manager's approval and Awesim's operational requirements. If an agreement cannot be reached, Awesim Telecoms reserves the right to make the final decision.\nLeave Balance:\nYou may only take annual leave equivalent to your accrued days.\nPublic Holidays:\nPublic holidays that fall within your approved annual leave period will not be deducted from your annual leave balance and will be paid.\nConcurrency:\nAnnual leave cannot be taken concurrently with paid sick leave, as stipulated by the BCEA.\nReligious Days:\nDays observed for religious purposes, other than official South African public holidays, must be applied for as annual leave.\nPayouts:\nAnnual leave cannot be exchanged for cash. Any outstanding annual leave will only be paid out upon termination of your employment with Awesim Telecoms, in accordance with this policy.\nNotice Period:\nAnnual leave may not be taken during your notice period unless prior written approval has been granted by management.\nMax Accumulation:\nYou are permitted to accumulate a maximum of\ntwenty-two (22) annual leave days\n. The ESS system in BCX will automatically stop accruing leave once this limit is reached. It is your responsibility to regularly check your leave balance on BCX and apply for leave accordingly to prevent forfeiture of accrued days.\nLeave increments calculation:\nThe ESS system in BCX offers standard increments that can be taken as annual leave.
