  • 🔴⬇️Below (less than) 33% lifetime connection %
  • 🔴⬇️Below (less than) 11% lifetime activation %

Check the Intranet Report for lifetime performance by searching the Syspro Customer:

Example (to follow)

Good-Performing: Default Order Type: Expired Accounts (04) NOT Paid - Order Limit(s)

How to identify Good Lifetime Performance: Expired Returning Agent (RA)

  • DOT: Expired Accounts (04) NOT Paid
  • Allowed Balance: 10
  • Qty Allowed = 10
  • Monthly Allowed = 10
  • Available Paid Qty: Nil

Performing expired agents:

  • ⬆️Over 33% lifetime connection %
  • ⬆️Over 11% lifetime activation %

Check the Intranet Report for lifetime performance by searching the Syspro Customer:


For Stock_Category:

  • VODACOM Unstuck
  • MTN Starters
  • CELLC ValuePack
  • Sim-Sonke Starters


Returning Agent – Good/Poor-performing Expired (04) Flow

  1. Verification
    Once all Returning Agent verification checks are completed, route SR to:
    DropDown: Expired (04) ESC
  2. AMB ESC Update
    The SR will route to AMB ESC (CC Ambassador Queue).
    • CC Ambassador must update Default Order Type from Expired (04) → Account Agent (0)
    • CRM - Relationship - Edit Tree Structure - Select Forest [Expired Accounts] - Arrows -
    • CRM Audit Reason: DOT 04 --> 0 (CRM). Account Agent.
  3. CC Ambassador selects DropDown → INFO SMS
      • The INFO SMS includes the Awesim App link so the agent can login to the App and;
        Good-Performing: Expired Returning Agent (RA) = Place a Fast Track (FT) Order to
        Poor-Performing: Expired Returning Agent (RA) = Buy the Returning Agent package.
      • Agent Benefit: Qualify for 60 Reward Points on Delivery Confirmation.

Quality Rating “EX”

EX Stock Codes – Order Limit

  • For any stock code with Quality Rating “EX”, agents can only receive max 10 units per network, no matter how many networks they request.
  • Agents who have never received a specific network should follow the EX Stock Code rule of thumb: a maximum of 10 units per network.

Example:
Agent requests MTN, Telkom, and Vodacom.

  • 5 Vodacom (not EX)
  • 10 MTN (EX)
  • 10 Telkom (EX)
    = 25 total units

➡️ Does not qualify – minimum shipping requirement is 30 SIMs.

Expired Account with Blank Stock Order Table

A blank table typically occurs because:

  • The system previously executed the Expired Allocation Process.
  • There has been no activity for over a month following that process.
  • Consequently, the system has moved the account status back to Expired.

Assessment Criteria

Since the Stock Order Table is unavailable, consultants must assess performance manually using the Intranet Report to search for the Syspro Customer.

Performance Category

Metrics (Lifetime)

Action Required

Good-Performing

↑ Over 33% connection %

↑ Over 11% activation %

Manual Order: There is no system function to automatically add quantities back. The order must be placed by Head Office.

Poor-Performing

↓ Below 33% connection %

↓ Below 11% activation %

Stock Code Flag Query: A query must be logged to specifically add Buy SIMs functionality for the agent.

Process Flow for Blank Tables

  • Step 1: Verify the \\\"Expired\\\" status and confirm the Stock Order table is empty.
  • Step 2: Run the Intranet Report for lifetime connection and activation percentages.
  • Step 3: Based on the results, route the request:
    • Good: Escalate to Head Office for manual quantity allocation.
    • Poor: Log a Stock Code Flag Query to enable the \\\"Buy SIMs\\\" package via the app.

Note:
We do not have the system functionality to add “free SIMs” to an account under Allowed Balance, as this is linked to the automatic performance calculator.

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2026-04-13T14:51:30.280+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/cb7e2f84-96e8-4459-96f1-8d4442abc926" }, { "id": "f7a835f5-e408-4d11-8759-f3fdbf434206", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"f7a835f5-e408-4d11-8759-f3fdbf434206\",\"title\":\"Returning Agent (RA) EXPIRED 04 ESC SOP\",\"content\":\"\nPurpose:\nTo outline the step-by-step process for Customer Care (CC) Ambassadors to manage\nExpired Accounts (04) NOT Paid\nescalations for Returning Agents whose Default Order Type (DOT) has expired.\nThese Service Requests (SRs) are routed to the CC Ambassadors queue using the drop-down option\nEXPIRED (04) ESC\n.\nSR Handling Checks:\nComplete all checks below\nbefore\nprocessing the Default Order Type (DOT) in CRM:\nConfirm there is only\none active\nagent/account agent agreement with Price Code: A, and revive the account with the better star rating (if applicable).\nEnsure the agent code has been removed from On Hold and is verified.\nConfirm the Main Telephone Number is SmartRICA registered.\nVerify the delivery address is accurate and aligned to Google-verified coordinates to prevent future delivery issues.\nVery Important:\nEnsure the Stock Order Table is correctly populated with the applicable Order Quantities (Allowed Balance or AvailablePaidQty) based on the Returning Agent (RA) status.\nRefer to:\nReturning Agent (RA): Stock Order Qtys\nUse the Good-Performing vs Poor-Performing RA metrics to check that the Stock Order Table has the correct quantities and to guide the next step of order processing.\nCRM Actions:\nLog into\nCRM system\nNavigate to:\n1. Relationship\n2. Edit Tree Structures\n3. Select the Forest: Expired Accounts\n4. Insert customer code to load account info\n5. Tap the arrows button\n6. Select the\nnew\nForest: Account Agent\n7. Copy and paste the reason for movement: DOT 04 --> 0 (CRM) Account Agent\n8. Tap the \\\"Move\\\" arrows button\n9. Once successfully completed, the message “The relationship for\nCustomer Code\nwas moved” will appear.\nCustomer Care / SOP: Returning Agent (RA) EXPIRED 04 ESC\nby Bernadine Bothwell\\\" height=\\\"483\\\" width=\\\"734\\\" id=\\\"0bxHlDVwh5ae\\\">\nCMS Actions:\nRefresh the page\nto confirm the\nDOT reflects the change\nmade in CRM.\nAdd SR Comment: DOT 04 --> 0 (CRM). Account Agent. DLS:\nYYYY-MM-DD\nSelect\nDropDown: INFO SMS\n(if a Head Office Order is not required).\nAgent Benefit:\nAgent will qualify for\n60 Reward Points\nonce delivery is confirmed.\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"f7a835f5-e408-4d11-8759-f3fdbf434206\",\"title\":\"Returning Agent (RA) EXPIRED 04 ESC SOP\",\"content\":\"

Purpose:

To outline the step-by-step process for Customer Care (CC) Ambassadors to manage Expired Accounts (04) NOT Paid escalations for Returning Agents whose Default Order Type (DOT) has expired.

These Service Requests (SRs) are routed to the CC Ambassadors queue using the drop-down option EXPIRED (04) ESC.

SR Handling Checks:

Complete all checks below before processing the Default Order Type (DOT) in CRM:

  • Confirm there is only one active agent/account agent agreement with Price Code: A, and revive the account with the better star rating (if applicable).
  • Ensure the agent code has been removed from On Hold and is verified.
  • Confirm the Main Telephone Number is SmartRICA registered.
  • Verify the delivery address is accurate and aligned to Google-verified coordinates to prevent future delivery issues.
  • Very Important: Ensure the Stock Order Table is correctly populated with the applicable Order Quantities (Allowed Balance or AvailablePaidQty) based on the Returning Agent (RA) status.
    • Refer to: Returning Agent (RA): Stock Order Qtys
    • Use the Good-Performing vs Poor-Performing RA metrics to check that the Stock Order Table has the correct quantities and to guide the next step of order processing.

CRM Actions:

  • Log into CRM system
  • Navigate to:
    1. Relationship
    2. Edit Tree Structures
    3. Select the Forest: Expired Accounts
    4. Insert customer code to load account info
    5. Tap the arrows button
    6. Select the new Forest: Account Agent
    7. Copy and paste the reason for movement: DOT 04 --> 0 (CRM) Account Agent
    8. Tap the \\\"Move\\\" arrows button
    9. Once successfully completed, the message “The relationship for Customer Code was moved” will appear.
Customer Care &#x2F; SOP: Returning Agent (RA) EXPIRED 04 ESC by Bernadine Bothwell\\\" height=\\\"483\\\" width=\\\"734\\\" id=\\\"0bxHlDVwh5ae\\\">


CMS Actions:

  • Refresh the page to confirm the DOT reflects the change made in CRM.
  • Add SR Comment: DOT 04 --> 0 (CRM). Account Agent. DLS: YYYY-MM-DD
  • Select DropDown: INFO SMS (if a Head Office Order is not required).

Agent Benefit: Agent will qualify for 60 Reward Points once delivery is confirmed.

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2026-04-07T09:34:16.917+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/f7a835f5-e408-4d11-8759-f3fdbf434206" }, { "id": "040217b7-34de-4e1b-9863-971e5d6673ec", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"040217b7-34de-4e1b-9863-971e5d6673ec\",\"title\":\"How do I deposit, top up or load money to my SmartLoad wallet?\",\"content\":\"\nThe easiest way to top up your SmartLoad wallet is by using:\nEFT from your banking app or\nCash Deposit\nAdd beneficiary:\nSmartcall Smartload\nImportant:\nFees for depositing money via cash or EFT into Smartcall Smartload can vary depending on your bank and account type. Check with your bank to confirm the fees before making a deposit.\nBanks Supported\nABSA\nFNB\nNedbank\nCapitec\nStep by Step Guide\nOpen your banking app\nAdd and pay beneficiary:\nSmartcall Smartload\nEnter the amount\nUse your\ncellphone number\nas\nreference\nConfirm payment\nPlease take note:\nDue to the risk of fraud at bank branches Smartcall will allocate a portion of your deposit within 15 minutes and the balance of the deposit will be allocated the following morning.\nYou will receive the following welcoming SMS when you make your first deposit into your Smartload wallet:\nWelcome to the Smartload Family! Your PIN is xxxx. Your account balance is R0.00. Time to start making easy cash. Dial *130*678# (Toll Free) to get started. Enjoy!\nPlease note: ABSA charges R67 per cash deposit at ABSA branches.\nPay@ deposits for SmartLoad will no longer be accepted. Kindly explore our other available deposit options.\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"040217b7-34de-4e1b-9863-971e5d6673ec\",\"title\":\"How do I deposit, top up or load money to my SmartLoad wallet?\",\"content\":\"

The easiest way to top up your SmartLoad wallet is by using:

EFT from your banking app or

Cash Deposit

Add beneficiary: Smartcall Smartload

Important: Fees for depositing money via cash or EFT into Smartcall Smartload can vary depending on your bank and account type. Check with your bank to confirm the fees before making a deposit.

Banks Supported

  • ABSA 
  • FNB
  • Nedbank 
  • Capitec

Step by Step Guide

  1. Open your banking app
  2. Add and pay beneficiary: Smartcall Smartload
  3. Enter the amount
  4. Use your cellphone number as reference
  5. Confirm payment

Please take note: 

Due to the risk of fraud at bank branches Smartcall will allocate a portion of your deposit within 15 minutes and the balance of the deposit will be allocated the following morning.

You will receive the following welcoming SMS when you make your first deposit into your Smartload wallet:

Welcome to the Smartload Family! Your PIN is xxxx. Your account balance is R0.00. Time to start making easy cash. Dial *130*678# (Toll Free) to get started. Enjoy!

Please note: ABSA charges R67 per cash deposit at ABSA branches.
Pay@ deposits for SmartLoad will no longer be accepted. Kindly explore our other available deposit options.

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2026-03-30T14:42:41.514+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/040217b7-34de-4e1b-9863-971e5d6673ec" }, { "id": "a8e68484-cf60-4ab7-9be1-2c19e6296a2d", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"a8e68484-cf60-4ab7-9be1-2c19e6296a2d\",\"title\":\"Awesim SIM Cards: Understanding the Different Types\",\"content\":\"\nAwesim SIM Cards: A Quick Guide\nWhat is a SIM card?\nA SIM card (Subscriber Identity Module) is a small chip that helps your phone connect to your mobile network to make calls, send texts, and use data.\nIt securely stores your IMSI (International Mobile Subscriber Identity), which the network uses to identify and verify you. It can also store contacts.\nWhat are Normal SIMs?\nSummary:\nAwesim Gold Sticker:\nEvery Normal SIM card has a gold Awesim sticker for easy identification.\nPayment:\nYou earn\nR30\nwhen you activate a Normal SIM to a REAL Customer. This payment is received on the 25th of the month.\nTariff Plan:\nThese SIMs are not automatically on the network’s LTE tariff plan, but the plan can be changed if needed. A normal SIM card that is recharged with LTE data, does qualify for activation payments, as long as the SIM is used by a REAL Customer (whether data or calls)\nCalls alone are not needed for us to be able to pay for an activation. It can only be data spend that allows us to pay for an activation.\nWhat are\nPreloaded\nLTE Data SIMs?\nSummary:\nWhat are Preloaded LTE Data SIMs?\nThey are SIM cards with preloaded data that are given for\nFREE\nto our\ntop-performing agents.\nPayment:\nHow do I earn with them?\nYou can earn\nCASH\nby selling these SIMs to\nREAL customers.\nDo I get the R30 activation fee?\nNo, these SIMs\ndo not\nqualify for the R30 activation payment.\nDo they count towards my month-end bonus payment?\nYes, they\ndo\ncount as activations for your month-end bonus payments.\nWhat is a \\\"REAL customer\\\" and why are they important?\nA \\\"\nREAL customer\n\\\" is someone who will continue to use and recharge the SIM\nafter\nthe preloaded data is finished. It is crucial to sell these SIMs to REAL customers. If customers only use the free data and stop, you will no longer receive free LTE Data SIMs, and those activations will be\nexcluded\nfrom month-end bonus payments.\nWhat are Social Starter SIMs?\nSummary:\nWhat are Social Starter SIMs?\nSIM cards with a FREE value, such as WhatsApp Data.\nPayment:\nHow do I earn with them?\nYou can earn\nCASH\nby selling these SIMs to\nREAL customers.\nDo I get the R30 activation fee?\nYes, you still get the\nR30 activation fee\n, and they also count towards your month-end bonuses.\nHow do I get them?\nYour\nfirst package\nof Social Starter SIMs is a\nprize\nawarded to top-performing agents. They are added to your order on top of your Normal SIMs.\nThereafter\n, you can qualify for more based on your performance. If you perform on your first allocation, you'll be able to order them as usual and receive them as part of your allowed balance.\nIf you waste your first allocation\nby only using the free value and nothing else, you will not be allocated them again.\nWhat are eSIMs?\nSummary:\nWhat is an eSIM?\nAn\neSIM (embedded SIM)\nis a digital SIM card built into certain smartphones and other mobile devices.\nAn eSIM works as an alternative to a physical plastic SIM card.\nTap here to see\neSIM Guide\nPayment:\nThe payment, activation criteria, and bonus rules are exactly the same as Normal SIMs.\nR30 Activation Fee:\nYou earn R30 upon activation.\nBonus Eligibility:\nThey are included in month-end bonuses.\nCompetitions:\nThey are eligible for port and rewind competitions.\nWhat are Unstuck SIMs?\nSummary:\nSIMs\nwithout\nthe gold Awesim sticker.\nDistributed to Direct Dealers.\nAvailable on various networks.\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"a8e68484-cf60-4ab7-9be1-2c19e6296a2d\",\"title\":\"Awesim SIM Cards: Understanding the Different Types\",\"content\":\"

Awesim SIM Cards: A Quick Guide

What is a SIM card?

  • A SIM card (Subscriber Identity Module) is a small chip that helps your phone connect to your mobile network to make calls, send texts, and use data.
  • It securely stores your IMSI (International Mobile Subscriber Identity), which the network uses to identify and verify you. It can also store contacts.

What are Normal SIMs?

  • Summary:
    • Awesim Gold Sticker: Every Normal SIM card has a gold Awesim sticker for easy identification.
    • Payment: You earn R30 when you activate a Normal SIM to a REAL Customer. This payment is received on the 25th of the month.
    • Tariff Plan: These SIMs are not automatically on the network’s LTE tariff plan, but the plan can be changed if needed. A normal SIM card that is recharged with LTE data, does qualify for activation payments, as long as the SIM is used by a REAL Customer (whether data or calls)
    • Calls alone are not needed for us to be able to pay for an activation. It can only be data spend that allows us to pay for an activation.

What are Preloaded LTE Data SIMs?

  • Summary:
    • What are Preloaded LTE Data SIMs?
      They are SIM cards with preloaded data that are given for FREE to our top-performing agents.
    • Payment:
      • How do I earn with them?
        You can earn CASH by selling these SIMs to REAL customers.
      • Do I get the R30 activation fee?
        No, these SIMs do not qualify for the R30 activation payment.
      • Do they count towards my month-end bonus payment?
        Yes, they do count as activations for your month-end bonus payments.
      • What is a \\\"REAL customer\\\" and why are they important?
        A \\\"REAL customer\\\" is someone who will continue to use and recharge the SIM after the preloaded data is finished. It is crucial to sell these SIMs to REAL customers. If customers only use the free data and stop, you will no longer receive free LTE Data SIMs, and those activations will be excluded from month-end bonus payments.

What are Social Starter SIMs?

  • Summary:
    • What are Social Starter SIMs?
      • SIM cards with a FREE value, such as WhatsApp Data.
    • Payment:
      • How do I earn with them?
        You can earn CASH by selling these SIMs to REAL customers.
      • Do I get the R30 activation fee?
        Yes, you still get the R30 activation fee, and they also count towards your month-end bonuses.
      • How do I get them?
        • Your first package of Social Starter SIMs is a prize awarded to top-performing agents. They are added to your order on top of your Normal SIMs.
        • Thereafter, you can qualify for more based on your performance. If you perform on your first allocation, you'll be able to order them as usual and receive them as part of your allowed balance.
        • If you waste your first allocation by only using the free value and nothing else, you will not be allocated them again.

What are eSIMs?

  • Summary:
    • What is an eSIM?
      An eSIM (embedded SIM) is a digital SIM card built into certain smartphones and other mobile devices.
      An eSIM works as an alternative to a physical plastic SIM card.
      Tap here to see eSIM Guide
    • Payment:
      The payment, activation criteria, and bonus rules are exactly the same as Normal SIMs.
      • R30 Activation Fee: You earn R30 upon activation.
      • Bonus Eligibility: They are included in month-end bonuses.
      • Competitions: They are eligible for port and rewind competitions.

What are Unstuck SIMs?

  • Summary:
    • SIMs without the gold Awesim sticker.
    • Distributed to Direct Dealers.
    • Available on various networks.

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2026-03-27T09:24:55.070+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/a8e68484-cf60-4ab7-9be1-2c19e6296a2d" }, { "id": "7e92dab9-c493-41a5-897e-2b9f52a0ae8f", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"7e92dab9-c493-41a5-897e-2b9f52a0ae8f\",\"title\":\"File Upload: Verification Admin Process SOP\",\"content\":\"\nSTANDARD OPERATING PROCEDURE\nThis Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) is effective immediately and compliance is mandatory. Please note this is not exhaustive and may not cover every possible scenario, process or detail. Non-compliance with the guidelines or instructions outlined herein may result in disciplinary measures. Should you have any questions or need further clarification, you are responsible for consulting with your Line Manager promptly.\nPURPOSE\nThe purpose of this SOP is to guide Customer Care Ambassadors on how to review uploaded documents, verify or reject them based on verification requirements, and communicate any rejections to the user so the documents can be corrected and re-uploaded for verification.\n1. Log in\nNavigate to My.Awesim, My Dashboard, then click Admin Dashboard. From there, you will click File Upload Approvals.\nEuphoria Pause Code: File Upload Verification(s)\nDedicated Timeslots:\n2. Verification Checks\nSee below the list of checks to be completed for verification:\nConfirm the uploaded document is clear (not blurry) and legible (easy to read).\nConfirm the following match the system (CMS/CRM):\nName and surname\nID / Passport number\nGender\nPassport expiry date (if applicable)\nand then:\nPhoto Check: Profile photo of the agent holding the ID (or passport) matches up with the ID uploaded.\n3. Ve\nrification Statuses\nIf everything matches → Approved\nIf information or photo does not match → Rejected\nApproved (\nNo\nPoints Allocated)\nApproved (Points Allocated)\nAny\ndata\ninaccuracies = Rejected (Not Appropriate)\nAny\nimage\ndiscrepancies = Rejected (Not Clear)\nAny\nRejected\nfiles will be captured in CMS and routed to the User for corrections.\nImportant Note:\nThe status\n“Approved – Points Allocated”\napplies when documents are uploaded at creation and approved on the first submission (no rejections).\n10 Reward Points\nare issued per approved upload.\nAny rejected file verifications may impact Reward Points. Please ensure documents are checked carefully to avoid errors.\nStep by step guide\nStep 1: On Hold: No \\\"N\\\"\nStart with records showing “N” in Column H (On Hold). These are the quickest to verify.\nStep 2: On Hold: Yes \\\"Y\\\" -\nhighlighted in Red\n1. Log a new Service Request (SR) in CMS.\n2. Check if there is already an SR in progress for the On-Hold process.\nYes = another SR is already in progress:\nSR Comment:\nVerification Status: Customer Verified. UNHOLD ESC\nin Progress\nDropdown:\nResolved\nNo = no SR under Open Orders:\nSR Comment:\nVerification Status: Customer Verified. UNHOLD ESC\nOutstanding\nDropdown:\nUNHOLD ESC\nStep 3: Minor Corrections (Spelling Only) for Prompt Verification\n1. Check the My.Awesim “i” button (Audit)\nConfirm which user uploaded the document and who was responsible for ensuring the information was correct.\n2. Log a new Service Request (SR) in CMS.\nSR Comment:\nVerification Status: Fixed.\nXXX corrected for prompt verification.\nPlease take note for future SR handling. Customer Verified.\nUse the correct template for the field updated:\nCustomer Name\nCustomer Surname\nCustomer Name & Surname\nContact\n3. Select the correct dropdown:\nIF SALES = DropDown:\nTO SALES\nIF Agent/ GEN = DropDown:\nVerify ID Docs (trends investigation)\n4. Exception(s): Corrections (no Service Request required)\nGender or\nExpiry Date\nStep 4: Major Corrections – Reject\nIf the ID / Passport number or photo does not match the information on CMS, select\nMy.Awesim Admin Dashboard → DropDown: Rejected\n.\nLog a new Service Request (SR) in CMS.\nNote:\nUse the\nRejected Status\nCMS SR Comment Templates\nto ensure the reason and required action are clearly communicated.\n3. Select the correct DropDown:\nIF SALES = DropDown:\nTO SALES\nIF Agent/ GEN = DropDown:\nVerify ID Docs (trends investigation)\nCMS SR COMMENT TEMPLATES\nRejected (Not Appropriate):\nVerification Status: Rejected (Not Appropriate). Reason:\nThe\n[Rejected Reason]\nAction Required:\n1) Correct Info OR Re-Upload the documents. 2) Once done route SR to DropDown: VERIFY ID DOCS\nReasons:\nID #\non the photo doesn't match CMS.\nPassport #\non the photo doesn't match CMS.\nDocuments don't match CMS.\nID / Passport Photo Uploaded to incorrect Placeholder\nProfile Photo Uploaded to incorrect Placeholder\nFace not visible for verification.\nProfile photo\nmissing\nID/Passport next to face\nRejected (Not Clear):\nVerification Status: Rejected (Not Clear). Reason:\nThe\n[Rejected Reason]\nAction Required:\n1) Re-Upload documents. 2) Once done route SR to DropDown: VERIFY ID DOCS\nReasons:\nID / Passport Photo is not clear (blurry).\nProfile Photo is not clear (blurry).\nBroken Link: ID / Passport Photo\nBroken Link: Profile Photo\nBlank Upload: ID / Passport Photo\nBlank Upload: Profile Photo\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"7e92dab9-c493-41a5-897e-2b9f52a0ae8f\",\"title\":\"File Upload: Verification Admin Process SOP\",\"content\":\"

STANDARD OPERATING PROCEDURE

This Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) is effective immediately and compliance is mandatory. Please note this is not exhaustive and may not cover every possible scenario, process or detail. Non-compliance with the guidelines or instructions outlined herein may result in disciplinary measures. Should you have any questions or need further clarification, you are responsible for consulting with your Line Manager promptly.

PURPOSE

The purpose of this SOP is to guide Customer Care Ambassadors on how to review uploaded documents, verify or reject them based on verification requirements, and communicate any rejections to the user so the documents can be corrected and re-uploaded for verification.

1. Log in

Navigate to My.Awesim, My Dashboard, then click Admin Dashboard. From there, you will click File Upload Approvals.
Euphoria Pause Code: File Upload Verification(s)
Dedicated Timeslots:

2. Verification Checks

See below the list of checks to be completed for verification:

  1. Confirm the uploaded document is clear (not blurry) and legible (easy to read).
  2. Confirm the following match the system (CMS/CRM):

Name and surname
ID / Passport number
Gender
Passport expiry date (if applicable)

and then:

  • Photo Check: Profile photo of the agent holding the ID (or passport) matches up with the ID uploaded.

3. Verification Statuses

If everything matches → Approved
If information or photo does not match → Rejected

  • Approved (No Points Allocated)
  • Approved (Points Allocated)
  • Any data inaccuracies = Rejected (Not Appropriate)
  • Any image discrepancies = Rejected (Not Clear)
  • Any Rejected files will be captured in CMS and routed to the User for corrections.

Important Note:
The status “Approved – Points Allocated” applies when documents are uploaded at creation and approved on the first submission (no rejections). 10 Reward Points are issued per approved upload.

Any rejected file verifications may impact Reward Points. Please ensure documents are checked carefully to avoid errors.

Step by step guide


Step 1: On Hold: No \\\"N\\\"

  • Start with records showing “N” in Column H (On Hold). These are the quickest to verify.

Step 2: On Hold: Yes \\\"Y\\\" - highlighted in Red

1. Log a new Service Request (SR) in CMS.

2. Check if there is already an SR in progress for the On-Hold process.

Yes = another SR is already in progress:

  • SR Comment: Verification Status: Customer Verified. UNHOLD ESC in Progress
  • Dropdown: Resolved

No = no SR under Open Orders:

  • SR Comment: Verification Status: Customer Verified. UNHOLD ESC Outstanding
  • Dropdown: UNHOLD ESC

Step 3: Minor Corrections (Spelling Only) for Prompt Verification

1. Check the My.Awesim “i” button (Audit)
Confirm which user uploaded the document and who was responsible for ensuring the information was correct.

2. Log a new Service Request (SR) in CMS.

SR Comment:
Verification Status: Fixed. XXX corrected for prompt verification. Please take note for future SR handling. Customer Verified.

Use the correct template for the field updated:

  • Customer Name
  • Customer Surname
  • Customer Name & Surname
  • Contact

3. Select the correct dropdown:

IF SALES = DropDown: TO SALES
IF Agent/ GEN = DropDown: Verify ID Docs (trends investigation)

4. Exception(s): Corrections (no Service Request required)

  • Gender or
  • Expiry Date

Step 4: Major Corrections – Reject

  1. If the ID / Passport number or photo does not match the information on CMS, select My.Awesim Admin Dashboard → DropDown: Rejected.
  2. Log a new Service Request (SR) in CMS.

Note:
Use the Rejected Status CMS SR Comment Templates to ensure the reason and required action are clearly communicated.

3. Select the correct DropDown:

IF SALES = DropDown: TO SALES
IF Agent/ GEN = DropDown: Verify ID Docs (trends investigation)

CMS SR COMMENT TEMPLATES

Rejected (Not Appropriate):

Verification Status: Rejected (Not Appropriate). Reason: The [Rejected Reason]
Action Required: 1) Correct Info OR Re-Upload the documents. 2) Once done route SR to DropDown: VERIFY ID DOCS


Reasons:

  • ID # on the photo doesn't match CMS.
  • Passport # on the photo doesn't match CMS.
  • Documents don't match CMS.
  • ID / Passport Photo Uploaded to incorrect Placeholder
  • Profile Photo Uploaded to incorrect Placeholder
  • Face not visible for verification.
  • Profile photo missing ID/Passport next to face

Rejected (Not Clear):

Verification Status: Rejected (Not Clear). Reason: The [Rejected Reason]
Action Required: 1) Re-Upload documents. 2) Once done route SR to DropDown: VERIFY ID DOCS

Reasons:

  • ID / Passport Photo is not clear (blurry).
  • Profile Photo is not clear (blurry).
  • Broken Link: ID / Passport Photo
  • Broken Link: Profile Photo
  • Blank Upload: ID / Passport Photo
  • Blank Upload: Profile Photo

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [ { "value": "Verification", "id": "83e081f5-8f31-4aab-aa4a-9d27c81a1deb", "categoryId": "e0751ef6-b3fd-4bd0-babb-3bc7619c24e1", "categoryName": "Support Tags" } ], "last_modified": "2026-03-25T11:00:36.956+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/7e92dab9-c493-41a5-897e-2b9f52a0ae8f" }, { "id": "3580a78c-78d0-47f7-b8ea-bcb80279c3b4", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"3580a78c-78d0-47f7-b8ea-bcb80279c3b4\",\"title\":\"Service Request (SR) Handling Tag(s) SOP \",\"content\":\"\nIn the first or, at most, second SR interaction, it is essential to categorize the type of Service Query, to guide the Service Request Handling process.\nIf unable to establish the SR Query Type: add:\nTAG TBC\nDefinition:\n*TBC = To Be Confirmed\nOne Tag per Service Request (SR)\nPlease tag the Type of Query as below:\nNEW AGENT\nORDER\nCUSTOMER INFO\nExample: Any changes required to Customer Info Table: Returning Agent, Base Change, Number Change, RTS Parcels\nFINANCE QUERY\nOTHER\nExample: Track Parcel, Rewards Item Issue\nSR Comment:\n[Tag as above]\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"3580a78c-78d0-47f7-b8ea-bcb80279c3b4\",\"title\":\"Service Request (SR) Handling Tag(s) SOP \",\"content\":\"

In the first or, at most, second SR interaction, it is essential to categorize the type of Service Query, to guide the Service Request Handling process.

If unable to establish the SR Query Type: add:

  • TAG TBC

Definition:
*TBC = To Be Confirmed

One Tag per Service Request (SR)

Please tag the Type of Query as below:

  • NEW AGENT
  • ORDER
  • CUSTOMER INFO
      • Example: Any changes required to Customer Info Table: Returning Agent, Base Change, Number Change, RTS Parcels
  • FINANCE QUERY
  • OTHER
      • Example: Track Parcel, Rewards Item Issue


SR Comment: [Tag as above]

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [ { "value": "SR Handling", "id": "8a200999-32c6-4746-b1fa-eeccf36da0af", "categoryId": "e0751ef6-b3fd-4bd0-babb-3bc7619c24e1", "categoryName": "Support Tags" }, { "value": "Tag", "id": "62b2eeb9-f229-42ad-9bf4-763245a506d8", "categoryId": "e0751ef6-b3fd-4bd0-babb-3bc7619c24e1", "categoryName": "Support Tags" } ], "last_modified": "2026-03-18T06:19:29.626+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/3580a78c-78d0-47f7-b8ea-bcb80279c3b4" }, { "id": "a621b3a7-330a-43a1-8990-03f20a621304", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"a621b3a7-330a-43a1-8990-03f20a621304\",\"title\":\"Facebook Customer Query Handling SOP\",\"content\":\"\nSTANDARD OPERATING PROCEDURE\nThis Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) is effective immediately and compliance is mandatory. Please note this is not exhaustive and may not cover every possible scenario, process or detail. Non-compliance with the guidelines or instructions outlined herein may result in disciplinary measures. Should you have any questions or need further clarification, you are responsible for consulting with your Line Manager promptly.\nPURPOSE\nThe purpose of this SOP is to guide Customer Care Ambassador(s) on how to manage Facebook queries by responding to general enquiries, redirecting account-specific requests to direct support channels, reacting to positive feedback, and escalating suggestions or negative feedback through the internal workflow.\nThis SOP aims to protect customer data, maintain a professional brand presence, and ensure queries are handled in line with defined response standards and escalation processes.\nFacebook Meta Business Suite -\nPrerequisites\nThe user must have\nPage access via Meta Business Suite\nwith\nContent permissions\nset to\nPartial Access: Basic\n.\nReplying to or reacting to Facebook comments must be done using the\n“Awesim” Public User\nprofile.\nThe\nLine Manager\nis responsible for requesting access and sharing the\ninvitation link\nto join the Awesim Business Page to the users work email address.\n1. Log in\nGo to\nbusiness.facebook.com\n2. Open the Inbox\nFrom the left menu, click\nInbox\nClick\nFacebook\ncomments\n(top filter)\n3. Filter to Comments\nClick the comment to open the conversation panel on the right.\nOption A: Reply\nQuestions or requests for help or suggestions must be replied to.\nEnter your response in the\nReply\nfield.\nAdd ~ followed by your initials at the end of each reply, for internal user tracking purposes\nExample: ~BB\nClick\nSend (Enter)\n.\nOption B: React to a Comment (Like / Heart)\nUse\nreactions only\nfor compliments or acknowledgements (Like/Love).\nHover over the \\\"Like\\\" text and click on the appropriate reaction.\n4. Move to Done\nClick \\\"Move to Done\\\" once all steps completed.\nResponse times\nReply within less than 2 business hours (operating hours)\nDedicated time slots are scheduled in the calendar by the Line Manager and should be adhered to.\nTime Tracking:\nToggl Track\n- Record time spent on the task for accurate reporting.\nTask Description:\nFacebook\nProject:\nCC Ambassadors\nTemplate Responses\nPersonalise all responses by addressing the customer by\n[Name]\nwhere available.\nUse approved template responses for account-specific queries. Do not request or share account information publicly.\nQueries that are not account-specific must be answered in line with the approved knowledge base.\nLog comments, complaints, or support requests via the Slack workflow\n“Customer Feedback Form.\nAccount-Specific Query\nUse when:\nA comment relates to personal account details (e.g. balance, SIM status, orders, payments).\nTemplate Response:\nHi [Name],\nFor us to securely assist with your account-specific query, please WhatsApp us on\n060 070 2666\nor follow this link\nrb.gy/cch8yy\n.\nInterested in Joining Awesim\nUse when:\nA user expresses interest in becoming an Awesim agent.\nTemplate Response:\nHi [Name],\nWe’d be happy to assist you with registering as an Awesim agent.\nPlease WhatsApp us on\n060 070 2666\nor follow this link\nrb.gy/cch8yy\nso we can assist you further.\nFor more details, visit:\nhttps://awesim.co.za/Agent\nInterested in Promotional Support\nUse when:\nA user expresses interest in promotional support by a local Sales Rep.\nTemplate Response:\nHi [Name],\nThese promotions are run by our Sales Reps in the local area to help support our agents.\nWe’d be happy to connect you with a local Sales Rep who can service your area.\nIf you are interested please WhatsApp us on\n060 070 2666\nor follow this link\nrb.gy/cch8yy\nso we can assist you further.\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"a621b3a7-330a-43a1-8990-03f20a621304\",\"title\":\"Facebook Customer Query Handling SOP\",\"content\":\"

STANDARD OPERATING PROCEDURE

This Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) is effective immediately and compliance is mandatory. Please note this is not exhaustive and may not cover every possible scenario, process or detail. Non-compliance with the guidelines or instructions outlined herein may result in disciplinary measures. Should you have any questions or need further clarification, you are responsible for consulting with your Line Manager promptly.

PURPOSE

The purpose of this SOP is to guide Customer Care Ambassador(s) on how to manage Facebook queries by responding to general enquiries, redirecting account-specific requests to direct support channels, reacting to positive feedback, and escalating suggestions or negative feedback through the internal workflow.

This SOP aims to protect customer data, maintain a professional brand presence, and ensure queries are handled in line with defined response standards and escalation processes.

Facebook Meta Business Suite - Prerequisites

  • The user must have Page access via Meta Business Suite with Content permissions set to Partial Access: Basic.
  • Replying to or reacting to Facebook comments must be done using the “Awesim” Public User profile.
  • The Line Manager is responsible for requesting access and sharing the invitation link to join the Awesim Business Page to the users work email address.

1. Log in

  • Go to business.facebook.com

2. Open the Inbox

  • From the left menu, click Inbox
  • Click Facebook comments (top filter)

3. Filter to Comments

  • Click the comment to open the conversation panel on the right.

Option A: Reply

  • Questions or requests for help or suggestions must be replied to.
  • Enter your response in the Reply field.
  • Add ~ followed by your initials at the end of each reply, for internal user tracking purposes
    Example: ~BB
  • Click Send (Enter).


Option B: React to a Comment (Like / Heart)

  • Use reactions only for compliments or acknowledgements (Like/Love).
  • Hover over the \\\"Like\\\" text and click on the appropriate reaction.


4. Move to Done

Click \\\"Move to Done\\\" once all steps completed.

Response times

  • Reply within less than 2 business hours (operating hours)
  • Dedicated time slots are scheduled in the calendar by the Line Manager and should be adhered to.
  • Time Tracking: Toggl Track - Record time spent on the task for accurate reporting.

Task Description: Facebook
Project: CC Ambassadors

Template Responses

  • Personalise all responses by addressing the customer by [Name] where available.
  • Use approved template responses for account-specific queries. Do not request or share account information publicly.
  • Queries that are not account-specific must be answered in line with the approved knowledge base.
  • Log comments, complaints, or support requests via the Slack workflow “Customer Feedback Form.

Account-Specific Query

  • Use when: A comment relates to personal account details (e.g. balance, SIM status, orders, payments).
  • Template Response:

Hi [Name],
For us to securely assist with your account-specific query, please WhatsApp us on 060 070 2666 or follow this link rb.gy/cch8yy.

Interested in Joining Awesim

  • Use when: A user expresses interest in becoming an Awesim agent.
  • Template Response:

Hi [Name],
We’d be happy to assist you with registering as an Awesim agent.
Please WhatsApp us on 060 070 2666 or follow this link rb.gy/cch8yy so we can assist you further.
For more details, visit: https://awesim.co.za/Agent

Interested in Promotional Support

  • Use when: A user expresses interest in promotional support by a local Sales Rep.
  • Template Response:

Hi [Name],
These promotions are run by our Sales Reps in the local area to help support our agents.
We’d be happy to connect you with a local Sales Rep who can service your area.
If you are interested please WhatsApp us on 060 070 2666 or follow this link rb.gy/cch8yy so we can assist you further.

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2026-03-16T11:35:03.175+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/a621b3a7-330a-43a1-8990-03f20a621304" }, { "id": "4a6679db-455e-401c-b48c-9624ada16ce2", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"4a6679db-455e-401c-b48c-9624ada16ce2\",\"title\":\"How can I change the number on my Awesim Agent account if I no longer have access to my old number (lost, stolen, or recycled)?\",\"content\":\"\nOPTION 1: CONTACT OUR CALL CENTRE\nSend us a\nWhatsApp message 060 070 2666 from your new number\n.\nIf your account was previously verified, please\nshare a new photo of yourself holding your ID\nfor confirmation.\nOur team will\ncall you to verify your details\n.\nOnce verified, we will\nupdate your number on your profile\n.\nOPTION 2: VISIT OR CONTACT A SALES REP\nAsk your Sales Rep to\nsubmit a Number Change request on your behalf\n.\nUpload your\nprofile photo to your Awesim account\n.\nOur Customer Care team will\ncall you to verify your details before updating your number\n.\nIMPORTANT\nFor security reasons, we will confirm that the number\nis not linked to another customer profile\nbefore completing the change.\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"4a6679db-455e-401c-b48c-9624ada16ce2\",\"title\":\"How can I change the number on my Awesim Agent account if I no longer have access to my old number (lost, stolen, or recycled)?\",\"content\":\"

OPTION 1: CONTACT OUR CALL CENTRE

  1. Send us a WhatsApp message 060 070 2666 from your new number.
  2. If your account was previously verified, please share a new photo of yourself holding your ID for confirmation.
  3. Our team will call you to verify your details.
  4. Once verified, we will update your number on your profile.

OPTION 2: VISIT OR CONTACT A SALES REP

  1. Ask your Sales Rep to submit a Number Change request on your behalf.
  2. Upload your profile photo to your Awesim account.
  3. Our Customer Care team will call you to verify your details before updating your number.

IMPORTANT

For security reasons, we will confirm that the number is not linked to another customer profile before completing the change.

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2026-03-11T05:46:51.663+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/4a6679db-455e-401c-b48c-9624ada16ce2" }, { "id": "a92bf5c7-126c-41fc-8e4c-96e0c7f521cb", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"a92bf5c7-126c-41fc-8e4c-96e0c7f521cb\",\"title\":\"Communications & Ways of Working Policy\",\"content\":\"\nPurpose\nThis policy sets out Awesim’s expectations regarding communication, availability, meeting conduct, and ways of working. Its purpose is to ensure effective collaboration, accountability, and professionalism across the business.\nThis policy applies to all employees, contractors, and temporary staff unless otherwise stated.\nGeneral Principles\nAll employees are expected to:\nCommunicate clearly, respectfully, and timeously\nBe reasonably available during working hours\nUse company communication tools responsibly and consistently\nSupport collaboration, productivity, and respect for colleagues’ time\nCommunication Platforms\nSlack\nSlack is Awesim’s primary internal communication platform.\nEmployees are required to:\nStay up to date on Slack during working hours\nCheck Slack\na minimum of three (3) times per working day\nRespond to messages within a reasonable timeframe, taking role and workload into account\nSlack Status Updates\nEmployees must keep their Slack status accurate and up-to-date at all times, including but not limited to:\nSick leave\nApplicable to all staff HO staff who are expected to have Slack on their cell phones. This excludes CC consultants, Sticking consultants, Invoicing consultants, and Gardener.\nAnnual leave\nWorking remotely (for office-based staff only)\nTemporarily offline or unavailable\nWhen setting a Slack status, employees must include:\nThe date and/or time they will be back at work or online\nWorkflows and Approvals\nEmployees are required to:\nSubmit all required workflows, approvals, and requests\nwithin the stipulated timeframes\nUse the appropriate Slack channels or tools as instructed\nFailure to submit workflows on time may impact business operations and performance management.\nGoogle Calendar (Head Office–Based Employees)\nHead office–based employees are required to maintain accurate Google Calendars.\nEmployees must:\nKeep calendars updated at all times.\nAccept meeting requests they are able to attend.\nDecline meetings they cannot attend, providing a brief reason in the response where applicable.\nSet an out-of-office notification for planned annual leave.\nWhere reasonably possible, update calendars and diary events when on sick leave.\nAccurate calendars support effective scheduling and respect for colleagues’ time.\nWays of Working\nOnline Meetings (Camera-On Policy)\nWhere meetings take place online, Awesim operates a\ncamera-on policy\n.\nEmployees are expected to:\nHave their camera switched on and ready\nbefore joining the meeting.\nEnsure a professional appearance and appropriate environment.\nMeeting Etiquette\nTo ensure meetings are productive and respectful of everyone’s time, all employees are expected to follow these meeting standards:\nBefore the meeting\nAccept or decline meeting invitations timeously.\nSales staff are to ensure they have enough data loaded onto their device to attend the meeting. In addition, sales staff are to ensure that they are parked in a safe location with proper connectivity to attend the meeting.\nReview the agenda or purpose of the meeting in advance.\nJoin meetings on time and prepared.\nDuring the meeting\nRemain focused and actively participate where required.\nAvoid multitasking, side conversations, or unrelated work.\nKeep microphones muted when not speaking to minimise disruption.\nCommunicate respectfully and allow others the opportunity to contribute.\nAfter the meeting\nComplete agreed actions within the required timeframes.\nClarify responsibilities and deadlines where needed.\nMeeting organisers are responsible for:\nEnsuring meetings have a clear purpose and agenda.\nInviting only relevant participants.\nManaging time effectively.\nCommunication Standards\nAll communication, whether written or verbal, must:\nRemain respectful and professional at all times.\nBe clear, constructive, and appropriate to the audience.\nAvoid offensive, aggressive, dismissive, or inappropriate language.\nDisrespectful communication will be addressed in line with Awesim’s disciplinary procedures.\nCompliance\nFailure to comply with this policy may result in corrective action in line with Awesim's disciplinary code.\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"a92bf5c7-126c-41fc-8e4c-96e0c7f521cb\",\"title\":\"Communications & Ways of Working Policy\",\"content\":\"

Purpose

This policy sets out Awesim’s expectations regarding communication, availability, meeting conduct, and ways of working. Its purpose is to ensure effective collaboration, accountability, and professionalism across the business.

This policy applies to all employees, contractors, and temporary staff unless otherwise stated.

General Principles

All employees are expected to:

  • Communicate clearly, respectfully, and timeously
  • Be reasonably available during working hours
  • Use company communication tools responsibly and consistently
  • Support collaboration, productivity, and respect for colleagues’ time

Communication Platforms

Slack

Slack is Awesim’s primary internal communication platform.

Employees are required to:

  • Stay up to date on Slack during working hours
  • Check Slack a minimum of three (3) times per working day
  • Respond to messages within a reasonable timeframe, taking role and workload into account

Slack Status Updates

Employees must keep their Slack status accurate and up-to-date at all times, including but not limited to:

  • Sick leave
    • Applicable to all staff HO staff who are expected to have Slack on their cell phones. This excludes CC consultants, Sticking consultants, Invoicing consultants, and Gardener.
  • Annual leave
  • Working remotely (for office-based staff only)
  • Temporarily offline or unavailable

When setting a Slack status, employees must include:

  • The date and/or time they will be back at work or online

Workflows and Approvals

Employees are required to:

  • Submit all required workflows, approvals, and requests within the stipulated timeframes
  • Use the appropriate Slack channels or tools as instructed

Failure to submit workflows on time may impact business operations and performance management.

Google Calendar (Head Office–Based Employees)

Head office–based employees are required to maintain accurate Google Calendars.

Employees must:

  • Keep calendars updated at all times.
  • Accept meeting requests they are able to attend.
  • Decline meetings they cannot attend, providing a brief reason in the response where applicable.
  • Set an out-of-office notification for planned annual leave.
  • Where reasonably possible, update calendars and diary events when on sick leave.

Accurate calendars support effective scheduling and respect for colleagues’ time.

Ways of Working

Online Meetings (Camera-On Policy)

Where meetings take place online, Awesim operates a camera-on policy.

Employees are expected to:

  • Have their camera switched on and ready before joining the meeting.
  • Ensure a professional appearance and appropriate environment.

Meeting Etiquette

To ensure meetings are productive and respectful of everyone’s time, all employees are expected to follow these meeting standards:

Before the meeting

  • Accept or decline meeting invitations timeously.
  • Sales staff are to ensure they have enough data loaded onto their device to attend the meeting. In addition, sales staff are to ensure that they are parked in a safe location with proper connectivity to attend the meeting.
  • Review the agenda or purpose of the meeting in advance.
  • Join meetings on time and prepared.

During the meeting

  • Remain focused and actively participate where required.
  • Avoid multitasking, side conversations, or unrelated work.
  • Keep microphones muted when not speaking to minimise disruption.
  • Communicate respectfully and allow others the opportunity to contribute.

After the meeting

  • Complete agreed actions within the required timeframes.
  • Clarify responsibilities and deadlines where needed.

Meeting organisers are responsible for:

  • Ensuring meetings have a clear purpose and agenda.
  • Inviting only relevant participants.
  • Managing time effectively.

Communication Standards

All communication, whether written or verbal, must:

  • Remain respectful and professional at all times.
  • Be clear, constructive, and appropriate to the audience.
  • Avoid offensive, aggressive, dismissive, or inappropriate language.

Disrespectful communication will be addressed in line with Awesim’s disciplinary procedures.

Compliance

Failure to comply with this policy may result in corrective action in line with Awesim's disciplinary code.

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2026-03-10T06:59:00.659+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/a92bf5c7-126c-41fc-8e4c-96e0c7f521cb" }, { "id": "2fb8ad74-2f80-4b3b-9c6b-620900574ba1", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"2fb8ad74-2f80-4b3b-9c6b-620900574ba1\",\"title\":\"Order Confirmation\",\"content\":\"\nWe've captured an order for you based on the system's allowances.\nYour order will be dispatched once it has been invoiced. Delivery normally takes\n3–5 working days\n.\nYou will receive a SMS from our courier, RAM, with a Secure Link, in order to Track your Parcel. The SMS will be sent to the Main Telephone number on your Agent Code.\nYou will also receive a call from RAM, to notify you that your parcel is coming, so please be available to take the call which may be from a private number, to receive your stock so it is not returned back to us.\nIn future, if you'd like to choose your order, you can do so by ordering on our\nAwesim App\n- ordering yourself will also mean you can earn\n60 Reward Points\nwhen you confirm delivery.\nDownload the Awesim App - available on Android, iOS or Huawei\nhttps://tinyurl.com/Awesim-App-Download\nIf you have any more questions, please don’t hesitate to contact us.\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"2fb8ad74-2f80-4b3b-9c6b-620900574ba1\",\"title\":\"Order Confirmation\",\"content\":\"

We've captured an order for you based on the system's allowances.
Your order will be dispatched once it has been invoiced. Delivery normally takes 3–5 working days.


You will receive a SMS from our courier, RAM, with a Secure Link, in order to Track your Parcel. The SMS will be sent to the Main Telephone number on your Agent Code.

You will also receive a call from RAM, to notify you that your parcel is coming, so please be available to take the call which may be from a private number, to receive your stock so it is not returned back to us.

In future, if you'd like to choose your order, you can do so by ordering on our Awesim App - ordering yourself will also mean you can earn 60 Reward Points when you confirm delivery.

Download the Awesim App - available on Android, iOS or Huawei
https://tinyurl.com/Awesim-App-Download

If you have any more questions, please don’t hesitate to contact us.




\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2026-03-04T09:51:53.826+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/2fb8ad74-2f80-4b3b-9c6b-620900574ba1" }, { "id": "b9938c7e-969f-436f-9f89-d169db8bba3b", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"b9938c7e-969f-436f-9f89-d169db8bba3b\",\"title\":\"System Rule: Expired Accounts (04) NOT Paid\",\"content\":\"\nLogic for Agent and Account Agent(s) moved to Expired.\nThe System Proc runs once a week on a Saturday, 10h00.\nCRM Audit Reason: Moved to Expired as part of ExpireAccounts Proc YYYY-MM-DD\nCMS Customer Information Table Updates:\nOn Hold: Y\nDefault Order Type: Expired Accounts (04) NOT Paid\nExpired Accounts Proc will change all flags to inactive when the account expires.\nExclusion Rule:\nAny Customer Codes revived from DOT 04 within the past month will be\nexcluded\nfrom being marked as expired. This gives the agent time to process an order before the proc runs again.\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"b9938c7e-969f-436f-9f89-d169db8bba3b\",\"title\":\"System Rule: Expired Accounts (04) NOT Paid\",\"content\":\"
  • Logic for Agent and Account Agent(s) moved to Expired.
  • The System Proc runs once a week on a Saturday, 10h00.
  • CRM Audit Reason: Moved to Expired as part of ExpireAccounts Proc YYYY-MM-DD
  • CMS Customer Information Table Updates:
    • On Hold: Y
    • Default Order Type: Expired Accounts (04) NOT Paid
  • Expired Accounts Proc will change all flags to inactive when the account expires.

Exclusion Rule:

  • Any Customer Codes revived from DOT 04 within the past month will be excluded from being marked as expired. This gives the agent time to process an order before the proc runs again.







\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2026-03-02T10:55:34.813+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/b9938c7e-969f-436f-9f89-d169db8bba3b" }, { "id": "371444f3-c205-4539-9e3f-4da3c06d3b9d", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"371444f3-c205-4539-9e3f-4da3c06d3b9d\",\"title\":\"System Rule: Move from Expired to Active Agent because of payment \",\"content\":\"\nAccounts are placed\nOn Hold\nand moved to Expired according to the “\nExpired Accounts (04) – Not Paid\n” system rules.\nOnce the agent is paid on the 25th due to\nhistoric\nSIM activity, the system automatically moves the account from\nExpired\nback to the agent’s\noriginal payment structure\n(Paid to RICA number or Paid to Code), however account still remains On Hold.\nHow to identify this system rule:\nCustomer On Hold:\nY [Tick] and\nDate of Last Sale:\nNo orders in the past 2 years\nCRM Audit – Last On Hold Reason:\nMoved from Expired to Agent because of payment.\nThe agent must still contact\nCustomer Care\nor a\nlocal Sales Rep\nto have the account reactivated and the\nOn Hold\nstatus removed.\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"371444f3-c205-4539-9e3f-4da3c06d3b9d\",\"title\":\"System Rule: Move from Expired to Active Agent because of payment \",\"content\":\"

Accounts are placed On Hold and moved to Expired according to the “Expired Accounts (04) – Not Paid” system rules.

Once the agent is paid on the 25th due to historic SIM activity, the system automatically moves the account from Expired back to the agent’s original payment structure (Paid to RICA number or Paid to Code), however account still remains On Hold.

How to identify this system rule:

Customer On Hold: Y [Tick] and Date of Last Sale: No orders in the past 2 years

CRM Audit – Last On Hold Reason: Moved from Expired to Agent because of payment.

The agent must still contact Customer Care or a local Sales Rep to have the account reactivated and the On Hold status removed.

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2026-03-02T10:54:57.643+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/371444f3-c205-4539-9e3f-4da3c06d3b9d" }, { "id": "b7d6799b-70f9-4dd8-ad7a-6d84f4055ed0", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"b7d6799b-70f9-4dd8-ad7a-6d84f4055ed0\",\"title\":\"RAM Query Manager (QM) SOP \",\"content\":\"\nSTANDARD OPERATING PROCEDURE\nThis Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) is effective immediately and compliance is mandatory. Please note this is not exhaustive and may not cover every possible scenario, process or detail. Non-compliance with the guidelines or instructions outlined herein may result in disciplinary measures. Should you have any questions or need further clarification, you are responsible for consulting with your Line Manager promptly.\nPURPOSE\nThe purpose of this Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) is to establish a clear framework for Customer Care (CC) Ambassadors to efficiently handle and resolve delivery service requests, ensuring timely outcomes in compliance with the defined process.\nRAM Service Level Agreement (SLA)\nDelivery within 3 - 5 working days.\nIf a delivery is missed, a case is created and submitted to Awesim via the RAM Query Manager Portal for clarification, support, or further action.\nThe response time to RAM is within 24 hours during Awesim Telecoms business days.\n3 delivery attempt(s) are required, before a Return to Sender (RTS) is logged.\nReturn to Sender (RTS) requests require an Authorization Code.\nAuthorized return (RTS) of the parcel to Awesim Head Office within 3 - 5 working days.\nChange of Address (COA) / ReRoute (RW) requests require second level approval, from the assigned Line Manager.\nCMS OUTSTANDING CONSIGNMENT SR HANDLING\nDelivery outside the 3 - 5 working days.\nFollow\nRAM Delivery Track & Trace – Delivery Queries SOP\nto investigate the cause of the delivery delay\nContact the agent telephonically to confirm availability and validate that the delivery address is correct and searchable on Google Maps; and\nRequest the agent to ensure they are available to receive the courier delivery.\nIf Unavailable: DropDown: FOLLOW UP 24hr\nIf Updated Info: Create a Case on RAM Query Manager\nRAM QUERY MANAGER (QM)\nQuery Manager Portal: launch the Google Chrome web browser and navigate to:\nhttps://app.ram.co.za\nRequired to Log in\ndaily\n, using your assigned user credentials (see DM on Slack, for security purposes)\nThe response time to RAM is within 24 hours during business days.\nImportant Reminder:\nCases highlighted in red require immediate attention. If no updates or actions are taken to resolve them within 2 business days from the creation date, they will automatically close and be removed from the queue. Please ensure all case queries are resolved in accordance with the SLA.\nRAM QM LOGIN STEP BY STEP GUIDE\nStep 1:\nNavigate to:\nhttps://app.ram.co.za\nLog in using your assigned user credentials:\nUsername:\nEmail address\nPassword:\nConfidential Password\nStep 2:\nClick on the 9 dots (app launcher) and click on the\n\\\"Query Manager\\\"\napplication or use the shortcut under Favourites (if available)\nStep 3:\nClick \\\"Open Query Manager Tasks\\\". A screen with all the Query tasks will open and appear.\nStep 4:\nClick on \\\"Date/Time Opened\\\" to sort tasks from oldest to newest and prioritize tasks that have been open the longest and /or those highlighted in Red, for urgent attention.\nStep 5:\nClick on the hyperlinked Case Number to open and action in accordance with the Case Type.\nRAM QUERY CASE TYPES\nCHANGE OF ADDRESS (COA) / REROUTE (RW)\nSECOND LEVEL APPROVAL: COA / RW\nRETURN TO SENDER (RTS)\nCANNOT CONTACT CLIENT\nMANUAL CASE CREATION\nFollow the instructions in\nRAM Query Manager (QM)\nto action the Query Case with specific reference to:-\n[Subject Line]\nand;\n[Mandatory Actions]\nwhich appears in Right Hand Side (RHS) Column\nCHANGE OF ADDRESS (COA) / REROUTE (RW)\n👉 A Change of Address (COA) or ReRoute (RW) is recorded when there is an address change to the original Waybill Consignment or when an agent is available beyond the standard three delivery attempts.\n👉 Select the Case from the List.\n👉 Follow the instructions to complete the\naction\nin\nboth the RAM Query Manager (QM) and CMS system:\nRAM Query Manager (QM)\nConfirm New Delivery Address with agent.\nClick the feedback button corresponding to the appropriate action for the query:\n👉\nApproved\n- New Address approved, as documented on the Right Hand Side under: [New Address]\n👉\nRejected\n- No Change of Address (COA) is needed, and/or the original address is accurate and searchable on Google Maps.\n👉\nNew Address\n- submit a corrected New Address\n👉\nReturn to Sender (RTS)\n- Agent unreachable, and parcel on High Business Days after 3 Unsuccessful Attempts.\nRequirment: Capture [Notes] as per Service Request (SR), for audit tracking purposes.\nImportant Note:\nAddress Query is linked to Mandatory Actions: COA Approval\nCMS\nQM = Query Manager\nSR Comment:\nRAM Waybill:\nAWES02-XXXXXXXX\n. COA Request. QM Case #:\nXXXX\nReason:\nXXXXXXX\nRAM Waybill:\nAWES02-XXXXXXXX\n. No Case on QM RW Request. Reason:\nXXXXXXX\nReason Examples:\n👉 New Address due to XXX. Address updated.\n👉 New Number. Cust Info updated.\n👉 Exceeded Delivery Attempts. Agent is available and informed: RPs are forfeited. FT Order: Remove RPs\n👉 Exceeded Delivery Attempts. Agent is available. In House Order. RPs not applicable.\nDropDown:\nRAM ESCALATE\nSECOND LEVEL APPROVAL: COA / RW\nRAM Query Manager (QM)\nStep 1:\nClick \\\"My Query Manager Tasks\\\".\nStep 2:\nThe case details the Original Address as well as the New Address. The Awesim CC Ambassador user details appear as well as the option to respond to: Can we proceed with the Request?\n1. Yes to approve; or\n2. No to reject the Change of Address (COA)\nClick on \\\"Next\\\"\nStep 3:\nWhen you select\nYes\n, the case will close and you can action the next open case.\nIf you select\nNo\n, the case will move back to the\nOpen Query Manager Task\nlist. It will also revert to the original delivery address.\nStep 4:\nCapture Notes as per Service Request (SR), for audit tracking purposes.\nCMS\nSR Comment:\nRAM QM: Waybill:\nAWES02-XXXXXXXX\n. QM Case Number REF:\nXXX\nCOA [Outcome: Approved, Rejected]\nDropDown: TO RAM QUERIES\nRETURN TO SENDER (RTS)\n👉 3 delivery attempt(s) are required, before a Return to Sender (RTS) is logged.\n👉 Return to Sender (RTS) requests require an Authorization Code.\n👉 Follow the instructions to complete the action in\nboth the RAM Query Manager (QM) and CMS system:\nRAM Query Manager (QM)\nSelect the Case from the List\nReview Consignment Tracking Details to ensure Case Query aligns to SLA\nClick the feedback button corresponding to the appropriate action for the query:\n👉\nApproved\n👉\nRejected\nRequirment: Capture [Notes] as per Service Request (SR), for audit tracking purposes.\nClick \\\"Save\\\" Button. This will complete the case and send it to RAM Query Team to action.\nAdditional Note: The New Address button may be used in the event that a delivery to a new address be made You will then select New Address and complete the information required - which will convert the Case Type to: [Change of Address (COA]\nCMS\nRTS APPROVED AUTHORISED\nSR Comment:\nRAM QM: Waybill:\nAWES02-XXXXXXXX\n. RTS Authorized.\nAuthorization Code\nXXXXXXX\nDropDown:\nRTS AUTHORISED\nRTS REJECTED\nSR Comment:\nRAM QM: Waybill:\nAWES02-XXXXXXXX\n. RTS Rejected. Reason:\nXXXXXXX\nDropDown:\nFOLLOW UP / RELEVANT TIMEFRAME\nCANNOT CONTACT CLIENT\n👉 Follow the instructions to complete the action in\nboth the RAM Query Manager (QM) and CMS system:\nRAM Query Manager (QM)\nSelect the Case from the List\nThe Mandatory fields are highlighted\nCapture all information pertaining to New contact information\nClick \\\"Save\\\" Button. This will complete the case and send it to RAM Query Team to action.\nMANUAL CASE CREATION\n👉 You are able to raise a manual case that instructs RAM to Change an Address, Return the parcel to sender, and updates Special Instructions\nwhile the consignment is in the supply chain.\n👉 It does not have to first experience a non-delivery, as soon as RAM receives the consignment you will be able to action these features.\nRAM Query Manager (QM)\nStep 1:\nSearch for the consignment number you wish to make changes to by entering it in the search consignment field, and click Next (on the right-hand side of the screen)\nStep 2:\nIn the event that there is an\nalready open case\nfor this consignment in the system, the user will be asked to close the prior open cases.\nThey will select YES, and then click Proceed.\nStep 3:\nSelect from the dropdown list the type of action case to be created.\nThe options available currently are:\n👉 Change of Delivery address,\n👉 Return to Sender and\n👉 Special instruction.\nStep 4:\nCapture details and reasons for the instruction being raised in the Call Notes field.\nClick \\\"Save Incoming Call Notes\\\"\nStep 5:\nManual Case screen will open.\nStep 6:\nTo create the Manual Case, you look on the right-hand side of your screen to the Mandatory actions console. You will need to select an action from the Optional Actions field selector.\nCreate:\n👉 Return to Sender (RTS) case\nThe RTS dropdown list will appear. Select the correct reason for the RTS.\nSave Selection\nCreate:\n👉Change of Address case\nSelect Change of Address, COA.\nThe address component will open. You need to capture all the address information in all the fields provided.\nIf you see\nred\non your screen, you are missing information.\nSave Selection\nCreate:\n👉Special Instruction case\nSelect Special Instructions\nCapture all the instructions in the field provided.\nSelect Save to complete the action\nOUTBOUND EMAIL QUERY: UNKNOWN RECEIVER /\nRTS OR Reroute (rw) WITHOUT AUTHORIZATION\n👉 You will not be able to log New Cases Example: Unknown Receiver via the RAM Query Manager Portal, due to the Case having been Closed due to \\\"Delivery\\\"\n👉 Query will need to be logged via Outbound Query - Email to our RAM Representative\nSubject Line:\nUrgent -\nWaybill Number - Unknown Receiver\nTo:\nThabisile.Maphosa@ram.co.za\nCC: Bernadine@awesim.co.za\nHi Thabisile,\nWe need your assistance with regards to one of our parcels, Waybill Number:\nAWES02-xxxxxxxxx\nParcel delivered to Unknown Receiver\nePOD attached.\nGPS Co-ordinates:\nSubject Line:\nUrgent -\nWaybill Number -\nUnauthorized RTS\nTo:\nThabisile.Maphosa@ram.co.za\nCC: Bernadine@awesim.co.za\nHi Thabisile,\nWe need your assistance with regards to one of our parcels, Waybill Number:\nAWES02-xxxxxxxxx\nThe Case has closed in RAM Query Manager due to Unauthorized RTS.\nDelivery Address and Contact Numbers are correct, as per Waybill.\nAs per the SLA: Only XX Unsuccessful Delivery Attempts\nRAM Portal Screenshot\nPlease escalate the query with the Hub.\nKindest regards,\nRAM RETURNS / RTS OR Reroute (rw) WITHOUT AUTHORIZATION\nRTS WITHOUT APPROVAL (\nAUTHORIZATION\n)\nThe team member on RAM (RTS) Rotation is required to:\nSend email to RAM (as per SOP: Outbound Query) advising of\nUnauthorized Return\nSR Comment: RAM Informed.\nUnauthorized RTS\nEscalate SR Drop Down:\nTO FINANCE\nSR will be Resolved\nImportant Note: SR\nmust be routed TO FINANCE for a Credit Request\nINTERNAL RAM DELIVERY ADDRESS CONSIGNMENT ERROR\nStep 1:\nCMS SR Comment: Internal RAM Consignment Error\nEscalate SR Drop Down:\nTO FINANCE\nStep 2:\nFinance will investigate and confirm Internal RAM Consignment Error\nCMS SR Comment:\nInternal RAM Consignment Error confirmed. Please inform Thabisile\nDrop Down: TO RAM QUERIES\nStep 3: Email to RAM\nSubject Line:\nWaybill Number\nTo:\nThabisile.Maphosa@ram.co.za\nHi Thabisile,\nPlease note that the RW for Waybill Number:\nAWES01-xxxxxxxxx is not for our account, due to\nInternal RAM Consignment Error.\nCorrect Address:\nXXXX\nPlease ensure Hub is informed for prompt delivery.\nLOSS LETTERS\nStolen or Hi-jacked\nSR is generated for Stores\nRAM sends Loss Letter to Awesim Finance\nFinance will raise SR to alert RAM QUERIES to inform agent of the lost parcel, new parcel will be shipped, apologise for the delay, new delivery timeframes (3 - 5 WDs)\nIf RAM does not alert us about a stolen or hijacked parcel, Awesim should\nescalate\nthe service request\nTo Finance\nto follow up on the Loss Letter.\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"b7d6799b-70f9-4dd8-ad7a-6d84f4055ed0\",\"title\":\"RAM Query Manager (QM) SOP \",\"content\":\"

STANDARD OPERATING PROCEDURE

This Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) is effective immediately and compliance is mandatory. Please note this is not exhaustive and may not cover every possible scenario, process or detail. Non-compliance with the guidelines or instructions outlined herein may result in disciplinary measures. Should you have any questions or need further clarification, you are responsible for consulting with your Line Manager promptly.

PURPOSE

The purpose of this Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) is to establish a clear framework for Customer Care (CC) Ambassadors to efficiently handle and resolve delivery service requests, ensuring timely outcomes in compliance with the defined process.

RAM Service Level Agreement (SLA)

  • Delivery within 3 - 5 working days.
  • If a delivery is missed, a case is created and submitted to Awesim via the RAM Query Manager Portal for clarification, support, or further action.
  • The response time to RAM is within 24 hours during Awesim Telecoms business days.
  • 3 delivery attempt(s) are required, before a Return to Sender (RTS) is logged.
  • Return to Sender (RTS) requests require an Authorization Code.
  • Authorized return (RTS) of the parcel to Awesim Head Office within 3 - 5 working days.
  • Change of Address (COA) / ReRoute (RW) requests require second level approval, from the assigned Line Manager.

CMS OUTSTANDING CONSIGNMENT SR HANDLING

  • Delivery outside the 3 - 5 working days.
  • Follow RAM Delivery Track & Trace – Delivery Queries SOP to investigate the cause of the delivery delay
  • Contact the agent telephonically to confirm availability and validate that the delivery address is correct and searchable on Google Maps; and
  • Request the agent to ensure they are available to receive the courier delivery.
  • If Unavailable: DropDown: FOLLOW UP 24hr
  • If Updated Info: Create a Case on RAM Query Manager

RAM QUERY MANAGER (QM)

  1. Query Manager Portal: launch the Google Chrome web browser and navigate to: https://app.ram.co.za
  2. Required to Log in daily, using your assigned user credentials (see DM on Slack, for security purposes)
  3. The response time to RAM is within 24 hours during business days.
  4. Important Reminder: Cases highlighted in red require immediate attention. If no updates or actions are taken to resolve them within 2 business days from the creation date, they will automatically close and be removed from the queue. Please ensure all case queries are resolved in accordance with the SLA.
RAM QM LOGIN STEP BY STEP GUIDE

Step 1:

  • Navigate to: https://app.ram.co.za
  • Log in using your assigned user credentials:
    Username:     Email address
    Password: Confidential Password

Step 2:

  • Click on the 9 dots (app launcher) and click on the \\\"Query Manager\\\" application or use the shortcut under Favourites (if available)

Step 3:

  • Click \\\"Open Query Manager Tasks\\\". A screen with all the Query tasks will open and appear.


Step 4:

  • Click on \\\"Date/Time Opened\\\" to sort tasks from oldest to newest and prioritize tasks that have been open the longest and /or those highlighted in Red, for urgent attention.


Step 5:

  • Click on the hyperlinked Case Number to open and action in accordance with the Case Type.

RAM QUERY CASE TYPES

  1. CHANGE OF ADDRESS (COA) / REROUTE (RW)
  2. SECOND LEVEL APPROVAL: COA / RW
  3. RETURN TO SENDER (RTS)
  4. CANNOT CONTACT CLIENT
  5. MANUAL CASE CREATION

Follow the instructions in RAM Query Manager (QM) to action the Query Case with specific reference to:-
[Subject Line] and;
[Mandatory Actions] which appears in Right Hand Side (RHS) Column

CHANGE OF ADDRESS (COA) / REROUTE (RW)


👉 A Change of Address (COA) or ReRoute (RW) is recorded when there is an address change to the original Waybill Consignment or when an agent is available beyond the standard three delivery attempts.
👉 Select the Case from the List.
👉 Follow the instructions to complete the action in both the RAM Query Manager (QM) and CMS system:

RAM Query Manager (QM)

Confirm New Delivery Address with agent.

Click the feedback button corresponding to the appropriate action for the query:

👉 Approved - New Address approved, as documented on the Right Hand Side under: [New Address]
👉 Rejected - No Change of Address (COA) is needed, and/or the original address is accurate and searchable on Google Maps.
👉 New Address - submit a corrected New Address
👉 Return to Sender (RTS) - Agent unreachable, and parcel on High Business Days after 3 Unsuccessful Attempts.

Requirment: Capture [Notes] as per Service Request (SR), for audit tracking purposes.

Important Note:
Address Query is linked to Mandatory Actions: COA Approval


CMS
QM = Query Manager

SR Comment:
RAM Waybill: AWES02-XXXXXXXX. COA Request. QM Case #: XXXX Reason: XXXXXXX
RAM Waybill: AWES02-XXXXXXXX. No Case on QM RW Request. Reason: XXXXXXX

Reason Examples:
👉 New Address due to XXX. Address updated.
👉 New Number. Cust Info updated.
👉 Exceeded Delivery Attempts. Agent is available and informed: RPs are forfeited. FT Order: Remove RPs
👉 Exceeded Delivery Attempts. Agent is available. In House Order. RPs not applicable.

DropDown: RAM ESCALATE

SECOND LEVEL APPROVAL: COA / RW

RAM Query Manager (QM)

Step 1:

  • Click \\\"My Query Manager Tasks\\\".

Step 2:

  • The case details the Original Address as well as the New Address. The Awesim CC Ambassador user details appear as well as the option to respond to: Can we proceed with the Request?

1. Yes to approve; or
2. No to reject the Change of Address (COA)

  • Click on \\\"Next\\\"

Step 3:

  • When you select Yes, the case will close and you can action the next open case.


  • If you select No, the case will move back to the Open Query Manager Task list. It will also revert to the original delivery address.

Step 4:

Capture Notes as per Service Request (SR), for audit tracking purposes.

CMS

SR Comment:
RAM QM: Waybill: AWES02-XXXXXXXX. QM Case Number REF: XXX COA [Outcome: Approved, Rejected]

DropDown: TO RAM QUERIES

RETURN TO SENDER (RTS)

👉 3 delivery attempt(s) are required, before a Return to Sender (RTS) is logged.
👉 Return to Sender (RTS) requests require an Authorization Code.
👉 Follow the instructions to complete the action in both the RAM Query Manager (QM) and CMS system:

RAM Query Manager (QM)

  1. Select the Case from the List
  2. Review Consignment Tracking Details to ensure Case Query aligns to SLA
  3. Click the feedback button corresponding to the appropriate action for the query:
    👉 Approved
    👉 Rejected
  4. Requirment: Capture [Notes] as per Service Request (SR), for audit tracking purposes.
  5. Click \\\"Save\\\" Button. This will complete the case and send it to RAM Query Team to action.
  6. Additional Note: The New Address button may be used in the event that a delivery to a new address be made You will then select New Address and complete the information required - which will convert the Case Type to: [Change of Address (COA]



CMS

RTS APPROVED AUTHORISED

SR Comment:
RAM QM: Waybill: AWES02-XXXXXXXX. RTS Authorized. Authorization Code XXXXXXX

DropDown: RTS AUTHORISED


RTS REJECTED

SR Comment:
RAM QM: Waybill: AWES02-XXXXXXXX. RTS Rejected. Reason: XXXXXXX

DropDown: FOLLOW UP / RELEVANT TIMEFRAME

CANNOT CONTACT CLIENT

👉 Follow the instructions to complete the action in both the RAM Query Manager (QM) and CMS system:

RAM Query Manager (QM)

  1. Select the Case from the List
  2. The Mandatory fields are highlighted
  3. Capture all information pertaining to New contact information
  4. Click \\\"Save\\\" Button. This will complete the case and send it to RAM Query Team to action.

MANUAL CASE CREATION

👉 You are able to raise a manual case that instructs RAM to Change an Address, Return the parcel to sender, and updates Special Instructions while the consignment is in the supply chain.
👉 It does not have to first experience a non-delivery, as soon as RAM receives the consignment you will be able to action these features.

RAM Query Manager (QM)

Step 1:
Search for the consignment number you wish to make changes to by entering it in the search consignment field, and click Next (on the right-hand side of the screen)




Step 2:
In the event that there is an already open case for this consignment in the system, the user will be asked to close the prior open cases.
They will select YES, and then click Proceed.



Step 3:
Select from the dropdown list the type of action case to be created.
The options available currently are:
👉 Change of Delivery address,
👉 Return to Sender and
👉 Special instruction.


Step 4:
Capture details and reasons for the instruction being raised in the Call Notes field.
Click \\\"Save Incoming Call Notes\\\"

Step 5:
Manual Case screen will open.



Step 6:
To create the Manual Case, you look on the right-hand side of your screen to the Mandatory actions console. You will need to select an action from the Optional Actions field selector.


Create: 👉 Return to Sender (RTS) case



The RTS dropdown list will appear. Select the correct reason for the RTS.


Save Selection

Create: 👉Change of Address case

Select Change of Address, COA.



The address component will open. You need to capture all the address information in all the fields provided.

If you see red on your screen, you are missing information.

Save Selection


Create: 👉Special Instruction case

Select Special Instructions

Capture all the instructions in the field provided.

Select Save to complete the action

OUTBOUND EMAIL QUERY: UNKNOWN RECEIVER / RTS OR Reroute (rw) WITHOUT AUTHORIZATION

👉 You will not be able to log New Cases Example: Unknown Receiver via the RAM Query Manager Portal, due to the Case having been Closed due to \\\"Delivery\\\"
👉 Query will need to be logged via Outbound Query - Email to our RAM Representative

Subject Line: Urgent - Waybill Number - Unknown Receiver
To: Thabisile.Maphosa@ram.co.za
CC: Bernadine@awesim.co.za

Hi Thabisile,

We need your assistance with regards to one of our parcels, Waybill Number: AWES02-xxxxxxxxx

Parcel delivered to Unknown Receiver
