ePOD attached.
GPS Co-ordinates:


Subject Line: Urgent - Waybill Number - Unauthorized RTS
To: Thabisile.Maphosa@ram.co.za
CC: Bernadine@awesim.co.za

Hi Thabisile,

We need your assistance with regards to one of our parcels, Waybill Number: AWES02-xxxxxxxxx
The Case has closed in RAM Query Manager due to Unauthorized RTS. 
Delivery Address and Contact Numbers are correct, as per Waybill.


As per the SLA: Only XX Unsuccessful Delivery Attempts

RAM Portal Screenshot

Please escalate the query with the Hub.

Kindest regards,

RAM RETURNS / RTS OR Reroute (rw) WITHOUT AUTHORIZATION

RTS WITHOUT APPROVAL (AUTHORIZATION)

The team member on RAM (RTS) Rotation is required to:

Send email to RAM (as per SOP: Outbound Query) advising of Unauthorized Return

SR Comment: RAM Informed. Unauthorized RTS
Escalate SR Drop Down: TO FINANCE
SR will be Resolved

Important Note: SR must be routed TO FINANCE for a Credit Request

INTERNAL RAM DELIVERY ADDRESS CONSIGNMENT ERROR


Step 1:
CMS SR Comment: Internal RAM Consignment Error
Escalate SR Drop Down: TO FINANCE



Step 2:
Finance will investigate and confirm Internal RAM Consignment Error

CMS SR Comment: Internal RAM Consignment Error confirmed. Please inform Thabisile
Drop Down: TO RAM QUERIES


Step 3: Email to RAM

Subject Line: Waybill Number
To: Thabisile.Maphosa@ram.co.za

Hi Thabisile,

Please note that the RW for Waybill Number: AWES01-xxxxxxxxx is not for our account, due to Internal RAM Consignment Error.

Correct Address:
XXXX

Please ensure Hub is informed for prompt delivery.

LOSS LETTERS

Stolen or Hi-jacked

  • SR is generated for Stores

  • RAM sends Loss Letter to Awesim Finance
  • Finance will raise SR to alert RAM QUERIES to inform agent of the lost parcel, new parcel will be shipped, apologise for the delay, new delivery timeframes (3 - 5 WDs)

If RAM does not alert us about a stolen or hijacked parcel, Awesim should escalate the service request To Finance to follow up on the Loss Letter.




\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [ { "value": "rts", "id": "497fff17-c8dc-462d-af56-3f1802a4dbc9", "categoryId": "e0751ef6-b3fd-4bd0-babb-3bc7619c24e1", "categoryName": "Support Tags" } ], "last_modified": "2026-02-24T10:55:20.438+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/b7d6799b-70f9-4dd8-ad7a-6d84f4055ed0" }, { "id": "69ffa850-017b-496f-9311-37a270275d86", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"69ffa850-017b-496f-9311-37a270275d86\",\"title\":\"RAM Delivery Track & Trace – Delivery Queries SOP\",\"content\":\"\nSTANDARD OPERATING PROCEDURE\nThis Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) is effective immediately and compliance is mandatory. Please note this is not exhaustive and may not cover every possible scenario, process or detail. Non-compliance with the guidelines or instructions outlined herein may result in disciplinary measures. Should you have any questions or need further clarification, you are responsible for consulting with your Line Manager promptly.\nScope/Objective\nTo ensure delivery address queries are handled at first contact using available tools, improving response time and avoiding unnecessary escalation to RAM Queries.\nRAM PORTAL LOGIN STEP BY STEP GUIDE\nStep 1:\nNavigate to:\nhttps://app.ram.co.za\nLog in using your assigned user credentials:\nUsername:\nEmail address\nPassword:\nConfidential Password\nStep 2:\nClick on the 9 dots (app launcher) and click on the\n\\\"New Customer Portal\\\"\napplication\nCreate the shortcut - Click on the three dots - Click \\\"\nAdd to Favourites\n\\\"\nStep 3:\nCopy & Paste the Invoice Waybill Number into the\nTrack Consignments\nsearch box and click\nSearch\nto retrieve the delivery status.\nImportant Checks\nValidate the Query\nReview the agent’s query and supporting details provided.\nCross-check delivery details between\nCMS and RAM\n.\nConfirm the delivery address matches the address consigned on the waybill.\nVerify telephone numbers match.\nCheck Last Invoice / Waybill\nConfirm the current delivery status.\nCopy and paste the Waybill number into the\nTrack & Trace Portal\n.\nConfirm delivery status:\nDelivered\nor\nIn Progress\nIf the system reflects “Delivered” but the agent confirms non-delivery:\nDownload ePOD\nVerify GPS coordinates vs CMS geo-location\nConfirm who signed for the parcel (customer vs third party)\nIf Unsuccessful Delivery\n:\nReview failure reason\nAction required corrections or updates\nIf details do not align\n:\nUpdate SR comments with Waybill & Investigation supporting details\nRoute via dropdown:\nTO RAM QUERIES\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"69ffa850-017b-496f-9311-37a270275d86\",\"title\":\"RAM Delivery Track & Trace – Delivery Queries SOP\",\"content\":\"

STANDARD OPERATING PROCEDURE

This Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) is effective immediately and compliance is mandatory. Please note this is not exhaustive and may not cover every possible scenario, process or detail. Non-compliance with the guidelines or instructions outlined herein may result in disciplinary measures. Should you have any questions or need further clarification, you are responsible for consulting with your Line Manager promptly.

Scope/Objective

To ensure delivery address queries are handled at first contact using available tools, improving response time and avoiding unnecessary escalation to RAM Queries.

RAM PORTAL LOGIN STEP BY STEP GUIDE

Step 1:

  • Navigate to: https://app.ram.co.za
  • Log in using your assigned user credentials:
    Username:     Email address
    Password: Confidential Password

Step 2:

  • Click on the 9 dots (app launcher) and click on the \\\"New Customer Portal\\\" application
  • Create the shortcut - Click on the three dots - Click \\\"Add to Favourites\\\"

Step 3:

  • Copy & Paste the Invoice Waybill Number into the Track Consignments search box and click Search to retrieve the delivery status.



Important Checks

  1. Validate the Query
    • Review the agent’s query and supporting details provided.
    • Cross-check delivery details between CMS and RAM.
      • Confirm the delivery address matches the address consigned on the waybill.
      • Verify telephone numbers match.

  1. Check Last Invoice / Waybill
    • Confirm the current delivery status.
    • Copy and paste the Waybill number into the Track & Trace Portal.
  2. Confirm delivery status: Delivered or In Progress

If the system reflects “Delivered” but the agent confirms non-delivery:
Download ePOD
Verify GPS coordinates vs CMS geo-location
Confirm who signed for the parcel (customer vs third party)

If Unsuccessful Delivery:
 Review failure reason
 Action required corrections or updates

If details do not align:

Update SR comments with Waybill & Investigation supporting details
Route via dropdown: TO RAM QUERIES

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2026-02-24T08:03:19.163+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/69ffa850-017b-496f-9311-37a270275d86" }, { "id": "024110f9-16da-492b-a9fa-eddf3a38315e", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"024110f9-16da-492b-a9fa-eddf3a38315e\",\"title\":\"Voice Notes Received via Chat SOP\",\"content\":\"\nSTANDARD OPERATING PROCEDURE\nThis Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) is effective immediately and compliance is mandatory. Please note this is not exhaustive and may not cover every possible scenario, process or detail. Non-compliance with the guidelines or instructions outlined herein may result in disciplinary measures. Should you have any questions or need further clarification, you are responsible for consulting with your Line Manager promptly.\nScope/Objective\nTo ensure Customer Care can accurately understand and assist agents when voice recordings are sent on chat channels.\nVoice note in English\nListen to the recording.\nAssist the agent by replying in\nwritten text\non the chat.\nProvide guidance as per the\nCustomer Care Service Request (SR) Handling SOP\nVoice note in another language\nInform the agent that we are unable to assist via the recording due to a language limitation.\nRequest one of the following:\nType the query in English,\nor\nSend a new voice recording in English,\nor\nConfirm if they would like a consultant to call them in their preferred language (where available).\nCANNED Response Template\nThank you for your voice note.\nWe want to help you, but we’re unable to understand the voice note on chat.\nPlease type your query in English, send an English voice note, or let us know if you would like a consultant to call you in your preferred language (where available).\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"024110f9-16da-492b-a9fa-eddf3a38315e\",\"title\":\"Voice Notes Received via Chat SOP\",\"content\":\"

STANDARD OPERATING PROCEDURE

This Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) is effective immediately and compliance is mandatory. Please note this is not exhaustive and may not cover every possible scenario, process or detail. Non-compliance with the guidelines or instructions outlined herein may result in disciplinary measures. Should you have any questions or need further clarification, you are responsible for consulting with your Line Manager promptly.

Scope/Objective

To ensure Customer Care can accurately understand and assist agents when voice recordings are sent on chat channels.


Voice note in English

  • Listen to the recording.
  • Assist the agent by replying in written text on the chat.
  • Provide guidance as per the Customer Care Service Request (SR) Handling SOP

Voice note in another language

  • Inform the agent that we are unable to assist via the recording due to a language limitation.
  • Request one of the following:
    • Type the query in English, or
    • Send a new voice recording in English, or
    • Confirm if they would like a consultant to call them in their preferred language (where available).

CANNED Response Template

Thank you for your voice note.

We want to help you, but we’re unable to understand the voice note on chat.
Please type your query in English, send an English voice note, or let us know if you would like a consultant to call you in your preferred language (where available).


\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [ { "value": "SOP Template", "id": "20027f4a-e23a-4c23-bd9d-c28d2bd2dbc7", "categoryId": "e0751ef6-b3fd-4bd0-babb-3bc7619c24e1", "categoryName": "Support Tags" } ], "last_modified": "2026-02-24T08:03:04.649+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/024110f9-16da-492b-a9fa-eddf3a38315e" }, { "id": "e8bb04bf-276b-4842-b361-d303450a0902", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"e8bb04bf-276b-4842-b361-d303450a0902\",\"title\":\"What is a REAL Customer? \",\"content\":\"\nA genuine person who registers (RICA) a SIM card using their own valid details and activates it for legitimate personal use.\nA customer who continues to use the SIM after it is activated and once the free starter airtime/data has been used, by:\nRecharging the SIM\nafter the first recharge\n;\nUsing the SIM for billable transactions (calls, data or SMS); and\nRecharging the SIM on a regular basis.\nA once-off high value recharge (for example R50) does\nnot\nautomatically mean the SIM is a REAL customer.\nThe customer must keep using and recharging the SIM.\nPlease note that Awesim reserves the right, at its sole discretion, to determine whether a SIM card distributed by an agent or dealer qualifies as a\nREAL customer\n, even if the standard activation requirements have been met.\nFor more information, please refer to the Awesim Terms and Conditions:\nhttps://awesim.co.za/Terms\n— see the section\n“Real Customers and Fraudulent Activations.”\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"e8bb04bf-276b-4842-b361-d303450a0902\",\"title\":\"What is a REAL Customer? \",\"content\":\"
  • A genuine person who registers (RICA) a SIM card using their own valid details and activates it for legitimate personal use.
  • A customer who continues to use the SIM after it is activated and once the free starter airtime/data has been used, by:
    • Recharging the SIM after the first recharge;
    • Using the SIM for billable transactions (calls, data or SMS); and
    • Recharging the SIM on a regular basis.

A once-off high value recharge (for example R50) does not automatically mean the SIM is a REAL customer.
The customer must keep using and recharging the SIM.


Please note that Awesim reserves the right, at its sole discretion, to determine whether a SIM card distributed by an agent or dealer qualifies as a REAL customer, even if the standard activation requirements have been met.

For more information, please refer to the Awesim Terms and Conditions: https://awesim.co.za/Terms — see the section “Real Customers and Fraudulent Activations.”

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2026-02-19T12:50:51.623+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/e8bb04bf-276b-4842-b361-d303450a0902" }, { "id": "f5a85795-9fe8-43bf-85f9-b84789304b76", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"f5a85795-9fe8-43bf-85f9-b84789304b76\",\"title\":\"Awesim eSIM (embedded SIM)\",\"content\":\"\nSummary\nWhat is an eSIM?\nAwesim eSIMs – Available Networks\nWhich devices work with Awesim eSIMs?\nHow can I get eSIMs?\nHow to install an eSIM?\nDoes a South African eSIM work in other countries?\n📲 1. What is an eSIM?\nAn\neSIM (embedded SIM)\nis a digital SIM card built into certain smartphones and other mobile devices.\nAn eSIM works as an alternative to a physical plastic SIM card.\n⚠️ Not all phones support eSIMs. Please check the device’s compatibility before purchasing an eSIM. Tap\nhere\n.\n📶 2. Awesim eSIMs – Available Networks\nAwesim offers eSIMs for the following networks:\nCell C,\nTelkom and;\nVodacom\nAwesim eSIMs Stock Availability Status\nThe below table indicates the order availability of eSIMs:\nStock Code\nAvailability Status\nTelkom\nYes\nCell C\nYes\nVodacom\nYes\n📲 3. Which devices work with Awesim eSIMs?\nMost newer smartphones\n(including Samsung Galaxy, iPhones, Huawei and Google Pixel) support eSIMs.\nHow to check if if the phone is eSIM compatible?\n👉 Dial *#06#\n👉 If an \\\"EID\\\" number appears - this indicates that the device can use an eSIM.\nor Search compatibity by device\nby clicking the link below:\n👉 [\nClick here to check if your mobile device supports eSIMs\n]\n💸 4. How can I get eSIMs?\nHow can I distribute eSIMs to customers?\neSIMs can only be purchased and distributed through the\nAwesim App\nusing your reward points.\nWhat is the current eSIM distribution limit?\nYou can purchase a total of 9 eSIMs. These are allocated as a Starter Package allocation as follows:\n3 Cell C eSIMs (10 Reward points each)\n3 Telkom eSIMs (10 Reward points each)\n3 Vodacom eSIMs (10 Reward points each)\nHow many Reward Points do I need to purchase an eSIM?\nEach eSIM costs 10 Reward Points. To get the full allocation of 9 eSIMs, you will need a total of 90 Reward points.\nWhat happens if I don't use the eSIMs I purchased?\nYou cannot get more eSIMs until you have used your existing allocation.\nLost or stolen eSIM:\nWe’re unable to recover the original QR code for your eSIM, so it’s important to keep it safe and secure.\nI am a high-performing agent and need more eSIMs. What should I do?\nIf you've used your 9 eSIMs and need more, please contact the Customer Care team or your Sales Rep. Your account performance will be reviewed to determine if you qualify for additional eSIMs.\n🛜 5. How to install an eSIM?\nInstead of inserting a plastic SIM card into your phone, you scan a QR code to download a digital SIM (called an eSIM) directly onto your phone.\nTo do this:\nThe agent to first RICA the eSIM\nThe customer must scan the QR code\non the leaflet using their own phone, which must have data or be connected to Wi-Fi.\nYour phone will automatically download the eSIM profile.\nOnce downloaded, your phone is connected to the network — no physical SIM needed!\n🚫\nImportant:\nAgents should not scan or install the eSIM on their own devices.\nCell C \\\"How to\\\" Guide\nTelkom \\\"How to\\\" Guide\nVodacom \\\"How to\\\" Guide\n6. Does a South African eSIM work in other countries?\nYes — but only if roaming or a travel plan is enabled.\nAn eSIM does not automatically work overseas just because it is digital.\nIt functions exactly like a normal SIM card.\nTo use your South African eSIM while travelling, your mobile network must support\ninternational roaming or a travel data bundle\nin the country you are visiting.\nSuggested Links:\nHow to buy eSIMs on the Awesim App?\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"f5a85795-9fe8-43bf-85f9-b84789304b76\",\"title\":\"Awesim eSIM (embedded SIM)\",\"content\":\"

Summary

  1. What is an eSIM?
  2. Awesim eSIMs – Available Networks
  3. Which devices work with Awesim eSIMs?
  4. How can I get eSIMs?
  5. How to install an eSIM?
  6. Does a South African eSIM work in other countries?

📲 1. What is an eSIM?

  • An eSIM (embedded SIM) is a digital SIM card built into certain smartphones and other mobile devices.
  • An eSIM works as an alternative to a physical plastic SIM card.

⚠️ Not all phones support eSIMs. Please check the device’s compatibility before purchasing an eSIM. Tap here.

📶 2. Awesim eSIMs – Available Networks

Awesim offers eSIMs for the following networks:

  • Cell C,
  • Telkom and;
  • Vodacom


Awesim eSIMs Stock Availability Status

The below table indicates the order availability of eSIMs:

Stock Code

Availability Status

Telkom

Yes

Cell C

Yes

Vodacom

Yes

📲 3. Which devices work with Awesim eSIMs?

  • Most newer smartphones (including Samsung Galaxy, iPhones, Huawei and Google Pixel) support eSIMs.
  • How to check if if the phone is eSIM compatible?
    👉 Dial *#06#
    👉 If an \\\"EID\\\" number appears - this indicates that the device can use an eSIM.
  • or Search compatibity by device by clicking the link below:
    👉 [Click here to check if your mobile device supports eSIMs]

💸 4. How can I get eSIMs?

  • How can I distribute eSIMs to customers?
    • eSIMs can only be purchased and distributed through the Awesim App using your reward points.
  • What is the current eSIM distribution limit?
    You can purchase a total of 9 eSIMs. These are allocated as a Starter Package allocation as follows:
    • 3 Cell C eSIMs (10 Reward points each)
    • 3 Telkom eSIMs (10 Reward points each)
    • 3 Vodacom eSIMs (10 Reward points each)
  • How many Reward Points do I need to purchase an eSIM?
    Each eSIM costs 10 Reward Points. To get the full allocation of 9 eSIMs, you will need a total of 90 Reward points.
  • What happens if I don't use the eSIMs I purchased?
    You cannot get more eSIMs until you have used your existing allocation.
  • Lost or stolen eSIM:
    We’re unable to recover the original QR code for your eSIM, so it’s important to keep it safe and secure.
  • I am a high-performing agent and need more eSIMs. What should I do?
    If you've used your 9 eSIMs and need more, please contact the Customer Care team or your Sales Rep. Your account performance will be reviewed to determine if you qualify for additional eSIMs.

🛜 5. How to install an eSIM?

Instead of inserting a plastic SIM card into your phone, you scan a QR code to download a digital SIM (called an eSIM) directly onto your phone.

To do this:

  1. The agent to first RICA the eSIM
  2. The customer must scan the QR code on the leaflet using their own phone, which must have data or be connected to Wi-Fi.
  3. Your phone will automatically download the eSIM profile.
  4. Once downloaded, your phone is connected to the network — no physical SIM needed!

🚫 Important:

  • Agents should not scan or install the eSIM on their own devices.

Cell C \\\"How to\\\" Guide



Telkom \\\"How to\\\" Guide



Vodacom \\\"How to\\\" Guide

6. Does a South African eSIM work in other countries?

Yes — but only if roaming or a travel plan is enabled.

An eSIM does not automatically work overseas just because it is digital.
It functions exactly like a normal SIM card.

To use your South African eSIM while travelling, your mobile network must support international roaming or a travel data bundle in the country you are visiting.

Suggested Links:

How to buy eSIMs on the Awesim App?




\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2026-02-18T13:10:37.051+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/f5a85795-9fe8-43bf-85f9-b84789304b76" }, { "id": "f4681010-99c1-4c8d-b56e-b7f28bc68c25", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"f4681010-99c1-4c8d-b56e-b7f28bc68c25\",\"title\":\"Creations Handling – 2nd Level CC Ambassador SOP\",\"content\":\"\nPurpose:\nTo outline the step-by-step process for CC Ambassadors to create account codes in CRM for Creations escalated to: TO CREATE Queue.\nOverview\nA new Creation request will come through from CMS at the top of the queue.\nStep 1: Open New ID in CMS\nClick\n“New ID”\non CMS.\nAfter clicking “New ID”, the system will open the CRM page.\nStep 2: Generate Customer Code in CRM\nClick \\\"\nGenerate\\\" under Syspro Customer Code\n.\nThe Customer Code will generate below the field.\nStep 3: Create Customer\nClick the blue\nCreate Customer\nbutton.\nConfirm the Customer Code appears to show it has been successfully saved on CRM.\nStep 4: Update CMS with Customer Code\nCopy the generated Customer Code.\nReturn to CMS.\nPaste the code in the search box.\nClick\nSearch.\nThe Customer Info Table will automatically update with the Code and Customer Information.\nStep 5: Confirm Stock Order\nClick\nStock Order\n.\nConfirm that the correct networks have been captured.\nEnsure the requested networks match the Stock Table.\nStep 6: Finalize Request\nAdd comment:\n“Welcome pack”\nin the comment box.\nManually add Geo Location GPS Co-ordinates in CRM, if required.\nUpload ID / Passport & Profile Photo to My.Awesim\nfor Verification\nClick\nTo Invoice\n.\nClick\nEnd Request\n.\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"f4681010-99c1-4c8d-b56e-b7f28bc68c25\",\"title\":\"Creations Handling – 2nd Level CC Ambassador SOP\",\"content\":\"

Purpose:

To outline the step-by-step process for CC Ambassadors to create account codes in CRM for Creations escalated to: TO CREATE Queue.

Overview

A new Creation request will come through from CMS at the top of the queue.

Step 1: Open New ID in CMS

  1. Click “New ID” on CMS.

  1. After clicking “New ID”, the system will open the CRM page.

Step 2: Generate Customer Code in CRM

  1. Click \\\"Generate\\\" under Syspro Customer Code.
  2. The Customer Code will generate below the field.

Step 3: Create Customer

  1. Click the blue Create Customer button.
  2. Confirm the Customer Code appears to show it has been successfully saved on CRM.

Step 4: Update CMS with Customer Code

  1. Copy the generated Customer Code.
  2. Return to CMS.
  3. Paste the code in the search box.
  4. Click Search.

The Customer Info Table will automatically update with the Code and Customer Information.

Step 5: Confirm Stock Order

  1. Click Stock Order.
  2. Confirm that the correct networks have been captured.
  3. Ensure the requested networks match the Stock Table.

Step 6: Finalize Request

  1. Add comment: “Welcome pack” in the comment box.
  2. Manually add Geo Location GPS Co-ordinates in CRM, if required.
  3. Upload ID / Passport & Profile Photo to My.Awesim for Verification
  4. Click To Invoice.
  5. Click End Request.

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2026-02-12T05:21:48.866+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/f4681010-99c1-4c8d-b56e-b7f28bc68c25" }, { "id": "3448722a-68a2-41fb-b35f-4c1c168f5883", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"3448722a-68a2-41fb-b35f-4c1c168f5883\",\"title\":\"Company Info@ Inbox Management & Query Handling SOP\",\"content\":\"\nSTANDARD OPERATING PROCEDURE\nThis Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) is effective immediately and compliance is mandatory. Please note this is not exhaustive and may not cover every possible scenario, process or detail. Non-compliance with the guidelines or instructions outlined herein may result in disciplinary measures. Should you have any questions or need further clarification, you are responsible for consulting with your Line Manager promptly.\nPURPOSE\nTo ensure the Company\nInfo@ Inbox\nis managed consistently and accurately, with queries handled in line with defined response standards, verified knowledge sources, structured escalation processes, and data compliance requirements.\nInfo@ -\nPrerequisites\nThe Line Manager is responsible for requesting or sharing access to the\nInfo@ Gmail inbox\nwith the assigned user.\nLogin details must remain confidential in line with policy.\n1. Log in\nGo to\nlink\n2. Check the inbox\nOpen the email and identify the query type, before responding.\nAccount-specific query\n→ Verify details → Respond using Customer Mangement System (CMS) and /or Knowledge Base → Log Service Request (SR)\nGeneral business enquiry\n→ Re-route (no SR unless customer impact is identified)\n3. Account-Specific Query\nUse available\nagent/customer information\nto establish account details:\nPhone number\nEmail address\nIf details are missing,\nrequest the required information\nto establish the account\nAnswer queries using the\nKnowledge Base / Help Centre\nResponses must align with the\nCustomer Care Service Request (SR) Handling SOP\nAdd ~ followed by your initials at the end of each reply, for internal user tracking purposes\nExample: ~BB\nLog comments, complaints, or support requests via the Slack workflow\n“Customer Feedback Form.\n4. Capture SeRvice request (SR) Comment in CMS\nCapture a\nclear SR comment in the CMS\nto track all relevant interactions. Document the Query and guidance or resolution provided.\nExample: SR Comment: Info@ Query - XXX\nThis ensures Customer Care has\ncontext and visibility\nif the agent/customer contacts us again\n5. General Business Enquiry\nAction:\nRe-route the query to the appropriate department or responsible Line Manager.\n6. Archive\nOnce the query has been\nfully actioned and responded to\n, click the\nArchive\nbutton to close off the email\nImportant Notes\nMulti-Channel Communication\nIf an agent is engaging on\nmore than one channel\n:\nAcknowledge this\nConfirm\nwhich channel\nthey would like support to continue on\nProceed on\none agreed channel only\nto avoid duplication\nQuality Assurance & GOVERNANCE\nAny concerns relating to\nCustomer Care team handling\nmust be:\nLogged via the\nQA process\nTracked for compliance, coaching, and improvement\nSecurity & Suspicious Activity\nDo not click\non any links or attachments that appear suspicious or unexpected. If unsure, escalate as outlined below.\nDo not reply to or engage with\nsuspected phishing, fraud, or unusual activity\nImmediately forward\nthe email or notification to\nCEO – Greg\nfor review\nGoogle account or security notifications\nmust also be forwarded to\nCEO – Greg\nResponse times\nReply within less than 2 business hours (operating hours)\nAny scheduled focus or task-specific time slots must be adhered to.\nTime Tracking:\nToggl Track\n- Record time spent on the task for accurate reporting.\nTask Description:\nInfo@\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"3448722a-68a2-41fb-b35f-4c1c168f5883\",\"title\":\"Company Info@ Inbox Management & Query Handling SOP\",\"content\":\"

STANDARD OPERATING PROCEDURE

This Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) is effective immediately and compliance is mandatory. Please note this is not exhaustive and may not cover every possible scenario, process or detail. Non-compliance with the guidelines or instructions outlined herein may result in disciplinary measures. Should you have any questions or need further clarification, you are responsible for consulting with your Line Manager promptly.

PURPOSE

To ensure the Company Info@ Inbox is managed consistently and accurately, with queries handled in line with defined response standards, verified knowledge sources, structured escalation processes, and data compliance requirements.

Info@ - Prerequisites

The Line Manager is responsible for requesting or sharing access to the Info@ Gmail inbox with the assigned user.
Login details must remain confidential in line with policy.


1. Log in

  • Go to link

2. Check the inbox

  • Open the email and identify the query type, before responding.
  • Account-specific query → Verify details → Respond using Customer Mangement System (CMS) and /or Knowledge Base → Log Service Request (SR)
  • General business enquiry → Re-route (no SR unless customer impact is identified)

3. Account-Specific Query

  • Use available agent/customer information to establish account details:
    • Phone number
    • Email address
  • If details are missing, request the required information to establish the account
  • Answer queries using the Knowledge Base / Help Centre
  • Responses must align with the Customer Care Service Request (SR) Handling SOP
  • Add ~ followed by your initials at the end of each reply, for internal user tracking purposes
    Example: ~BB
  • Log comments, complaints, or support requests via the Slack workflow “Customer Feedback Form.

4. Capture SeRvice request (SR) Comment in CMS

  • Capture a clear SR comment in the CMS to track all relevant interactions. Document the Query and guidance or resolution provided.
  • Example: SR Comment: Info@ Query - XXX
  • This ensures Customer Care has context and visibility if the agent/customer contacts us again

5. General Business Enquiry

  • Action: Re-route the query to the appropriate department or responsible Line Manager.


6. Archive

  • Once the query has been fully actioned and responded to, click the Archive button to close off the email

Important Notes

Multi-Channel Communication

  • If an agent is engaging on more than one channel:
    • Acknowledge this
    • Confirm which channel they would like support to continue on
    • Proceed on one agreed channel only to avoid duplication

Quality Assurance & GOVERNANCE

  • Any concerns relating to Customer Care team handling must be:
    • Logged via the QA process
    • Tracked for compliance, coaching, and improvement

Security & Suspicious Activity

  • Do not click on any links or attachments that appear suspicious or unexpected. If unsure, escalate as outlined below.
  • Do not reply to or engage with suspected phishing, fraud, or unusual activity
  • Immediately forward the email or notification to CEO – Greg for review
  • Google account or security notifications must also be forwarded to CEO – Greg

Response times

  • Reply within less than 2 business hours (operating hours)
  • Any scheduled focus or task-specific time slots must be adhered to.
  • Time Tracking: Toggl Track - Record time spent on the task for accurate reporting.

Task Description: Info@

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2026-02-09T08:05:54.743+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/3448722a-68a2-41fb-b35f-4c1c168f5883" }, { "id": "4bf5fb62-afe2-4e44-b098-4fc9e61d0dea", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"4bf5fb62-afe2-4e44-b098-4fc9e61d0dea\",\"title\":\"How to earn up to R90 per SIM? \",\"content\":\"\nThe up to R90 per SIM is broken down as follows:\nR30 per Activation (REAL Customers) paid on the 25th\nR20 per Activation for Month-end (Bonus) Payment\nR10 per REWIND Activation (the Activation of any SIM that’s older than 1 yr)\nR30 per Port\nTotal = up to R90 Per SIM\nThe above excludes any network-specific incentives or additional competition payments, which offer you the opportunity to earn even more.\nFor more info on what the above means, please visit:\nhttps://awesim.co.za/Payments\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"4bf5fb62-afe2-4e44-b098-4fc9e61d0dea\",\"title\":\"How to earn up to R90 per SIM? \",\"content\":\"

The up to R90 per SIM is broken down as follows:

  • R30 per Activation (REAL Customers) paid on the 25th
  • R20 per Activation for Month-end (Bonus) Payment
  • R10 per REWIND Activation (the Activation of any SIM that’s older than 1 yr)
  • R30 per Port

Total = up to R90 Per SIM
The above excludes any network-specific incentives or additional competition payments, which offer you the opportunity to earn even more.

For more info on what the above means, please visit:

https://awesim.co.za/Payments

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2026-02-04T06:03:44.997+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/4bf5fb62-afe2-4e44-b098-4fc9e61d0dea" }, { "id": "039d5124-336d-42ef-bb41-6f7c42d69983", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"039d5124-336d-42ef-bb41-6f7c42d69983\",\"title\":\"Smartcall Support \",\"content\":\"\nAwesim cannot access your Smartload eWallet or password.\nIf you need assistance with your SmartLoad, please contact Smartcall Customer Care:\nCustomer Care: 011 507 4789\nEmail: support@smartcall.co.za\nWhatsApp: 064 670 8975\nOffice hours are Monday to Friday 08:00 - 17:30, and Saturday 08:00 - 12:00.\nAfter hours are outside of these times, including Sundays and Public Holidays.\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"039d5124-336d-42ef-bb41-6f7c42d69983\",\"title\":\"Smartcall Support \",\"content\":\"

Awesim cannot access your Smartload eWallet or password.
If you need assistance with your SmartLoad, please contact Smartcall Customer Care:

  • Customer Care: 011 507 4789
  • Email: support@smartcall.co.za
  • WhatsApp: 064 670 8975

Office hours are Monday to Friday 08:00 - 17:30, and Saturday 08:00 - 12:00.
After hours are outside of these times, including Sundays and Public Holidays.



\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2026-01-27T09:18:16.000+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/039d5124-336d-42ef-bb41-6f7c42d69983" }, { "id": "998dff51-b6ef-44d7-bd52-746f398a6aa2", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"998dff51-b6ef-44d7-bd52-746f398a6aa2\",\"title\":\"Manual Number Change SOP\",\"content\":\"\nSTANDARD OPERATING PROCEDURE\nThe following is a Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) that must be followed as of the date of issue. Non-compliance to this document and/or instruction may result in disciplinary action. Should you have any queries in regard to this SOP, you are required to address same with management immediately.\nPURPOSE\nAny manual number change(s) pose a security risk to the agent’s account, as they grant access to payment methods.\nThis Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) is to mitigate this risk, it is crucial to not only request\nnew verification documents\n, even if previously verified, but also to\nre-upload them\n. This allows for a comparison between\nold\nand\nnew\nverification documents as an additional security check before updating the telephone number.\nManual Number\nChange SOP\nThis procedure applies to all agents / Sales Reps or Customer Care (CC) requesting updates to customer account information, specifically Telephone Number Changes.\nVerification & Upload Requirements\nUpload new verification documents, even if the agent was previously verified, in accordance with the\nFile Upload Verification Checks SOP\nAll manual number changes require re-verification, regardless of when the original verification took place.\nIf the customer code was previously verified, only the profile photo is required for facial verification comparison, rather than uploading all documents again.\nManual Number Change Process\nCheck if New Telephone number is SmartRICA Registered on CMS - SmartRICA Verify, if Not yet registered, proceed to register the new Tel number on\nSmartcall Online\n.\nCheck if New Telephone number is not saved on any other customer codes on CRM (Search results to return blank if not on any other code).\nFor any manual number changes, please ensure the\nDefault Order Type (DOT)\nis checked and clarified with the customer, as it determines the\nPayment Method\nassociated with the account.\nManual number updates may still be processed as usual; however,\nNo Manual Updates\nshould be made on\npayment days\n[i.e Activation Payments: 25th of every month; Month-end Bonus Payments: 30th/31st of every month & Bus bonus: 10th of every month]. Finance conducts a final checklist review on the morning of each pay day to update any necessary numbers for processing payments.\nRaising a Service Request (SR) on CMS\nRaise SR on CMS -\nif Sales Rep\n:\nSR Comment: Please update main Tel # 276612345678 with New Tel # 27819101112, New Tel # is Smart Rica Registered and is not on any other codes on CRM. Verification documents have been uploaded.\nDropdown: NUMBER CHANGE\nRaise SR on CMS -\nif GEN: Customer Care (CC)\n:\nSR Comment: Please update main Tel # 276612345678 with New Tel # 27819101112, New Tel # is Smart Rica      Registered and is not on any other codes on CRM. Verification documents have been uploaded.\nDropdown: NUMBER CHANGE ESC\nConclusion\nThis SOP ensures that manual number changes are conducted with an additional layer of security by verifying, comparing, and validating all required information before updating an agent’s telephone number. Following this process helps protect agent accounts from unauthorized access and maintains system integrity.\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"998dff51-b6ef-44d7-bd52-746f398a6aa2\",\"title\":\"Manual Number Change SOP\",\"content\":\"

STANDARD OPERATING PROCEDURE

The following is a Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) that must be followed as of the date of issue. Non-compliance to this document and/or instruction may result in disciplinary action. Should you have any queries in regard to this SOP, you are required to address same with management immediately.


PURPOSE

Any manual number change(s) pose a security risk to the agent’s account, as they grant access to payment methods.

This Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) is to mitigate this risk, it is crucial to not only request new verification documents, even if previously verified, but also to re-upload them. This allows for a comparison between old and new verification documents as an additional security check before updating the telephone number.

Manual Number Change SOP

This procedure applies to all agents / Sales Reps or Customer Care (CC) requesting updates to customer account information, specifically Telephone Number Changes.

Verification & Upload Requirements

Upload new verification documents, even if the agent was previously verified, in accordance with the File Upload Verification Checks SOP

  1. All manual number changes require re-verification, regardless of when the original verification took place.
  2. If the customer code was previously verified, only the profile photo is required for facial verification comparison, rather than uploading all documents again.

Manual Number Change Process

  1. Check if New Telephone number is SmartRICA Registered on CMS - SmartRICA Verify, if Not yet registered, proceed to register the new Tel number on Smartcall Online.
  2. Check if New Telephone number is not saved on any other customer codes on CRM (Search results to return blank if not on any other code).   
  3. For any manual number changes, please ensure the Default Order Type (DOT) is checked and clarified with the customer, as it determines the Payment Method associated with the account.
  4. Manual number updates may still be processed as usual; however, No Manual Updates should be made on payment days [i.e Activation Payments: 25th of every month; Month-end Bonus Payments: 30th/31st of every month & Bus bonus: 10th of every month]. Finance conducts a final checklist review on the morning of each pay day to update any necessary numbers for processing payments.

Raising a Service Request (SR) on CMS

Raise SR on CMS - if Sales Rep: 

  • SR Comment: Please update main Tel # 276612345678 with New Tel # 27819101112, New Tel # is Smart Rica Registered and is not on any other codes on CRM. Verification documents have been uploaded. 
  • Dropdown: NUMBER CHANGE        

Raise SR on CMS - if GEN: Customer Care (CC):

  • SR Comment: Please update main Tel # 276612345678 with New Tel # 27819101112, New Tel # is Smart Rica      Registered and is not on any other codes on CRM. Verification documents have been uploaded.
  • Dropdown: NUMBER CHANGE ESC  

Conclusion

This SOP ensures that manual number changes are conducted with an additional layer of security by verifying, comparing, and validating all required information before updating an agent’s telephone number. Following this process helps protect agent accounts from unauthorized access and maintains system integrity.

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [ { "value": "change", "id": "f17a1bfb-c579-4e8d-a110-7ac857a6e363", "categoryId": "e0751ef6-b3fd-4bd0-babb-3bc7619c24e1", "categoryName": "Support Tags" }, { "value": "manual", "id": "f49af67e-6da2-4056-92b6-647c8bba4ba1", "categoryId": "877b2ec0-0822-48f7-ac44-e37af6584b8d", "categoryName": "Tags" }, { "value": "manual number change sop", "id": "1dc951cf-4875-4160-abe0-b9f7bc6a4a9a", "categoryId": "877b2ec0-0822-48f7-ac44-e37af6584b8d", "categoryName": "Tags" }, { "value": "number", "id": "08b8441a-5785-47ce-b2ae-9ac3c8b411d9", "categoryId": "e0751ef6-b3fd-4bd0-babb-3bc7619c24e1", "categoryName": "Support Tags" }, { "value": "Number Change", "id": "fc94af9c-ef1c-43b2-982c-9e9e37930cf7", "categoryId": "e0751ef6-b3fd-4bd0-babb-3bc7619c24e1", "categoryName": "Support Tags" } ], "last_modified": "2026-01-23T09:12:16.530+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/998dff51-b6ef-44d7-bd52-746f398a6aa2" }, { "id": "137c7870-e83a-4249-b704-78d142298c8a", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"137c7870-e83a-4249-b704-78d142298c8a\",\"title\":\"SurveyMonkey (WhatsApp) Chat Rating Daily Report SOP\",\"content\":\"\nSTANDARD OPERATING PROCEDURE\nThe following is a Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) that must be followed as of the date of issue. Non-compliance to this document and/or instruction may result in disciplinary action. Should you have any queries in regard to this SOP, you are required to address same with management immediately.\nPURPOSE\nThis Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) is t\no ensure the consistent, accurate, and timely extraction, review, and escalation of daily WhatsApp customer service feedback collected via SurveyMonkey.\nThis SOP enables the Customer Care team to:\nTrack customer satisfaction and service quality through chat ratings\nIdentify and investigate negative feedback or inconsistencies\nTake corrective actions where necessary\nMaintain a record of customer sentiment and service interactions for quality assurance and continuous improvement\nTOOLS REQUIRED\nSurveyMonkey account access (\nfeedback@awesim.co.za\n)\nExported XLS file\nExcel and Google Sheets\nAccess to CMS for Service Request (SR) referencing\nRESPONSIBILITY MATRIX & TASK COLOUR CODING\nTo streamline workflow and clarify accountability, the following task breakdown applies. Responsibilities are visually highlighted on the\nCustomer Service Chat Rating Google Sheet\nusing the colors listed below.\n⬛\nGrey Fill\n— Tasks to be completed by\nCustomer Care Admin (CCA)\n🟨\nYellow Fill\n— Tasks to be completed by\nCustomer Care Supervisor (CC Sup)\nDaily Task Breakdown\nTask Description\nResponsible\nSheet Cell Color\nVerify that new daily data has auto-populated correctly via formula/automation\nCustomer Care Admin (CCA)\nGrey\nCheck for missing fields, blanks, or formatting issues\nCCA\nGrey\nHighlight and mark\nPoor Ratings\nor mismatched comments in\nred\nCCA\nGrey\nPopulate the following from CMS:\n- Customer Code, Service Request Number, Salesperson, Customer History Notes\nCCA\nGrey\n- Action Taken Summary (support to field agent)\nCCA\nGrey\nEnsure proper formatting of numbers and IDs if corrections are needed manually\nCCA\nGrey\nReview completed entries and investigations\nCC Supervisor\nYellow\nSpot-check random positive ratings for inconsistencies\nCC Supervisor\nYellow\nConfirm all flagged (red) entries have been actioned and resolved\nCC Supervisor\nYellow\nEscalate repetitive issues or unresolved complaints to management or QA\nCC Supervisor\nYellow\nProvide coaching feedback where required\nCC Supervisor\nYellow\nThis task matrix must be reviewed weekly by the CC Supervisor to ensure proper adherence to roles, especially when automation is in place. The Sheet should reflect updated task assignments with accurate color formatting as per this SOP.\nAutomated Process Overview\nThe system runs a scheduled export or API-based sync from SurveyMonkey to Excel/Google Sheets.\nA formula automatically transfers key fields:\nRespondent ID\nDate\nService Rating\nCustomer Name\nFormatted Cell Phone Number\nFormatted ID/Passport Number\nComments/Feedback\nGoogle Sheet Link\n:\nCustomer Service Chat Rating Google Sheet\nManual Tasks That Still Apply\nEven with automation in place, the following steps\nmust still be performed daily\nto ensure service quality and accountability:\nStep 1 – Daily Verification\nCustomer Care Admin (CCA)\nOpen the Google Sheet and verify that the day’s data has populated correctly.\nCheck for any:\nMissing fields\nFormatting issues\nIncomplete records\nStep 2 – Feedback Investigation\nReview\nPoor Ratings\nor\nmismatched comments\n.\nHighlight in\nred\nand populate:\nCustomer Code (from CMS)\nSR Number\nSalesperson or GEN\nCustomer History Notes (QA)\nActions Taken\nStep 3 – Final QA Review\nConfirm that all required investigations and QA steps have been completed.\nEscalate unresolved or repeated complaints to the QA Lead or Manager.\n⚠️ Important Note on Automation Limit\nOur\nSurveyMonkey subscription has a monthly response quota\n. Once this quota is reached,\nthe automation will cease\nuntil the subscription refreshes on the\n4th of each month\n.\nCCA must monitor response volumes nearing the end of each cycle.\nIf automation stops:\nRevert to\nmanual extraction and data entry (Step 1–3)\nas detailed in this SOP.\nNotify the CC Supervisor immediately for monitoring and escalation.\nResume automation checks from the 5th of the month onward.\nManual PROCEDURE\nStep 1 – Download Survey Responses\nLog in at\nwww.surveymonkey.com\nusing:\nEmail:\nfeedback@awesim.co.za\nPassword: [To be provided]\nNavigate to\n[My Surveys]\n>\nCustomer Service (Chat) Rating – WhatsApp\nApply filter for\ncurrent date\n:\nClick on\nFilter date\nAdjust to today’s date\nClick\nApply\nClick\nAnalyze Results\n>\nSave As\n>\nIndividual Responses\nExport as\nXLS\n> Click\nExport\n> Then\nDownload\nStep 2 – Data Sorting & Formatting\nOpen the exported XLS file and apply\nFilters\non Row 1.\nSort the data by\nEnd Date\n:\nSelect\nEnd Date\n>\nSort Oldest to Newest\nDelete any historic data\nnot part of today’s filter.\nFormat Cell Phone Numbers\n:\nInsert a new column before and after “Cell Phone Number”\nAdd\n'27\nin front of all SA numbers\nUse formula\n=K3&L3\nto link country code\nCopy-paste\nValues Only\nRemove formula column\nFormat ID/Passport Numbers\nsimilarly:\nInsert columns before and after “ID/Passport”\nUse apostrophe formatting and a concatenation formula\n=P3&Q3\nCopy-paste values and delete formula\nStep 3 – Copy to Google Sheet\nOpen:\nDownloads > Data > Customer Service Chat Rating.xlsx\nCopy the following fields:\nRespondent ID\nEnd Date\nRate our service\nName & Surname\nReformatted Cell Phone Number\nReformatted ID/Passport Number\nComments/Feedback\nPaste into:\nCustomer Service Chat Rating Google Sheet\nStep 4 – Rating Review & Investigation\nHighlight any\nPoor Ratings\nor\ninconsistent comments\nin\nRed\n.\nFor each:\nRetrieve from CMS:\nCustomer Code\nRelated Service Request Number\nAssigned Salesperson\nCustomer History Notes\nSR Actions Taken\nSummarize findings and steps taken\nUpdate the Google Sheet accordingly.\nStep 5 – Final Checks & Action Plan\nConfirm\nall Poor Ratings\nand\ninconsistent feedback\nhave been:\nInvestigated\nDocumented\nActioned as per QA standards\nConfirm\nService Requests\nwere:\nValid\nAppropriately followed up\nEscalate unresolved issues to QA/Management with supporting notes.\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"137c7870-e83a-4249-b704-78d142298c8a\",\"title\":\"SurveyMonkey (WhatsApp) Chat Rating Daily Report SOP\",\"content\":\"

STANDARD OPERATING PROCEDURE

The following is a Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) that must be followed as of the date of issue. Non-compliance to this document and/or instruction may result in disciplinary action. Should you have any queries in regard to this SOP, you are required to address same with management immediately.


PURPOSE

This Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) is to ensure the consistent, accurate, and timely extraction, review, and escalation of daily WhatsApp customer service feedback collected via SurveyMonkey.

This SOP enables the Customer Care team to:

  • Track customer satisfaction and service quality through chat ratings
  • Identify and investigate negative feedback or inconsistencies
  • Take corrective actions where necessary
  • Maintain a record of customer sentiment and service interactions for quality assurance and continuous improvement

TOOLS REQUIRED

  • SurveyMonkey account access (feedback@awesim.co.za)
  • Exported XLS file
  • Excel and Google Sheets
  • Access to CMS for Service Request (SR) referencing

RESPONSIBILITY MATRIX & TASK COLOUR CODING

To streamline workflow and clarify accountability, the following task breakdown applies. Responsibilities are visually highlighted on the Customer Service Chat Rating Google Sheet using the colors listed below.

⬛ Grey Fill — Tasks to be completed by Customer Care Admin (CCA)

🟨 Yellow Fill — Tasks to be completed by Customer Care Supervisor (CC Sup)

Daily Task Breakdown

Task Description

Responsible

Sheet Cell Color

Verify that new daily data has auto-populated correctly via formula/automation

Customer Care Admin (CCA)

Grey

Check for missing fields, blanks, or formatting issues

CCA

Grey

Highlight and mark Poor Ratings or mismatched comments in red

CCA

Grey

Populate the following from CMS:

- Customer Code, Service Request Number, Salesperson, Customer History Notes

CCA

Grey

- Action Taken Summary (support to field agent)

CCA

Grey

Ensure proper formatting of numbers and IDs if corrections are needed manually

CCA

Grey

Review completed entries and investigations

CC Supervisor

Yellow

Spot-check random positive ratings for inconsistencies

CC Supervisor

Yellow

Confirm all flagged (red) entries have been actioned and resolved

CC Supervisor

Yellow

Escalate repetitive issues or unresolved complaints to management or QA

CC Supervisor

Yellow

Provide coaching feedback where required

CC Supervisor

Yellow

This task matrix must be reviewed weekly by the CC Supervisor to ensure proper adherence to roles, especially when automation is in place. The Sheet should reflect updated task assignments with accurate color formatting as per this SOP.

Automated Process Overview

  • The system runs a scheduled export or API-based sync from SurveyMonkey to Excel/Google Sheets.
  • A formula automatically transfers key fields:
    • Respondent ID
    • Date
    • Service Rating
    • Customer Name
    • Formatted Cell Phone Number
    • Formatted ID/Passport Number
    • Comments/Feedback
Google Sheet Link:
Customer Service Chat Rating Google Sheet

Manual Tasks That Still Apply

Even with automation in place, the following steps must still be performed daily to ensure service quality and accountability:

Step 1 – Daily Verification

Customer Care Admin (CCA)

  • Open the Google Sheet and verify that the day’s data has populated correctly.
  • Check for any:
    • Missing fields
    • Formatting issues
    • Incomplete records

Step 2 – Feedback Investigation

  • Review Poor Ratings or mismatched comments.
  • Highlight in red and populate:
    • Customer Code (from CMS)
    • SR Number
    • Salesperson or GEN
    • Customer History Notes (QA)
    • Actions Taken

Step 3 – Final QA Review

  • Confirm that all required investigations and QA steps have been completed.
  • Escalate unresolved or repeated complaints to the QA Lead or Manager.

⚠️ Important Note on Automation Limit

Our SurveyMonkey subscription has a monthly response quota. Once this quota is reached, the automation will cease until the subscription refreshes on the 4th of each month.

  • CCA must monitor response volumes nearing the end of each cycle.
  • If automation stops:
    • Revert to manual extraction and data entry (Step 1–3) as detailed in this SOP.
    • Notify the CC Supervisor immediately for monitoring and escalation.
    • Resume automation checks from the 5th of the month onward.

Manual PROCEDURE

Step 1 – Download Survey Responses

  1. Log in at www.surveymonkey.com using:
    • Email: feedback@awesim.co.za
    • Password: [To be provided]
  2. Navigate to [My Surveys] > Customer Service (Chat) Rating – WhatsApp
  3. Apply filter for current date:
    • Click on Filter date
    • Adjust to today’s date
    • Click Apply
  4. Click Analyze Results > Save As > Individual Responses
  5. Export as XLS > Click Export > Then Download

Step 2 – Data Sorting & Formatting

  1. Open the exported XLS file and apply Filters on Row 1.
  2. Sort the data by End Date:
    • Select End Date > Sort Oldest to Newest
  3. Delete any historic data not part of today’s filter.
  4. Format Cell Phone Numbers:
    • Insert a new column before and after “Cell Phone Number”
    • Add '27 in front of all SA numbers
    • Use formula =K3&L3 to link country code
    • Copy-paste Values Only
    • Remove formula column
  5. Format ID/Passport Numbers similarly:
    • Insert columns before and after “ID/Passport”
    • Use apostrophe formatting and a concatenation formula =P3&Q3
    • Copy-paste values and delete formula

Step 3 – Copy to Google Sheet

  1. Open:
    Downloads > Data > Customer Service Chat Rating.xlsx
  2. Copy the following fields:
    • Respondent ID
    • End Date
    • Rate our service
    • Name & Surname
    • Reformatted Cell Phone Number
    • Reformatted ID/Passport Number
    • Comments/Feedback
  3. Paste into:
    Customer Service Chat Rating Google Sheet

Step 4 – Rating Review & Investigation

  1. Highlight any Poor Ratings or inconsistent comments in Red.
  2. For each:
    • Retrieve from CMS:
      • Customer Code
      • Related Service Request Number
      • Assigned Salesperson
      • Customer History Notes
      • SR Actions Taken
    • Summarize findings and steps taken
  3. Update the Google Sheet accordingly.

Step 5 – Final Checks & Action Plan

  1. Confirm all Poor Ratings and inconsistent feedback have been:
    • Investigated
    • Documented
    • Actioned as per QA standards
  2. Confirm Service Requests were:
    • Valid
    • Appropriately followed up
  3. Escalate unresolved issues to QA/Management with supporting notes.

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [ { "value": "chat rating", "id": "2bdb3e8b-296d-4e97-9702-a02df548e7f1", "categoryId": "877b2ec0-0822-48f7-ac44-e37af6584b8d", "categoryName": "Tags" }, { "value": "SOP Template", "id": "20027f4a-e23a-4c23-bd9d-c28d2bd2dbc7", "categoryId": "e0751ef6-b3fd-4bd0-babb-3bc7619c24e1", "categoryName": "Support Tags" }, { "value": "Survey Monkey", "id": "0eefa9ea-c7de-4525-952a-bf008b527ad4", "categoryId": "877b2ec0-0822-48f7-ac44-e37af6584b8d", "categoryName": "Tags" } ], "last_modified": "2026-01-23T09:11:58.379+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/137c7870-e83a-4249-b704-78d142298c8a" }, { "id": "ce449dd4-87c2-4fbb-8520-3a4f39444de4", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"ce449dd4-87c2-4fbb-8520-3a4f39444de4\",\"title\":\"WhatsApp Channel SOP \",\"content\":\"\nSTANDARD OPERATING PROCEDURE\nThe following is a Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) that must be followed as of the date of issue. Non-compliance to this document and/or instruction may result in disciplinary action. Should you have any queries in regard to this SOP, you are required to address same with management immediately.\nPURPOSE\nThis Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) outlines the process for posting on the WhatsApp Channel to ensure alignment with Facebook daily posts and maintain consistency in communication.\nHow to post on the whatsapp channel\nSteps to Follow on Facebook\nLog in to Facebook Awesim page.\nClick on Meta Business Suite.\nSelect Planner and tap on today’s date.\nPost according to time slots shared on Facebook.\nSteps to Follow on Awesim WhatsApp Channel\nSelect Awesim WhatsApp Channel.\nCopy and paste Facebook post to Awesim WhatsApp Channel and attach image(s).\nPosting Schedule\nGeneral posts to be shared at\n09h00\n.\nPay Day - Activation Payments posts to be shared at\n15h00\n.\nCommission payments posts to be shared at\n13h00\nand\n15h00\nContent Approval Process\nContent drafts should be reviewed and approved by the Director and / or Marketing Team before posting.\nAny urgent changes or updates must be communicated to the Director .\nContact Information\nFor any concerns or clarifications regarding WhatsApp Channel posts, contact the Director or Social Media Administrator.\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"ce449dd4-87c2-4fbb-8520-3a4f39444de4\",\"title\":\"WhatsApp Channel SOP \",\"content\":\"

STANDARD OPERATING PROCEDURE

The following is a Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) that must be followed as of the date of issue. Non-compliance to this document and/or instruction may result in disciplinary action. Should you have any queries in regard to this SOP, you are required to address same with management immediately.


PURPOSE

This Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) outlines the process for posting on the WhatsApp Channel to ensure alignment with Facebook daily posts and maintain consistency in communication.

How to post on the whatsapp channel

Steps to Follow on Facebook

  1. Log in to Facebook Awesim page.
  2. Click on Meta Business Suite.
  3. Select Planner and tap on today’s date.
  4. Post according to time slots shared on Facebook.

Steps to Follow on Awesim WhatsApp Channel

  1. Select Awesim WhatsApp Channel.
  2. Copy and paste Facebook post to Awesim WhatsApp Channel and attach image(s).

Posting Schedule

  • General posts to be shared at 09h00.
  • Pay Day - Activation Payments posts to be shared at 15h00.
  • Commission payments posts to be shared at 13h00 and 15h00

Content Approval Process

  • Content drafts should be reviewed and approved by the Director and / or Marketing Team before posting.
  • Any urgent changes or updates must be communicated to the Director .

Contact Information

For any concerns or clarifications regarding WhatsApp Channel posts, contact the Director or Social Media Administrator.


\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [ { "value": "SOP Template", "id": "20027f4a-e23a-4c23-bd9d-c28d2bd2dbc7", "categoryId": "e0751ef6-b3fd-4bd0-babb-3bc7619c24e1", "categoryName": "Support Tags" }, { "value": "whatsapp", "id": "a5b9c7cb-f2f4-498c-afa3-a3cc0ea5db57", "categoryId": "877b2ec0-0822-48f7-ac44-e37af6584b8d", "categoryName": "Tags" }, { "value": "whatsapp posts", "id": "9f62a63e-ee9e-4406-a72e-923a87c0fd33", "categoryId": "877b2ec0-0822-48f7-ac44-e37af6584b8d", "categoryName": "Tags" } ], "last_modified": "2026-01-23T09:11:44.908+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/ce449dd4-87c2-4fbb-8520-3a4f39444de4" }, { "id": "ee8c93e3-d99f-4d14-86ae-4dc008f1b540", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"ee8c93e3-d99f-4d14-86ae-4dc008f1b540\",\"title\":\"Euphoria IVR Set-Up SOP\",\"content\":\"\nSTANDARD OPERATING PROCEDURE\nThe following is a Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) that must be followed as of the date of issue. Non-compliance to this document and/or instruction may result in disciplinary action. Should you have any queries in regard to this SOP, you are required to address same with management immediately.\nPURPOSE\nThis Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) outlines how to configure Euphoria IVR to play a call recording or voicemail message when Customer Care (CC) agents are unavailable—typically due to scheduled team meetings or training sessions.\nTools & Access Required\nEuphoria Administrator Portal access\nAudio file(s) for IVR prompts (in WAV/MP3 format)\nPre-approved IVR flow or call-routing diagram\nExtension list or destination numbers\nEmail/Slack for confirmation with relevant departments\nLog in to the Euphoria Admin Portal\nNavigate to:\nhttps://tms.euphoria.co.za/\nUse your admin credentials to log in.\nIVR Set-Up for Scheduled CC Unavailability (Meetings/Events)\nWhen the\nCustomer Care team is unavailable to take calls\n(e.g., during scheduled meetings), a temporary IVR must be configured to\ncapture calls via voicemail or recording\nand inform callers of the unavailability.\nUpload Audio File\nConfirm team/department needs:\nIVR greeting\nRouting options (e.g.,Play file and Hangup)\nOperating hours or scheduled availability\nPrepare a professional voice recording of the IVR message.\nTemporary IVR for CC Meetings or Unavailability\nWhen the CC team is in a scheduled meeting:\nGo to:\nPBX Manager > Inbound Routes\nClick\nAdd Action\nDescription: \\\"CC in Meeting – Temporary IVR Active\\\"\nSchedule it to start\n10 minutes before\nthe meeting time and ends 5 - 10 minutes after the meeting.\nAttach the message (e.g., \\\"\nCC Unavailable generic\n…\\\")\nTest the audio before activation.\nClick Apply\nTest the IVR\nDial the linked number or extension ( Office Tel: 011 268 1348)\nVerify:\nAudio clarity\nKeypress routing (e.g.,Play file and Hangup)\nCall flow continuity\n🎧 Click on Voice Recordings to listen to the IVR recordings we have on file.\nE.g: “Audio file for CC Unavailable generic – English Version”\nBest Practices\nReview IVRs quarterly or after any operational change.\nKeep a log of IVR versions and changes.\nAlways test before going live.\nUse professional and clear audio recordings.\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"ee8c93e3-d99f-4d14-86ae-4dc008f1b540\",\"title\":\"Euphoria IVR Set-Up SOP\",\"content\":\"

STANDARD OPERATING PROCEDURE

The following is a Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) that must be followed as of the date of issue. Non-compliance to this document and/or instruction may result in disciplinary action. Should you have any queries in regard to this SOP, you are required to address same with management immediately.


PURPOSE

This Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) outlines how to configure Euphoria IVR to play a call recording or voicemail message when Customer Care (CC) agents are unavailable—typically due to scheduled team meetings or training sessions.

Tools & Access Required

  • Euphoria Administrator Portal access
  • Audio file(s) for IVR prompts (in WAV/MP3 format)
  • Pre-approved IVR flow or call-routing diagram
  • Extension list or destination numbers
  • Email/Slack for confirmation with relevant departments

Log in to the Euphoria Admin Portal

  • Navigate to: https://tms.euphoria.co.za/
  • Use your admin credentials to log in.

IVR Set-Up for Scheduled CC Unavailability (Meetings/Events)

When the Customer Care team is unavailable to take calls (e.g., during scheduled meetings), a temporary IVR must be configured to capture calls via voicemail or recording and inform callers of the unavailability.

Upload Audio File

Confirm team/department needs:

  • IVR greeting
  • Routing options (e.g.,Play file and Hangup)
  • Operating hours or scheduled availability
  • Prepare a professional voice recording of the IVR message.

Temporary IVR for CC Meetings or Unavailability

When the CC team is in a scheduled meeting:

  1. Go to: PBX Manager > Inbound Routes
  2. Click Add Action
  3. Description: \\\"CC in Meeting – Temporary IVR Active\\\"
  4. Schedule it to start 10 minutes before the meeting time and ends 5 - 10 minutes after the meeting.
  5. Attach the message (e.g., \\\"CC Unavailable generic…\\\")
  6. Test the audio before activation.
  7. Click Apply

Test the IVR

  • Dial the linked number or extension ( Office Tel: 011 268 1348)
  • Verify:
  • Audio clarity
  • Keypress routing (e.g.,Play file and Hangup)
  • Call flow continuity

🎧 Click on Voice Recordings to listen to the IVR recordings we have on file.

E.g: “Audio file for CC Unavailable generic – English Version”

Best Practices

  • Review IVRs quarterly or after any operational change.
  • Keep a log of IVR versions and changes.
  • Always test before going live.
  • Use professional and clear audio recordings.

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [ { "value": "Set IVR", "id": "b377e7ca-50c1-4e6f-8406-ae4ac3e4b255", "categoryId": "877b2ec0-0822-48f7-ac44-e37af6584b8d", "categoryName": "Tags" }, { "value": "SOP Template", "id": "20027f4a-e23a-4c23-bd9d-c28d2bd2dbc7", "categoryId": "e0751ef6-b3fd-4bd0-babb-3bc7619c24e1", "categoryName": "Support Tags" } ], "last_modified": "2026-01-23T09:11:17.249+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/ee8c93e3-d99f-4d14-86ae-4dc008f1b540" }, { "id": "3014c301-89d3-46ff-9073-39519afe6ab5", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"3014c301-89d3-46ff-9073-39519afe6ab5\",\"title\":\"YE Ops Helpdesk Tickets SOP \",\"content\":\"\nPurpose\nTo outline the process and key actions required for the configuration, communication, and management of\nYear-End (YE) system notifications, Help Desk tickets, and closures\nacross all Awesim platforms during the festive period.\nThis ensures seamless coordination, consistent communication, and controlled operational shutdown and reopening.\nScope\nApplies to all systems and channels impacted by YE operations, including:\nIT Help Desk\nTwilio Chat\nCMS & BitCo Incoming SRs\nMyAwesim, USSD, and App\nOutlook - Out of Office (info@ and RTS mailboxes)\nEuphoria IVR System\nRoles & Responsibilities\nRole\nResponsibility\nIT Help DeskLead [CCA]\nOversees ticket setup, activation, and closure processes.\nIT Team\nConfigures, tests, and schedules YE notifications and auto-closures including Manages queue hiding/reinstatement (Creations Queue, TO INVOICE)..\nOperations Team\nApproves timelines and ensures system alignment (CMS, Chat, App & my.awesim).\nCustomer Care (CC)\nApplies SR descriptions, follow-up lists, and communication templates.\nKey Dates & Actions\nNote:\nThis SOP applies to the\n2025/2026 year-end\n. The dates listed below are\nindicative\nand may vary from year to year due to\nOPS planning\n.\nDate\nSystem/Event\nAction\nFri, 14 Nov 2025\nCompany Event\nAuto-reply active from 13 Nov (16h00). Chats paused until Mon, 17 Nov.\n15 Dec 2025 (17h00)\nCreations (HO) - Closed\nCode Creations will only be actioned on 6 Jan 2026.\n16 Dec 2025\nPublic Holiday\nAuto-reply active from 15 Dec (16h00). Chats paused until Wed, 17 Dec.\n01–17 Dec 2025\nMyAwesim / USSD / App\nOrders processed normally. Festive message active.\n17–18 Dec 2025\nMyAwesim / USSD / App\nDelivery not guaranteed notice active.\n18 Dec 2025 (17h00)\nAll Ordering Channels\nOrdering disabled until 04 Jan 2026 (midnight).\nApp Ordering (ONLY) Open on 1 Jan 2026\n24 Dec 2025 (13h00–14h29)\nTwilio / CMS / BitCo SRs\nPre-closure message active; urgent calls accepted until 14h30.\n24 Dec 2025 (14h30)–03 Jan 2026 (midnight)\nAll Systems\nYear-end closure message active.\n25 Dec 2025–04 Jan 2025\nOutlook (info@ / RTS)\nOut-of-office message active.\n05 Jan 2026 (08h00)\nAll Systems\nNormal operations resume.\nYE Ops 2025/26 Schedule\nIT HelpDesk Ticket Templates\n1.\nTwilio Chat Auto Response and Closure - Company Event: Friday, 14 November 2025\nHi Team,\nPlease see below the Chat Auto Response and Closure for the scheduled Company Event: Friday, 14 November 2025.\nThursday,\n13 November\n16:00 - 17:00\n\\\"We have stopped processing chat msgs 'til Mon, 17 Nov 2025. If you need to speak to us urgently, pls call 011 268 1348 before 17h00 and we’ll call you back.\\\"\nThursday,\n13 November\n17:01 - Friday,\n14 November\n17:00\n\\\"Thank you for your message. We are no longer processing msgs due to a staff function. Please send us another msg on Mon, 17 Nov after 08:00.\\\"\nAny questions, please let us know.\nThank you.\n2.\nTwilio Chat Auto Response and Closure - Public Holiday “Day of Reconciliation”: Tuesday, 16 December 2025 - Chat Auto Response & Closure\nHi team\nPlease see below the Chat Auto Response and Closure for the Public Holiday - Day of Reconciliation.\nMonday, 15 December\n16:00 - 17:00\n\\\"We have stopped processing msgs due to the Public Holiday tomorrow. If you need to speak to us urgently, call 011 268 1348 before 17h00 and we’ll call you back.\\\"\nMonday, 15 December 17:01 - 00:00\n\\\"We have stopped processing msgs due to the Public Holiday tomorrow. Please send us another msg Wed, 17 Dec after 08:00.\\\"\nTuesday, 16 December 00:01 - 17:00\n\\\"Thank you for your message. It is a Public Holiday - Day of Reconciliation. Please send us another msg tomorrow Wed, 17 Dec after 08:00.\\\"\nThank you.\n3.\nCMS - MISReport: \\\"CMS - CC Roles - Check Status\\\" -\nRemove Creations from automation proc\nHi Team,\nIn preparation for year-end operations, please assist wrt the below daily \\\"Job\\\"\nTask:\nRemove Creations from automation proc\nDetails:\nRemove Creations:\n[Specify date] December 2026 at 17h00\n(date to align with 2026 / 2027 YE Planner)\nReactivate Creations automation proc :\n5 January 2027 at 07h00 in line with\nJanuary Call Backs Proc\n4. CMS - YE 2025 - BitCo Table Incomings + Auto-System SRs\nHi Team,\nIn preparation for year-end operations, please assist wrt auto-replies and their auto-closures for Incoming BitCo SRs. SMSes (all SMSes).\n1. Wednesday, 24th December from 13:45 to 14:29\nNotification:\nWe are no longer processing msgs for 2025. If you need to speak to us urgently before we close, call 011 268 1348 before 14h30 and we’ll call you back.\n2. Wednesday, 24th December from 14:30 'til Fri, 4th January\n(midnight) >>\nThere is no weekend message.\nNotification:\nWe wish all our agents a wonderful festive season. We are no longer processing msgs for 2025. Please SMS again on Mon 5th of Jan 2026, 08:00 when we reopen.\nThank you.\nNOTE TO CCA :\nHead office will close at 15h00 on Wed, 24 December 2025 - however this is confidential and will only be communicated on Slack #general on the day.\nAbove times allow us to process the last of any queries.\nAny questions, please let us know.\n5.\nMy.Awesim, USSD & App - YE 2025 - Order functionality (Closure & Reactivation)\nHi Team\nIn preparation for year-end operations, please see below system notifications:\n1. My.Awesim, USSD & App\nnotification\n8th 'til 16th December 2025 (midnight)\nNotification:\n\\\"\nPlease note - orders placed during this period (08th - 16th Dec) will be processed, invoiced & shipped ahead of the festive season.\\\"\n2. My.Awesim, USSD & App\nnotification\nWednesday, 17th December till Thursday, 18th December 'til\n17:00\n*\nNotification:\n\\\"\nPlease note - orders placed today & tomorrow (17th – 18th Dec) will be processed, however we cannot guarantee delivery due to the festive season.\n\\\"\n3. Disable option to order stock: My.Awesim &\nUSSD notification\nDisable the option to order stock - ‘disabled’ on Thursday, 18th December 2025\nfrom\n17:00\n'til 04th January 2026 (midnight).\nNotification: \\\"\nPlease note - ordering is now closed (18th Dec – 04th Jan). You will be able to order again from 5 Jan 2026.\nIt will need to be\nre-activated\nfrom the 04th January 2026 at 23:59 (midnight) >> 5 Jan 2026.\n4.\nDisable option to order stock: App\nDisable: 18 December 2025 17h00\nReactivate: 1 Jan 2026 (Midnight)\nNotification: \\\"\nPlease note - ordering is now closed (18th – 31st Dec). You will be able to order again from 1 Jan 2026 – App Only!”\nSee below screenshot of Last Year's notification:\n6. Twilio Chat Auto reply & Auto Closure Templates - YE 2025/26\nHi Team\nIn preparation for year-end operations, please assist with putting in place auto-replies and auto-closures for Chats whilst closed for the festive season. The auto-reply + chat-closure (ONLY for *\nNEW\nchats within the following timeframes), needs to be activated:\n*\nchats already in the system will be addressed and get the 24hr closure if not completed.\nMessage 1:\nWednesday, 24th December from 13:45 to 14:29:29\nNotification:\nWe are no longer processing msgs for 2025. If you need to speak to us urgently before we close, call 011 268 1348 before 14h30 and we’ll call you back.\nMessage 2: Wednesday, 24th December from 14:30\n'til 31st December 00:00 (midnight)\nNotification:\nWe wish all our agents a wonderful festive season. Please msg us again from 08:00 on Mon the 5th Jan 2026, when we reopen.\nMessage 3: 1st – 2nd Jan 2026\n>> the weekend message can kick back in again for the weekend (2nd Jan – 4th Jan 2026 17h00 (SRs can start to generate again to address on our return).\nNotification:\nThank you for your message. Happy New Year. Please msg us again on Mon 5th of Jan 2026, 08:00 when we reopen.\nAny questions, please let me know.\nThank you.\n7. CMS - YE 2025 - SRs Descriptions, TO INVOICE DropDown & \\\"January Follow Up\\\" Call List\nHi Arno / Team,\nIn preparation for year-end operations, please adjust Incoming Queue Source Service Request (SR) Description(s) as outlined below:\nPart 1: Service Request (SR) Notifications\nSee attached proc table with details.\nFestiveClosureNotifications.xlsx\nFestiveClosure - Qualifying Agents\nDate: 2025-12-17 (Midnight) to 2025-12-18 17h00\nMessage:\nAdvise agent that they can order, but that we cannot guarantee delivery before we close. They may want to rather wait to order in Jan.\nFestiveClosure - Returning and New Agents\nDate:\n2025-12-15 (17h00) to 2026-01-04 (Midnight)\nMessage:\nThis is either a NEW or RETURNING Agent. Their package will only be invoiced and sent to them in JANUARY. This is to avoid RTSes. SR Comment: JANUARY FOLLOW UP\nFestiveClosure - All Agents\nDate:\n2025-12-18 (17h00) to 2026-01-04 (Midnight)\nMessage:\nIf needed, advise the agent that ordering is closed for 2025. They can contact us in the New Year - 5th Jan - to process an order. SR Comment: JANUARY FOLLOW UP\n+Inform the below January Call Back List\nPart 2: DropDown(s)\nTO INVOICE DropDown \\\"Block\\\" and CMS Notification\nDate:\n2025-12-18 (17h00) to\n2026-01-04 (Midnight)\nNotification:\nIf needed, advise the agent that ordering is closed for 2025. They can contact us in the New Year - 5th Jan - to process an order.\nPart 3: January Call Backs Proc\nWith reference to:\nTable created called “ServiceOrder.[dbo].[JanuaryCallBacks]\nExport List w SR Comment:\nJANUARY FOLLOW UP\nImport List: Custom Uploads (AI) Queue\nDate: Tues, 6th Jan 2026\n8\n. CMS -\nNew Agent Courtesy SRs\nStop: 24th Dec 2025.\nRestart: 5 Jan 2026 and share\n1. Manually stop the the Job.\nThe name of the job is:\nCMS Auto Courtesy Calls\nAnd it runs this proc:\nAddAutoCourtesyCalls_NewAgents\n9. Out of Office Notifications for info@ and RTS Inbox for the following events\ninfo@ & RTS Mailboxes\n14 Nov 2025 (Company Event):\n“Awesim is closed for the day due to a company event. We will reopen Mon, 17 Nov.”\n16 Dec 2025 (Public Holiday):\n“Awesim is closed for the day due to a Public Holiday. We will reopen Wed, 17 Dec.”\n24 Dec 2025–04 Jan 2026 (Festive Closure):\n“Awesim offices are closed for the festive season. We reopen on Mon, 05 Jan 2026.”\nSlack #general\nPost YE closure message on 24 Dec (Head Office early closure 15h00) - c/o CEO, Greg S.\nDate: Friday 14 November 2025 - Company Event\nGood day,\nAwesim is closed for the day Friday,\n14 November 2025\ndue to a company event.\nWe will be open and available again on Monday,\n17 November 2025\n, to respond to your email.\nThank you and have a great day further.\nThe Awesim Team\nDate: Tuesday, 16 December 2025 - Public Holiday\nGood day,\nAwesim is closed for the day, Tue, 16 December 2025 due to the Public Holiday\nDay of Reconciliation.\nWe will be open and available again on Wed, 17 December 2025, to respond to your email.\nThank you, and have a great day.\nThe Awesim Team\nDate: Wednesday, 24 December 2025 to 5 January 2025 - Office closed\nGood day,\nThank you for reaching out to Awesim. We are currently out of the office, this festive season.\nOur offices will be closed from Wed, 24 December 2025,\nand will reopen on Monday, 05 January 2026. During this period, we won't be available to respond to emails.\nThank you, we look forward to connecting with you upon our return. In the meantime, we wish you a joyful and restful Festive Season.\nThe Awesim Team\n10. IVR Setup (YE)\nEnsure the IVR system is updated and ready for the Year-End period.\nUpdate Scripts:\nReview and update messages to reflect YE operating hours and process changes.\nTest Functionality:\nCheck call routing, voicemail, and message clarity.\nConfigure System:\nSchedule holiday greetings, after-hours routing, and closure dates.\nCommunicate Updates:\nInform IT, Operations, and Support teams once setup is complete.\nBackup Plan:\nConfirm contingency routing and escalation procedures are in place.\nVoice Recordings\nSet-Up IVR - YE 2025/26\n11. maintenance Settings Table\nTo be\nturned off and set to zero at COB on 24 December 2025\n, and\nturned back on at the start of the new year 5 Jan 2026 and /or in line with below Filters and Deadlines:\nNew Leads - turn off from 15th Dec 5pm (in line with Creations Closed)\nRetention Call - turn off 23rd Dec COB (day before we Close)\nUnreachable Retry - turn off 23rd Dec COB (day before we Close)\n1. Filters to be turned Off and qty\n2. Filters to be turned back on and qty\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"3014c301-89d3-46ff-9073-39519afe6ab5\",\"title\":\"YE Ops Helpdesk Tickets SOP \",\"content\":\"

Purpose

To outline the process and key actions required for the configuration, communication, and management of Year-End (YE) system notifications, Help Desk tickets, and closures across all Awesim platforms during the festive period.

This ensures seamless coordination, consistent communication, and controlled operational shutdown and reopening.

Scope

Applies to all systems and channels impacted by YE operations, including:

  • IT Help Desk
  • Twilio Chat
  • CMS & BitCo Incoming SRs
  • MyAwesim, USSD, and App
  • Outlook - Out of Office (info@ and RTS mailboxes)
  • Euphoria IVR System

Roles & Responsibilities

Role

Responsibility

IT Help DeskLead [CCA]

Oversees ticket setup, activation, and closure processes.

IT Team

Configures, tests, and schedules YE notifications and auto-closures including Manages queue hiding/reinstatement (Creations Queue, TO INVOICE)..

Operations Team

Approves timelines and ensures system alignment (CMS, Chat, App & my.awesim).

Customer Care (CC)

Applies SR descriptions, follow-up lists, and communication templates.

Key Dates & Actions

Note: This SOP applies to the 2025/2026 year-end. The dates listed below are indicative and may vary from year to year due to OPS planning.

Date

System/Event

Action

Fri, 14 Nov 2025

Company Event

Auto-reply active from 13 Nov (16h00). Chats paused until Mon, 17 Nov.

15 Dec 2025 (17h00)

Creations (HO) - Closed

Code Creations will only be actioned on 6 Jan 2026.

16 Dec 2025

Public Holiday

Auto-reply active from 15 Dec (16h00). Chats paused until Wed, 17 Dec.

01–17 Dec 2025

MyAwesim / USSD / App

Orders processed normally. Festive message active.

17–18 Dec 2025

MyAwesim / USSD / App

Delivery not guaranteed notice active.

18 Dec 2025 (17h00)

All Ordering Channels

Ordering disabled until 04 Jan 2026 (midnight).

App Ordering (ONLY) Open on 1 Jan 2026

24 Dec 2025 (13h00–14h29)

Twilio / CMS / BitCo SRs

Pre-closure message active; urgent calls accepted until 14h30.

24 Dec 2025 (14h30)–03 Jan 2026 (midnight)

All Systems

Year-end closure message active.
