\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2025-11-21T08:37:20.197+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/f1cfbfc1-db49-47d3-bef8-53dd48fe8004" }, { "id": "91cb1121-b115-4f82-bafc-9d6c59ae20a0", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"91cb1121-b115-4f82-bafc-9d6c59ae20a0\",\"title\":\"Help Centre Test API \",\"content\":\"\nWhat is the MTN Weekly Winners competition?\nIt’s an Awesim x MTN incentive where\n5 winners\n(Awesim Agents) each receive\nR1000 cash\nevery week until Christmas!\nHow do I qualify?\nTo enter and stand a chance to win:\nGet\n5+ new REAL MTN customers\nwith\nrecharges in the week\nto qualify!\nWhen are winners announced?\nWinners are\nannounced every Tuesday\n, based on the\nprevious\nweek’s performance.\nPayments are made on\nWednesday\nto the\nsame payment method\nyou currently receive your Awesim payments.💸\nFollow us on\nFacebook\nor our\nWhatsApp Channel\nto see if you’re one of the weekly winners! 🏆\nView our\nTerms & Conditions\nE&OE – We do our best to keep details accurate.\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"91cb1121-b115-4f82-bafc-9d6c59ae20a0\",\"title\":\"Help Centre Test API \",\"content\":\"

What is the MTN Weekly Winners competition?

It’s an Awesim x MTN incentive where 5 winners (Awesim Agents) each receive R1000 cash every week until Christmas!

How do I qualify?

To enter and stand a chance to win:

  • Get 5+ new REAL MTN customers with recharges in the week to qualify!

When are winners announced?

  • Winners are announced every Tuesday, based on the previous week’s performance.
  • Payments are made on Wednesday to the same payment method you currently receive your Awesim payments.💸
  • Follow us on Facebook or our WhatsApp Channel to see if you’re one of the weekly winners! 🏆

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2025-11-19T13:02:01.666+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/b63bcdf4-3432-4b2f-b3c3-dc53c1a2b728" }, { "id": "78326759-9fd8-4b23-abb4-8b22d42147ea", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"78326759-9fd8-4b23-abb4-8b22d42147ea\",\"title\":\"Help Centre FAQs \",\"content\":\"\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"78326759-9fd8-4b23-abb4-8b22d42147ea\",\"title\":\"Help Centre FAQs \",\"content\":\"

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2025-11-19T13:01:31.453+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/78326759-9fd8-4b23-abb4-8b22d42147ea" }, { "id": "14ebc937-156d-4e7f-b2bd-8cc65d0f09fb", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"14ebc937-156d-4e7f-b2bd-8cc65d0f09fb\",\"title\":\"Help Centre FAQs \",\"content\":\"\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"14ebc937-156d-4e7f-b2bd-8cc65d0f09fb\",\"title\":\"Help Centre FAQs \",\"content\":\"

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2025-11-19T12:40:06.819+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/a15b4a53-003a-4ce4-afe9-fa87185a4ae2" }, { "id": "338e2a42-a93d-4ab7-9d95-581f6fa254b4", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"338e2a42-a93d-4ab7-9d95-581f6fa254b4\",\"title\":\"Help Centre FAQs \",\"content\":\"\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"338e2a42-a93d-4ab7-9d95-581f6fa254b4\",\"title\":\"Help Centre FAQs \",\"content\":\"

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2025-11-19T07:55:05.367+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/da96d98d-16d9-4fc9-9686-db121c485e63" }, { "id": "5efede6b-a2a6-4ec2-8bde-5290aba4fb92", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"5efede6b-a2a6-4ec2-8bde-5290aba4fb92\",\"title\":\"Help Centre FAQs \",\"content\":\"\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"5efede6b-a2a6-4ec2-8bde-5290aba4fb92\",\"title\":\"Help Centre FAQs \",\"content\":\"

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2025-11-19T07:54:01.453+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/5efede6b-a2a6-4ec2-8bde-5290aba4fb92" }, { "id": "483cb612-a28c-48bd-bc2e-cdb922755ee8", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"483cb612-a28c-48bd-bc2e-cdb922755ee8\",\"title\":\"Help Centre FAQs \",\"content\":\"\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"483cb612-a28c-48bd-bc2e-cdb922755ee8\",\"title\":\"Help Centre FAQs \",\"content\":\"

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2025-11-19T07:28:42.758+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/483cb612-a28c-48bd-bc2e-cdb922755ee8" }, { "id": "502d45e1-22f5-4ff9-b6a8-6ce8ee095b5c", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"502d45e1-22f5-4ff9-b6a8-6ce8ee095b5c\",\"title\":\"Help Centre FAQs \",\"content\":\"\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"502d45e1-22f5-4ff9-b6a8-6ce8ee095b5c\",\"title\":\"Help Centre FAQs \",\"content\":\"

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2025-11-19T07:21:08.274+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/502d45e1-22f5-4ff9-b6a8-6ce8ee095b5c" }, { "id": "4540729f-a965-459f-bec7-7f11635dc1e4", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"4540729f-a965-459f-bec7-7f11635dc1e4\",\"title\":\"File Upload Verification Checks SOP\",\"content\":\"\nSTANDARD OPERATING PROCEDURE\nThe following is a Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) that must be followed as of the date of issue. Non-compliance to this document and/or instruction may result in disciplinary action. Should you have any queries in regard to this SOP, you are required to address same with management immediately.\nPURPOSE\nThis Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) defines a standardized process for uploading identification documents to ensure data accuracy and completeness, for prompt verification.\nVERIFICATION CHECKS\nThis procedure applies to all file uploads submitted for verification:\nFile Verification Upload Requirements AND placement\n✅\nRequired Documents:\nUpload a clear photo of the\nIdentity Document\n(e.g., RSA National ID, Passport, or Asylum Permit) under under\nID Document or Card\n.\nProfile Picture:\nA picture of the agent holding the ID / Passport next to his/her face. Upload under\nProfile Photo\n.\n✅\nVerification Checklist:\nCustomer details (\nName, Surname, Contact Name, Identity No., Age, Gender, Expiry Date\n) must match the uploaded document.\nThe ID photo should provide the best facial recognition for the agent.\nSYSTEMS TO USE AND\nACCEPTED FORMATS\n✅\nSystems to use:\nOrder Invoicing (OI) - If Sales Rep Onboarding\nMy.Awesim - If CC / Any reuploads if Sales Rep\n✅\nAccepted File Formats:\nPDF, JPEG, PNG, or TIFF.\nOn Hold Process\nOn Hold Reasons include but are not limited to:\nEXPIRED ACCOUNT\n– Customer code inactive for more than 12 months.\nRTS PARCEL\n– Agent unreachable for delivery; parcel returned as undelivered. [If address is not Google Verified, please update or log SR for CC to google verify delivery address to avoid any further RTSes]\nUNREACHABLE ON HOLD\n– After three distinct Service Request (SR) attempts.\nCUSTOMER REQUESTED ON HOLD\n– Customer has requested a temporary pause [On Hold & OPT Out].\nPENDING INTERNAL VERIFICATION\n– Awaiting feedback due to internal investigation(s) from internal teams. See Customer History. Example: Finance\nCheck On Hold [H] indicator for status: Ticked or not ticked on CMS\nIf the Code is Yes [Y] On Hold, log a Service Request (SR) in CMS to ensure the next step of the process for the On Hold removal is processed\nif Sales Person:\naction On Hold\nSales: to Raise SR to UnHold\nSR Comment: Verification documents uploaded, please unhold\nDropDown: UNHOLD\nIf GEN:\naction On Hold\nCustomer Care (CC): to Raise SR to UnHold.\nSR Comment: Verification documents uploaded, please unhold.\nDropDown: UNHOLD ESC.\nManual Number Change Process\nUpload verification document (see below) as per\nManual\nNumber Change SOP,\nas all manual number changes will require re-verification, regardless of the timeframe.\nIf previously verified,\nonly the Profile Photo needs to be uploaded\nfor facial verification comparison.\nCheck if New Telephone number is SmartRICA Registered on CMS - SmartRICA Verify, if Not yet registered, proceed to register the new Tel number on\nSmartcall Online\n.\nCheck if New Telephone number is not saved on any other customer codes on CRM (Search results to return blank if not on any other code).\nFor any manual number changes, please ensure the\nDefault Order Type (DOT)\nis checked and clarified with the customer, as it determines the\nPayment Method\nassociated with the account.\nManual number updates may still be processed as usual; however,\nNo Manual Updates\nshould be made on\npayment days\n[i.e Activation Payments: 25th of every month & Month-end Bonus Payments: 30th/31st of every month]. Finance conducts a final checklist review on the morning of each payment day to update any necessary numbers for processing payments.\nRaise SR on CMS -\nif Sales Rep\n:\nSR Comment: Please update main Tel # 276612345678 with New Tel # 27819101112, New Tel # is SmartRICA Registered and is not on any other codes on CRM. Verification documents have been uploaded.\nDropdown: NUMBER CHANGE\nRaise SR on CMS -\nif GEN: Customer Care (CC):\nSR Comment: Please update main Tel # 276612345678 with New Tel # 27819101112, New Tel # is SmartRICA       Registered and is not on any other codes on CRM. Verification documents have been uploaded.\nDropdown: NUMBER CHANGE ESC\nUnverified vs Previously Verified - Payment Block Rule\nAs a rule of thumb,\nall unverified customer codes must be verified as soon as possible\nto prevent any\npayment blocks.\nNew creations must be\nverified within 3 days\nof creation.\nUpload new verification documents, on\nAny Expired accounts\n[Over a year of Inactivity]\nIf previously verified,\nonly the Profile Photo\nneeds to be uploaded for facial verification comparison.\nIn addition:\nplease ensure that your file upload has saved correctly, as there are instances where the upload may not take effect due to a broken link.\nVerification Status Process\nAny\ndata\ninaccuracies = Rejected (Not Appropriate)\nAny\nimage\ndiscrepancies = Rejected (Not Clear)\nAny\nRejected\nfiles will be captured in CMS and routed to the User for corrections.\nCMS SR Comment:\nRejected (Not Appropriate):\nOption 1:\nVerification Status: Rejected (Not Appropriate). Reason:\nThe\nID #\non the photo doesn't match CMS.\nAction Required:\n1) Update the ID # in CMS 2) Reupload the photo for verification. 3) Once done route SR to DropDown: VERIFY ID DOCS\nOption 2:\nVerification Status: Rejected (Not Appropriate). Reason:\nThe\nPassport #\non the photo doesn't match CMS.\nAction Required:\n1) Update the Passport # in CMS 2) Reupload the photo for verification. 3) Once done route SR to DropDown: VERIFY ID DOCS\nOption 3:\nVerification Status: Rejected (Not Appropriate). Reason:\nThe\nName\non the photo doesn't match CMS.\nAction Required:\n1) Update the Customer Info in CMS 2) Reupload the photo for verification. 3) Once done route SR to DropDown: VERIFY ID DOCS\nOption 4:\nVerification Status: Rejected (Not Appropriate). Reason:\nThe\nSurname\non the photo doesn't match CMS.\nAction Required:\n1) Update the Customer Info in CMS 2) Reupload the photo for verification. 3) Once done route SR to DropDown: VERIFY ID DOCS\nOption 5:\nVerification Status: Rejected (Not Appropriate). Reason:\nThe\nName & Surname\non the photo doesn't match CMS.\nAction Required:\n1) Update the Customer Info in CMS 2) Reupload the photo for verification. 3) Once done route SR to DropDown: VERIFY ID DOCS\nRejected (Not Clear):\nOption 1:\nVerification Status: Rejected (Not Clear).\nReason:\nID / Passport Photo\nis not clear (blurry).\nAction Required:\n1) Reupload a clear photo for verification. 2) Once done route SR to DropDown: VERIFY ID DOCS\nOption 2:\nVerification Status: Rejected (Not Clear).\nReason:\nProfile Photo\nis not clear (blurry).\nAction Required:\n1) Reupload a clear photo for verification. 2) Once done route SR to DropDown: VERIFY ID DOCS\nOption 3:\nVerification Status: Rejected (Not Clear).\nReason:\nBroken Link:\nID / Passport Photo\nAction Required:\n1) Reupload photo for verification. 2) Once done route SR to DropDown: VERIFY ID DOCS\nOption 4:\nVerification Status: Rejected (Not Clear).\nReason:\nBroken Link: Profile Photo\nAction Required:\n1) Reupload photo for verification. 2) Once done route SR to DropDown: VERIFY ID DOCS\nUNHOLD ESC – Address Verification Requirement\nBefore removing the On Hold status for any UNHOLD ESC case related to\nEX (Expired) / RTS (Return to Sender)\n, please ensure the following:\nDelivery Address Verification\nConfirm that the delivery address has been\nGoogle Verified\n. This verification helps to prevent potential RTS occurrences by ensuring the address is valid and deliverable as per\nDelivery Address - Google Co-Ordinates ++ Geo Location Sharing.\n﻿\nSteps to Verify\nUse Google Maps or the Genarate Location Share Link [Google address verification tool embeded on WhatsApp Chat] to check the exact delivery location.\nIf the address cannot be verified or appears invalid,\ndo not remove the On Hold status\n.\nEscalate or request updated / correct delivery details before proceeding.\nOnly after successful address verification should the On Hold status be removed to continue with delivery processing.\nUnhold Escalate Process – Expired AND RTS’ed customer Codes\nWhen handling\nExpired or RTS’ed Customer Codes\n, follow the steps below:\nRequest Return Agent (RA) Verification Documents:\nA clear photo of the RA / RTS'ed agent holding their ID next to their face.\nThe first Customer Care Consultant\n(CC)\nto Receive the Image\nMust:\n📤 Upload the document to\nmy.awesim\n.\nAddress Confirmation:\n🔍 Ensure the RA & / RTS'ed agent's delivery address is\nGoogle Verified\n.\n📍 Update the\ncomments section\nwith the\nlocation coordinates\n(e.g. from Google Maps).\n📌 Route the SR to the\n\\\"Unhold Esc\\\" queue (CC Admin)\n.\n📝\nSR Comment:\nUhold [Add Reason] i.e RTS / EX\n✅ Once Unhold is complete,\nconfirm the order\n.\nFootsoldier in Business Partner Structure\nKeep in mind that Footsoldiers\nDO NOT\nhave access to their agent accounts on My.Awesim/Awesim App and should refer queries through their dealer channel (1st point of contact is their Dealer).\n1.      A Footsoldier will always be linked to a Master Account. In a Business Partner structure, the Master will be the Major Dealer who the Footsoldier and the rest of the structure reports to.\n2.      The Default Order type will indicate the type of structure. 09 – Paid to Code, meaning activation payments are made to the main customer of that account.\n3.      Sales Person could be S42 or a Sales Rep. Please check who the sales person is to be able to direct any further queries or escalations to the correct person.\n4.      Price Code is always A for Business Partners and Major Dealers\n*Note*\nFootsoldier queries or requests such as change of payment method, updating cell number or address details should only come from the Major Dealer or Business Partner of the structure. Footsoldiers should be referred to their Dealer in such cases or the Dealer should be contacted to confirm the change request and verify the details.\nThese requests don’t come through often outside of the standard Creation Process handled by Grant. However, if any\nFS Verification SRs\nare routed to your queue, please\nroute them to: DEALER SUP\n(as Sales Reps do not have this routing option).\nDEALER SUP\nwill manually upload and verify all Foot Soldier documents.\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"4540729f-a965-459f-bec7-7f11635dc1e4\",\"title\":\"File Upload Verification Checks SOP\",\"content\":\"

STANDARD OPERATING PROCEDURE

The following is a Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) that must be followed as of the date of issue. Non-compliance to this document and/or instruction may result in disciplinary action. Should you have any queries in regard to this SOP, you are required to address same with management immediately.


PURPOSE

This Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) defines a standardized process for uploading identification documents to ensure data accuracy and completeness, for prompt verification.

VERIFICATION CHECKS

This procedure applies to all file uploads submitted for verification:

File Verification Upload Requirements AND placement

  • ✅ Required Documents:
    • Upload a clear photo of the Identity Document (e.g., RSA National ID, Passport, or Asylum Permit) under under ID Document or Card.
    • Profile Picture: A picture of the agent holding the ID / Passport next to his/her face. Upload under Profile Photo.

  • ✅ Verification Checklist:
    • Customer details (Name, Surname, Contact Name, Identity No., Age, Gender, Expiry Date) must match the uploaded document.
    • The ID photo should provide the best facial recognition for the agent.

SYSTEMS TO USE AND ACCEPTED FORMATS

  • ✅ Systems to use:
      • Order Invoicing (OI) - If Sales Rep Onboarding
      • My.Awesim - If CC / Any reuploads if Sales Rep
  • ✅ Accepted File Formats:
    • PDF, JPEG, PNG, or TIFF.

On Hold Process

On Hold Reasons include but are not limited to:

    • EXPIRED ACCOUNT – Customer code inactive for more than 12 months.
    • RTS PARCEL – Agent unreachable for delivery; parcel returned as undelivered. [If address is not Google Verified, please update or log SR for CC to google verify delivery address to avoid any further RTSes]
    • UNREACHABLE ON HOLD – After three distinct Service Request (SR) attempts.
    • CUSTOMER REQUESTED ON HOLD – Customer has requested a temporary pause [On Hold & OPT Out].
    • PENDING INTERNAL VERIFICATION – Awaiting feedback due to internal investigation(s) from internal teams. See Customer History. Example: Finance

  1. Check On Hold [H] indicator for status: Ticked or not ticked on CMS
  2. If the Code is Yes [Y] On Hold, log a Service Request (SR) in CMS to ensure the next step of the process for the On Hold removal is processed

if Sales Person: action On Hold

  1. Sales: to Raise SR to UnHold
  2. SR Comment: Verification documents uploaded, please unhold
  3. DropDown: UNHOLD

If GEN: action On Hold

  1. Customer Care (CC): to Raise SR to UnHold.  
  2. SR Comment: Verification documents uploaded, please unhold.  
  3. DropDown: UNHOLD ESC.

Manual Number Change Process

  1. Upload verification document (see below) as per Manual Number Change SOP, as all manual number changes will require re-verification, regardless of the timeframe.
  2. If previously verified, only the Profile Photo needs to be uploaded for facial verification comparison.
  3. Check if New Telephone number is SmartRICA Registered on CMS - SmartRICA Verify, if Not yet registered, proceed to register the new Tel number on Smartcall Online.
  4. Check if New Telephone number is not saved on any other customer codes on CRM (Search results to return blank if not on any other code). 
  5. For any manual number changes, please ensure the Default Order Type (DOT) is checked and clarified with the customer, as it determines the Payment Method associated with the account.
  6. Manual number updates may still be processed as usual; however, No Manual Updates should be made on payment days [i.e Activation Payments: 25th of every month & Month-end Bonus Payments: 30th/31st of every month]. Finance conducts a final checklist review on the morning of each payment day to update any necessary numbers for processing payments.

Raise SR on CMS - if Sales Rep: 

  • SR Comment: Please update main Tel # 276612345678 with New Tel # 27819101112, New Tel # is SmartRICA Registered and is not on any other codes on CRM. Verification documents have been uploaded. 
  • Dropdown: NUMBER CHANGE        

Raise SR on CMS - if GEN: Customer Care (CC):

  • SR Comment: Please update main Tel # 276612345678 with New Tel # 27819101112, New Tel # is SmartRICA       Registered and is not on any other codes on CRM. Verification documents have been uploaded.
  • Dropdown: NUMBER CHANGE ESC

Unverified vs Previously Verified - Payment Block Rule

  1. As a rule of thumb, all unverified customer codes must be verified as soon as possible to prevent any payment blocks.

  1. New creations must be verified within 3 days of creation.
  2. Upload new verification documents, on Any Expired accounts [Over a year of Inactivity]
  3. If previously verified, only the Profile Photo needs to be uploaded for facial verification comparison.
  4. In addition: please ensure that your file upload has saved correctly, as there are instances where the upload may not take effect due to a broken link.

Verification Status Process

  • Any data inaccuracies = Rejected (Not Appropriate)
  • Any image discrepancies = Rejected (Not Clear)
  • Any Rejected files will be captured in CMS and routed to the User for corrections.

CMS SR Comment:

Rejected (Not Appropriate):

Option 1:

Verification Status: Rejected (Not Appropriate). Reason: The ID # on the photo doesn't match CMS. Action Required: 1) Update the ID # in CMS 2) Reupload the photo for verification. 3) Once done route SR to DropDown: VERIFY ID DOCS

Option 2:

Verification Status: Rejected (Not Appropriate). Reason: The Passport # on the photo doesn't match CMS. Action Required: 1) Update the Passport # in CMS 2) Reupload the photo for verification. 3) Once done route SR to DropDown: VERIFY ID DOCS

Option 3:

Verification Status: Rejected (Not Appropriate). Reason: The Name on the photo doesn't match CMS. Action Required: 1) Update the Customer Info in CMS 2) Reupload the photo for verification. 3) Once done route SR to DropDown: VERIFY ID DOCS


Option 4:

Verification Status: Rejected (Not Appropriate). Reason: The Surname on the photo doesn't match CMS. Action Required: 1) Update the Customer Info in CMS 2) Reupload the photo for verification. 3) Once done route SR to DropDown: VERIFY ID DOCS

Option 5:

Verification Status: Rejected (Not Appropriate). Reason: The Name & Surname on the photo doesn't match CMS. Action Required: 1) Update the Customer Info in CMS 2) Reupload the photo for verification. 3) Once done route SR to DropDown: VERIFY ID DOCS

Rejected (Not Clear):

Option 1:

Verification Status: Rejected (Not Clear). Reason: ID / Passport Photo is not clear (blurry).
Action Required: 1) Reupload a clear photo for verification. 2) Once done route SR to DropDown: VERIFY ID DOCS

Option 2:

Verification Status: Rejected (Not Clear). Reason: Profile Photo is not clear (blurry).
Action Required: 1) Reupload a clear photo for verification. 2) Once done route SR to DropDown: VERIFY ID DOCS

Option 3:

Verification Status: Rejected (Not Clear). Reason: Broken Link: ID / Passport Photo
Action Required: 1) Reupload photo for verification. 2) Once done route SR to DropDown: VERIFY ID DOCS

Option 4:

Verification Status: Rejected (Not Clear). Reason: Broken Link: Profile Photo
Action Required: 1) Reupload photo for verification. 2) Once done route SR to DropDown: VERIFY ID DOCS

UNHOLD ESC – Address Verification Requirement

Before removing the On Hold status for any UNHOLD ESC case related to EX (Expired) / RTS (Return to Sender), please ensure the following:

  1. Delivery Address Verification

Confirm that the delivery address has been Google Verified. This verification helps to prevent potential RTS occurrences by ensuring the address is valid and deliverable as per Delivery Address - Google Co-Ordinates ++ Geo Location Sharing. ﻿

  1. Steps to Verify
  2. Use Google Maps or the Genarate Location Share Link [Google address verification tool embeded on WhatsApp Chat] to check the exact delivery location.
  3. If the address cannot be verified or appears invalid, do not remove the On Hold status.
  4. Escalate or request updated / correct delivery details before proceeding.

  1. Only after successful address verification should the On Hold status be removed to continue with delivery processing.

Unhold Escalate Process – Expired AND RTS’ed customer Codes

When handling Expired or RTS’ed Customer Codes, follow the steps below:

  1. Request Return Agent (RA) Verification Documents:
  2. A clear photo of the RA / RTS'ed agent holding their ID next to their face.
  3. The first Customer Care Consultant (CC) to Receive the Image Must:

📤 Upload the document to my.awesim.

Address Confirmation:

🔍 Ensure the RA & / RTS'ed agent's delivery address is Google Verified.

📍 Update the comments section with the location coordinates (e.g. from Google Maps).

📌 Route the SR to the \\\"Unhold Esc\\\" queue (CC Admin).

📝 SR Comment: Uhold [Add Reason] i.e RTS / EX

✅ Once Unhold is complete, confirm the order.

Footsoldier in Business Partner Structure

Keep in mind that Footsoldiers DO NOT have access to their agent accounts on My.Awesim/Awesim App and should refer queries through their dealer channel (1st point of contact is their Dealer).

1.      A Footsoldier will always be linked to a Master Account. In a Business Partner structure, the Master will be the Major Dealer who the Footsoldier and the rest of the structure reports to.

2.      The Default Order type will indicate the type of structure. 09 – Paid to Code, meaning activation payments are made to the main customer of that account.

3.      Sales Person could be S42 or a Sales Rep. Please check who the sales person is to be able to direct any further queries or escalations to the correct person.

4.      Price Code is always A for Business Partners and Major Dealers

*Note*Footsoldier queries or requests such as change of payment method, updating cell number or address details should only come from the Major Dealer or Business Partner of the structure. Footsoldiers should be referred to their Dealer in such cases or the Dealer should be contacted to confirm the change request and verify the details.

  • These requests don’t come through often outside of the standard Creation Process handled by Grant. However, if any FS Verification SRs are routed to your queue, please route them to: DEALER SUP (as Sales Reps do not have this routing option).
  • DEALER SUP will manually upload and verify all Foot Soldier documents.

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [ { "value": "File Upload Verification Checks", "id": "d8fe292c-59c0-456f-b8f8-e356fc396afa", "categoryId": "e0751ef6-b3fd-4bd0-babb-3bc7619c24e1", "categoryName": "Support Tags" } ], "last_modified": "2025-11-19T06:55:46.198+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/4540729f-a965-459f-bec7-7f11635dc1e4" }, { "id": "5bb6e468-234a-4d63-8c95-e6a46cb8b745", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"5bb6e468-234a-4d63-8c95-e6a46cb8b745\",\"title\":\"Help Centre FAQs \",\"content\":\"\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"5bb6e468-234a-4d63-8c95-e6a46cb8b745\",\"title\":\"Help Centre FAQs \",\"content\":\"

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2025-11-18T07:26:29.132+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/6cd22841-9dd2-4005-aff5-20a95abdd1cf" }, { "id": "410caad0-80c7-448f-912d-f780c0dd6320", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"410caad0-80c7-448f-912d-f780c0dd6320\",\"title\":\"Help Centre FAQs \",\"content\":\"\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"410caad0-80c7-448f-912d-f780c0dd6320\",\"title\":\"Help Centre FAQs \",\"content\":\"

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2025-11-18T07:25:57.956+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/410caad0-80c7-448f-912d-f780c0dd6320" }, { "id": "36322d47-0a81-46f9-b8fb-a4b43cbfb11b", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"36322d47-0a81-46f9-b8fb-a4b43cbfb11b\",\"title\":\"Help Centre FAQs \",\"content\":\"\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"36322d47-0a81-46f9-b8fb-a4b43cbfb11b\",\"title\":\"Help Centre FAQs \",\"content\":\"

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2025-11-18T07:25:27.612+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/36322d47-0a81-46f9-b8fb-a4b43cbfb11b" }, { "id": "9ba73ecc-e97a-40ae-bc89-ec37ca1d78a5", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"9ba73ecc-e97a-40ae-bc89-ec37ca1d78a5\",\"title\":\"Help Centre FAQs \",\"content\":\"\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"9ba73ecc-e97a-40ae-bc89-ec37ca1d78a5\",\"title\":\"Help Centre FAQs \",\"content\":\"

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2025-11-18T07:23:09.528+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/9ba73ecc-e97a-40ae-bc89-ec37ca1d78a5" }, { "id": "d1c48ffd-5c27-4992-9f9a-c588776ebd3c", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"d1c48ffd-5c27-4992-9f9a-c588776ebd3c\",\"title\":\"Understanding Awesim Stock Code Flags\",\"content\":\"\nAwesim uses stock code flags as a way to provide agents with valuable feedback on your performance. This feedback helps to better inform your stock allowances. By doing so, we help you manage your inventory more effectively, ensuring you only receive stock that you can successfully sell. This approach helps you avoid waste and allows you to focus on maximizing your earnings.\nFlag Review Process\nIf you’d like us to review your account flag, please note the following requirements before we can submit your request:\nRequirements:\nYour account must have a verified status (with ID/Passport and profile photo).\nYour delivery address must be Google-verified.\nQuestions you’ll need to answer:\nWhy do you believe you should be given a second chance?\nWhat will you do differently with the stock going forward?\nSTOCK CODE FLAGS\nHere are six types of flags that may be applied to an agent's account:\nPRIORITY\nFLAG\nWHAT IT MEANS?\nEFFECT ON STOCK\nFLAG UPDATES WHEN?\nIS PAYMENT AFFECTED\nHOW TO RESOLVE IT\n1\nFRAUD\nAgent has intentionally connected non-REAL customers to gain commissions\nNo Further stock - Permanently\nOn Review\nYes\nThis flag can be reviewed upon request.\n2\nHIGH CONNECT\nOver the last 6 months, the agent has connected a large amount of SIMs but few have recharged\nNo Further stock - until flag is removed\nEvery night\nNo\nEncourage more recharges on the SIMs you have already connected.\nThis flag is updated every night.\n3\nLOW RECHARGE\nOver the last six months, agent has recharged a large number of SIMs, but many of them are low in value.\nNo Further stock - until flag is removed\nEvery night\nNo\nGet your REAL customers to recharge more on the SIMs they have already recharged.\nThis flag is updated every night.\n4\nBLOCK STOCK\nToo much stock issued or there was a large amount of wastage on stock the agent has already received.\nNo Further stock - until the date on which the block ends\nThere will be an end date on the flag\nNo\nYou must use the stock you have already received.\nThis flag can be reviewed upon request.\n5\nLIMIT STOCK\nAccount is underperforming due to stock wastage or a low number of REAL customers.\nYour monthly stock allowance will be reduced, but you can still qualify for stock based on your allowed balance (unless the Monthly Allowed is zero)\nOn Review\nNo\nUse the stock you have already received to RICA and Connect REAL Customers who continue to recharge and use the SIM.\nThis flag can be reviewed upon request.\n6\nSTRICT STOCK\nThe agent's order needs double-checking before it can be released.\nIt will be escalated for review.\nNo Further stock - Permanently\nOn Review\nNo\nUse the stock you have already received to RICA and Connect REAL Customers who continue to recharge and use the SIM.\nThis flag can be reviewed upon request.\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"d1c48ffd-5c27-4992-9f9a-c588776ebd3c\",\"title\":\"Understanding Awesim Stock Code Flags\",\"content\":\"

Awesim uses stock code flags as a way to provide agents with valuable feedback on your performance. This feedback helps to better inform your stock allowances. By doing so, we help you manage your inventory more effectively, ensuring you only receive stock that you can successfully sell. This approach helps you avoid waste and allows you to focus on maximizing your earnings.


Flag Review Process

If you’d like us to review your account flag, please note the following requirements before we can submit your request:

Requirements:

  • Your account must have a verified status (with ID/Passport and profile photo).
  • Your delivery address must be Google-verified.

Questions you’ll need to answer:

  1. Why do you believe you should be given a second chance?
  2. What will you do differently with the stock going forward?

STOCK CODE FLAGS

Here are six types of flags that may be applied to an agent's account:

PRIORITY

FLAG

WHAT IT MEANS?

EFFECT ON STOCK

FLAG UPDATES WHEN?

IS PAYMENT AFFECTED

HOW TO RESOLVE IT

1

FRAUD

Agent has intentionally connected non-REAL customers to gain commissions

No Further stock - Permanently

On Review

Yes

This flag can be reviewed upon request.

2

HIGH CONNECT

Over the last 6 months, the agent has connected a large amount of SIMs but few have recharged

No Further stock - until flag is removed

Every night

No

Encourage more recharges on the SIMs you have already connected.

This flag is updated every night.

3

LOW RECHARGE

Over the last six months, agent has recharged a large number of SIMs, but many of them are low in value.

No Further stock - until flag is removed

Every night

No

Get your REAL customers to recharge more on the SIMs they have already recharged.

This flag is updated every night.

4

BLOCK STOCK

Too much stock issued or there was a large amount of wastage on stock the agent has already received.

No Further stock - until the date on which the block ends

There will be an end date on the flag

No

You must use the stock you have already received.

This flag can be reviewed upon request.

5

LIMIT STOCK

Account is underperforming due to stock wastage or a low number of REAL customers.

Your monthly stock allowance will be reduced, but you can still qualify for stock based on your allowed balance (unless the Monthly Allowed is zero)

On Review

No

Use the stock you have already received to RICA and Connect REAL Customers who continue to recharge and use the SIM.

This flag can be reviewed upon request.

6

STRICT STOCK

The agent's order needs double-checking before it can be released.

It will be escalated for review.

No Further stock - Permanently

On Review

No

Use the stock you have already received to RICA and Connect REAL Customers who continue to recharge and use the SIM.

This flag can be reviewed upon request.

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [ { "value": "SOP Template", "id": "20027f4a-e23a-4c23-bd9d-c28d2bd2dbc7", "categoryId": "e0751ef6-b3fd-4bd0-babb-3bc7619c24e1", "categoryName": "Support Tags" } ], "last_modified": "2025-11-18T05:27:39.709+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/d1c48ffd-5c27-4992-9f9a-c588776ebd3c" }, { "id": "957f9620-c592-4438-b366-941c0b6bda08", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"957f9620-c592-4438-b366-941c0b6bda08\",\"title\":\"How to RICA SIM cards on the Awesim App\",\"content\":\"\nEvery Awesim agent can easily RICA a SIM using the Awesim app. Follow these steps:\nOpen the Awesim App\n.\nScan the SIM Barcode\nor\nEnter the ICCID\nmanually.\nFill in the Customer Information\n:\nName\nSurname\nID Number or Passport Number\nPassport Expiry Date (must be valid for at least 6 months)\nFull Address (include Number, Street Name, Suburb, City, & Postal Code)\nSelect \\\"SUBMIT\\\"\n.\nDetails\nOpen the\nAwesim App\n.\nNavigate to RICA\nScan the SIM Barcode\nor\nEnter the ICCID\nmanually (the ICCID is the long barcode on the SIM Pack).\nClick \\\"Next\\\"\nFill in the Customer Information: Personal Details\nSelect\nSA ID\nor\nPassport\nIf SA ID fill in:\nSA ID Number\nFirst Name\nSurname\nIf Passport\nFill in:\nPassport Number\nPassport Expiry Date (must be valid for at least 6 months)\nCountry of Issue\nFirst Name\nSurname\nFill in the Customer Information: Residential Details\nSelect\n\\\"Submit\\\"\nBy submitting the agent agrees to the RICA Act.\nRICA Statuses\nWhen you RICA a SIM, it goes through four main statuses:\nSubmit,\nPending,\nSuccess,\nand Failure.\nHere's what each status means and what you should do at each stage:\nSubmit\nSubmit\n: After clicking \\\"Submit,\\\" you will see a screen indicating that Awesim has accepted the RICA request and is sending it to the network. This should take 0-1 minutes.\nExample of a Submitted RICA:\nPending\n: Once the RICA request is sent to the network, you need to wait for the network to approve it. This status indicates that the request is being processed.\nThe SIM RICA request will remain in pending until the network provides a final answer. This can take anywhere from 2 minutes to 2 hours, depending on the network's RICA system.\nDo not attempt to RICA the SIM again until you receive a response indicating success or failure.\nRICA Success\nSuccess\n: When a RICA is successful, the system where you first RICA'd the SIM will confirm the success.\nYou will receive a push notification to confirm the RICA was successful.\nThe customer can now take the SIM out of the SIM pack, insert it into their phone, and connect their SIM.\nRICA Failure\nFailure\n: If a RICA fails, the system where you first RICA'd the SIM will return a failure message with the error.\nCommon reasons for failure include:\nNetwork RICA service is down.\nIncorrect information entered (e.g., postal code, country code for the passport, invalid address, etc.).\nIf a failure occurs, retry RICAing the SIM with the correct information.\nYou can view all your RICA submissions by clicking\n\\\"Report.\\\"\nImportant Reminders\nReversal of RICA\n: Networks have a specific time period for an automated reversal of a RICA if the SIM is not used within a certain timeframe. This period varies by network and is not fully known.\nActivation Rule\n: A SIM card has 90 days from the date of RICA to perform a successful recharge or usage to qualify for an activation payment. This rule prevents pre-RICA of SIM cards.\nFraud Warning\n: Pre-RICA of SIM cards is considered fraud. Please do not pre-RICA SIMs, as it can lead to your account being blocked.\nBy following these guidelines, you can ensure a smooth RICA process and avoid any issues with your Awesim account.\nTerms & Conditions Apply\nDo not sell or give away SIMs to other agents.\nOnly RICA Awesim SIMs to real customers.\nAwesim reserves the right to verify activations and claw back invalid payments.\nFor more details, refer to our\nterms & conditions.\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"957f9620-c592-4438-b366-941c0b6bda08\",\"title\":\"How to RICA SIM cards on the Awesim App\",\"content\":\"

Every Awesim agent can easily RICA a SIM using the Awesim app. Follow these steps:

  1. Open the Awesim App.
  2. Scan the SIM Barcode or Enter the ICCID manually.
  3. Fill in the Customer Information:
    • Name
    • Surname
    • ID Number or Passport Number
    • Passport Expiry Date (must be valid for at least 6 months)
    • Full Address (include Number, Street Name, Suburb, City, & Postal Code)
  4. Select \\\"SUBMIT\\\".

Details

  1. Open the Awesim App.
  2. Navigate to RICA

  1. Scan the SIM Barcode or Enter the ICCID manually (the ICCID is the long barcode on the SIM Pack).
    Click \\\"Next\\\"

  1. Fill in the Customer Information: Personal Details

Select SA ID or Passport

If SA ID fill in:

    • SA ID Number
    • First Name
    • Surname

If Passport

Fill in:

    • Passport Number
    • Passport Expiry Date (must be valid for at least 6 months)
    • Country of Issue
    • First Name
    • Surname

  1. Fill in the Customer Information: Residential Details

  1. Select \\\"Submit\\\"

By submitting the agent agrees to the RICA Act.

RICA Statuses

When you RICA a SIM, it goes through four main statuses:

  • Submit,
  • Pending,
  • Success,
  • and Failure.

Here's what each status means and what you should do at each stage:

Submit

Submit: After clicking \\\"Submit,\\\" you will see a screen indicating that Awesim has accepted the RICA request and is sending it to the network. This should take 0-1 minutes.

Example of a Submitted RICA:

  1. Pending: Once the RICA request is sent to the network, you need to wait for the network to approve it. This status indicates that the request is being processed.
      • The SIM RICA request will remain in pending until the network provides a final answer. This can take anywhere from 2 minutes to 2 hours, depending on the network's RICA system.
      • Do not attempt to RICA the SIM again until you receive a response indicating success or failure.

RICA Success

Success: When a RICA is successful, the system where you first RICA'd the SIM will confirm the success.

    • You will receive a push notification to confirm the RICA was successful.
    • The customer can now take the SIM out of the SIM pack, insert it into their phone, and connect their SIM.

RICA Failure

Failure: If a RICA fails, the system where you first RICA'd the SIM will return a failure message with the error.

  • Common reasons for failure include:
    • Network RICA service is down.
    • Incorrect information entered (e.g., postal code, country code for the passport, invalid address, etc.).

If a failure occurs, retry RICAing the SIM with the correct information.

You can view all your RICA submissions by clicking \\\"Report.\\\"

Important Reminders

  • Reversal of RICA: Networks have a specific time period for an automated reversal of a RICA if the SIM is not used within a certain timeframe. This period varies by network and is not fully known.
  • Activation Rule: A SIM card has 90 days from the date of RICA to perform a successful recharge or usage to qualify for an activation payment. This rule prevents pre-RICA of SIM cards.
  • Fraud Warning: Pre-RICA of SIM cards is considered fraud. Please do not pre-RICA SIMs, as it can lead to your account being blocked.

By following these guidelines, you can ensure a smooth RICA process and avoid any issues with your Awesim account.

Terms & Conditions Apply

  • Do not sell or give away SIMs to other agents.
  • Only RICA Awesim SIMs to real customers.
  • Awesim reserves the right to verify activations and claw back invalid payments.

For more details, refer to our terms & conditions.


\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2025-11-18T05:27:39.373+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/957f9620-c592-4438-b366-941c0b6bda08" }, { "id": "de220ce7-e779-4248-94c2-13249521b479", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"de220ce7-e779-4248-94c2-13249521b479\",\"title\":\"What is the reason an Agents account is blocked on USSD?\",\"content\":\"\nWhy is my account blocked on USSD?\nAnswer:\nWhen trying to access the Awesim USSD, the notification means that your Awesim account has been blocked because Awesim detected abuse or misuse associated with your account.\nDear user your account has been blocked due to abuse. If you feel this is wrong please contact our call center.\n011 268 1348\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"de220ce7-e779-4248-94c2-13249521b479\",\"title\":\"What is the reason an Agents account is blocked on USSD?\",\"content\":\"
  1. Why is my account blocked on USSD?

Answer:

When trying to access the Awesim USSD, the notification means that your Awesim account has been blocked because Awesim detected abuse or misuse associated with your account.

Dear user your account has been blocked due to abuse. If you feel this is wrong please contact our call center.

011 268 1348

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2025-11-18T05:27:39.196+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/de220ce7-e779-4248-94c2-13249521b479" }, { "id": "5119948d-52ed-43c5-bbb2-3d1b83a61f43", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"5119948d-52ed-43c5-bbb2-3d1b83a61f43\",\"title\":\"Does Smartcall accept asylum papers to create a RICA agent? \",\"content\":\"\nDoes Smartcall accept asylum papers to create a RICA agent?\nNo, Smartcall does not accept asylum papers for RICA agent registration. A valid passport is required.\nWhat are the options or processes to create an agent who is using asylum?\nWAITING FOR FEEDBACK\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"5119948d-52ed-43c5-bbb2-3d1b83a61f43\",\"title\":\"Does Smartcall accept asylum papers to create a RICA agent? \",\"content\":\"

Does Smartcall accept asylum papers to create a RICA agent?

No, Smartcall does not accept asylum papers for RICA agent registration. A valid passport is required.

What are the options or processes to create an agent who is using asylum? 
WAITING FOR FEEDBACK

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2025-11-18T05:27:38.977+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/5119948d-52ed-43c5-bbb2-3d1b83a61f43" }, { "id": "fd52abbb-c8db-4f48-9c47-91bea9a775ea", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"fd52abbb-c8db-4f48-9c47-91bea9a775ea\",\"title\":\"Help Centre FAQs \",\"content\":\"\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"fd52abbb-c8db-4f48-9c47-91bea9a775ea\",\"title\":\"Help Centre FAQs \",\"content\":\"

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2025-11-17T13:24:28.604+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/fd52abbb-c8db-4f48-9c47-91bea9a775ea" }, { "id": "dc7b3c86-4b46-4130-9f1d-bf732e442e05", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"dc7b3c86-4b46-4130-9f1d-bf732e442e05\",\"title\":\"Help Centre FAQs \",\"content\":\"\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"dc7b3c86-4b46-4130-9f1d-bf732e442e05\",\"title\":\"Help Centre FAQs \",\"content\":\"

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2025-11-17T13:21:35.045+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/dc5a52d9-0174-4ac8-b26d-78e02815f31f" }, { "id": "192b9a46-e4d3-4a1b-b04a-8f59d4926419", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"192b9a46-e4d3-4a1b-b04a-8f59d4926419\",\"title\":\"Help Centre FAQs \",\"content\":\"\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"192b9a46-e4d3-4a1b-b04a-8f59d4926419\",\"title\":\"Help Centre FAQs \",\"content\":\"

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2025-11-17T13:19:27.241+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/192b9a46-e4d3-4a1b-b04a-8f59d4926419" }, { "id": "1a43b8d2-0a56-4b00-883f-48bba1ba9e31", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"1a43b8d2-0a56-4b00-883f-48bba1ba9e31\",\"title\":\"Help Centre FAQs \",\"content\":\"\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"1a43b8d2-0a56-4b00-883f-48bba1ba9e31\",\"title\":\"Help Centre FAQs \",\"content\":\"

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2025-11-17T13:17:31.429+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/1a43b8d2-0a56-4b00-883f-48bba1ba9e31" }, { "id": "7ae6f6a4-a8e4-47a8-b801-e33a4c5f1262", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"7ae6f6a4-a8e4-47a8-b801-e33a4c5f1262\",\"title\":\"Help Centre FAQs \",\"content\":\"\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"7ae6f6a4-a8e4-47a8-b801-e33a4c5f1262\",\"title\":\"Help Centre FAQs \",\"content\":\"

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2025-11-17T13:12:50.032+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/7ae6f6a4-a8e4-47a8-b801-e33a4c5f1262" }, { "id": "2fd5acfd-bdc0-449a-93b4-f186bf71a91e", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"2fd5acfd-bdc0-449a-93b4-f186bf71a91e\",\"title\":\"Help Centre FAQs \",\"content\":\"\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"2fd5acfd-bdc0-449a-93b4-f186bf71a91e\",\"title\":\"Help Centre FAQs \",\"content\":\"

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2025-11-17T13:12:14.234+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/2fd5acfd-bdc0-449a-93b4-f186bf71a91e" }, { "id": "dfe9e0d2-75f4-4a46-b096-b8e8125bf204", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"dfe9e0d2-75f4-4a46-b096-b8e8125bf204\",\"title\":\"Help Centre FAQs \",\"content\":\"\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"dfe9e0d2-75f4-4a46-b096-b8e8125bf204\",\"title\":\"Help Centre FAQs \",\"content\":\"

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2025-11-17T13:11:02.386+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/dfe9e0d2-75f4-4a46-b096-b8e8125bf204" }, { "id": "09296e44-a323-41ea-881b-5051a9adc2b3", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"09296e44-a323-41ea-881b-5051a9adc2b3\",\"title\":\"Help Centre FAQs \",\"content\":\"\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"09296e44-a323-41ea-881b-5051a9adc2b3\",\"title\":\"Help Centre FAQs \",\"content\":\"

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2025-11-17T12:08:56.374+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/48382f65-1737-4f56-80dd-14bc99bb54bf" }, { "id": "1ecbbe47-01fe-4cd6-9914-244a16861bd0", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"1ecbbe47-01fe-4cd6-9914-244a16861bd0\",\"title\":\"Help Centre FAQs \",\"content\":\"\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"1ecbbe47-01fe-4cd6-9914-244a16861bd0\",\"title\":\"Help Centre FAQs \",\"content\":\"

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2025-11-17T12:01:27.083+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/1ecbbe47-01fe-4cd6-9914-244a16861bd0" }, { "id": "6a4be875-f523-4624-9a88-81ae32b1702f", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"6a4be875-f523-4624-9a88-81ae32b1702f\",\"title\":\"Help Centre FAQs \",\"content\":\"\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"6a4be875-f523-4624-9a88-81ae32b1702f\",\"title\":\"Help Centre FAQs \",\"content\":\"

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2025-11-17T11:51:21.982+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/6a4be875-f523-4624-9a88-81ae32b1702f" }, { "id": "0e54f918-11a9-46f7-9ebb-b4d391890ce6", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"0e54f918-11a9-46f7-9ebb-b4d391890ce6\",\"title\":\"To Do List - Awesim Functions \",\"content\":\"\nVENUE HIRE\nCost per person for venue hire\nBuffet lunch per person – 3 meats, salad, veg, and rolls (incl dessert + options) OR\nDessert per person\nHalaal meals (inhouse or order external to bring in)\nVegan Meal (inhouse or order external to bring in)\nCan we bring in muffins OR\nSnacks platters price\nOutside + inside area for teambuilding to take place\nLunch area + chill space for staff\nNo. of toilet facilities for male and female and where they are situated\nDrinks menu (token system) – 50% upfront and balance at venue via credit card (gratuity at venue)\nAdvise on max price per drink and no. of drinks per person.\nDistance from HO\nParking for staff (how many parking spaces and where situated vs actual venue)\nSeparate bar area\nJugs of water or juice and pricing – whilst team build is on\nDeparture and arrival time/ duration we have the venue for\nAdvise venue + team build times we are looking at (Prep schedule for the day)\nAdvise venue that staff will only have drinks after team build activity – during lunch.\nPortion size per person – no. of meat etc per person when waiters are dishing out.\nNo. of waiters available for serving\nDo they have garden games available or our own garden games (jenga, crochet, darts, etc)\nFind out if there is a projector/speakers/DJ available\n2.\nPayments:\nDeposit for Team building and venue\nBalance 1 week before event + confirm numbers\nBalance for drinks to be paid at the venue via credit card\nRefund of deposit and when will It be paid back\nBanking details to be sent to venue for refund\n3.\nMessages to send:\nCheck with LM’s if everyone is going to be attending + Lexi, and those on leave.\nVenue/Teambuilding details share with staff 1x staff meeting before event takes place\nTransport type message\nName tags message before staff arrive\nShare transport list and venue details reminder/timing with staff +agenda for the day so they are aware if they need to eat breakfast before coming etc.\nAdvise staff if no snacks – have breakfast before coming to venue\nAdvise staff where to park\nMessage Drivers transporting staff for alcohol preference\nMessage drivers to bring along bags for drinks to take home\nFor YE Function – message to be sent Monday after function – Company annual awards (insert in frame and slack message) refer previous year message.\nSend employee recognition message for drivers - Monday/next working day after event.\n4.\nTransport:\nArrange transport with Fleet Administrator\nAdvise on message - staff to leave office at a specific time and staff to arrive at venue at a specific time\n5.\nNotes for the actual event day:\nCredit card for balance of drinks\nCollect name tags at end of event\nDrinks tokens\nAdvise barman of budget and figure that needs to be stopped at. + drinks pp and max amount per drink\nCollect drinks for Drivers transporting staff\n6.\nIf year-end:\nTrophies engraving (November sprint)\nDecorations /props\nTokens + Drivers\nPrinting LOS & Cardboard\nCertificates\nLOS & Annual company awards – Postnet on cardboard\nAnnual Top Performers – cardboard purchased from Postnet – in house printing\nDepartment award certificates – LM’s to print\nChocolates - 5 per department\nSmall trophies for Annual Top performer winners\nName Tags\nCollecting of drinks for drivers at venue\nCollect name tags at venue\nAdvise barman of budget and figure that needs to be stopped at. + drinks pp and max amount per drink\nCredit card for balance of drinks\nAwesim Table Cloths\nLaminating Sleeves\n7.\nField Visits:\nArrange with John possible day and timing (Refer 03/10/2024 event)\nSend message to Leadership Team to find out who wants to go to confirm numbers for transport\nCard needs to be taken to purchase lunch\nIf KC is there – she will arrange. If not Finance needs to be sent a message to use the company card and for it to be loaded with funds for day.\nBudget pp for lunch. R70.00\n8.\nJP Morgan\nRegister Team in December\nSend message to staff for registering (Note end of Dec to register)\nClose off team in January\nPay for entries\nRequest Hospitality Forms\nBanners and table cloth to take to the venue (Judah to drop – day before and pick up day after)\nSend menu options and transport workflow to channel\nParking Tickets dependant on No. of vehicles\nRequest Tshirt sizes for Awesim tshirts\nTshirt designs open to Team\nKC to send through Chosen tshirt design to anatomic\nAccessories (Glow sticks, etc) - suggestions from Team\nUber for staff that are far\nTake bag, pen, paper/book along.\nNames for menus\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"0e54f918-11a9-46f7-9ebb-b4d391890ce6\",\"title\":\"To Do List - Awesim Functions \",\"content\":\"

VENUE HIRE

  • Cost per person for venue hire
  • Buffet lunch per person – 3 meats, salad, veg, and rolls (incl dessert + options) OR
  • Dessert per person
  • Halaal meals (inhouse or order external to bring in)
  • Vegan Meal (inhouse or order external to bring in)
  • Can we bring in muffins OR
  • Snacks platters price
  • Outside + inside area for teambuilding to take place
  • Lunch area + chill space for staff
  • No. of toilet facilities for male and female and where they are situated
  • Drinks menu (token system) – 50% upfront and balance at venue via credit card (gratuity at venue)
  • Advise on max price per drink and no. of drinks per person.
  • Distance from HO
  • Parking for staff (how many parking spaces and where situated vs actual venue)
  • Separate bar area
  • Jugs of water or juice and pricing – whilst team build is on
  • Departure and arrival time/ duration we have the venue for
  • Advise venue + team build times we are looking at (Prep schedule for the day)
  • Advise venue that staff will only have drinks after team build activity – during lunch.
  • Portion size per person – no. of meat etc per person when waiters are dishing out.
  • No. of waiters available for serving
  • Do they have garden games available or our own garden games (jenga, crochet, darts, etc)
  • Find out if there is a projector/speakers/DJ available

2. Payments:

  • Deposit for Team building and venue
  • Balance 1 week before event + confirm numbers
  • Balance for drinks to be paid at the venue via credit card
  • Refund of deposit and when will It be paid back
  • Banking details to be sent to venue for refund

3. Messages to send:

  • Check with LM’s if everyone is going to be attending + Lexi, and those on leave.
  • Venue/Teambuilding details share with staff 1x staff meeting before event takes place
  • Transport type message
  • Name tags message before staff arrive
  • Share transport list and venue details reminder/timing with staff +agenda for the day so they are aware if they need to eat breakfast before coming etc.
  • Advise staff if no snacks – have breakfast before coming to venue
  • Advise staff where to park
  • Message Drivers transporting staff for alcohol preference
  • Message drivers to bring along bags for drinks to take home
  • For YE Function – message to be sent Monday after function – Company annual awards (insert in frame and slack message) refer previous year message.
  • Send employee recognition message for drivers - Monday/next working day after event.

4. Transport:

  • Arrange transport with Fleet Administrator
  • Advise on message - staff to leave office at a specific time and staff to arrive at venue at a specific time

5. Notes for the actual event day:

  • Credit card for balance of drinks
  • Collect name tags at end of event
  • Drinks tokens
  • Advise barman of budget and figure that needs to be stopped at. + drinks pp and max amount per drink
  • Collect drinks for Drivers transporting staff

6. If year-end:

  • Trophies engraving (November sprint)
  • Decorations /props
  • Tokens + Drivers
  • Printing LOS & Cardboard
  • Certificates
    LOS & Annual company awards – Postnet on cardboard
  • Annual Top Performers – cardboard purchased from Postnet – in house printing
  • Department award certificates – LM’s to print
  • Chocolates - 5 per department
  • Small trophies for Annual Top performer winners
  • Name Tags
  • Collecting of drinks for drivers at venue
  • Collect name tags at venue
  • Advise barman of budget and figure that needs to be stopped at. + drinks pp and max amount per drink
  • Credit card for balance of drinks
  • Awesim Table Cloths
  • Laminating Sleeves

7. Field Visits:

  • Arrange with John possible day and timing (Refer 03/10/2024 event)
  • Send message to Leadership Team to find out who wants to go to confirm numbers for transport
  • Card needs to be taken to purchase lunch
  • If KC is there – she will arrange. If not Finance needs to be sent a message to use the company card and for it to be loaded with funds for day.
  • Budget pp for lunch. R70.00

8. JP Morgan

  • Register Team in December
  • Send message to staff for registering (Note end of Dec to register)
  • Close off team in January
  • Pay for entries
  • Request Hospitality Forms
  • Banners and table cloth to take to the venue (Judah to drop – day before and pick up day after)
  • Send menu options and transport workflow to channel
  • Parking Tickets dependant on No. of vehicles
  • Request Tshirt sizes for Awesim tshirts
  • Tshirt designs open to Team
  • KC to send through Chosen tshirt design to anatomic
  • Accessories (Glow sticks, etc) - suggestions from Team
  • Uber for staff that are far
  • Take bag, pen, paper/book along.
  • Names for menus

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [ { "value": "company events", "id": "d11c2021-1b8c-4a77-a33e-5d2d849f6fee", "categoryId": "f1824c7f-80e1-44e8-9c49-e3aca58b442f", "categoryName": "HR Tags" } ], "last_modified": "2025-11-13T05:16:07.030+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/0e54f918-11a9-46f7-9ebb-b4d391890ce6" }, { "id": "25409f0a-b72f-4460-b3ef-01d8bc59a816", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"25409f0a-b72f-4460-b3ef-01d8bc59a816\",\"title\":\"HSE Toolbox Talk \",\"content\":\"\nASSETS: TOOLS, EQUIPMENT & VEHICLES\nCanteen equipment safety\nVehicle & road safety\nLadder & step ladder safety\nSafe use of office equipment\nERGONOMICS\nErgonomics\nLifting boxes & heavy objects\nHEALTH & WELLNESS\nMental health & stress management\nHOUSEKEEPING\nGood housekeeping\nSlips, trips & falls\nHEALTH & SAFETY\nCleaning chemicals safety\nFire safety & emergency procedures\nTECHNOLOGY / INFORMATION\nCybersecurity & phishing awareness\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"25409f0a-b72f-4460-b3ef-01d8bc59a816\",\"title\":\"HSE Toolbox Talk \",\"content\":\"
