\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [ { "value": "hse", "id": "aeb12f8b-983a-485c-965a-1a416c2e4c4c", "categoryId": "877b2ec0-0822-48f7-ac44-e37af6584b8d", "categoryName": "Tags" }, { "value": "toolbox talk", "id": "468d84b8-a378-40db-b104-30674e736235", "categoryId": "877b2ec0-0822-48f7-ac44-e37af6584b8d", "categoryName": "Tags" } ], "last_modified": "2025-11-12T10:49:35.056+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/25409f0a-b72f-4460-b3ef-01d8bc59a816" }, { "id": "a3bb4bc2-3c70-4fcc-9d69-3e2ff42efc25", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"a3bb4bc2-3c70-4fcc-9d69-3e2ff42efc25\",\"title\":\"ERS Access Control Policy & Procedure\",\"content\":\"\nPURPOSE\nThis policy provides clear and compulsory guidelines for all Awesim employees regarding the use of the ERS Biometrics system for facility access and timekeeping (clocking in and out). The purpose of this system is to manage access to company premises, as well as ensure accurate and secure record-keeping.\nREGISTRATION & ENROLLMENT\nAll employees will be enrolled in the biometrics system, and new employees will be added as part of the onboarding process.\nEmployees must provide their fingerprints to be securely stored in the system.\nIt is the employee's responsibility to ensure their fingerprints are successfully registered during the registration process.\nACCESSING THE BUILDING\nEmployees registered on the biometrics system can access the building by scanning their designated finger on any of the biometrics terminals located around the building and premises.\nEmployees are required to scan their fingerprint on the biometrics system to gain access to the premises/building.\nIf a colleague has entered the boom ahead of you, wait for the boom gate to close completely before scanning your fingerprint. No tailgating.\nThe reception door is to remain closed at all times for safety reasons and to ensure access is controlled.\nNo sharing or buddy clocking: Your fingerprint registration is unique to you. Under no circumstances are you to ask a colleague to grant you access, nor should you grant access to a fellow colleague. Under no circumstances are you to tailgate into the premises or building (i.e access the premises or building by driving in or walking in behind a colleague who clocked in in front of you, resulting in you not clocking in on the system).\nAreas with ERS Biometrics Terminal:\na) By the boom gates at the entrance/exit of the property;\nb) Outside the main reception door;\nc) Outside the entrance door in the basement.\nCLOCKING IN AND OUT:\nEvery employee is required to clock in once upon arrival at the premises/building. This will record your arrival time at the office/premises.\nEvery employee is required to clock out once when leaving the premises/building. This will record the time that you left the building/premises for the day.\n( 1 ) Steps to CLOCK IN:\nClick F1 (Clock in).\nScan your registered fingerprint on the scanning device.\nCheck that your fingerprint has been successfully verified (a message will be displayed on the screen).\n( 2 ) General Entry and Exit during the day\nGeneral access throughout the day does not require you to clock in or clock out.\nYou will not be required to press F1 or F5 during the day - only required when clocking in or clocking out for the day - see above;\nHowever, it is important that you scan your fingerprint each time you want to access the building during the day. To access the building generally throughout the day, you will scan your registered fingerprint on the biometrics terminal (no need to press any buttons).\nTo exit the building, you will need to wave your hand in front of the exit sensor in order to exit the building.\nBlue light - door is closed.\nGreen light - door is open.\n( 3 ) Steps to CLOCK OUT:\nClick F5 (clock out).\nScan your registered fingerprint on the scanning device.\nCheck that your fingerprint has been successfully verified (a message will be displayed on the screen).\nDO'S AND DON'TS WHEN USING THE BIOMETRIC TERMINAL\nDo's - Proper finger placement:\nThe finger is centered on the scanning terminal;\nThe finger is placed flat onto the surface of the scanning terminal.\nWhen verification is successful, the below message appears on the screen of the terminal:\nDon'ts - Improper finger placement:\nThe finger is not centered on the scanning terminal;\nThe finger is not placed flat on the surface of the scanning terminal;\nThe finger is slanted or angled.\nWhen verification has failed, the below message appears on the screen of the terminal:\nAFTER-HOUR ACCESS\nTimes considered as after hours when additional access is needed:\nMonday to Friday after 18:00pm;\nSaturdays, Sundays, or on public holidays.\nProcess required in order to get After Hour Access:\nEmployees must complete the\nAfter-Hours Access Request\nworkflow on Slack, found on the #general channel.\nMondays to Fridays after-hour access: This workflow needs to be completed before 15:30pm on the day you require access after hours.\nWeekend after-hour access—This workflow needs to be completed before 15:30pm on the Friday before the weekend you will require access after hours.\nPublic holiday after-hour access: This workflow needs to be completed before 15:30pm on the last working weekday prior to the public holiday.\nGroup after-hour access: Where a group of employees are required to work after hours (approved overtime or departmental requirements—e.g., invoicers), the line manager is required to complete the workflow once in accordance with the above timelines and allocate one employee responsible for opening and locking up the office in line with the requirements over that time period if the line manager will not be working over that period.\nYour request will be sent through to the CFO & Procurement Officer for approval.\nFinance will provide the access keys and communicate the relevant requirements once approved.\nRequirements before LEAVING the building/ PREMISES when working after hours:\nIf you are working after hours, you, or the designated nominated employee, will need to ensure the below is done before leaving the premises:\nAll building doors and windows are closed and locked;\nAll lights and air-conditioning units are turned off;\nThe alarm is armed (turned on);\nThe basement gate is closed and locked;\nThe main gate is closed and locked;\nAny suspicious activity is reported immediately to the CFO & Procurement Officer.\nSYSTEM ISSUE REPORTING\nAny issues or concerns with the biometrics system or terminals must be reported to both your line manager and the procurement officer immediately.\nThis includes the biometrics system failing to scan your fingerprint on multiple consecutive attempts.\nBREACH OF THIS POLICY\nFailing to follow this policy or the procedures outlined herein will result in disciplinary action in line with Awesim's disciplinary code.\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"a3bb4bc2-3c70-4fcc-9d69-3e2ff42efc25\",\"title\":\"ERS Access Control Policy & Procedure\",\"content\":\"

PURPOSE

This policy provides clear and compulsory guidelines for all Awesim employees regarding the use of the ERS Biometrics system for facility access and timekeeping (clocking in and out). The purpose of this system is to manage access to company premises, as well as ensure accurate and secure record-keeping.

REGISTRATION & ENROLLMENT

  • All employees will be enrolled in the biometrics system, and new employees will be added as part of the onboarding process.
  • Employees must provide their fingerprints to be securely stored in the system.
  • It is the employee's responsibility to ensure their fingerprints are successfully registered during the registration process.

ACCESSING THE BUILDING

  • Employees registered on the biometrics system can access the building by scanning their designated finger on any of the biometrics terminals located around the building and premises.
  • Employees are required to scan their fingerprint on the biometrics system to gain access to the premises/building.
  • If a colleague has entered the boom ahead of you, wait for the boom gate to close completely before scanning your fingerprint. No tailgating.
  • The reception door is to remain closed at all times for safety reasons and to ensure access is controlled.
  • No sharing or buddy clocking: Your fingerprint registration is unique to you. Under no circumstances are you to ask a colleague to grant you access, nor should you grant access to a fellow colleague. Under no circumstances are you to tailgate into the premises or building (i.e access the premises or building by driving in or walking in behind a colleague who clocked in in front of you, resulting in you not clocking in on the system).

Areas with ERS Biometrics Terminal:

a) By the boom gates at the entrance/exit of the property;

b) Outside the main reception door;

c) Outside the entrance door in the basement.

CLOCKING IN AND OUT:

  • Every employee is required to clock in once upon arrival at the premises/building. This will record your arrival time at the office/premises.
  • Every employee is required to clock out once when leaving the premises/building. This will record the time that you left the building/premises for the day.

( 1 ) Steps to CLOCK IN:

  1. Click F1 (Clock in).
  2. Scan your registered fingerprint on the scanning device.
  3. Check that your fingerprint has been successfully verified (a message will be displayed on the screen).

( 2 ) General Entry and Exit during the day

    • General access throughout the day does not require you to clock in or clock out.
    • You will not be required to press F1 or F5 during the day - only required when clocking in or clocking out for the day - see above;
    • However, it is important that you scan your fingerprint each time you want to access the building during the day. To access the building generally throughout the day, you will scan your registered fingerprint on the biometrics terminal (no need to press any buttons).
    • To exit the building, you will need to wave your hand in front of the exit sensor in order to exit the building.
      • Blue light - door is closed.
      • Green light - door is open.

( 3 ) Steps to CLOCK OUT:

  1. Click F5 (clock out).
  2. Scan your registered fingerprint on the scanning device.
  3. Check that your fingerprint has been successfully verified (a message will be displayed on the screen).

DO'S AND DON'TS WHEN USING THE BIOMETRIC TERMINAL

Do's - Proper finger placement:

  • The finger is centered on the scanning terminal;
  • The finger is placed flat onto the surface of the scanning terminal.

When verification is successful, the below message appears on the screen of the terminal:

Don'ts - Improper finger placement:

  • The finger is not centered on the scanning terminal;
  • The finger is not placed flat on the surface of the scanning terminal;
  • The finger is slanted or angled.

When verification has failed, the below message appears on the screen of the terminal:

AFTER-HOUR ACCESS

Times considered as after hours when additional access is needed:

  • Monday to Friday after 18:00pm;
  • Saturdays, Sundays, or on public holidays.

Process required in order to get After Hour Access:

  • Employees must complete the After-Hours Access Request workflow on Slack, found on the #general channel.
  • Mondays to Fridays after-hour access: This workflow needs to be completed before 15:30pm on the day you require access after hours.
  • Weekend after-hour access—This workflow needs to be completed before 15:30pm on the Friday before the weekend you will require access after hours.
  • Public holiday after-hour access: This workflow needs to be completed before 15:30pm on the last working weekday prior to the public holiday.
  • Group after-hour access: Where a group of employees are required to work after hours (approved overtime or departmental requirements—e.g., invoicers), the line manager is required to complete the workflow once in accordance with the above timelines and allocate one employee responsible for opening and locking up the office in line with the requirements over that time period if the line manager will not be working over that period.
  • Your request will be sent through to the CFO & Procurement Officer for approval.
  • Finance will provide the access keys and communicate the relevant requirements once approved.

Requirements before LEAVING the building/ PREMISES when working after hours:

If you are working after hours, you, or the designated nominated employee, will need to ensure the below is done before leaving the premises:

  • All building doors and windows are closed and locked;
  • All lights and air-conditioning units are turned off;
  • The alarm is armed (turned on);
  • The basement gate is closed and locked;
  • The main gate is closed and locked;
  • Any suspicious activity is reported immediately to the CFO & Procurement Officer.

SYSTEM ISSUE REPORTING

  • Any issues or concerns with the biometrics system or terminals must be reported to both your line manager and the procurement officer immediately.
  • This includes the biometrics system failing to scan your fingerprint on multiple consecutive attempts.

BREACH OF THIS POLICY

Failing to follow this policy or the procedures outlined herein will result in disciplinary action in line with Awesim's disciplinary code.

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [ { "value": "Clock in", "id": "887aa396-3888-4caa-9a08-e97249560927", "categoryId": "f1824c7f-80e1-44e8-9c49-e3aca58b442f", "categoryName": "HR Tags" }, { "value": "ers", "id": "2b942a1c-81a4-4234-8dbc-e47cebd32c67", "categoryId": "f1824c7f-80e1-44e8-9c49-e3aca58b442f", "categoryName": "HR Tags" }, { "value": "policy", "id": "4b4e383d-ef16-43ea-8781-9877bf0601e9", "categoryId": "877b2ec0-0822-48f7-ac44-e37af6584b8d", "categoryName": "Tags" }, { "value": "procedure", "id": "17e9a5c6-5b5d-46d4-8964-c4af9d3296ae", "categoryId": "877b2ec0-0822-48f7-ac44-e37af6584b8d", "categoryName": "Tags" } ], "last_modified": "2025-11-10T10:15:08.934+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/a3bb4bc2-3c70-4fcc-9d69-3e2ff42efc25" }, { "id": "3d869e50-6b20-45ce-8693-a72f156556c7", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"3d869e50-6b20-45ce-8693-a72f156556c7\",\"title\":\"What is Month-End Bonus Payments? \",\"content\":\"\nAwesim rewards agents with Month End Bonuses\nbased on the number of activations each month.\nBonuses are paid at the\nend of each month\n, usually on the\n30th/31st\n(or closest business day).\nTo receive a bonus, Agents need at least 20 activations in a month.\nData SIM\nexclusions\ncount towards the month end bonuses.\nBonuses are calculated based on the total number of activations, including eligible data SIMs.\nYour Month-End Bonus is an extra payment for hitting your monthly activation targets. The more you activate, the more you earn per SIM.\nHow it Works\nQualification:\nYou must have at least\n5 total activations\nin a month to get a bonus.\nPayment Date:\nBonuses are paid at the end of each month (usually on the 30th or 31st).\nBonus Tiers\nYour bonus amount per activation increases as you activate more SIMs.\n5 - 9 activations:\nR2.50 per SIM\n10 - 19 activations:\nR5 per SIM\n20 - 49 activations:\nR7.50 per SIM\n50 - 74 activations:\nR10 per SIM\n75 - 99 activations:\nR12.50 per SIM\n100 - 149 activations:\nR15 per SIM\n150 - 199 activations:\nR17.50 per SIM\n200+ activations:\nR20 per SIM\nWhich SIMs Count?\nNormal SIMs:\n(with gold stickers)\nCount\nfor both the R30 activation payment and your Month-End Bonus.\nSocial Starter SIMs:\nCount\nfor both the R30 payment and your Month-End Bonus.\nPreloaded LTE Data SIMs:\nOnly count\ntowards your Month-End Bonus. They must be sold to a \\\"REAL\\\" customer who recharges and uses the SIM after the initial data is gone.\nPort Bonus\nYou can also earn an extra\nR30\nfor each successful port. To qualify, the customer must spend at least R150 within 3 months of the port.\nMore activations mean a higher bonus per activation.\nEnsure you have at least 20 activations to qualify for the bonus.\nPayment Confirmation\nOn the payment date, agents receive an SMS confirming their bonus has been p\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"3d869e50-6b20-45ce-8693-a72f156556c7\",\"title\":\"What is Month-End Bonus Payments? \",\"content\":\"

Awesim rewards agents with Month End Bonuses
based on the number of activations each month.
Bonuses are paid at the end of each month, usually on the 30th/31st (or closest business day).
To receive a bonus, Agents need at least 20 activations in a month.
Data SIM exclusions count towards the month end bonuses.
Bonuses are calculated based on the total number of activations, including eligible data SIMs.

Your Month-End Bonus is an extra payment for hitting your monthly activation targets. The more you activate, the more you earn per SIM.

How it Works

  • Qualification: You must have at least 5 total activations in a month to get a bonus.
  • Payment Date: Bonuses are paid at the end of each month (usually on the 30th or 31st).

Bonus Tiers

Your bonus amount per activation increases as you activate more SIMs.

  • 5 - 9 activations: R2.50 per SIM
  • 10 - 19 activations: R5 per SIM
  • 20 - 49 activations: R7.50 per SIM
  • 50 - 74 activations: R10 per SIM
  • 75 - 99 activations: R12.50 per SIM
  • 100 - 149 activations: R15 per SIM
  • 150 - 199 activations: R17.50 per SIM
  • 200+ activations: R20 per SIM

Which SIMs Count?

  • Normal SIMs: (with gold stickers) Count for both the R30 activation payment and your Month-End Bonus.
  • Social Starter SIMs: Count for both the R30 payment and your Month-End Bonus.
  • Preloaded LTE Data SIMs: Only count towards your Month-End Bonus. They must be sold to a \\\"REAL\\\" customer who recharges and uses the SIM after the initial data is gone.

Port Bonus

You can also earn an extra R30 for each successful port. To qualify, the customer must spend at least R150 within 3 months of the port.

More activations mean a higher bonus per activation.
Ensure you have at least 20 activations to qualify for the bonus.

Payment Confirmation

On the payment date, agents receive an SMS confirming their bonus has been p

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2025-11-07T09:50:54.050+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/3d869e50-6b20-45ce-8693-a72f156556c7" }, { "id": "79aab2cb-5587-4b28-9126-ff75ec15af7e", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"79aab2cb-5587-4b28-9126-ff75ec15af7e\",\"title\":\"Awesim / Vodacom R99 incentive\",\"content\":\"\nAll Awesim Vodacom SIMs that have a First Recharge of R99 or more will earn an extra R10 activation payment.\nHere is how it works:\nR30 activation commission\n+ R10 extra\npaid separately\nThe R10 commission will be paid on the\n28th of the month\n(2 months after the First Recharge).\nExample:\nMarch qualifiers will be paid in May\nThe activated sims will still count for\nMonth End bonuses\nThe incentive runs from 1 March 2024 to\n(extended: to be confirmed)\nView our\nTerms & Conditions\nE&OE – We do our best to keep details accurate.\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"79aab2cb-5587-4b28-9126-ff75ec15af7e\",\"title\":\"Awesim / Vodacom R99 incentive\",\"content\":\"

All Awesim Vodacom SIMs that have a First Recharge of R99 or more will earn an extra R10 activation payment.

Here is how it works:

  • R30 activation commission + R10 extra paid separately
  • The R10 commission will be paid on the 28th of the month (2 months after the First Recharge).
  • Example: March qualifiers will be paid in May
  • The activated sims will still count for Month End bonuses
  • The incentive runs from 1 March 2024 to (extended: to be confirmed)


View our Terms & Conditions
E&OE – We do our best to keep details accurate.

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [ { "value": "awesim promotion", "id": "56535241-54d6-4cb7-850a-ba29bcdadf34", "categoryId": "877b2ec0-0822-48f7-ac44-e37af6584b8d", "{\"id\":\"5266a171-450e-44bd-a435-f9e9c30229ff\",\"title\":\"How can I change my main RICA phone number or link a new account on Smartload?\",\"content\":\"\nCan I change or link my RICA phone number on Smartload?\nUnfortunately, Smartcall\ncannot change or link your main RICA phone number\nto a new one account.\nIf you can’t use your old SIM card or can’t do a SIM swap, you’ll need to\nregister a new number\nand continue using that number for your Smartload account.\nWhat if I had funds on my old Smartload number?\nIf your old number had\nSmartload funds\n, Smartcall can assist once ownership of that number is confirmed.\nPlease send these documents to\nfraud@smartcall.co.za\nor submit them via\nSmartcall Support\n:\n📄\nConfirmation letter\nfrom your network confirming ownership of the old number.\n📝\nAffidavit\nfrom the police station requesting Smartcall to transfer the funds.\n🆔\nCertified copy\nof your ID or passport.\n💡\nTip:\nAll documents must be clear, valid, and correctly signed — Smartcall can’t process incomplete submissions.\nWhy does Smartcall require these documents?\nSmartcall’s\nFraud and Risk Department\nrequires these documents to confirm ownership and prevent fraudulent fund transfers.\nWithout them, Smartcall cannot process any Smartload fund transfers from an old number.\n💬 Need help?\nIf you have questions, contact\nSmartcall support on 011 507 4789\nor email them at support@smartcall.co.za.\nAlternatively, contact\nAwesim Customer Care\non:\n📱\nWhatsApp:\n060 070 2666\nCan I change or link my RICA phone number on Smartload?\nUnfortunately, Smartcall\ncannot change or link your main RICA phone number\nto a new one account.\nIf you can’t use your old SIM card or can’t do a SIM swap, you’ll need to\nregister a new number\nand continue using that number for your Smartload account.\nWhat if I had funds on my old Smartload number?\nIf your old number had\nSmartload funds\n, Smartcall can assist once ownership of that number is confirmed.\nPlease send these documents to\nfraud@smartcall.co.za\nor submit them via\nSmartcall Support\n:\n📄\nConfirmation letter\nfrom your network confirming ownership of the old number.\n📝\nAffidavit\nfrom the police station requesting Smartcall to transfer the funds.\n🆔\nCertified copy\nof your ID or passport.\n💡\nTip:\nAll documents must be clear, valid, and correctly signed — Smartcall can’t process incomplete submissions.\nWhy does Smartcall require these documents?\nSmartcall’s\nFraud and Risk Department\nrequires these documents to confirm ownership and prevent fraudulent fund transfers.\nWithout them, Smartcall cannot process any Smartload fund transfers from an old number.\n💬 Need help?\nIf you have questions contact\nSmartcall support on 011 507 4789\nor email them at support@smartcall.co.za\nAlternatively contact\nAwesim Customer Care\non:\n📱\nWhatsApp:\n060 070 2666\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"5266a171-450e-44bd-a435-f9e9c30229ff\",\"title\":\"How can I change my main RICA phone number or link a new account on Smartload?\",\"content\":\"

Can I change or link my RICA phone number on Smartload?

Unfortunately, Smartcall cannot change or link your main RICA phone number to a new one account.

If you can’t use your old SIM card or can’t do a SIM swap, you’ll need to register a new number and continue using that number for your Smartload account.

What if I had funds on my old Smartload number?

If your old number had Smartload funds, Smartcall can assist once ownership of that number is confirmed.

Please send these documents to fraud@smartcall.co.za or submit them via Smartcall Support:

  1. 📄 Confirmation letter from your network confirming ownership of the old number.
  2. 📝 Affidavit from the police station requesting Smartcall to transfer the funds.
  3. 🆔 Certified copy of your ID or passport.

💡 Tip: All documents must be clear, valid, and correctly signed — Smartcall can’t process incomplete submissions.

Why does Smartcall require these documents?

Smartcall’s Fraud and Risk Department requires these documents to confirm ownership and prevent fraudulent fund transfers.

Without them, Smartcall cannot process any Smartload fund transfers from an old number.

💬 Need help?

If you have questions, contact Smartcall support on 011 507 4789 or email them at support@smartcall.co.za.

Alternatively, contact Awesim Customer Care on:

📱 WhatsApp: 060 070 2666

Can I change or link my RICA phone number on Smartload?

Unfortunately, Smartcall cannot change or link your main RICA phone number to a new one account.
If you can’t use your old SIM card or can’t do a SIM swap, you’ll need to register a new number and continue using that number for your Smartload account.

What if I had funds on my old Smartload number?

If your old number had Smartload funds, Smartcall can assist once ownership of that number is confirmed.

Please send these documents to fraud@smartcall.co.za or submit them via Smartcall Support:

  1. 📄 Confirmation letter from your network confirming ownership of the old number.
  2. 📝 Affidavit from the police station requesting Smartcall to transfer the funds.
  3. 🆔 Certified copy of your ID or passport.

💡 Tip: All documents must be clear, valid, and correctly signed — Smartcall can’t process incomplete submissions.

Why does Smartcall require these documents?

Smartcall’s Fraud and Risk Department requires these documents to confirm ownership and prevent fraudulent fund transfers.
Without them, Smartcall cannot process any Smartload fund transfers from an old number.

💬 Need help?

If you have questions contact Smartcall support on 011 507 4789 or email them at support@smartcall.co.za

Alternatively contact Awesim Customer Care on:
📱 WhatsApp: 060 070 2666

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2025-10-30T05:54:21.125+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/5266a171-450e-44bd-a435-f9e9c30229ff" }, { "id": "89f5b93e-f418-40bf-995c-d924f23db4c3", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"89f5b93e-f418-40bf-995c-d924f23db4c3\",\"title\":\"How can I use the Rewards menu on USSD?\",\"content\":\"\nWhat is the Awesim Rewards menu on USSD?\nThe\nRewards menu\nlets you check your\npoints\n, view the\nAwesim Store\n, and\nredeem or manage your rewards\n— all directly from your phone using the USSD menu.\nYou don’t need data or the app to use it.\nTo get started, simply dial\n*\n130*\n43203#\nand select “Rewards.”\nWhat options are available in the Rewards menu?\nWhen you open the\nRewards\nmenu, you’ll see these options:\n⭐\nBalance\n– Check your current Reward Points, pending orders, and redeemed points.\n🛍️\nAwesim Store\n– Browse available reward categories (Devices, Audio, Accessories, etc.).\n❌\nCancel Order\n– Cancel any pending reward orders.\n💰\nBuy Points\n– Purchase more Reward Points using your preferred method.\nℹ️\nWhat’s This?\n– View information about the Rewards programme.\n🔄\n99 Next Page\n– Move to the next set of menu options.\n💡\nTip:\nYou can always dial\n“0”\nto return to the **Rewards Menu.\n**\nHow can I check my Reward Points balance under rewards?\nChoose\n“Balance.”\nYou’ll see:\nYour\ntotal points\nPending order points\nRedeemed points\nYour\nstar rating\nHow can I view or order from the Awesim Store?\nDial\n*\n130*\n43203#\nand select\n“Rewards.”\nTap\n“Awesim Store.”\nSelect the category you’d like to view, such as:\nDevices\nAudio\nElectronics\nAccessories\nAgent Uniform\nPromo Equipment\nAwesim or Network Branded Items\nHow can I cancel a reward order?\nIf you’ve placed a\npending reward order\nand want to cancel it:\nDial\n*\n130\n*43203#\nand select\n“Rewards.”\nChoose\n“Cancel Order.”\nSelect your\npending order\nand confirm by choosing\nOption 1\nYou’ll see a confirmation message that your order has been cancelled.\nHow can I buy Reward Points on USSD?\nDial\n*\n130*\n43203#\nSelect\n“Rewards.”\nChoose\n“Buy Points.”\nSelect Option 1 (Bank Details) or 2 (Smartload Number) & follow the prompts to buy Reward Points on the Awesim USSD\n💡\nTip:\nYou can also buy Reward Points in the\nAwesim App\nunder\nMy Rewards → Buy Points.\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"89f5b93e-f418-40bf-995c-d924f23db4c3\",\"title\":\"How can I use the Rewards menu on USSD?\",\"content\":\"

What is the Awesim Rewards menu on USSD?

The Rewards menu lets you check your points, view the Awesim Store, and redeem or manage your rewards — all directly from your phone using the USSD menu.

You don’t need data or the app to use it.

To get started, simply dial *130*43203# and select “Rewards.”

What options are available in the Rewards menu?

When you open the Rewards menu, you’ll see these options:

  • ⭐ Balance – Check your current Reward Points, pending orders, and redeemed points.
  • 🛍️ Awesim Store – Browse available reward categories (Devices, Audio, Accessories, etc.).
  • ❌ Cancel Order – Cancel any pending reward orders.
  • 💰 Buy Points – Purchase more Reward Points using your preferred method.
  • ℹ️ What’s This? – View information about the Rewards programme.
  • 🔄 99 Next Page – Move to the next set of menu options.

💡 Tip: You can always dial “0” to return to the **Rewards Menu.

**

How can I check my Reward Points balance under rewards?

  1. Choose “Balance.”

  1. You’ll see:
    • Your total points
    • Pending order points
    • Redeemed points
    • Your star rating

How can I view or order from the Awesim Store?

  1. Dial *130*43203# and select “Rewards.”
  2. Tap “Awesim Store.”
  3. Select the category you’d like to view, such as:
    • Devices
    • Audio
    • Electronics
    • Accessories
    • Agent Uniform
    • Promo Equipment
    • Awesim or Network Branded Items

How can I cancel a reward order?

If you’ve placed a pending reward order and want to cancel it:

  1. Dial *130*43203# and select “Rewards.”
  2. Choose “Cancel Order.”

  1. Select your pending order and confirm by choosing Option 1

  1. You’ll see a confirmation message that your order has been cancelled.

How can I buy Reward Points on USSD?

  1. Dial *130*43203#
  2. Select “Rewards.”
  3. Choose “Buy Points.”
  4. Select Option 1 (Bank Details) or 2 (Smartload Number) & follow the prompts to buy Reward Points on the Awesim USSD

💡 Tip: You can also buy Reward Points in the Awesim App under My Rewards → Buy Points.

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2025-10-29T13:55:09.172+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/89f5b93e-f418-40bf-995c-d924f23db4c3" }, { "id": "5423ee2e-5717-4c1b-81bd-b189814c3afd", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"5423ee2e-5717-4c1b-81bd-b189814c3afd\",\"title\":\"How can I change my payment method on the Awesim App?\",\"content\":\"\nWhat payment methods can I use?\nBy default, your Awesim payments are made to your\nSmartload Wallet\nor your\npreferred payment method\n, depending on your account type.\nAwesim offers the following payment options:\n💸\nSmartload Wallet\n(default option)\n— Dial\n130\n678#\nto view your balance.\n🏦\nBank Account\n💳\nFNB eWallet\n🧾\nPrepay Central\nHow can I change my payment method in the Awesim App?\nOpen the\nAwesim App\nand tap your\nProfile\nicon.\nSelect\nPayment Settings\n.\nTap\nHow Do I Get Paid\n.\nView your\nCurrent Payment Method\nat the top of the screen.\nTo change it, scroll down to\nChange Payment Method\nand select your date you want to change to a new payment option.\nSelect the\n\\\"How to I get Paid\nsection and choose your new Payment Method from the list and follow the prompts.\n💡\nNote:\nIf you choose\nPrepay Central\nor\nFNB eWallet\n, you’ll need to email\naccounts@awesim.co.za\nto finalise the update.\nWhen can I change my payment method?\nYou can update your payment method\nat any time\n, except during\npayment processing periods\n, which usually run from:\n📅\n5 days before the 25th\nuntil\nafter month-end payments are completed\n.\nIf you try to make changes during this time, you’ll see a message that updates are temporarily disabled.\ncan I change my account type?\nYes.\nIf you need to switch from\nPaid to RICA\nto\nPaid to Code\n, follow these steps:\nGo to\nHow Do I Get Paid\nin the\nAwesim App.\nSelect\nPayment Date.\nChoose\n25th and Month End\nto change both.\nSelect\nHow to get Paid\n(Smartload, Bank)\nOnce done, your account type will update automatically.\n💬 Need help?\nIf you can’t change your payment method or need assistance, contact\nAwesim Customer Care\non:\n📱\nWhatsApp:\n060 070 2666\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"5423ee2e-5717-4c1b-81bd-b189814c3afd\",\"title\":\"How can I change my payment method on the Awesim App?\",\"content\":\"

What payment methods can I use?

By default, your Awesim payments are made to your Smartload Wallet or your preferred payment method, depending on your account type.

Awesim offers the following payment options:

  • 💸 Smartload Wallet (default option) — Dial 130678# to view your balance.
  • 🏦 Bank Account
  • 💳 FNB eWallet
  • 🧾 Prepay Central

How can I change my payment method in the Awesim App?

  1. Open the Awesim App and tap your Profile icon.

  1. Select Payment Settings.

  1. Tap How Do I Get Paid.

  1. View your Current Payment Method at the top of the screen.

  1. To change it, scroll down to Change Payment Method and select your date you want to change to a new payment option.

  1. Select the \\\"How to I get Paid section and choose your new Payment Method from the list and follow the prompts.

💡 Note: If you choose Prepay Central or FNB eWallet, you’ll need to email accounts@awesim.co.za to finalise the update.

When can I change my payment method?

You can update your payment method at any time, except during payment processing periods, which usually run from:
📅 5 days before the 25th until after month-end payments are completed.

If you try to make changes during this time, you’ll see a message that updates are temporarily disabled.

can I change my account type?

Yes.
If you need to switch from Paid to RICA to Paid to Code, follow these steps:

  1. Go to How Do I Get Paid in the Awesim App.

  1. Select Payment Date.

  1. Choose 25th and Month End to change both.

  1. Select How to get Paid (Smartload, Bank)

Once done, your account type will update automatically.

💬 Need help?

If you can’t change your payment method or need assistance, contact Awesim Customer Care on:
📱 WhatsApp: 060 070 2666

All newly connected sims will need to dial *1# to retrieve their MSISDN.\nNetworks that are supported by the Awesim In-App RICA is Telkom, MTN, Vodacom and Cell C.\nstatus key (by colour)\nColour\nStatus (Description)\nTime\nAction\nGreen\nSuccess\nN/A\nN/A\nBlue\nSubmitted\nPending Submission c/o awesim\nIf no update, and error persists => 15 Minutes\nLog\n[Reporting Bugs CC Agents]\nWorkflow on #new-app_testing Slack Channel, for investigation.\nYellow\nPending\nPending Submission c/o Smartcall and / or Network(s)\nSee #general for any Network Error Updates\nIf no update, and error persists => 1 Hour (See Date & Timestamp on App Support Dashboard)\nLog\n[Reporting Bugs CC Agents]\nWorkflow on #new-app_testing Slack Channel, for investigation.\nRed\nFailed (Error)\nError notifications c/o awesim\nImmediate\nIf an agent raises a query or concern regarding\nmultiple failed (Error) RICAs\n, this must be treated as\nurgent\nand logged on\n#calling_problems\n.\n→ The\nCC Admin\nmust immediately raise an\nurgent request\non\n#critical_support\nfor investigation.\nIf an agent experiences a\nonce-off RICA error\n(single failed RICA)\n→ Any \\\"Unknown\\\" failed notification - not listed below - Log\n[Reporting Bugs CC Agents]\nWorkflow on #new-app_testing Slack Channel, for investigation.\nFailed (Error) Notifications\nError Notification\nStatus (Description)\nValue cannot be null. (Parameter 's')\nRICA Service Down\nSystem downtime\nLog\nurgent query\non\n#calling_problems\n.\nA registration request for this SIM has already been received and is being processed.\nA RICA request is in process\nor SIm has already been RICA'ed\nAgent MSISDN is not a RICA Agent\ntbc\nFAILURE: Error executing iCAP function. Error in executing the CRERGL iCAP call [ErrorCode = UNKNOWN]\nSystem downtime\nLog\nurgent query\non\n#calling_problems\n.\nFAILURE:The subscriber has already been registered:0003:The subscriber has already been registered\nFAILURE:WARNING: SIM ALREADY USED => 8927078031429333055:203:RegisterMSISDNImpl\nFAILURE:Registration failed:002:8927000009891840313 is pending activation\nSim already RICA'ed & connected\nFAILURE: Registration failed:002:27834985849\nis already registered\nSim already RICA'ed\nFAILURE:Registration failed:002:8927000009882847988 is expired\nMTN Sim was previously RICA'ed - and not used and since removed \\\"Expired\\\" from the Network.\n**The Sim has been RICA'd & connected, 3 x months have past & now they are trying to reRICA the Sim.\nIf any questions outside the above rule: Log on App Bug Reporting Workflow, and ESC for investigation\nFAILURE:Registration failed:002:Invalid Postal Code [3908]\nPost code is not a verified postal code\nFAILURE:Registration failed:002:RICA Pre-Paid Registration Threshold Per ID/Passport Number Limit R\nFAILURE:Registration failed:002:RICA Registration Threshold Per ID/Passport Number Limit Reached.\n577:Registration Limit Exceeded for SIM Cards registered under Subscriber\nAgent has used the same ID / Passport too many times to RICA\nLimit: 100 RICA attempts using the same ID / Passport\nRETRY_LATER:Registration failed:003:Error registering 8927000009788576780: null\nSystem problem\n505:Cell phone, Starter Pack Reference, SIM already registered\nSim already RICA'ed\nMTN RICA is currently experiencing problems, please try again later.\nSystem downtime\nWe are not able to RICA the SIM. Please try again later.\nSystem downtime\nSIM Serial No is not valid\nEscalate Immediately\nAwesim RICA checks IN APP Notifications\nNotification for the Agent on the RICA Screen\nThe passport expiry date is not valid\nInvalid passport number\nInvalid input: The passport number should not contain special characters and should be at least 6 ch\nInvalid input: The letter cannot be repeated more than twice error code 17\nInvalid input: The ID number is invalid. error code 16 , Address line 1 and address line 2 cannot be\nInvalid input: Should have at least 1 vowel and 1 consonant error code 27\nInvalid input: Must have numbers and letters and should therefore contain at least 5 characters. err\nInvalid input: Cannot not contain numbers or special characters error code 33\nInvalid input: Address line 1 and address line 2 cannot be the same error code 32\nInvalid data captured for Address Line 3\nagent in-app view\nHome Page\nRICA\nScroll Down - [\nRICA Report]\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"ba491f4f-67ca-4fe8-bbad-632b7db9f769\",\"title\":\"Our Awesim - In-App RICA Status Support \",\"content\":\"

Our awesim Link:

  1. http://appi/our
  2. App Support
  3. Search: SysproCustomer or Phone
  4. Select [Latest RICA Attempts]
  5. Important Note: Awesim does not send a RICA SMS. The RICA status can be found in the App's RICA Report.
  6. As of 5 December 2024, Telkom will no longer include the MSISDN in the SMS sent after successful RICA registration. All newly connected sims will need to dial *1# to retrieve their MSISDN.
  7. Networks that are supported by the Awesim In-App RICA is Telkom, MTN, Vodacom and Cell C.

status key (by colour)

Colour

Status (Description)

Time

Action

Green

Success

N/A

N/A

Blue

Submitted

Pending Submission c/o awesim

If no update, and error persists => 15 Minutes
Log [Reporting Bugs CC Agents] Workflow on #new-app_testing Slack Channel, for investigation.

Yellow

Pending

Pending Submission c/o Smartcall and / or Network(s)

See #general for any Network Error Updates
If no update, and error persists => 1 Hour (See Date & Timestamp on App Support Dashboard)
Log [Reporting Bugs CC Agents] Workflow on #new-app_testing Slack Channel, for investigation.

Red

Failed (Error)

Error notifications c/o awesim
Immediate

If an agent raises a query or concern regarding multiple failed (Error) RICAs, this must be treated as urgent and logged on #calling_problems.
→ The CC Admin must immediately raise an urgent request on #critical_support for investigation.

If an agent experiences a once-off RICA error (single failed RICA)
→ Any \\\"Unknown\\\" failed notification - not listed below - Log [Reporting Bugs CC Agents] Workflow on #new-app_testing Slack Channel, for investigation.


Failed (Error) Notifications

Error Notification

Status (Description)

Value cannot be null. (Parameter 's')

RICA Service Down

System downtime
Log urgent query on #calling_problems.

A registration request for this SIM has already been received and is being processed.

A RICA request is in process
or SIm has already been RICA'ed

Agent MSISDN is not a RICA Agent

tbc

FAILURE: Error executing iCAP function. Error in executing the CRERGL iCAP call [ErrorCode = UNKNOWN]

System downtime
Log urgent query on #calling_problems.

FAILURE:The subscriber has already been registered:0003:The subscriber has already been registered

FAILURE:WARNING: SIM ALREADY USED => 8927078031429333055:203:RegisterMSISDNImpl

FAILURE:Registration failed:002:8927000009891840313 is pending activation

Sim already RICA'ed & connected

FAILURE: Registration failed:002:27834985849 is already registered

Sim already RICA'ed

FAILURE:Registration failed:002:8927000009882847988 is expired

MTN Sim was previously RICA'ed - and not used and since removed \\\"Expired\\\" from the Network.

**The Sim has been RICA'd & connected, 3 x months have past & now they are trying to reRICA the Sim.

If any questions outside the above rule: Log on App Bug Reporting Workflow, and ESC for investigation

FAILURE:Registration failed:002:Invalid Postal Code [3908]

Post code is not a verified postal code

FAILURE:Registration failed:002:RICA Pre-Paid Registration Threshold Per ID/Passport Number Limit R

FAILURE:Registration failed:002:RICA Registration Threshold Per ID/Passport Number Limit Reached.

577:Registration Limit Exceeded for SIM Cards registered under Subscriber

Agent has used the same ID / Passport too many times to RICA

Awesim RICA checks IN APP Notifications

The passport expiry date is not valid

Invalid passport number

Invalid input: The passport number should not contain special characters and should be at least 6 ch

Invalid input: The letter cannot be repeated more than twice error code 17

Invalid input: The ID number is invalid. error code 16 , Address line 1 and address line 2 cannot be

Invalid input: Should have at least 1 vowel and 1 consonant error code 27

Invalid input: Must have numbers and letters and should therefore contain at least 5 characters. err

Invalid input: Cannot not contain numbers or special characters error code 33

Invalid input: Address line 1 and address line 2 cannot be the same error code 32

Invalid data captured for Address Line 3

  2. RICA
  3. Scroll Down - [RICA Report]



\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2025-10-27T08:05:44.418+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/ba491f4f-67ca-4fe8-bbad-632b7db9f769" }, { "id": "360c7d61-7f4d-46a9-ac20-63d9a4557c10", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"360c7d61-7f4d-46a9-ac20-63d9a4557c10\",\"title\":\"How can I check SIM payments using USSD?\",\"content\":\"\nWhat can I check using USSD?\nYou can check\nhow much you’ll be paid\nfor each activated SIM card — and\nwho receives the payment\n— directly from your phone, using the\nAwesim USSD menu\n.\n💡\nTip:\nIf the SIM hasn’t been activated or hasn’t met the minimum spend requirement, no payment will appear.\nHow can I check SIM payments on USSD?\nDial\n13043203#\non your phone.\nSelect\n\\\"Payments\\\"\nSelect\n\\\"Check sim payment\\\"\nConfirm by selecting\n“Check SIM Payment.”\nagain.\nEnter the\nSIM ICCID number\n(the long number printed on the SIM).\nSelect\n\\\"25th Payment\\\"\nYour payment details will appear on the screen.\nWhat will I see on the screen?\nOnce you’ve entered the SIM number, the results will show:\nThe\namount paid\nfor that SIM’s activation.\nWho receives the payment\n(you or another agent).\nThe\npayment cycle\n, which is usually paid on the\n25th of each month.\n💬 Need help?\nIf payment details don’t appear or the system isn’t loading correctly, contact\nAwesim Customer Care:\n📱\nWhatsApp:\n060 070 2666\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"360c7d61-7f4d-46a9-ac20-63d9a4557c10\",\"title\":\"How can I check SIM payments using USSD?\",\"content\":\"

What can I check using USSD?

You can check how much you’ll be paid for each activated SIM card — and who receives the payment — directly from your phone, using the Awesim USSD menu.

💡 Tip: If the SIM hasn’t been activated or hasn’t met the minimum spend requirement, no payment will appear.

How can I check SIM payments on USSD?

  1. Dial 13043203# on your phone.

  1. Select \\\"Payments\\\"

  1. Select \\\"Check sim payment\\\"

  1. Confirm by selecting “Check SIM Payment.” again.

  1. Enter the SIM ICCID number (the long number printed on the SIM).

  1. Select \\\"25th Payment\\\"

  1. Your payment details will appear on the screen.

What will I see on the screen?

Once you’ve entered the SIM number, the results will show:

  • The amount paid for that SIM’s activation.
  • Who receives the payment (you or another agent).
  • The payment cycle, which is usually paid on the 25th of each month.

💬 Need help?

If payment details don’t appear or the system isn’t loading correctly, contact Awesim Customer Care:
📱 WhatsApp: 060 070 2666

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2025-10-24T20:40:56.962+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/360c7d61-7f4d-46a9-ac20-63d9a4557c10" }, { "id": "1a75eac1-af74-402e-9692-36c56c7b4245", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"1a75eac1-af74-402e-9692-36c56c7b4245\",\"title\":\"How can I view my reports on the Awesim App?\",\"content\":\"\nHow to View Your Reports on the Awesim App?\nKeep track of your performance and progress directly in the\nAwesim App\n.\nWhat can I do with the Reports section?\nThe\nReports section\nin your\nAwesim App\nhelps you keep track of your\nsales, activations, and RICA performance\n— all in one place.\nYou can easily view how your connections are performing and check delivery updates for your orders.\nHow can I access my reports?\nOpen the\nAwesim App\n.\nOn your\nDashboard\n, you’ll see your\nConnections\nand\nFirst Recharges\nfor the current period.\nYou can also tap\nReports\nfrom the\nbottom navigation bar.\nWhat types of reports can I view?\nOnce on your\nReports Dashboard\n, you’ll find three report types:\n📡\nNetwork Report\n– View how your activations are performing by network.\n📦\nShipped Order Report\n– Check the delivery and progress of your SIM orders.\n🧾\nRICA No. Report\n– See the performance for each RICA number on your account.\nYou can use the\n“This Month”\ndropdown at the top to switch between months.\nHow can I see more detailed information?\nTap the\ngreen section\nof a report card or press the\n“+” icon\nto expand the view.\nIn the\nNetwork Report\n, see performance by network.\nIn the\nShipped Order Report\n, track the progress of each order.\nIn the\nRICA No. Report\n, view each SIM’s activity and recharges.\n💬 Need help?\nIf your reports aren’t updating or something looks incorrect, contact\nAwesim Customer Care:\n📱\nWhatsApp:\n060 070 2666\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"1a75eac1-af74-402e-9692-36c56c7b4245\",\"title\":\"How can I view my reports on the Awesim App?\",\"content\":\"

How to View Your Reports on the Awesim App?

Keep track of your performance and progress directly in the Awesim App.

What can I do with the Reports section?

The Reports section in your Awesim App helps you keep track of your sales, activations, and RICA performance — all in one place.
You can easily view how your connections are performing and check delivery updates for your orders.

How can I access my reports?

  1. Open the Awesim App.
  2. On your Dashboard, you’ll see your Connections and First Recharges for the current period.
  3. You can also tap Reports from the bottom navigation bar.

What types of reports can I view?

Once on your Reports Dashboard, you’ll find three report types:

  • 📡 Network Report – View how your activations are performing by network.
  • 📦 Shipped Order Report – Check the delivery and progress of your SIM orders.
  • 🧾 RICA No. Report – See the performance for each RICA number on your account.

You can use the “This Month” dropdown at the top to switch between months.


How can I see more detailed information?

  • Tap the green section of a report card or press the “+” icon to expand the view.
  • In the Network Report, see performance by network.

  • In the Shipped Order Report, track the progress of each order.

  • In the RICA No. Report, view each SIM’s activity and recharges.

💬 Need help?

If your reports aren’t updating or something looks incorrect, contact Awesim Customer Care:
📱 WhatsApp: 060 070 2666

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2025-10-24T20:32:28.140+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/1a75eac1-af74-402e-9692-36c56c7b4245" }, { "id": "f2580400-2bc3-4e4d-8649-bbb5ee18b60d", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"f2580400-2bc3-4e4d-8649-bbb5ee18b60d\",\"title\":\"What is stored on my SIM card and how much space does it have?\",\"content\":\"\nWhat does a SIM card actually store?\nYour SIM card doesn’t store your\napps\n,\nphotos\n, or\nWhatsApp chats\n— it’s mainly used to connect your phone to your\nmobile network\n.\nThink of it as your network’s ID card — it helps your phone know who you are on the network.\nHow much storage does a SIM card have?\nModern SIM cards have between\n128 KB and 256 KB\nof storage, while some newer 4G and 5G SIMs can have up to\n512 KB\n.\nThat’s very small compared to your phone’s memory, but it’s enough to store your essential\nnetwork and security details\n.\nWhat information is stored on my SIM card?\nYour SIM card keeps the technical details that make your connection work:\nNetwork ID\n– a unique number that connects your SIM to your mobile network.\nSecurity keys\n– protect your calls and data from being accessed by others.\nNetwork settings\n– let your phone connect and roam on your carrier’s network.\nContacts and SMS (optional)\n– on older phones, you can save about 250 contacts and a few text messages.\nService updates\n– includes small SIM Toolkit apps or menu options from your network.\nWhere are my apps, photos, and messages stored?\nYour\nphone’s internal storage\nor\ncloud storage\nkeeps all your personal data — like photos, messages, and apps — not your SIM card.\nThe SIM card’s main job is to keep you connected to your mobile network.\n💬 Need help?\nIf your SIM card isn’t connecting or showing network information, contact\nAwesim Customer Care:\n📱\nWhatsApp:\n060 070 2666\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"f2580400-2bc3-4e4d-8649-bbb5ee18b60d\",\"title\":\"What is stored on my SIM card and how much space does it have?\",\"content\":\"

What does a SIM card actually store?

Your SIM card doesn’t store your apps, photos, or WhatsApp chats — it’s mainly used to connect your phone to your mobile network.
Think of it as your network’s ID card — it helps your phone know who you are on the network.

How much storage does a SIM card have?

Modern SIM cards have between 128 KB and 256 KB of storage, while some newer 4G and 5G SIMs can have up to 512 KB.

That’s very small compared to your phone’s memory, but it’s enough to store your essential network and security details.

What information is stored on my SIM card?

Your SIM card keeps the technical details that make your connection work:

  • Network ID – a unique number that connects your SIM to your mobile network.
  • Security keys – protect your calls and data from being accessed by others.
  • Network settings – let your phone connect and roam on your carrier’s network.
  • Contacts and SMS (optional) – on older phones, you can save about 250 contacts and a few text messages.
  • Service updates – includes small SIM Toolkit apps or menu options from your network.

Where are my apps, photos, and messages stored?

Your phone’s internal storage or cloud storage keeps all your personal data — like photos, messages, and apps — not your SIM card.
The SIM card’s main job is to keep you connected to your mobile network.

💬 Need help?

If your SIM card isn’t connecting or showing network information, contact Awesim Customer Care:
📱 WhatsApp: 060 070 2666

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2025-10-24T20:08:21.990+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/f2580400-2bc3-4e4d-8649-bbb5ee18b60d" }, { "id": "566c6415-59a9-4ea4-b54c-37f4f0cfadde", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"566c6415-59a9-4ea4-b54c-37f4f0cfadde\",\"title\":\"How can I buy Reward Points on the Awesim App?\",\"content\":\"\nWhat are Reward Points?\nReward Points are used to\nredeem items\nin the\nAwesim Rewards Store\n.\nYou can also\nbuy Reward Points\ndirectly in the Awesim App whenever you need more to redeem your favourite rewards.\nHow can I buy Reward Points in the Awesim App?\nOpen the\nAwesim App\n, on the dashboard tap '\nReward Points'\nTap '\nBuy Points'\nEnter how many points you want to buy.\n1 Reward Point = R1\nMinimum purchase: 20 points\nSelect your\npayment method\n:\nCredit / Debit Card\n(instant)\nSmartload\n(instant)\nEFT or Cash Deposit\n(2–3 days to reflect)\nComplete your payment and return to the app to confirm your new balance.\nHow does payment work?\nCredit/ Debit Card:\nEnter your card details and tap\nPay Now.\nApprove the transaction in your banking app.\nOnce successful, your\nReward Points\nbalance will\nupdate immediately.\nSmartload:\nSelect\nSmartload\nas your payment option.\nYou must use your\nMain Number\n(the same number you receive payments on).\nEnter the\nOTP\nsent to your phone to confirm.\nReward Points will\nreflect instantly\nafter approval.\nEFT or Cash:\nDeposit funds into Awesim’s official bank account.\nAllow\n2–3 working days\nfor the Reward Points to appear in your balance.\nHow do I know if my purchase was successful?\nAfter payment:\nYou’ll see a\n“Payment Successful”\nmessage on your screen.\nYour\nReward Points balance\nwill update automatically under\nMy Rewards.\n💬 Need help?\nIf your payment doesn’t reflect or you can’t buy Reward Points, contact\nAwesim Customer Care:\n📱\nWhatsApp:\n060 070 2666\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"566c6415-59a9-4ea4-b54c-37f4f0cfadde\",\"title\":\"How can I buy Reward Points on the Awesim App?\",\"content\":\"

What are Reward Points?

Reward Points are used to redeem items in the Awesim Rewards Store.
You can also buy Reward Points directly in the Awesim App whenever you need more to redeem your favourite rewards.

How can I buy Reward Points in the Awesim App?

  1. Open the Awesim App, on the dashboard tap 'Reward Points'

  1. Tap 'Buy Points'

  1. Enter how many points you want to buy.
    • 1 Reward Point = R1
    • Minimum purchase: 20 points

  1. Select your payment method:
    • Credit / Debit Card (instant)
    • Smartload (instant)
    • EFT or Cash Deposit (2–3 days to reflect)

  1. Complete your payment and return to the app to confirm your new balance.

How does payment work?

Credit/ Debit Card:

    • Enter your card details and tap Pay Now.
    • Approve the transaction in your banking app.

    • Once successful, your Reward Points balance will update immediately.

Smartload:

  • Select Smartload as your payment option.
  • You must use your Main Number (the same number you receive payments on).
  • Enter the OTP sent to your phone to confirm.
  • Reward Points will reflect instantly after approval.

EFT or Cash:

  • Deposit funds into Awesim’s official bank account.
  • Allow 2–3 working days for the Reward Points to appear in your balance.

How do I know if my purchase was successful?

After payment:

  • You’ll see a “Payment Successful” message on your screen.
  • Your Reward Points balance will update automatically under My Rewards.

💬 Need help?

If your payment doesn’t reflect or you can’t buy Reward Points, contact Awesim Customer Care:
📱 WhatsApp: 060 070 2666

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2025-10-24T20:02:20.114+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/566c6415-59a9-4ea4-b54c-37f4f0cfadde" }, { "id": "068c7537-68ab-4ba6-9534-a6c78322c28d", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"068c7537-68ab-4ba6-9534-a6c78322c28d\",\"title\":\"How long do I have before my delivery code expires if I don’t confirm delivery?\",\"content\":\"\nA\ndelivery code\nis sent to you when your SIM order arrives.\nYou’ll need this code to confirm your delivery in the\nAwesim App or USSD\nand earn your\nReward Points\n.\nHow long is my delivery code valid for?\nYour delivery code is valid for\n3 months\nfrom the delivery date.\nIf you don’t confirm your delivery within this time, the code will\nexpire\nautomatically.\nWhat happens when a delivery code expires?\nIf your code expires:\nYou will\nnot earn Reward Points\nfor that order.\nYou will\nno longer be able to confirm delivery\nfor that order.\nThe order will\nautomatically fall away\nfrom your list in both the\nAwesim App\nand\nUSSD\n.\nOnly your\nmost recent active order\nwill remain visible.\nCan expired codes be reactivated?\nNo, expired codes\ncannot be reactivated\n.\nTo make sure you receive your rewards, always confirm delivery as soon as your SIMs arrive.\n💬 Need help?\nIf you missed the expiry or have questions about confirming your delivery, contact\nAwesim Customer Care:\n📱\nWhatsApp:\n060 070 2666\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"068c7537-68ab-4ba6-9534-a6c78322c28d\",\"title\":\"How long do I have before my delivery code expires if I don’t confirm delivery?\",\"content\":\"

A delivery code is sent to you when your SIM order arrives.
You’ll need this code to confirm your delivery in the Awesim App or USSD and earn your Reward Points.

How long is my delivery code valid for?

Your delivery code is valid for 3 months from the delivery date.
If you don’t confirm your delivery within this time, the code will expire automatically.

What happens when a delivery code expires?

If your code expires:

  • You will not earn Reward Points for that order.
  • You will no longer be able to confirm delivery for that order.
  • The order will automatically fall away from your list in both the Awesim App and USSD.
  • Only your most recent active order will remain visible.

Can expired codes be reactivated?

No, expired codes cannot be reactivated.
To make sure you receive your rewards, always confirm delivery as soon as your SIMs arrive.

💬 Need help?

If you missed the expiry or have questions about confirming your delivery, contact Awesim Customer Care:
📱 WhatsApp: 060 070 2666

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2025-10-24T19:36:57.143+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/068c7537-68ab-4ba6-9534-a6c78322c28d" }, { "id": "78576dcd-3fbe-459f-a819-55895e1fdfcb", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"78576dcd-3fbe-459f-a819-55895e1fdfcb\",\"title\":\"How can I confirm my delivery in the Awesim App?\",\"content\":\"\nConfirming your delivery lets you confirm that your\nSIM order\nhas arrived in the\nAwesim App\n— and earn\n60 Reward Points\nwhen you do!\nIt ensures your order is recorded correctly and your points are automatically added to your Rewards balance.\nHow can I confirm my delivery?\nOpen the Awesim App.\nOn your Dashboard, tap\nConfirm Delivery\n.\nEnter your\nUnique Delivery Code\nand tap\nNext\nOnce confirmed, you will see\nStatus: Delivery Confirmed.\nYou’ll receive an SMS confirming you’ve earned\n60 Reward Points\n.\nHow long do I have to confirm my delivery?\nDelivery codes are valid for\n3 months\nfrom your delivery date.\nIf not confirmed within that time:\nThe code will\nexpire\nand cannot be reactivated.\nYou will\nnot earn Reward Points\nfor that order.\nThe expired order will\ndisappear automatically\nfrom your list in both the\nAwesim App\nand\nUSSD\n.\nOnly your\nmost recent active order\nwill remain visible.\nWhat if my code has expired?\nUnfortunately, expired codes can’t be reactivated.\nTo make sure you never miss out, confirm your delivery as soon as your SIMs arrive.\n💬 Need help?\nIf you can’t confirm a delivery or think your code has expired, contact\nAwesim Customer Care:\n📱\nWhatsApp:\n060 070 2666\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"78576dcd-3fbe-459f-a819-55895e1fdfcb\",\"title\":\"How can I confirm my delivery in the Awesim App?\",\"content\":\"

Confirming your delivery lets you confirm that your SIM order has arrived in the Awesim App — and earn 60 Reward Points when you do!
It ensures your order is recorded correctly and your points are automatically added to your Rewards balance.

How can I confirm my delivery?

  1. Open the Awesim App.
    On your Dashboard, tap Confirm Delivery.

  1. Enter your Unique Delivery Code and tap Next

  1. Once confirmed, you will see Status: Delivery Confirmed. You’ll receive an SMS confirming you’ve earned 60 Reward Points.

How long do I have to confirm my delivery?

  • Delivery codes are valid for 3 months from your delivery date.
  • If not confirmed within that time:
    • The code will expire and cannot be reactivated.
    • You will not earn Reward Points for that order.
    • The expired order will disappear automatically from your list in both the Awesim App and USSD.
  • Only your most recent active order will remain visible.

What if my code has expired?

Unfortunately, expired codes can’t be reactivated.
To make sure you never miss out, confirm your delivery as soon as your SIMs arrive.

💬 Need help?

If you can’t confirm a delivery or think your code has expired, contact Awesim Customer Care:
📱 WhatsApp: 060 070 2666

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2025-10-24T19:26:36.705+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/78576dcd-3fbe-459f-a819-55895e1fdfcb" }, { "id": "23d3e5a8-9925-4cb7-8ced-7e6119d40be8", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"23d3e5a8-9925-4cb7-8ced-7e6119d40be8\",\"title\":\"How can I check SIM payments on the Awesim App?\",\"content\":\"\nYou can use the\nAwesim App\nto confirm who will be paid for a SIM activation and how much was earned.\nThis helps you keep track of your commissions for each SIM you’ve activated.\nTip:\nIf a SIM hasn’t reached its minimum spend yet, no payment information will appear.\nHow can I check SIM payments on the Awesim App?\nTap your\nProfile\nicon\nSelect \\\"\nPayment Settings\\\"\nTap\n“Check SIM Payment.”\nEnter or scan the\nSIM Serial Number (ICCID)\n.\nTap\n“Next.”\nThe\nSIM Payment screen\nwill show who receives payment and how much has been earned.\nWhat if I don’t see any payment information?\nIf payment details don’t appear:\nMake sure the SIM has been\nRICA’d and activated\n.\nConfirm the SIM has\nmet its minimum spend requirement\n.\nCheck that you’re entering the\ncorrect SIM serial or ICCID number\n.\nIf all details are correct and it still doesn’t display, contact\nAwesim Customer Care.\n💬 Need help?\nIf you’re unable to view SIM payment details, contact\nAwesim Customer Care on\nWhatsApp:\n060 070 2666\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"23d3e5a8-9925-4cb7-8ced-7e6119d40be8\",\"title\":\"How can I check SIM payments on the Awesim App?\",\"content\":\"

You can use the Awesim App to confirm who will be paid for a SIM activation and how much was earned.
This helps you keep track of your commissions for each SIM you’ve activated.

Tip: If a SIM hasn’t reached its minimum spend yet, no payment information will appear.

How can I check SIM payments on the Awesim App?

  1. Tap your Profile icon

  1. Select \\\"Payment Settings\\\"

  1. Tap “Check SIM Payment.”

  1. Enter or scan the SIM Serial Number (ICCID).

  1. Tap “Next.”

  1. The SIM Payment screen will show who receives payment and how much has been earned.

What if I don’t see any payment information?

If payment details don’t appear:

  • Make sure the SIM has been RICA’d and activated.
  • Confirm the SIM has met its minimum spend requirement.
  • Check that you’re entering the correct SIM serial or ICCID number.

If all details are correct and it still doesn’t display, contact Awesim Customer Care.

💬 Need help?

If you’re unable to view SIM payment details, contact Awesim Customer Care on
WhatsApp: 060 070 2666

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2025-10-24T19:10:16.486+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/23d3e5a8-9925-4cb7-8ced-7e6119d40be8" }, { "id": "cf072e08-7a1e-458c-9aa9-4b0919a1efb9", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"cf072e08-7a1e-458c-9aa9-4b0919a1efb9\",\"title\":\"What happens when my FNB eWallet Pro card expires?\",\"content\":\"\nYour\nFNB eWallet Pro card\nexpires every\n5 years\n, but there is\nno action required from you\n.\nWhen your current card reaches its expiry date,\nAwesim sends you a new one\n.\n💡 You can find your expiry date on the back of your card.\n❓ How do I get my new card?\nYou do not need to request a replacement — the process is\ncompleted by Awesim.\nHere’s how it works:\nAwesim keeps track of all\nFNB eWallet Pro\ncard expiry dates.\nDuring your card’s expiry month, a\nreplacement card\nis issued automatically.\nYour new card will be placed inside a\nsealed envelope\nwithin your\nnext SIM delivery package\n.\n❓ What if my card has already expired and I haven’t received a new one?\nIf your card has expired and the replacement hasn’t arrived yet:\nCheck your\nlatest SIM delivery package\n— your new card is often included there.\nIf it’s not, please contact\nAwesim Customer Care\nfor assistance.\n📱\nWhatsApp:\n060 070 2666\n❓ How soon can I use my new card?\nYour new\nFNB eWallet Pro card\nis\nready to use immediately\nafter you receive it.\nYou don’t need to activate or link it manually — it’s already set up for your account.\n💬 Need more help?\nIf you haven’t received your replacement card within\n30 days of expiry\n, please contact:\nAwesim Customer Care\nat\n060 070 2666\nquick assistance.\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"cf072e08-7a1e-458c-9aa9-4b0919a1efb9\",\"title\":\"What happens when my FNB eWallet Pro card expires?\",\"content\":\"

Your FNB eWallet Pro card expires every 5 years, but there is no action required from you.
When your current card reaches its expiry date, Awesim sends you a new one.

💡 You can find your expiry date on the back of your card.

❓ How do I get my new card?

You do not need to request a replacement — the process is completed by Awesim.

Here’s how it works:

  1. Awesim keeps track of all FNB eWallet Pro card expiry dates.
  2. During your card’s expiry month, a replacement card is issued automatically.
  3. Your new card will be placed inside a sealed envelope within your next SIM delivery package.

❓ What if my card has already expired and I haven’t received a new one?

If your card has expired and the replacement hasn’t arrived yet:

  • Check your latest SIM delivery package — your new card is often included there.
  • If it’s not, please contact Awesim Customer Care for assistance.

📱 WhatsApp: 060 070 2666

❓ How soon can I use my new card?

Your new FNB eWallet Pro card is ready to use immediately after you receive it.
You don’t need to activate or link it manually — it’s already set up for your account.

💬 Need more help?

If you haven’t received your replacement card within 30 days of expiry, please contact:
Awesim Customer Care at 060 070 2666 quick assistance.

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2025-10-24T18:56:39.693+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/cf072e08-7a1e-458c-9aa9-4b0919a1efb9" }, { "id": "9fd41336-25d2-4967-bf6e-c8324e34ccd6", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"9fd41336-25d2-4967-bf6e-c8324e34ccd6\",\"title\":\"How can I reset my Awesim App password?\",\"content\":\"\nIf you have forgotten your Awesim App password, you can easily reset it using your registered details.\nFollow the steps below to regain access to your account.\nHow do I reset my password if I forgot it?\nOn the Login Page, tap\n'Forgot Password'\nEnter your\nMain Number and ID/Passport Number\nand tap\n'Get OTP'\nEnter the\nOTP\nsent to your\nregistered RICA number\nand tap\n'Verify'.\nEnter your\nNew Password, confirm it,\nand tap\n'Save Password'\nA\nconfirmation message\nwill appear. Tap\n'Go Back to Login'\nHow do I change my password if I’m already logged in?\nAfter login in, tap your\nProfile icon\nSelect\n'Change Password'\nEnter your\nRICA Number and ID/Passport Number\nand tap\n'Get OTP'\nEnter the\nOTP\nsent to your registered\nRICA number\nand tap\n'Verify'\nType your\nNew Password, confirm it\n, and tap\n'Save Password'\nYou’ll see a\nconfirmation message\nonce your password is updated.\nNeed help?\nIf you don’t receive your OTP or have any login issues, contact Awesim Customer Care on\nWhatsApp: 060 070 2666\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"9fd41336-25d2-4967-bf6e-c8324e34ccd6\",\"title\":\"How can I reset my Awesim App password?\",\"content\":\"

If you have forgotten your Awesim App password, you can easily reset it using your registered details.

Follow the steps below to regain access to your account.

How do I reset my password if I forgot it?

  1. On the Login Page, tap 'Forgot Password'

  1. Enter your Main Number and ID/Passport Number and tap 'Get OTP'

  1. Enter the OTP sent to your registered RICA number and tap 'Verify'.

  1. Enter your New Password, confirm it, and tap 'Save Password'

  1. A confirmation message will appear. Tap 'Go Back to Login'

How do I change my password if I’m already logged in?

  1. After login in, tap your Profile icon

  1. Select 'Change Password'

  1. Enter your RICA Number and ID/Passport Number and tap 'Get OTP'

  1. Enter the OTP sent to your registered RICA number and tap 'Verify'

  1. Type your New Password, confirm it, and tap 'Save Password'

  1. You’ll see a confirmation message once your password is updated.

Need help?

If you don’t receive your OTP or have any login issues, contact Awesim Customer Care on WhatsApp: 060 070 2666

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2025-10-24T14:24:47.865+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/9fd41336-25d2-4967-bf6e-c8324e34ccd6" }, { "id": "3431e58a-cd54-47ad-bb27-e434addc67a9", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"3431e58a-cd54-47ad-bb27-e434addc67a9\",\"title\":\"eSIM Training \",\"content\":\"\nHow many points are awarded for passing the eSIM Training on Google Forms and USSD?\nIf the Agent passes, they will receive\n20 reward points - redeemable once.\nHow long does it does take for points to be allocated after completing the USSD eSIM training?\nThe Agent needs to achieve 100% for the assessment.\nThe Agent only has 3 attempts to achieve 100%.\nPoints are allocated immediately is the above criteria is met.\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"3431e58a-cd54-47ad-bb27-e434addc67a9\",\"title\":\"eSIM Training \",\"content\":\"

How many points are awarded for passing the eSIM Training on Google Forms and USSD?

  1. If the Agent passes, they will receive 20 reward points - redeemable once.

How long does it does take for points to be allocated after completing the USSD eSIM training?

  1. The Agent needs to achieve 100% for the assessment.
  2. The Agent only has 3 attempts to achieve 100%.
  3. Points are allocated immediately is the above criteria is met.

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2025-10-22T21:00:18.045+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/3431e58a-cd54-47ad-bb27-e434addc67a9" }, { "id": "93c463f8-28f2-4207-aa1f-c35c551b4d11", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"93c463f8-28f2-4207-aa1f-c35c551b4d11\",\"title\":\"What documents are needed for the next of kin to transfer an agent’s account in the event of their death / passing?\",\"content\":\"\nPlaceholder - Need this information - cant find anything - asking Greg\nOnce the SSoT card info is verified by info expert - I will create the HC Card\nSSoT related card - https://app.getguru.com/card/TjgB5pdc/17-Process-to-transfer-Agents-Account-in-the-Event-of-death\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"93c463f8-28f2-4207-aa1f-c35c551b4d11\",\"title\":\"What documents are needed for the next of kin to transfer an agent’s account in the event of their death / passing?\",\"content\":\"

Once the SSoT card info is verified by info expert - I will create the HC Card
