\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2025-10-22T10:47:10.350+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/93c463f8-28f2-4207-aa1f-c35c551b4d11" }, { "id": "e7647170-ee1a-41f2-9d03-7a668b759b39", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"e7647170-ee1a-41f2-9d03-7a668b759b39\",\"title\":\"How is my Allowed Balance determined?\",\"content\":\"\nPlace Holder\nGetting\nhttps://app.getguru.com/card/ipRgeqgT/54-Allowed-Balance-\nverified 1st\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"e7647170-ee1a-41f2-9d03-7a668b759b39\",\"title\":\"How is my Allowed Balance determined?\",\"content\":\"

Place Holder

Getting https://app.getguru.com/card/ipRgeqgT/54-Allowed-Balance- verified 1st

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2025-10-22T08:54:35.035+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/e7647170-ee1a-41f2-9d03-7a668b759b39" }, { "id": "43da0dd4-e442-4783-ae84-f984fd1d4b80", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"43da0dd4-e442-4783-ae84-f984fd1d4b80\",\"title\":\"Training and Development Policy\",\"content\":\"\nSCOPE/OBJECTIVE\nThis Training & Development Policy is designed to support employees in their pursuit of professional development by providing them with the opportunity to attend training and courses relevant to their roles within Awesim.\nAwesim strives to promote an organisational culture that encourages and supports continuous learning and the development of all employees.\nThis policy provides for financial assistance for permanent staff members who wish to advance themselves academically. It applies to approved courses that will directly benefit both the employee and Awesim through improved productivity and enhanced competencies within their role.\nREQUEST FOR TRAINING & DEVELOPMENT ASSISTANCE\nAwesim recognises the need and desirability for employees to improve their knowledge and skills.\nEmployees who wish to apply for training and development assistance must submit a formal request to the Chief HR Officer (CHRO) for review and approval.\nThe request should include:\nCourse or training name and duration\nInstitution details\nA brief description of its relevance to the employee’s role\nA quotation of the total cost, including registration fees\nPlease note that any other expenses (e.g. textbooks, stationery, travel, or additional materials) will be for the employee’s own account.\nAPPROVAL PROCESS\nThe CHRO will review the training and development request, considering its relevance to the employee’s role and the overall benefit to Awesim.\nApproval of the training or course is at the sole discretion of Awesim. When evaluating applications, the following factors will be considered:\nRelevance of the course or qualification to the employee’s work\nCost of the training or qualification\nTime required to complete the course\nAny other relevant information or requirements\nThe CHRO will provide feedback on whether the request has been approved or not.\nFINANCIAL ASSISTANCE\nFor approved training and development requests, Awesim will subsidise 50% of the approved cost. To promote shared commitment to professional growth, employees will be responsible for the remaining 50%.\nAwesim will make payment of the full course or semester cost in advance. Thereafter, Awesim will recover the employee’s 50% portion through monthly salary deductions. The recovery period will depend on the cost, duration, and any other relevant factors, and will be determined at Awesim’s discretion.\nIn the event that the employee fails, does not write, or does not complete the course/qualification for any reason whatsoever, the employee shall immediately refund Awesim for all payments made by the company.\nCOURSE COMPLETION TIMEFRAME AND RECOVERY OF SUBSIDY\nEmployees approved for a study subsidy must complete their course or qualification within a reasonable timeframe. The maximum completion period shall not exceed two (2) times the official duration of the course or qualification, as stipulated by the educational institution.\nFor example, a three-year qualification must be completed within six (6) years. This extended timeframe allows for possible re-registrations, failed modules, or limited intake cycles.\nEmployees are required to provide annual proof of registration and academic progress reports or results to remain eligible for the subsidy.\nIn the event that an employee fails, does not write, or does not complete any part of the approved course or qualification for any reason whatsoever, Awesim will not cover the cost of re-registration or any repeat examinations. The cost to redo a failed subject, semester, module, or examination will be entirely for the employee’s own account. Awesim will not subsidise or provide study leave for the rewriting of failed modules, subjects, or examinations.\nShould an employee fail to complete the course within the approved timeframe, or choose to discontinue or not complete the approved course, Awesim reserves the right to recover the company’s full subsidy contribution (50%) through salary deductions over a period determined by Awesim.\nExtensions beyond the maximum timeframe may only be granted in writing under exceptional circumstances (e.g. verified medical reasons, family emergencies, or institutional delays beyond the employee’s control).\nSTUDY LEAVE\nEmployees may refer to Awesim’s Leave Policy regarding any study leave assistance available to them for approved training and development requests.\nREPORTING & ADMINISTRATION\nEmployees are required to submit all relevant documentation and reports to the CHRO in a timely manner. Required documentation includes, but is not limited to:\nRegistration documentation and proof of enrolment\nQuotations and invoices\nTest and examination results\nAnnual progress reports\nCopies of results and reports must be submitted to the CHRO as soon as they are received.\nWORKBACK AGREEMENT\nEmployees agree to tender their services to Awesim for a period equivalent to 50% of the duration of the completed course, commencing from the date of completion.\nFor example, if the course duration is three (3) years, the employee is required to remain in Awesim’s employ for one and a half (1.5) years after completion.\nIf an employee resigns before fulfilling the full workback period (except in cases of retrenchment or disability), the employee shall immediately refund Awesim the pro-rated value of the remaining period.\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"43da0dd4-e442-4783-ae84-f984fd1d4b80\",\"title\":\"Training and Development Policy\",\"content\":\"

SCOPE/OBJECTIVE

This Training & Development Policy is designed to support employees in their pursuit of professional development by providing them with the opportunity to attend training and courses relevant to their roles within Awesim.

Awesim strives to promote an organisational culture that encourages and supports continuous learning and the development of all employees.

This policy provides for financial assistance for permanent staff members who wish to advance themselves academically. It applies to approved courses that will directly benefit both the employee and Awesim through improved productivity and enhanced competencies within their role.

REQUEST FOR TRAINING & DEVELOPMENT ASSISTANCE

Awesim recognises the need and desirability for employees to improve their knowledge and skills.

Employees who wish to apply for training and development assistance must submit a formal request to the Chief HR Officer (CHRO) for review and approval.

The request should include:

  • Course or training name and duration
  • Institution details
  • A brief description of its relevance to the employee’s role
  • A quotation of the total cost, including registration fees

Please note that any other expenses (e.g. textbooks, stationery, travel, or additional materials) will be for the employee’s own account.

APPROVAL PROCESS

The CHRO will review the training and development request, considering its relevance to the employee’s role and the overall benefit to Awesim.

Approval of the training or course is at the sole discretion of Awesim. When evaluating applications, the following factors will be considered:

  • Relevance of the course or qualification to the employee’s work
  • Cost of the training or qualification
  • Time required to complete the course
  • Any other relevant information or requirements

The CHRO will provide feedback on whether the request has been approved or not.

FINANCIAL ASSISTANCE

For approved training and development requests, Awesim will subsidise 50% of the approved cost. To promote shared commitment to professional growth, employees will be responsible for the remaining 50%.

Awesim will make payment of the full course or semester cost in advance. Thereafter, Awesim will recover the employee’s 50% portion through monthly salary deductions. The recovery period will depend on the cost, duration, and any other relevant factors, and will be determined at Awesim’s discretion.

In the event that the employee fails, does not write, or does not complete the course/qualification for any reason whatsoever, the employee shall immediately refund Awesim for all payments made by the company.

COURSE COMPLETION TIMEFRAME AND RECOVERY OF SUBSIDY

Employees approved for a study subsidy must complete their course or qualification within a reasonable timeframe. The maximum completion period shall not exceed two (2) times the official duration of the course or qualification, as stipulated by the educational institution.

For example, a three-year qualification must be completed within six (6) years. This extended timeframe allows for possible re-registrations, failed modules, or limited intake cycles.

Employees are required to provide annual proof of registration and academic progress reports or results to remain eligible for the subsidy.

In the event that an employee fails, does not write, or does not complete any part of the approved course or qualification for any reason whatsoever, Awesim will not cover the cost of re-registration or any repeat examinations. The cost to redo a failed subject, semester, module, or examination will be entirely for the employee’s own account. Awesim will not subsidise or provide study leave for the rewriting of failed modules, subjects, or examinations.

Should an employee fail to complete the course within the approved timeframe, or choose to discontinue or not complete the approved course, Awesim reserves the right to recover the company’s full subsidy contribution (50%) through salary deductions over a period determined by Awesim.

Extensions beyond the maximum timeframe may only be granted in writing under exceptional circumstances (e.g. verified medical reasons, family emergencies, or institutional delays beyond the employee’s control).

STUDY LEAVE

Employees may refer to Awesim’s Leave Policy regarding any study leave assistance available to them for approved training and development requests.

REPORTING & ADMINISTRATION

Employees are required to submit all relevant documentation and reports to the CHRO in a timely manner. Required documentation includes, but is not limited to:

  • Registration documentation and proof of enrolment
  • Quotations and invoices
  • Test and examination results
  • Annual progress reports

Copies of results and reports must be submitted to the CHRO as soon as they are received.

WORKBACK AGREEMENT

Employees agree to tender their services to Awesim for a period equivalent to 50% of the duration of the completed course, commencing from the date of completion.
For example, if the course duration is three (3) years, the employee is required to remain in Awesim’s employ for one and a half (1.5) years after completion.

If an employee resigns before fulfilling the full workback period (except in cases of retrenchment or disability), the employee shall immediately refund Awesim the pro-rated value of the remaining period.

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [ { "value": "Development", "id": "b26e6edc-98e7-47c7-a1ac-00151f2c4945", "categoryId": "f1824c7f-80e1-44e8-9c49-e3aca58b442f", "categoryName": "HR Tags" }, { "value": "policy", "id": "4b4e383d-ef16-43ea-8781-9877bf0601e9", "categoryId": "877b2ec0-0822-48f7-ac44-e37af6584b8d", "categoryName": "Tags" }, { "value": "training", "id": "7520481b-31b5-435c-ab0f-99b3c154ce15", "categoryId": "e0751ef6-b3fd-4bd0-babb-3bc7619c24e1", "categoryName": "Support Tags" } ], "last_modified": "2025-10-21T08:43:22.843+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/43da0dd4-e442-4783-ae84-f984fd1d4b80" }, { "id": "eef41e4e-20d9-4dcc-a936-037170334922", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"eef41e4e-20d9-4dcc-a936-037170334922\",\"title\":\"Systems Training: Customer Management System (CMS) \",\"content\":\"\nDefinition:\nCMS is a software solution that helps awesim efficiently manage and track our interactions and relationships with our RICA Agents.\nSign In\nAwesim Links - CMS\nInternal Access Only - Virtual Private Network (VPN)\nSign in using your allocated\nUsername\nand\nPassword\n.\nNavigate to Queue\nWhat is a Service Request (SR)?\nA Service Request is a form of communication from a user, customer or system generated to request some kind of action or response.\nNew Request\nNew Request - To initiate a new Service Request (SR)\nSearch Bar:\nSearch by ID / Passport - Click [Search] Button\nSearch by Telephone - Click [Search] Button\nNext Request\nNext Request - To open the next Service Request (SR) in your queue\n\\\" height=\\\"559\\\" width=\\\"734\\\" data-ghq-card-content-is-full-width=\\\"true\\\" id=\\\"cNyKyj7roLkv\\\">\nExample of the CMS Service Request (SR) Queue\nService Request (SR) Number - Reference Number\nEach\nNew Request\nis allocated a SR Number in order to track and reference the interaction within Customer History.\nExample:\nService Request: 3477325\nCustomer Code Selection (only New Request)\nCustomer History\nOpen Orders\nIf more than one Open SR, the\nactive /current SR\nwill be\nhighlighted Green\nClosed Orders\nSMSes\nSocial Messages\nCustomer History Table\nCustomer\nSR #\nDate\nUser\nSystem Status\nComment\nDetails\nAttachment\nIdentifier\nSource\nMG00068\n3477325\n10/2/2023\n10:00:01 AM\nPULANET\n[DropDown] Menu\n[Comment] Field Input(s)\nSR Description\nc/o Social Messages\nMSISDN\nNEW REQUEST\nUPLOAD LIST\nWHATSAPP\nDropdown Routing\nComment Field: Add query and/or feedback\nAppears in Customer History under [Comment]\nEND REQUEST\nDropDown\nRouting\nBACK TO QUEUE\nNULL\nBANKING DETAILS CHANGE\nFINANCE\nBANKING DETAILS NEW\nFINANCE\nBANKING DETAILS REMOVE\nFINANCE\nBASE CHANGE\nCUSTOMER CARE (CC)\nDETAILS UPDATED\nCLOSURE\nESCALATE\nCUST CODE RESPECTIVE SALESPERSON SUPERVISOR (SALES: RTL; GEN: CC SUP)\nFOLLOW UP 24HR SALES\nREINSTATE TO QUEUE\nINFIELD\nCLOSURE\nRESOLVED/DENY\nCLOSURE\nTO CALL CENTRE SUP\nCC SUP c/o CC ADMINISTRATOR\nTO FINANCE\nFINANCE\nTO INVOICE\nINVOICING\nTO PROMO SUP\nPROMO SUP\nTO SALES ASSISTANT\nSALES ASSISTANT\nTO SALES MANAGER\nSALES MANAGER\nCustomer INFO TABLE\nSTOCK ORDER TABLE\n*FastTrack – App / my.awesim 60 RPs; USSD 30 RPs\n<30 sims = In-field\n>30 sims = CMS\nRewards > Sim Order > Purchase\nMonthlyAllowed → Allowed Balance\nPERFORMANCE TABLE\nShipped Prizes Detail (Listing of “prize”/POS items issued)\nLast Invoice Items (Listing of all contents of last package\nLast Invoice(s) Stats\n(Data relating to the activity/performance of SIMs sent previously per Stock Code)\nUSSD Test Results (Tests that the agent has passed/failed on our USSD)\nDELIVERY CONFIRMATION\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"eef41e4e-20d9-4dcc-a936-037170334922\",\"title\":\"Systems Training: Customer Management System (CMS) \",\"content\":\"

Definition:

CMS is a software solution that helps awesim efficiently manage and track our interactions and relationships with our RICA Agents.

Sign In

  • Awesim Links - CMS
  • Internal Access Only - Virtual Private Network (VPN)
  • Sign in using your allocated Username and Password.


Navigate to Queue

What is a Service Request (SR)?

  • A Service Request is a form of communication from a user, customer or system generated to request some kind of action or response.

New Request

  • New Request - To initiate a new Service Request (SR)
  • Search Bar:
    • Search by ID / Passport - Click [Search] Button
    • Search by Telephone - Click [Search] Button


Next Request

  • Next Request - To open the next Service Request (SR) in your queue


\\\" height=\\\"559\\\" width=\\\"734\\\" data-ghq-card-content-is-full-width=\\\"true\\\" id=\\\"cNyKyj7roLkv\\\">

Example of the CMS Service Request (SR) Queue


Service Request (SR) Number - Reference Number

  • Each New Request is allocated a SR Number in order to track and reference the interaction within Customer History.
  • Example:
    Service Request: 3477325

Customer Code Selection (only New Request)


Customer History

  • Open Orders
    • If more than one Open SR, the active /current SR will be highlighted Green
  • Closed Orders
  • SMSes
  • Social Messages

Customer History Table

Customer

SR #

Date

User

System Status

Comment

Details

Attachment

Identifier

Source

MG00068

3477325

10/2/2023
10:00:01 AM

PULANET

[Comment] Field Input(s)

SR Description

c/o Social Messages

MSISDN

  • NEW REQUEST
  • UPLOAD LIST
  • WHATSAPP

Dropdown Routing

  • Comment Field: Add query and/or feedback
  • Appears in Customer History under [Comment]
  • END REQUEST

DropDown

Routing

BACK TO QUEUE

NULL

BANKING DETAILS CHANGE

FINANCE

BANKING DETAILS NEW

FINANCE

BANKING DETAILS REMOVE

FINANCE

BASE CHANGE

CUSTOMER CARE (CC)

DETAILS UPDATED

CLOSURE

ESCALATE

CUST CODE RESPECTIVE SALESPERSON SUPERVISOR (SALES: RTL; GEN: CC SUP)

FOLLOW UP 24HR SALES

REINSTATE TO QUEUE

INFIELD

CLOSURE

RESOLVED/DENY

CLOSURE

TO CALL CENTRE SUP

CC SUP c/o CC ADMINISTRATOR

TO FINANCE

FINANCE

TO INVOICE

INVOICING

TO PROMO SUP

PROMO SUP

TO SALES ASSISTANT

SALES ASSISTANT

TO SALES MANAGER

SALES MANAGER

Customer INFO TABLE

STOCK ORDER TABLE


*FastTrack – App / my.awesim 60 RPs; USSD 30 RPs

<30 sims = In-field
>30 sims = CMS

Rewards > Sim Order > Purchase
MonthlyAllowed → Allowed Balance


PERFORMANCE TABLE

  • Shipped Prizes Detail (Listing of “prize”/POS items issued)
  • Last Invoice Items (Listing of all contents of last package
  • Last Invoice(s) Stats (Data relating to the activity/performance of SIMs sent previously per Stock Code)
  • USSD Test Results (Tests that the agent has passed/failed on our USSD)


DELIVERY CONFIRMATION


\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [ { "value": "CMS", "id": "afbe13f6-0ef3-4372-856a-809fa221fd7a", "categoryId": "e0751ef6-b3fd-4bd0-babb-3bc7619c24e1", "categoryName": "Support Tags" } ], "last_modified": "2025-10-21T07:44:06.762+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/eef41e4e-20d9-4dcc-a936-037170334922" }, { "id": "c9ddfe82-f3c3-4202-a2e0-56f5f16b1940", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"c9ddfe82-f3c3-4202-a2e0-56f5f16b1940\",\"title\":\"SSoT to Help Centre: Verified Answer Workflow\",\"content\":\"\nScope/Objective\nThis SOP outlines the process for managing, verifying, and publishing accurate and customer-friendly information from the Single Source of Truth (SSoT) to the Help Centre (#help_centre) as a public knowledge base.\nRole Permissions\nAll relevant team members are assigned the\nAuthor\nrole in the Single Source of Truth (SSoT) Collection, enabling them to create and update information - to inform verified FAQs in the Help Centre GetGuru Collection and Slack Channel #help_centre.\nStep-by-Step Process\nFor the CUSTOMER CARE ADMINISTRATOR\nSee\nSlack Channel #Help_Centre SOP\nShould Non/Guru User not provide feedback, please action the below:\nFeedback Process\nCC Admin\n: Tag the person who asked the question.\nScript to use\n:\nThank you for raising the question. Please share your feedback using the steps below\n:\nNon-Guru Users\nUse\nSlack Emojis\n(not Guru Emojis):\n👍 = Accurate & helpful\n👎 = Needs work →\nplease explain what needs improvement\nShare details:\nReply in the Thread\nTag \\\"\n@\\\" Naadirah Valli\n(Content & Training Admin)\nGuru Users\nUse the\nGuru Emojis\n:\n👍 = Accurate & helpful\n👎 = Needs work →\nplease explain what needs improvement\nClick\n⋮ (three dots)\n→\nAsk an Expert\nTag\nNaadirah Valli\n(Content & Training Admin)\nAdd feedback\nManaging Knowledge Gaps (Thumbs Down Feedback)\nWhen a Help Centre answer receives a\nthumbs-down or \\\"Ask an Expert\\\" request\n, follow these steps:\nFor the Content & Training Admin\n1. Check for an Existing Verified Answer\nSearch the\nSSoT\nfor a verified answer.\nIf found:\nDuplicate the answer into the Help Centre.\nEnsure the answer is clear; review and edit text and visuals for public, customer-friendly use.\n2. If No Verified Answer Exists\nRequest support from the\nKnowledge Expert\nas part of the SSoT workflow by:\nCreating a\nJira task\nin the\n\\\"Knowledge Base\\\" board\nand assigning it to the relevant Knowledge Expert to action.\n3. Share the Answer to #help_centre\nOnce the\nverified answer\nis saved in the GetGuru Help Centre, share the public link in the Slack Channel #help_centre thread where the question was raised.\nStep No.\nAction / Condition\nDetails / Instructions\nResponsible Person\n3️⃣\nIf Feedback = 👍 (Verified Answer)\nAdd emoji 👍 to the question in the Slack Channel, to mark as verified.\nNaadirah\n4️⃣\nIf Feedback = 👎 (Create Jira Task)\nTurnaround Time: Same Business Day (unless after 16h00 → next day before 09h00)\nJira Task Title = Question\nSearch the SSoT for verified answer.\nIf found → Duplicate into Help Centre.\nIf not found → Create / Update in Q&A format (no jargon).\nAssign Jira task to Knowledge Expert with 2 working-day deadline.\nNaadirah\n5️⃣\nCustomer Care Review (CC Review)\nTag @Bernadine in Jira task.\nMove task to column\n[CC Review]\nfor Customer Care review.\nNaadirah\n6️⃣\nFinal Review & Learnings\nBernadine reviews content for clarity and tone.\nNote any content learnings for future reference.\nBernadine\n7️⃣\nClose the Loop (Completion)\nShare the verified Help Centre link in the original Slack thread.\nAdd ✅\nGreen Check Mark emoji\nin Slack to indicate the question is resolved and published.\nNaadirah\nFor the Knowledge Expert\n1. Review the Request\nAccess the task assigned to you in\nJira - Project \\\"Knowledge Base\\\"\n.\n2. Draft and Verify the Answer\nCreate or update the GetGuru Card\nwith a clear, accurate, and\ncustomer-friendly response\n, ensuring that\ninternal, confidential knowledge\nis flagged for internal use only, while\npublic-facing details\nare simplified and tailored for agents.\nEnsure the content is current, aligns with\nAwesim’s products, processes, and public knowledge\n, and meets quality and compliance standards.\nUpdate or clarify details if any gaps or inconsistencies are identified during the review.\n3. Share the Verified Answer or Feedback\nSubmit the\nverified answer\nto the\nContent & Training Admin\nfor publishing.\nIf changes are required or additional input is needed, provide clear feedback in the Jira task comments or notes.\nTurnaround Time\nStandard ETA:\n2 working days\nReminder:\nFaster responses from Knowledge Experts result in\nquicker customer service turnaround times\n.\nJira Board Stages: A Quick Guide\nTo Do\n– Task created and assigned to the Knowledge Expert with a set deadline.\nIn Progress\n– The Knowledge Expert updates the task status once work has started.\nWaiting On\n– Task updated with comments or feedback and reassigned to the relevant person; awaiting input.\nDone\n– The assigned person completes the task, approves the content, and reassigns it to the Content & Training Admin, for final checks, such as typesetting or system updates.\nPublished\n– Once final checks are done and the content is live (internal and / or external), the Content & Training Admin marks it as “Published.”\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"c9ddfe82-f3c3-4202-a2e0-56f5f16b1940\",\"title\":\"SSoT to Help Centre: Verified Answer Workflow\",\"content\":\"

Scope/Objective

This SOP outlines the process for managing, verifying, and publishing accurate and customer-friendly information from the Single Source of Truth (SSoT) to the Help Centre (#help_centre) as a public knowledge base.

Role Permissions

All relevant team members are assigned the Author role in the Single Source of Truth (SSoT) Collection, enabling them to create and update information - to inform verified FAQs in the Help Centre GetGuru Collection and Slack Channel #help_centre.

Step-by-Step Process

For the CUSTOMER CARE ADMINISTRATOR

  • See Slack Channel #Help_Centre SOP
  • Should Non/Guru User not provide feedback, please action the below:

Feedback Process

  • CC Admin: Tag the person who asked the question.
  • Script to use:
    Thank you for raising the question. Please share your feedback using the steps below:

Non-Guru Users

  • Use Slack Emojis (not Guru Emojis):
    • 👍 = Accurate & helpful
    • 👎 = Needs work → please explain what needs improvement
    • Share details: Reply in the Thread
  • Tag \\\"@\\\" Naadirah Valli (Content & Training Admin)

Guru Users

  • Use the Guru Emojis:
    • 👍 = Accurate & helpful
    • 👎 = Needs work → please explain what needs improvement
  • Click ⋮ (three dots) → Ask an Expert
  • Tag Naadirah Valli (Content & Training Admin)
  • Add feedback

Managing Knowledge Gaps (Thumbs Down Feedback)

When a Help Centre answer receives a thumbs-down or \\\"Ask an Expert\\\" request, follow these steps:


For the Content & Training Admin

1. Check for an Existing Verified Answer

  • Search the SSoT for a verified answer.
  • If found:
    • Duplicate the answer into the Help Centre.
    • Ensure the answer is clear; review and edit text and visuals for public, customer-friendly use.

2. If No Verified Answer Exists

  • Request support from the Knowledge Expert as part of the SSoT workflow by:
    • Creating a Jira task in the \\\"Knowledge Base\\\" board and assigning it to the relevant Knowledge Expert to action.

3. Share the Answer to #help_centre

  • Once the verified answer is saved in the GetGuru Help Centre, share the public link in the Slack Channel #help_centre thread where the question was raised.

Step No.

Action / Condition

Details / Instructions

Responsible Person

3️⃣

If Feedback = 👍 (Verified Answer)

Add emoji 👍 to the question in the Slack Channel, to mark as verified.

Naadirah

4️⃣

If Feedback = 👎 (Create Jira Task)

  • Turnaround Time: Same Business Day (unless after 16h00 → next day before 09h00)
  • Jira Task Title = Question
  • Search the SSoT for verified answer.
    • If found → Duplicate into Help Centre.
    • If not found → Create / Update in Q&A format (no jargon).
  • Assign Jira task to Knowledge Expert with 2 working-day deadline.

Naadirah

5️⃣

Customer Care Review (CC Review)

  • Tag @Bernadine in Jira task.
  • Move task to column [CC Review] for Customer Care review.

Naadirah

6️⃣

Final Review & Learnings

  • Bernadine reviews content for clarity and tone.
  • Note any content learnings for future reference.

Bernadine

7️⃣

Close the Loop (Completion)

  • Share the verified Help Centre link in the original Slack thread.
  • Add ✅ Green Check Mark emoji in Slack to indicate the question is resolved and published.

Naadirah

For the Knowledge Expert

1. Review the Request

  • Access the task assigned to you in Jira - Project \\\"Knowledge Base\\\".

2. Draft and Verify the Answer

  • Create or update the GetGuru Card with a clear, accurate, and customer-friendly response, ensuring that internal, confidential knowledge is flagged for internal use only, while public-facing details are simplified and tailored for agents.
  • Ensure the content is current, aligns with Awesim’s products, processes, and public knowledge, and meets quality and compliance standards.
  • Update or clarify details if any gaps or inconsistencies are identified during the review.

3. Share the Verified Answer or Feedback

  • Submit the verified answer to the Content & Training Admin for publishing.
  • If changes are required or additional input is needed, provide clear feedback in the Jira task comments or notes.

Turnaround Time

  • Standard ETA: 2 working days
  • Reminder: Faster responses from Knowledge Experts result in quicker customer service turnaround times.

Jira Board Stages: A Quick Guide

  • To Do – Task created and assigned to the Knowledge Expert with a set deadline.
  • In Progress – The Knowledge Expert updates the task status once work has started.
  • Waiting On – Task updated with comments or feedback and reassigned to the relevant person; awaiting input.
  • Done – The assigned person completes the task, approves the content, and reassigns it to the Content & Training Admin, for final checks, such as typesetting or system updates.
  • Published – Once final checks are done and the content is live (internal and / or external), the Content & Training Admin marks it as “Published.”



\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [ { "value": "SOP Template", "id": "20027f4a-e23a-4c23-bd9d-c28d2bd2dbc7", "categoryId": "e0751ef6-b3fd-4bd0-babb-3bc7619c24e1", "categoryName": "Support Tags" } ], "last_modified": "2025-10-16T06:55:50.356+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/c9ddfe82-f3c3-4202-a2e0-56f5f16b1940" }, { "id": "18731878-8bbe-4333-b302-551be51a9a20", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"18731878-8bbe-4333-b302-551be51a9a20\",\"title\":\"What are Awesim's Bank account details?\",\"content\":\"\nWhat are Awesim's Bank account details?\nAwesim bank account number is 62770686114.\nAdditional bank details:\n- Bank: First National Bank\n- Account Name: Awesim Telecoms (Pty) Ltd\n- Branch Code: 255355\n- Reference: Agent Code (use your agent code as reference when making payments)\nThese details are used for EFT and Cash payments to purchase Reward Points or make other payments to Awesim.\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"18731878-8bbe-4333-b302-551be51a9a20\",\"title\":\"What are Awesim's Bank account details?\",\"content\":\"

What are Awesim's Bank account details?

Awesim bank account number is 62770686114.

Additional bank details:
- Bank: First National Bank
- Account Name: Awesim Telecoms (Pty) Ltd
- Branch Code: 255355
- Reference: Agent Code (use your agent code as reference when making payments)

These details are used for EFT and Cash payments to purchase Reward Points or make other payments to Awesim.

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2025-10-10T06:33:08.893+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/18731878-8bbe-4333-b302-551be51a9a20" }, { "id": "7d58b7d7-a27d-4dde-9880-28ab10c42e55", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"7d58b7d7-a27d-4dde-9880-28ab10c42e55\",\"title\":\"How to confirm a delivery via USSD?\",\"content\":\"\nSummary:\nTo confirm delivery:\nDial\n*130*43203#\nDial \\\"\n1. Ok\n\\\"\nDial Menu Option\n\\\"Confirm Delivery\\\"\nDial Menu Option\n\\\"Next\\\"\nEnter the\n\\\"Unique Code\\\"\nDial Menu Option\n\\\"Continue\\\"\nDetails\nFollow the steps below to Confirm your Delivery on the Awesim USSD\n:\nUSSD:\nDial\n*130*43203#\nDial \\\"\n1. Ok\n\\\"\n﻿﻿\nDial Menu Option\n\\\"Confirm Delivery\\\"\n﻿﻿\nDial Menu Option\n\\\"Next\\\"\n﻿﻿\nEnter the\n\\\"Unique Code\\\"\n﻿﻿\nDial Menu Option\n\\\"Continue\\\"\nRewards Points\nEarn 1 Rewards Points when you confirm your delivery on the Awesim App\nTerms & Conditions Apply\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"7d58b7d7-a27d-4dde-9880-28ab10c42e55\",\"title\":\"How to confirm a delivery via USSD?\",\"content\":\"

Summary:

To confirm delivery:

  1. Dial *130*43203#
  2. Dial \\\"1. Ok\\\"
  3. Dial Menu Option \\\"Confirm Delivery\\\"
  4. Dial Menu Option \\\"Next\\\"
  5. Enter the \\\"Unique Code\\\"
  6. Dial Menu Option \\\"Continue\\\"

Details

Follow the steps below to Confirm your Delivery on the Awesim USSD:

USSD:

  1. Dial *130*43203#
  2. Dial \\\"1. Ok\\\"

﻿﻿

  1. Dial Menu Option \\\"Confirm Delivery\\\"

﻿﻿

  1. Dial Menu Option \\\"Next\\\"

﻿﻿

  1. Enter the \\\"Unique Code\\\"

﻿﻿

  1. Dial Menu Option \\\"Continue\\\"

Rewards Points

Earn 1 Rewards Points when you confirm your delivery on the Awesim App

Terms & Conditions Apply

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2025-10-10T06:12:38.193+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/7d58b7d7-a27d-4dde-9880-28ab10c42e55" }, { "id": "da54bd77-1a6f-4b0b-bb46-f9f2d0560191", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"da54bd77-1a6f-4b0b-bb46-f9f2d0560191\",\"title\":\"Awesim App Error Messages\",\"content\":\"\nWhat is the cause of the Awesim App error message:\n“Cannot check Rica. Something unexpected happened. Please try again – if the problem continues, contact our support team.”\n?\nAnswer:\nThis occurs when a user has no signal and it drops / struggles to connect to our servers. The user should try again.\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"da54bd77-1a6f-4b0b-bb46-f9f2d0560191\",\"title\":\"Awesim App Error Messages\",\"content\":\"
  1. What is the cause of the Awesim App error message: 
    “Cannot check Rica. Something unexpected happened. Please try again – if the problem continues, contact our support team.”    ?

Answer:

This occurs when a user has no signal and it drops / struggles to connect to our servers. The user should try again.

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2025-10-09T09:32:13.836+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/da54bd77-1a6f-4b0b-bb46-f9f2d0560191" }, { "id": "dc3c1d54-d26e-42cd-a7ab-c597059de845", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"dc3c1d54-d26e-42cd-a7ab-c597059de845\",\"title\":\"How can agents get a proof of income from Awesim?\",\"content\":\"\nHow can agents get a proof of income from Awesim?\nAnswer:\nAs these agents are not employed by Awesim we cannot provide payslips.\nThey can request an affiliation letter which includes all the payments we have made to them in the last 6 months.\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"dc3c1d54-d26e-42cd-a7ab-c597059de845\",\"title\":\"How can agents get a proof of income from Awesim?\",\"content\":\"

How can agents get a proof of income from Awesim?

Answer:

As these agents are not employed by Awesim we cannot provide payslips.

They can request an affiliation letter which includes all the payments we have made to them in the last 6 months.

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2025-10-08T12:45:16.485+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/dc3c1d54-d26e-42cd-a7ab-c597059de845" }, { "id": "893fc27c-33c9-4d88-b445-2eb67af3e2d2", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"893fc27c-33c9-4d88-b445-2eb67af3e2d2\",\"title\":\"Which Social SIMs qualify for Activation Payments?\",\"content\":\"\nDo MTN social sim cards pay the activation?\nAnswer:\nYes,\nall social sims qualify\nfor an activation payment, this is not excluded as being a data sim.\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"893fc27c-33c9-4d88-b445-2eb67af3e2d2\",\"title\":\"Which Social SIMs qualify for Activation Payments?\",\"content\":\"
  1. Do MTN social sim cards pay the activation?

Answer:

Yes, all social sims qualify for an activation payment, this is not excluded as being a data sim.

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2025-10-08T12:43:45.573+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/893fc27c-33c9-4d88-b445-2eb67af3e2d2" }, { "id": "c15d1fea-f3ff-470c-b456-b333ce222ab8", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"c15d1fea-f3ff-470c-b456-b333ce222ab8\",\"title\":\"Who should load verification documents when an agent is under a major dealer?\",\"content\":\"\nAgents (Footsoldiers) created under a Business Partner or Major Dealer structure will\nnot\nhave their verification documents uploaded at the time of creation, as the system does not currently support this functionality.\nInstead, the required verification documents —\nfacial photo and ID/Passport photo\n— are stored on the\nDealer Shared Drive\n, inside the designated folder for the main dealer.\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"c15d1fea-f3ff-470c-b456-b333ce222ab8\",\"title\":\"Who should load verification documents when an agent is under a major dealer?\",\"content\":\"

Agents (Footsoldiers) created under a Business Partner or Major Dealer structure will not have their verification documents uploaded at the time of creation, as the system does not currently support this functionality.

Instead, the required verification documents — facial photo and ID/Passport photo — are stored on the Dealer Shared Drive, inside the designated folder for the main dealer.

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2025-10-08T12:05:26.133+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/c15d1fea-f3ff-470c-b456-b333ce222ab8" }, { "id": "18c0ca78-26fd-40ef-a2df-e02b465c7859", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"18c0ca78-26fd-40ef-a2df-e02b465c7859\",\"title\":\"Why do some Agent Accounts expire?\",\"content\":\"\nWhy do some Agent Accounts expire?\nAccounts expire, because it seems as if they’re inactive.\nThey seem inactive for 2 reasons:\na). because they have not ordered or been sent stock for 2 years and\nb). there has been no sim-activity for a year.\nIf an agent wants to re-activate an expired account, they simply need to contact us and re-verify their details.\nDepending on their historic performance (before their account expired), they’ll either qualify for free stock (performing Returning Agents) or they’ll qualify to buy stock via the App (non-performing Returning Agents).\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"18c0ca78-26fd-40ef-a2df-e02b465c7859\",\"title\":\"Why do some Agent Accounts expire?\",\"content\":\"
  1. Why do some Agent Accounts expire?

    Accounts expire, because it seems as if they’re inactive.

    They seem inactive for 2 reasons:
    a). because they have not ordered or been sent stock for 2 years and
    b). there has been no sim-activity for a year.

    If an agent wants to re-activate an expired account, they simply need to contact us and re-verify their details.
    Depending on their historic performance (before their account expired), they’ll either qualify for free stock (performing Returning Agents) or they’ll qualify to buy stock via the App (non-performing Returning Agents).

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2025-10-08T12:03:25.507+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/18c0ca78-26fd-40ef-a2df-e02b465c7859" }, { "id": "22f64122-6168-43eb-85f3-5f5cfd1b29fd", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"22f64122-6168-43eb-85f3-5f5cfd1b29fd\",\"title\":\"What is the Lifecycle/Lifespan of the SIM Card?\",\"content\":\"\nSummary\nEvery SIM at AWESIM is tracked through a series of steps.\nThese steps make up a SIM's Lifecycle.\nThese steps are:\nInvoicing and Shipping (Delivery)\nRICA\nPorting\nConnection\nRecharge\nActivation\nDeletion\nDetails\n1. Invoicing and Shipping (Delivery)\nAWESIM allocates every SIM serial number (ICCID) to an agent/dealer's account when invoicing.\nThese are then packaged and sent to the agent/dealer via Courier or Sales Rep.\nAgents/dealers earn Reward Points for\nconfirming the delivery\nof their SIMs.\nImportant\n: Agents/dealers should only use SIMs invoiced to their account to avoid payment confusion and maximise their\nBonus\nqualification.\nSystem Flags & Exclusions\n2. RICA\nEvery SIM should be registered to a\nREAL customer\n, referencing their identification documents.\nSee\nRICA a SIM\nfor detailed steps.\n3. Porting\nPorting allows a customer to move from their current network to another network, but keep their number.\nThe Port Request must be sent from the current SIM (the one the customer wants to move FROM) before the new-network SIM (the one the customer wants to move TO) is connected.\nSee\nPorts\nfor detailed steps.\n4. Connection\nA SIM card connects to the network (and gets its number) once it has been RICA’ed and then inserted into a phone.\nImportant:\nNetworks require a billable event (recharge, use, or receive calls) to for it to be considered as a connection.\n5. Recharge\nThis is when a SIM gets airtime or data loaded to it. A convenient way for agents to do this, is to use\nSmartLoad\n.\n6. Activation\nOnce a REAL customer has used the required airtime value; within a specified timeframe (network dependent) on their SIM, it is deemed to have activated.\nAWESIM pays agents/dealers for activations on the\n25th\nof the month after the activation.\n7. Deletion\nIf a SIM is not used for a certain period (varies per network) its number will be churned and recycled by the network.\nThe SIM will then no longer work.\nImportant Notes\nAWESIM SIMs do not expire\n. Agents/dealers will be able to RICA them, for the 1st time, no matter how old the physical sim card is. We pay an\nextra R10\nfor old sims to be used.\nDo not give away or exchange\nyour AWESIM SIMs with anyone - regardless of their promises.\nDoing so may result in immediate account blockage and possible stopping of payments.\nDo not throw away\nyour SIMs. Contact us if you no longer want to use them.\nRather don't use Awesim SIMs for SIM swaps. This will be considered a wasted SIM which means you will receive fewer SIMs in future orders. Also,\nSIM swaps do not qualify for payments\n.\nTerms and Conditions Apply\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"22f64122-6168-43eb-85f3-5f5cfd1b29fd\",\"title\":\"What is the Lifecycle/Lifespan of the SIM Card?\",\"content\":\"

Summary

Every SIM at AWESIM is tracked through a series of steps.
These steps make up a SIM's Lifecycle.
These steps are:

  1. Invoicing and Shipping (Delivery)
  2. RICA
  3. Porting
  4. Connection
  5. Recharge
  6. Activation
  7. Deletion

Details

1. Invoicing and Shipping (Delivery)

AWESIM allocates every SIM serial number (ICCID) to an agent/dealer's account when invoicing.
These are then packaged and sent to the agent/dealer via Courier or Sales Rep.
Agents/dealers earn Reward Points for confirming the delivery of their SIMs.

Important: Agents/dealers should only use SIMs invoiced to their account to avoid payment confusion and maximise their Bonus qualification.
System Flags & Exclusions

2. RICA

Every SIM should be registered to a REAL customer, referencing their identification documents.
See RICA a SIM for detailed steps.

3. Porting

Porting allows a customer to move from their current network to another network, but keep their number.
The Port Request must be sent from the current SIM (the one the customer wants to move FROM) before the new-network SIM (the one the customer wants to move TO) is connected.
See Ports for detailed steps.

4. Connection

A SIM card connects to the network (and gets its number) once it has been RICA’ed and then inserted into a phone.

Important: Networks require a billable event (recharge, use, or receive calls) to for it to be considered as a connection.

5. Recharge

This is when a SIM gets airtime or data loaded to it. A convenient way for agents to do this, is to use SmartLoad.

6. Activation

Once a REAL customer has used the required airtime value; within a specified timeframe (network dependent) on their SIM, it is deemed to have activated.
AWESIM pays agents/dealers for activations on the 25th of the month after the activation.

7. Deletion

If a SIM is not used for a certain period (varies per network) its number will be churned and recycled by the network.
The SIM will then no longer work.

Important Notes

  • AWESIM SIMs do not expire. Agents/dealers will be able to RICA them, for the 1st time, no matter how old the physical sim card is. We pay an extra R10 for old sims to be used.
  • Do not give away or exchange your AWESIM SIMs with anyone - regardless of their promises.
    Doing so may result in immediate account blockage and possible stopping of payments.
  • Do not throw away your SIMs. Contact us if you no longer want to use them.
  • Rather don't use Awesim SIMs for SIM swaps. This will be considered a wasted SIM which means you will receive fewer SIMs in future orders. Also, SIM swaps do not qualify for payments.

Terms and Conditions Apply

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2025-10-08T06:39:23.063+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/22f64122-6168-43eb-85f3-5f5cfd1b29fd" }, { "id": "ebaa0c43-ca2e-4256-9200-a17ab970f103", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"ebaa0c43-ca2e-4256-9200-a17ab970f103\",\"title\":\"What are the different ways and steps for Awesim Agents to RICA a SIM?\",\"content\":\"\nA. How to RICA using the Awesim App?\nSummary\nEvery Awesim agent can easily RICA a SIM using the Awesim app. Follow these steps:\nOpen the Awesim App\n.\nScan the SIM Barcode\nor\nEnter the ICCID\nmanually.\nFill in the Customer Information\n:\nName\nSurname\nID Number or Passport Number\nPassport Expiry Date (must be valid for at least 6 months)\nFull Address (include Number, Street Name, Suburb, City, & Postal Code)\nSelect \\\"SUBMIT\\\"\n.\nDetails\nOpen the\nAwesim App\n.\nNavigate to RICA\nScan the SIM Barcode\nor\nEnter the ICCID\nmanually (the ICCID is the long barcode on the SIM Pack).\nClick \\\"Next\\\"\nFill in the Customer Information: Personal Details\nSelect\nSA ID\nor\nPassport\nIf SA ID fill in:\nSA ID Number\nFirst Name\nSurname\nIf Passport\nFill in:\nPassport Number\nPassport Expiry Date (must be valid for at least 6 months)\nCountry of Issue\nFirst Name\nSurname\nFill in the Customer Information: Residential Details\nSelect\n\\\"Submit\\\"\nBy submitting the agent agrees to the RICA Act.\nRICA Statuses\nWhen you RICA a SIM, it goes through four main statuses:\nSubmit,\nPending,\nSuccess,\nand Failure.\nHere's what each status means and what you should do at each stage:\nSubmit\nSubmit\n: After clicking \\\"Submit,\\\" you will see a screen indicating that Awesim has accepted the RICA request and is sending it to the network. This should take 0-1 minutes.\nExample of a Submitted RICA:\nPending\n: Once the RICA request is sent to the network, you need to wait for the network to approve it. This status indicates that the request is being processed.\nThe SIM RICA request will remain in pending until the network provides a final answer. This can take anywhere from 2 minutes to 2 hours, depending on the network's RICA system.\nDo not attempt to RICA the SIM again until you receive a response indicating success or failure.\nRICA Success\nSuccess\n: When a RICA is successful, the system where you first RICA'd the SIM will confirm the success.\nYou will receive a push notification to confirm the RICA was successful.\nThe customer can now take the SIM out of the SIM pack, insert it into their phone, and connect their SIM.\nRICA Failure\nFailure\n: If a RICA fails, the system where you first RICA'd the SIM will return a failure message with the error.\nCommon reasons for failure include:\nNetwork RICA service is down.\nIncorrect information entered (e.g., postal code, country code for the passport, invalid address, etc.).\nIf a failure occurs, retry RICAing the SIM with the correct information.\nYou can view all your RICA submissions by clicking\n\\\"Report.\\\"\nImportant Reminders\nReversal of RICA\n: Networks have a specific time period for an automated reversal of a RICA if the SIM is not used within a certain timeframe. This period varies by network and is not fully known.\nActivation Rule\n: A SIM card has 90 days from the date of RICA to perform a successful recharge or usage to qualify for an activation payment. This rule prevents pre-RICA of SIM cards.\nFraud Warning\n: Pre-RICA of SIM cards is considered fraud. Please do not pre-RICA SIMs, as it can lead to your account being blocked.\nBy following these guidelines, you can ensure a smooth RICA process and avoid any issues with your Awesim account.\nTerms & Conditions Apply\nDo not sell or give away SIMs to other agents.\nOnly RICA Awesim SIMs to real customers.\nAwesim reserves the right to verify activations and claw back invalid payments.\nFor more details, refer to our\nterms & conditions.\nB. How to RICA using the USSD?\nDial\n*130*7422#\nSelect option 5\nEnter the customer's cellphone number\nCapture the customer's details (Name, Surname, ID/Passport and Address).\nEnter the alternative number - if the customer has an alternative number.\nThen confirm your registration.\nIn order to complete the registration process, please ensure that you have your South African ID or Passport, as well as proof of residence.\nOption 1 :\nA registered RICA agent can register you as a RICA Agent. They can capture your details on SmartRICA USSD (*130*7422#)\nOption 2 :\nSmartRICAApp (Download on Apple App Store or Google Play Store)\nOption 3 :\nSmartCall Online (https://online.smartcall.co.za)\nOption 4 :\nThe new agent can WhatsApp us on 060 070 2666 and a call centre agent will create a profile.\nYou also need to provide the following:\nA photo of your valid ID or passport: your face only, holding your ID or passport next to your face.\nA photo of your proof of address.\nThe phone number that you will be using to RICA.\nThey will upload your ID or Passport, proof of address and a selfie of you holding your ID or Passport.\nOnce your profile and agent code have been created for you, we will send you your first SIMS parcel.\nC. How to RICA using SmartRICA Online?\nHow to RICA a SIM using SMARTCALL ONLINE\nSummary\nEnter your cellphone number\nDial *\n130*678*100#\nGo to\nhttps://online.smartcall.co.za\n﻿\nEnter the one time PIN\nSelect\n\\\"Login\\\"\nSelect\n\\\"SmartRica\\\"\nSelect\n\\\"Capture New RICA Registration\\\"\nSelect\n\\\"Capture New RICA Registration\\\"\nSelect RICA Network\nCapture Required Information\nSelect\n\\\"Capture Registration\\\"\n﻿\nDetails\nEnter your cellphone number\nDial *\n130*678*100#\nGo to\nhttps://online.smartcall.co.za\n﻿\nEnter the one time PIN\nSelect\n\\\"Login\\\"\n﻿\n﻿﻿\nSelect\n\\\"SmartRica\\\"\n﻿\n﻿﻿\nSelect\n\\\"Capture New RICA Registration\\\"\n﻿\n﻿﻿\nSelect\n\\\"Capture New RICA Registration\\\"\n﻿\n﻿﻿\nSelect RICA Network\n﻿\n﻿﻿\nCapture all required information\n﻿\n﻿﻿\nSelect\n\\\"Capture Registration\\\"\nD. How to RICA using the SmartRICA App?\nAvailable on Google Play Store for Android\nHow to register a RICA Agent\nOnce downloaded, open the SmartRICA app on your Android device.\nClick on the \\\"Create New Agent\\\" option.\nComplete the relevant fields on the form then click \\\"Create Agent\\\".\nA prompt should appear asking if you would like to upload documents for the agent being created.\nClick \\\"Yes\\\" then upload the required documents.\nThen click upload once all 3 required documents have been attached.\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"ebaa0c43-ca2e-4256-9200-a17ab970f103\",\"title\":\"What are the different ways and steps for Awesim Agents to RICA a SIM?\",\"content\":\"

A. How to RICA using the Awesim App?

Summary

Every Awesim agent can easily RICA a SIM using the Awesim app. Follow these steps:

  1. Open the Awesim App.
  2. Scan the SIM Barcode or Enter the ICCID manually.
  3. Fill in the Customer Information:
    • Name
    • Surname
    • ID Number or Passport Number
    • Passport Expiry Date (must be valid for at least 6 months)
    • Full Address (include Number, Street Name, Suburb, City, & Postal Code)
  4. Select \\\"SUBMIT\\\".

Details

  1. Open the Awesim App.
  2. Navigate to RICA

  1. Scan the SIM Barcode or Enter the ICCID manually (the ICCID is the long barcode on the SIM Pack).
    Click \\\"Next\\\"

  1. Fill in the Customer Information: Personal Details

Select SA ID or Passport

If SA ID fill in:

    • SA ID Number
    • First Name
    • Surname

If Passport

Fill in:

    • Passport Number
    • Passport Expiry Date (must be valid for at least 6 months)
    • Country of Issue
    • First Name
    • Surname

  1. Fill in the Customer Information: Residential Details

  1. Select \\\"Submit\\\"

By submitting the agent agrees to the RICA Act.

RICA Statuses

When you RICA a SIM, it goes through four main statuses:

  • Submit,
  • Pending,
  • Success,
  • and Failure.

Here's what each status means and what you should do at each stage:

Submit

Submit: After clicking \\\"Submit,\\\" you will see a screen indicating that Awesim has accepted the RICA request and is sending it to the network. This should take 0-1 minutes.

Example of a Submitted RICA:

  1. Pending: Once the RICA request is sent to the network, you need to wait for the network to approve it. This status indicates that the request is being processed.
      • The SIM RICA request will remain in pending until the network provides a final answer. This can take anywhere from 2 minutes to 2 hours, depending on the network's RICA system.
      • Do not attempt to RICA the SIM again until you receive a response indicating success or failure.

RICA Success

Success: When a RICA is successful, the system where you first RICA'd the SIM will confirm the success.

    • You will receive a push notification to confirm the RICA was successful.
    • The customer can now take the SIM out of the SIM pack, insert it into their phone, and connect their SIM.

RICA Failure

Failure: If a RICA fails, the system where you first RICA'd the SIM will return a failure message with the error.

  • Common reasons for failure include:
    • Network RICA service is down.
    • Incorrect information entered (e.g., postal code, country code for the passport, invalid address, etc.).

If a failure occurs, retry RICAing the SIM with the correct information.

You can view all your RICA submissions by clicking \\\"Report.\\\"

Important Reminders

  • Reversal of RICA: Networks have a specific time period for an automated reversal of a RICA if the SIM is not used within a certain timeframe. This period varies by network and is not fully known.
  • Activation Rule: A SIM card has 90 days from the date of RICA to perform a successful recharge or usage to qualify for an activation payment. This rule prevents pre-RICA of SIM cards.
  • Fraud Warning: Pre-RICA of SIM cards is considered fraud. Please do not pre-RICA SIMs, as it can lead to your account being blocked.

By following these guidelines, you can ensure a smooth RICA process and avoid any issues with your Awesim account.

Terms & Conditions Apply

  • Do not sell or give away SIMs to other agents.
  • Only RICA Awesim SIMs to real customers.
  • Awesim reserves the right to verify activations and claw back invalid payments.

For more details, refer to our terms & conditions.

B. How to RICA using the USSD?

  1. Dial *130*7422#
  2. Select option 5
  3. Enter the customer's cellphone number
  4. Capture the customer's details (Name, Surname, ID/Passport and Address).
  5. Enter the alternative number - if the customer has an alternative number.
  6. Then confirm your registration.

In order to complete the registration process, please ensure that you have your South African ID or Passport, as well as proof of residence.

Option 1 : A registered RICA agent can register you as a RICA Agent. They can capture your details on SmartRICA USSD (*130*7422#)

Option 2 : SmartRICAApp (Download on Apple App Store or Google Play Store)

Option 3 : SmartCall Online (https://online.smartcall.co.za)

Option 4 : The new agent can WhatsApp us on 060 070 2666 and a call centre agent will create a profile. 


You also need to provide the following:

  • A photo of your valid ID or passport: your face only, holding your ID or passport next to your face.
  • A photo of your proof of address.
  • The phone number that you will be using to RICA.

They will upload your ID or Passport, proof of address and a selfie of you holding your ID or Passport.

Once your profile and agent code have been created for you, we will send you your first SIMS parcel.

C. How to RICA using SmartRICA Online?

How to RICA a SIM using SMARTCALL ONLINE

Summary

  1. Enter your cellphone number
  2. Dial *130*678*100#
  3. Go to https://online.smartcall.co.za﻿
  4. Enter the one time PIN
  5. Select \\\"Login\\\"
  6. Select \\\"SmartRica\\\"
  7. Select \\\"Capture New RICA Registration\\\"
  8. Select \\\"Capture New RICA Registration\\\"
  9. Select RICA Network
  10. Capture Required Information
  11. Select \\\"Capture Registration\\\"

﻿

Details

  1. Enter your cellphone number
  2. Dial *130*678*100#
  3. Go to https://online.smartcall.co.za﻿
  4. Enter the one time PIN
  5. Select \\\"Login\\\"

﻿﻿﻿

  1. Select \\\"SmartRica\\\"

﻿﻿﻿

  1. Select \\\"Capture New RICA Registration\\\"

﻿﻿﻿

  1. Select \\\"Capture New RICA Registration\\\"

﻿﻿﻿

  1. Select RICA Network

﻿﻿﻿

  1. Capture all required information

﻿﻿﻿

  1. Select \\\"Capture Registration\\\"


D. How to RICA using the SmartRICA App?

  • Available on Google Play Store for Android

How to register a RICA Agent

  1. Once downloaded, open the SmartRICA app on your Android device.
  2. Click on the \\\"Create New Agent\\\" option.
  3. Complete the relevant fields on the form then click \\\"Create Agent\\\".
  4. A prompt should appear asking if you would like to upload documents for the agent being created.
  5. Click \\\"Yes\\\" then upload the required documents.
  6. Then click upload once all 3 required documents have been attached.


\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2025-10-07T09:20:43.956+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/ebaa0c43-ca2e-4256-9200-a17ab970f103" }, { "id": "5a52733e-89a5-476c-9d88-95ceff363ba7", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"5a52733e-89a5-476c-9d88-95ceff363ba7\",\"title\":\"What is RICA?\",\"content\":\"\nSummary\nRICA\nstands for\nRegulation of Interception of Communications\nand Provision of Communication-Related Information Act\n.\nRICA\nis a government regulation in South Africa.\nEvery SIM card must be registered with the customer’s personal details to function.\nImportant:\nOnly RICA SIMs with REAL customer details.\nFake RICA information can result in account suspension.\nAgents can RICA SIMs using the\nAwesim app, USSD, or SmartRICA.\nTo RICA a SIM for a customer the following customer documents are required:\nproof of identification (smart ID, ID book, or passport),\ncustomer name,\nand proof of address.\nDetails\nWhat Information is Required to RICA a SIM?\nIn Order to RICA a SIM an agent needs the following:\nName\nSurname\nDate of Birth\n(ID or Passport)\nID Number or Passport Number\nExpiry Date\n(Passport, must be valid for 6 months)\nFull Address\n(Number, Street Name, Suburb, City, Postal Code)\nValid Identity Documents\nID or Passport\nA clear photo of the customer ID or Passport\n(please ensure the Full Name(s) and Surname is clear and readable).\nAcceptable documents include:\nGreen bar-coded ID,\nID card,\nor Passport\n(check expiry date).\nProof of Address\nThe proof of address MUST be in the customers name and\nnot\nbe older than 3 months.\nAcceptable documents include:\nAccount statement\nBank statement\nLetter from the tribal office\nOr an affidavit stating the address\nHow to RICA a SIM?\nGather Information\n: Collect the necessary documents and details from the customer.\nRICA Methods\n: Use the\nAwesim App, USSD, or SmartRICA\nto RICA the SIM.\nUse ICCID\n: Enter the SIM card's serial number (ICCID) to start the RICA process.\nSubmit Information\n: Input the customer’s details and submit the RICA request to the network (Cell C, MTN, Telkom & Vodacom)\nHow to Submit a RICA application?\nRICA on the Awesim App, SmartRICA, or USSD.\nUse the ICCID from the SIM pack.\nEnter customer information and submit the RICA request to the relevant Network (Cell C, MTN, Telkom & Vodacom).\nWhat do the RICA Statuses mean?\nSubmitted:\nAfter clicking \\\"Submit,\\\" you will see a screen indicating that Awesim has accepted the RICA request and is sending it to the network. This should take 0-1 minutes.\nPending:\nOnce the RICA request is sent to the network, you need to wait for the network to approve it. This status indicates that the request is being processed.\nThe SIM RICA request will remain in pending until the network provides a final answer. This can take anywhere from 2 minutes to 2 hours, depending on the network's RICA system.\nDo not attempt to RICA the SIM again until you receive a response indicating success or failure.\nSuccess:\nWhen a RICA is successful, the system where you first RICA'd the SIM will confirm the success.\nYou will receive a push notification to confirm the RICA was successful.\nThe customer can now take the SIM out of the SIM pack, insert it into their phone, and connect their SIM.\nConfirmation\n: The system will confirm a successful RICA.\nNotification\n: The agent will receive an SMS confirming the success.\nNext Step\n: The customer can now insert the SIM into their phone.\nRICA Failure\nIf a RICA fails, the system where you first RICA'd the SIM will return a failure message with the error.\nCommon reasons for failure include:\nNetwork RICA service is down.\nIncorrect information entered (e.g., postal code, country code for the passport, invalid address, etc.).\nIf a failure occurs, retry RICAing the SIM with the correct information.\nImportant Reminders\nNetworks may reverse a RICA if the SIM is not used within a certain time period.\nA SIM must be used or recharged within 90 days of RICA to qualify for activation payment.\nDo not pre-RICA SIM cards; it may lead to account blockage and non-payment.\nBy following these steps, you can ensure your SIM cards are properly RICA'ed and ready for customer use.\nTerms & Conditions Apply\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"5a52733e-89a5-476c-9d88-95ceff363ba7\",\"title\":\"What is RICA?\",\"content\":\"

Summary

RICA stands for Regulation of Interception of Communications
and Provision of Communication-Related Information Act.

RICA is a government regulation in South Africa.

Every SIM card must be registered with the customer’s personal details to function.

Important: Only RICA SIMs with REAL customer details.
Fake RICA information can result in account suspension.

Agents can RICA SIMs using the Awesim app, USSD, or SmartRICA.

To RICA a SIM for a customer the following customer documents are required:

  1. proof of identification (smart ID, ID book, or passport),
  2. customer name,
  3. and proof of address.

Details

What Information is Required to RICA a SIM?

In Order to RICA a SIM an agent needs the following:

  • Name
  • Surname
  • Date of Birth (ID or Passport)
  • ID Number or Passport Number
  • Expiry Date (Passport, must be valid for 6 months)
  • Full Address (Number, Street Name, Suburb, City, Postal Code)

Valid Identity Documents

ID or Passport

A clear photo of the customer ID or Passport (please ensure the Full Name(s) and Surname is clear and readable).
Acceptable documents include:

  • Green bar-coded ID,
  • ID card,
  • or Passport (check expiry date).

Proof of Address

The proof of address MUST be in the customers name and not be older than 3 months.
Acceptable documents include:

  • Account statement
  • Bank statement
  • Letter from the tribal office
  • Or an affidavit stating the address

How to RICA a SIM?

  1. Gather Information: Collect the necessary documents and details from the customer.
  2. RICA Methods: Use the Awesim App, USSD, or SmartRICA to RICA the SIM.
  3. Use ICCID: Enter the SIM card's serial number (ICCID) to start the RICA process.
  4. Submit Information: Input the customer’s details and submit the RICA request to the network (Cell C, MTN, Telkom & Vodacom)

How to Submit a RICA application?

  1. RICA on the Awesim App, SmartRICA, or USSD.
  2. Use the ICCID from the SIM pack.
  3. Enter customer information and submit the RICA request to the relevant Network (Cell C, MTN, Telkom & Vodacom).

What do the RICA Statuses mean?

Submitted:
After clicking \\\"Submit,\\\" you will see a screen indicating that Awesim has accepted the RICA request and is sending it to the network. This should take 0-1 minutes.

Pending:
Once the RICA request is sent to the network, you need to wait for the network to approve it. This status indicates that the request is being processed.

  • The SIM RICA request will remain in pending until the network provides a final answer. This can take anywhere from 2 minutes to 2 hours, depending on the network's RICA system.

Do not attempt to RICA the SIM again until you receive a response indicating success or failure.

Success:
When a RICA is successful, the system where you first RICA'd the SIM will confirm the success.

  • You will receive a push notification to confirm the RICA was successful.
  • The customer can now take the SIM out of the SIM pack, insert it into their phone, and connect their SIM.
  • Confirmation: The system will confirm a successful RICA.
  • Notification: The agent will receive an SMS confirming the success.
  • Next Step: The customer can now insert the SIM into their phone.


RICA Failure

If a RICA fails, the system where you first RICA'd the SIM will return a failure message with the error.

Common reasons for failure include:

  • Network RICA service is down.
  • Incorrect information entered (e.g., postal code, country code for the passport, invalid address, etc.).

If a failure occurs, retry RICAing the SIM with the correct information.

Important Reminders

  • Networks may reverse a RICA if the SIM is not used within a certain time period.
  • A SIM must be used or recharged within 90 days of RICA to qualify for activation payment.
  • Do not pre-RICA SIM cards; it may lead to account blockage and non-payment.

By following these steps, you can ensure your SIM cards are properly RICA'ed and ready for customer use.

Terms & Conditions Apply




\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2025-10-07T08:58:56.832+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/5a52733e-89a5-476c-9d88-95ceff363ba7" }, { "id": "6fe9adc3-6350-44d3-a07b-93803c84b520", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"6fe9adc3-6350-44d3-a07b-93803c84b520\",\"title\":\"How to add or change banking details on the Awesim App?\",\"content\":\"\nTo Change your banking details is the\nsame as changing from Smartload to Bank\n.\nThis is the same process to add your banking details.\nNOTE:\nNot at all times. Payment details\ncannot be changed during the payment processing periods\n— this is typically\nfrom 5 days before the 25th\nuntil\nafter month-end payments have been completed\n.\nIf you need to update your payment details, please try again\noutside of these restricted times or WhatsApp our support team\nfor help.\nFollow these steps:\nClick on your profile\nSelect Payment Settings\nSelect How do I get Paid\nSelect How to get Paid\nSelect Payment Method to \\\"Bank\\\"\nFill in your details to Authenticate and select Next\nEnter the OTP that will be sent to your Main number to complete your Authentication\nFill in your New or Updated banking details and Save\nOnce completed you will get a notification that it has been successful.\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"6fe9adc3-6350-44d3-a07b-93803c84b520\",\"title\":\"How to add or change banking details on the Awesim App?\",\"content\":\"

To Change your banking details is the same as changing from Smartload to Bank.

This is the same process to add your banking details.

NOTE:

Not at all times. Payment details cannot be changed during the payment processing periods — this is typically from 5 days before the 25th until after month-end payments have been completed.

If you need to update your payment details, please try again outside of these restricted times or WhatsApp our support team for help.

Follow these steps:

  1. Click on your profile

  1. Select Payment Settings

  1. Select How do I get Paid

  1. Select How to get Paid

  1. Select Payment Method to \\\"Bank\\\"

  1. Fill in your details to Authenticate and select Next

Enter the OTP that will be sent to your Main number to complete your Authentication

  1. Fill in your New or Updated banking details and Save

  1. Once completed you will get a notification that it has been successful.

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2025-10-03T13:50:48.020+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/6fe9adc3-6350-44d3-a07b-93803c84b520" }, { "id": "c5eb2365-b204-4fb0-82e1-2c913762a26e", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"c5eb2365-b204-4fb0-82e1-2c913762a26e\",\"title\":\"Health & Safety Policy\",\"content\":\"\nSCOPE/OBJECTIVE\nAwesim is committed to providing a safe and healthy work environment for all employees, contractors, visitors, and any other individuals affected by our operations.\nWe recognise that the success of our organisation depends on the well-being and safety of our people. Therefore, we are dedicated to complying with the Occupational Health and Safety Act (Act No. 85 of 1993) and other relevant regulations and standards applicable in South Africa.\nThis policy outlines our commitment to health and safety and provides a framework for the implementation of effective health and safety practices across our organisation.\nRESPONSIBILITIES\n(1) Management:\nProvide leadership, support, and resources for the effective implementation of the health and safety policy.\nAppoint competent person/s to oversee health and safety matters.\nEnsure employees comply with our health and safety policies, procedures, and instructions\n(2) Employees:\nComply with health and safety rules, procedures, and instructions.\nReport hazards, incidents, and near misses promptly to supervisor/line manager and health and safety representatives.\nTake reasonable care of their health and safety and that of others.\nHAZARD IDENTIFICATION & RISK ASSEMENT\nThe HIRA (Hazard Identification & Risk Assessment) document identifies potential hazards and evaluates associated risks across all work activities.\nRisk Assessments identify hazards and detail preventative measures required either to eliminate the risk or the impact altogether or to reduce it to as low as possible and ensure control measures are in place to manage the risk/impact.\nControl measures are established and reviewed to mitigate risks to an acceptable level.\nOur risk assessment process involves a systematic evaluation of the workplace environment, equipment, processes, and activities to identify any risks that could lead to harm or injury.\nWe consider factors such as the likelihood of occurrence and potential severity of consequences.\nWhen risks are identified, they are prioritised based on the level of risk and thereafter proactive steps taken to eliminate or minimize these risks.\nWe encourage all employees to actively participate in the risk assessment process by reporting any hazards or concerns they may identify.\nAwesim’s HIRA document will be available on Slack and GetGuru.\nREPORTING HAZARDS\nReporting hazards is essential to prevent, eliminate or minimse accidents and injuries by ensuring unsafe conditions are quickly identified and addressed. It also helps in maintaining a safe work environment and comply with health and safety regulations.\nSteps to report a hazard:\nOpen the Google Form:\nHazard Report Form\nComplete the Form:\nFill in all the required information.\nAttach the supporting documents:\nAttach a picture of the hazard in the form in the allocated section.\nSubmit the form:\nOnce completed, click submit, which will automatically send the completed form to HR for processing.\nHEALTH & SAFETY COMMITTEE\nThe HSE Committee serves as a platform for collaboration between management and employees to identify, assess, and address potential health and safety risks within our workplace.\nCommittee meetings are an integral part of our proactive approach to ensure continuous improvement in health and safety standards.\nThese meetings provide a forum for open discussions, knowledge sharing, and the formulation of effective strategies to prevent accidents, injuries, and occupational hazards.\nPosters indicating committee members role and contact details will be placed on notice boards so staff are aware of such information in the case of an emergency/incident.\nHEALTH & SAFETY REPRESENTATIVES & THEIR RESPONSIBILITIES\nHealth and Safety Representative: Responsible for conducting inspections, investigate incidents, attend health and safety committee meetings, and identify potential hazards, risks and dangers.\nFire Warden/Fire Marshal: Responsible for fire safety, evacuation plans, conducting fire drills, and ensuring fire-fighting equipment is maintained.\nFirst Aider: Trained to provide first aid in case of accidents or medical emergencies and responsible for maintaining first aid kits and supplies.\nFire Fighter: Preventing, combating, and extinguishing fires with the goal of protecting lives, and operating tools and equipment used for firefighting safely and effectively.\nHealth and Safety Committee: A group of employees from various departments that have been trained in health and safety aspects and meet regularly to discuss safety concerns, review incidents, and suggest improvements.\nFIRST AID BOX\n(1) Location OF FIRST AID BOXES AT AWESIM HO:\nBox 1:\nUpstairs – Outside Large Boardroom\nBox 2:\nDownstairs – At Reception Area\n(2) USAGE:\nThis first aid box serves as an essential resource to promptly address any minor injuries or medical incidents that may occur during the course of work.\nStocked with a range of medical supplies, including bandages, antiseptics, sterile dressings, and basic medical equipment.\nIn the case of an accident or emergency that may arise, only Awesim appointed first aiders are allowed to access the First Aid Box as they have been trained on the proper use of items contained in the first aid box.\nFIRE EXTINGUISHERS AND RELATED EQUIPMENT\n(1) USAGE:\nFire Extinguishers and other related equipment are serviced in accordance with legislative requirements and should only be accessed by appointed Fire Fighters, Fire Wardens and staff who have been trained in the proper use of such equipment.\n(2) Types of Fire Extinguishers at Awesim HO:\nDCP Fire Extinguishers\n– Dry Chemical Powder – Generally used for electrical fires, combustible fires, and fires from flammable liquids.\nCO2 Fire Extinguishers\n– Gas – Stored in extinguisher as a liquid and gives off gas when used – Generally used for flammable liquids and gases and energized electrical fires.\n(3) LOCATION OF FIRE EXTINGUISHERS AT AWESIM HO:\n(a) Downstairs:\nReception:\nNext to female bathroom:\n1x hose reel\n2x 4,45kg DCP fire extinguishers\nNext to male bathroom:\n1x hose reel\n2x 4,45kg DCP fire extinguishers\nCall centre:\n1x 9kg fire extinguisher\nStores:\nShelves area:\n1x 9kg DCP fire extinguisher\nOutside stores office:\n1x 9kg DCP fire extinguisher\nInvoicing:\n1x 9kg DCP fire extinguisher\nServer Room:\n1x 2kg CO2 fire extinguisher\n(b) Upstairs:\nPassage way:\nNext to female bathroom\n1x hose reel\n2x 4,45kg DCP fire extinguishers\nNext to male bathroom\n1x hose reel\n2x 4,45kg DCP fire extinguishers\nCanteen:\n2x 2kg CO2 fire extinguishers\nHR/Floating desks:\n2x 2kg CO2 fire extinguishers\n(c) Basement:\nStores cage:\n1x hose reel & 2x 9kg DCP fire extinguishers\nBasement Entrance:\n1x Fire Hydrant\n(d) Outside:\nSecurity gate:\n2x Fire Hydrant\n(4) Fire Alarms at Awesim HO:\n1 x Fire Alarm\n- Reception door\n1 x Fire Alarm\n- Outside Large Boardroom\nPERSONAL PROTECTIVE EQUIPMET (PPE)\nAs stated within South African legislation, any employees working in an environment or performing a task/responsibility where they may be exposed to risk or potential risk are required to wear the stipulated personal protective equipment (PPE). Environment, tasks and/or responsibilities that require the use of PPE will be discussed with the relevant employee/s.\nShould an environment, task or responsibility require the use of PPE and the employee does not make use of the required PPE, then disciplinary action will be implemented in line with Awesim disciplinary code of conduct.\nACCIDENTS & INCIDENTS\nAn accident\nis defined as any unplanned event that results in personal injury, property damage, or both.\nAn incident\nis any unplanned event that has the potential to cause harm, loss, or damage but did not result in injury or property damage.\nAll accidents and incidents, regardless of severity, must be reported to either the SHE Representative/Line Manager. Employees involved in an accident or incident are responsible for reporting the details accurately and in as much detail as possible. Refer to accident / incident flow diagram herein.\nREPORTING\n(1) PERSONAL ACCIDENT (PERSON INJURED)\nRefers to an unexpected event that results in injury, death, or ill-health of an employee or 3rd party person.\nProcess to report a personal accident/incident:\nStep 1\n:\nImmediate Action:\nIf an employee is injured, they should immediately seek first aid or medical attention from one of the appointed first aiders. For serious or life threatening injuries, call emergency services (Netcare Ambulance - 082 911).\nSHE Representative (Liona Govender) & CHRO (Kristen Castle) to be notified immediately.\nCHRO to provide the relevant Injury on Duty (IOD) forms if required. The employee will require the completed IOD forms prior to being taken to emergency facilities or to a Medical Practitioner for treatment.\nCHRO to complete the COIDA slack workflow for reporting purposes.\nIf first aid treatment is applied, the appointed first aider is required to complete the\nFirst Aid Application Form_HSE_F_009_(18-06-2024).pdf\n.\nShould the employee or 3rd party person refuse treatment, then the appointed first aider must get them to sign the\nFirst Aid_Medical Treatment Waiver Form_HSE_F_005_(14-06-2024).pdf\n.\nStep 2\n:\n911 - NewsFlash workflow\n:\nWorkflow to be submitted as soon as possible, but within 1 hour of the event.\nSlack workflow link above, which can be accessed by copying and pasting into any chat on slack.\nThe workflow can also be found on #general channel in Slack.\nMost prevalent information is sent on the workflow which notifies relevant Awesim staff in order for help/assistance to be given.\nWorkflow should be submitted by the employee.
