If your payment method is SmartLoad, you can transfer your money to an Nedbank MobiMoney account.

Here’s a detailed guide how to do it step-by-step:

Nedbank MobiMoney Cash out

  1. Dial *130*678#
  2. Select \\\"Option - Money Send\\\"
  3. Select \\\"Option - Send Money\\\"
  4. Select \\\"Option - Nedbank MobiMoney\\\"
  5. Enter SmartLoad PIN:

  1. Select \\\"Option - Continue\\\"

  1. Enter Cash Out Amount
    (note: a R10 fee will be deducted).

  1. Enter 1 to proceed.

  1. After confirming, you will see a pop-up confirmation.
    The processing time with Nedbank is approximately 1-3 hours.
    Keep the reference number handy, contact SmartLoad at 011 507 4789
    if you do not receive an SMS from Nedbank after 3 hours.

  1. Receive SMS Confirmation:
    Once the transaction is complete, you will receive an
    SMS from Nedbank with the PIN and Voucher Number.
    Take this SMS to a Nedbank ATM, Pick n Pay, Shoprite,
    Checkers, Boxer Stores, or any other participating
    locations to withdraw your money.
    Keep the SMS safe and do not share it with anyone.

By following these steps, you can easily transfer your money
from SmartLoad to an Nedbank Mobimoney Account and access your funds.

Forgot Your PIN or Issues with Accessing Money?

Call Nedbank MobiMoney support at 0800 555 111 for assistance.

Terms & Conditions Apply

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2025-09-08T14:18:46.579+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/b233043c-f90b-4e3b-9774-f8cdbb712e65" }, { "id": "6867e93d-27ef-493a-9534-5324dfe6c984", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"6867e93d-27ef-493a-9534-5324dfe6c984\",\"title\":\"How to Cash Out from SmartLoad? - From FNB\",\"content\":\"\nSummary\nIf your payment method is Smartload, you can easily cash out your money.\nHere’s a quick step-by-step guide on how to transfer money from your SmartLoad account to an FNB eWallet:\nDial *\n130*678#\non your phone.\nSelect\n\\\"Option - Money Send\\\"\nSelect\n\\\"Option - Send Money\\\"\nSelect \\\"\nOption - FNB eWallet\\\"\nFollow the prompts to complete the transaction. A\nR10 fee\nwill be deducted for the cash out.\nDetails\nIf your payment method is Smartload, you can transfer your money to an FNB eWallet.\nHere’s a detailed guide how to do it step-by-step:\nFNB eWallet Steps to Cash Out:\nDial *\n130*678#\non your phone.\nSelect Option - Money Send.\nSelect Option - Send Money.\nSelect Option - FNB eWallet.\nEnter SmartLoad PIN.\nEnter the amount you want to cash out\n(note: a\nR10 fee\nwill be\ndeducted\n)\n.\nEnter 1 to proceed.\nAfter confirming, you will see a pop-up confirmation.\nThe processing time with FNB is approximately 1-3 hours.\nKeep the reference number handy in case you need to follow up.\nOnce the transaction is complete, you will receive an SMS from FNB with details.\nUsing FNB eWallet\nReceive SMS\nDial\n*120*277#\nSelect\nOption Smart Call eWallet\nCreate a 5-digit PIN (different from your SmartLoad PIN) for eWallet transactions.\nSelect Option - Home.\nChoose Option - Get Cash.\nAn ATM PIN will be created and sent to you via SMS.\nUse this PIN to cash out at any FNB ATM that accepts eWallet cash outs.\nCashing Out at FNB ATM\nVisit FNB ATM:\nSelect eWallet Cash Out.\nFollow the on-screen steps to complete the cash out.\nBy following these steps, you can easily transfer your money from Smartload to an FNB eWallet and access your funds.\nForgot Your PIN or Issues with Accessing Money?\nCall\nFNB eWallet support\non\n087 575 9405\nfor assistance.\nTerms & Conditions Apply\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"6867e93d-27ef-493a-9534-5324dfe6c984\",\"title\":\"How to Cash Out from SmartLoad? - From FNB\",\"content\":\"

Summary

If your payment method is Smartload, you can easily cash out your money.

Here’s a quick step-by-step guide on how to transfer money from your SmartLoad account to an FNB eWallet:

  1. Dial *130*678# on your phone.
  2. Select \\\"Option - Money Send\\\"
  3. Select \\\"Option - Send Money\\\"
  4. Select \\\"Option - FNB eWallet\\\"

Follow the prompts to complete the transaction. A R10 fee will be deducted for the cash out.

Details

If your payment method is Smartload, you can transfer your money to an FNB eWallet.

Here’s a detailed guide how to do it step-by-step:

FNB eWallet Steps to Cash Out:

  1. Dial *130*678# on your phone.
  2. Select Option - Money Send.
  3. Select Option - Send Money.
  4. Select Option - FNB eWallet.
  5. Enter SmartLoad PIN.

  1. Enter the amount you want to cash out
    (note: a     R10 fee will be deducted).

  1. Enter 1 to proceed.

  1. After confirming, you will see a pop-up confirmation.
    The processing time with FNB is approximately 1-3 hours.
    Keep the reference number handy in case you need to follow up.

  1. Once the transaction is complete, you will receive an SMS from FNB with details.

Using FNB eWallet

  1. Receive SMS

  1. Dial *120*277#
  2. Select Option Smart Call eWallet

  1. Create a 5-digit PIN (different from your SmartLoad PIN) for eWallet transactions.

  1. Select Option - Home.

  1. Choose Option - Get Cash.

  1. An ATM PIN will be created and sent to you via SMS.
    Use this PIN to cash out at any FNB ATM that accepts eWallet cash outs.

Cashing Out at FNB ATM

  1. Visit FNB ATM:
  2. Select eWallet Cash Out.
  3. Follow the on-screen steps to complete the cash out.

By following these steps, you can easily transfer your money from Smartload to an FNB eWallet and access your funds.

Forgot Your PIN or Issues with Accessing Money?

Call FNB eWallet support on 087 575 9405 for assistance.

Terms & Conditions Apply

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2025-09-08T14:17:49.299+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/6867e93d-27ef-493a-9534-5324dfe6c984" }, { "id": "08326c54-f2dd-4590-a150-92842116bc9a", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"08326c54-f2dd-4590-a150-92842116bc9a\",\"title\":\"How to Cash Out from SmartLoad?\",\"content\":\"\nSummary\nAll Awesim agents receive payments via SmartLoad by default, which is free of charge.\nAgents can change their preferred payment method, view\nHow do I get paid\nfor more info on how to.\nAgents can withdraw funds from Smartload using FNB eWallet or Nedbank Mobimoney.\nPayments are automatically made on designated payment dates:\n25th,\nNetwork Drives,\nand\nMonth End Bonus\nPayment.\nAgents can access Smartload balance by dialing *\n130*678#\nafter payment.\nATM withdrawals from Smartload incur a fee of R10.\nAgents can only use the USSD on their phone for this process and must keep their PIN safe.\nDetails\nHere’s a detailed guide on how to use SmartLoad to withdraw your money:\nWhen payment is made to an agent, the agent will receive an SMS from awesim detailing the payment.\nThis payment is made to the Main Cell Phone Number of the agents awesim Account or to the RICA Number that RICA'd the SIM.\nPayment SMS Example:\nAWESIM: TEST001 - APR24 Comm R13955 for 465 act (CellC 50=R1500 +VODA 94=R2820 +MTN 128=R3840 +TMP 193=R5790) +REWIND 1=R10\nAn SMS from SmartLoad will be received with the agents\nnew account balance from their payment\n(i.e. how much they have been paid):\nSmartload SMS Example:\nSmartLoad will give the agent a default PIN to login for the first time.\nOnce an agent chooses to Cash Out the default PIN will need to be changed.\nIn the above example the pin is 9172\nHow to Cash Out\nChange Default PIN:\nAfter receiving the SMS above with the payment:\nDial *130*678#\nSelect\n\\\"Option - Change Pin\\\"\n(give current PIN & give new pin).\nIf an agent does not change their pin, it will not let the agent register or cash out.\nIt is important to keep the PIN secret and not to give it to anyone.\nAwesim or Smartload is not responsible if an agent is defrauded by giving someone else access to their Smartload or Pin.\nRedial *130*678#\nSelect\n\\\"Option - (Money Send)\\\"\nSelect\n\\\"Option - Register\\\"\nEnter in the agent details (Title, Name, Middle Name - if you have -, Surname, ID or Passport, Gender)\nEnter the SmartLoad PIN\nConfirm Your Registration\nOnce successfully Registered you will be able to send money\nRedial *130*678#\nSelect\n\\\"Option\n- Money send\\\"\nSelect\n\\\"Option\n- Send Money\\\"\nSelect\n\\\"Payment Method\\\"\nFNB e-Wallet or\nNedbank Mobimoney.\n(Both charge a R10 cash out fee from Smartload).\n1)\nFNB eWallet\n- See full instructions\n2)\nNedbank Mobimoney\n- See full instructions\nFollow the Instructions and the guides for each for a full breakdown of how FNB eWallet & Nedbank Mobimoney work with Smartload.\nOn a Smartload Wallet an agent has the ability to buy airtime and data for customers, vouchers and more.\nSee full instructions on\nSmartload\nhere.\nWhen You Can't Cash Out\nYour SmartLoad account can be blocked for the following reasons:\nInvalid PIN used 3 times.\nInactive on Smartload for the past 3 months.\nInactive on SmartRICA for the past 3 months.\nSuspected fraudulent activities.\nExpired passport.\nIf your account is blocked, awesim will notify you via SMS,\nbut your payment will not be credited to your Smartload account.\nCheck under Payments >\nExclusions\nfor more details.\nIf your account is blocked, please call SmartLoad to unblock it:\nSmartLoad Support:\n011 507 4789\nBy following these steps, you can efficiently manage and cash out your payments using SmartLoad.\nTerms & Conditions Apply\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"08326c54-f2dd-4590-a150-92842116bc9a\",\"title\":\"How to Cash Out from SmartLoad?\",\"content\":\"

Summary

All Awesim agents receive payments via SmartLoad by default, which is free of charge.
Agents can change their preferred payment method, view How do I get paid for more info on how to.
Agents can withdraw funds from Smartload using FNB eWallet or Nedbank Mobimoney.
Payments are automatically made on designated payment dates:

  • 25th,
  • Network Drives,
  • and Month End Bonus Payment.

Agents can access Smartload balance by dialing *130*678# after payment.
ATM withdrawals from Smartload incur a fee of R10.
Agents can only use the USSD on their phone for this process and must keep their PIN safe.

Details

Here’s a detailed guide on how to use SmartLoad to withdraw your money:

When payment is made to an agent, the agent will receive an SMS from awesim detailing the payment.
This payment is made to the Main Cell Phone Number of the agents awesim Account or to the RICA Number that RICA'd the SIM.

Payment SMS Example:

AWESIM: TEST001 - APR24 Comm R13955 for 465 act (CellC 50=R1500 +VODA 94=R2820 +MTN 128=R3840 +TMP 193=R5790) +REWIND 1=R10

An SMS from SmartLoad will be received with the agents
new account balance from their payment (i.e. how much they have been paid):

Smartload SMS Example:

SmartLoad will give the agent a default PIN to login for the first time.
Once an agent chooses to Cash Out the default PIN will need to be changed.

In the above example the pin is 9172

How to Cash Out

  1. Change Default PIN:

After receiving the SMS above with the payment:

  1. Dial *130*678#

  1. Select \\\"Option - Change Pin\\\" (give current PIN & give new pin).
    • If an agent does not change their pin, it will not let the agent register or cash out.
    • It is important to keep the PIN secret and not to give it to anyone.
    • Awesim or Smartload is not responsible if an agent is defrauded by giving someone else access to their Smartload or Pin.
  2. Redial *130*678#
  3. Select \\\"Option - (Money Send)\\\"

  1. Select \\\"Option - Register\\\"

  • Enter in the agent details (Title, Name, Middle Name - if you have -, Surname, ID or Passport, Gender)
  • Enter the SmartLoad PIN
  • Confirm Your Registration

Once successfully Registered you will be able to send money

  1. Redial *130*678#
  2. Select \\\"Option - Money send\\\"

  1. Select \\\"Option - Send Money\\\"

  1. Select \\\"Payment Method\\\"
  2. FNB e-Wallet or
  3. Nedbank Mobimoney.

(Both charge a R10 cash out fee from Smartload).

1) FNB eWallet - See full instructions

2) Nedbank Mobimoney - See full instructions

Follow the Instructions and the guides for each for a full breakdown of how FNB eWallet & Nedbank Mobimoney work with Smartload.
On a Smartload Wallet an agent has the ability to buy airtime and data for customers, vouchers and more.

See full instructions on Smartload here.

When You Can't Cash Out

Your SmartLoad account can be blocked for the following reasons:

  • Invalid PIN used 3 times.
  • Inactive on Smartload for the past 3 months.
  • Inactive on SmartRICA for the past 3 months.
  • Suspected fraudulent activities.
  • Expired passport.

If your account is blocked, awesim will notify you via SMS,
but your payment will not be credited to your Smartload account.
Check under Payments > Exclusions for more details.

If your account is blocked, please call SmartLoad to unblock it:

  • SmartLoad Support: 011 507 4789

By following these steps, you can efficiently manage and cash out your payments using SmartLoad.

Terms & Conditions Apply

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2025-09-08T14:15:42.996+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/08326c54-f2dd-4590-a150-92842116bc9a" }, { "id": "525a70c7-95e0-4d3a-8525-e7704397591c", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"525a70c7-95e0-4d3a-8525-e7704397591c\",\"title\":\"How do I send airtime using my SmartLoad wallet?\",\"content\":\"\nSend airtime using your SmartLoad Wallet\nYou are able to send airtime using the following methods:\nUSSD - Dial *130*678#\nSmartLoad App\nOnline\nUSSD Process:\nDial\n*130*678#\nSelect\n\\\"Recharge\\\"\nSelect the required\n\\\"Network\\\"\nSelect the required\n\\\"Product\\\"\nEnter\n\\\"Amount\\\"\nyou want to purchase\nYou will be able to either\nget a recharge pin\nor you will be able to\nsend it directly to the cell phone number\nof your choice.\nSmartLoad App\nLogin\nto the App\nSelect\nDirect Recharge\nChoose the\nNetwork, Type of Product, enter the amount and cell phone number. Then click Recharge\nYou will then receive a confirmation message.\nOnline via http://online.smartcall.co.za/\nLogin\nto your account\nSelect \\\"\nSmartload\\\"\nSelect\n\\\"Recharge Airtime\\\"\nSelect your \\\"\nrequired product\\\"\nEnter the\nRand Amount, Number to send the Pin to\nand your\nsmartload pin\n, the click\nNext\nConfirm\nthe recharge details\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"525a70c7-95e0-4d3a-8525-e7704397591c\",\"title\":\"How do I send airtime using my SmartLoad wallet?\",\"content\":\"

Send airtime using your SmartLoad Wallet

You are able to send airtime using the following methods:

  1. USSD - Dial *130*678#
  2. SmartLoad App
  3. Online

  1. USSD Process:

Dial *130*678#

Select \\\"Recharge\\\"

Select the required \\\"Network\\\"

Select the required \\\"Product\\\"


Enter \\\"Amount\\\" you want to purchase

You will be able to either get a recharge pin or you will be able to send it directly to the cell phone number of your choice.

  1. SmartLoad App

Login to the App

Select Direct Recharge

Choose the Network, Type of Product, enter the amount and cell phone number. Then click Recharge

You will then receive a confirmation message.

  1. Online via http://online.smartcall.co.za/

Login to your account

Select \\\"Smartload\\\"

Select \\\"Recharge Airtime\\\"

Select your \\\"required product\\\"

Enter the Rand Amount, Number to send the Pin to and your smartload pin, the click Next

Confirm the recharge details

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2025-09-08T14:12:03.068+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/525a70c7-95e0-4d3a-8525-e7704397591c" }, { "id": "0d99ea72-a6df-416e-95eb-480d2b1c18c2", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"0d99ea72-a6df-416e-95eb-480d2b1c18c2\",\"title\":\"How to see paid activations and SIM serial numbers in the Awesim App?\",\"content\":\"\nPaid activations and SIM serial numbers report\nTo view your paid activations and the SIM serial number that you were paid for, follow there easy steps:\nStep 1\nOn the Dashboard, select\n\\\"Payments\\\"\nStep 2:\nSelect the\n\\\"Breakdown\\\"\ntab\nStep 3:\nSelect\n\\\"Paid Activation Serial No,\nStep 4\\\"\nOn this page you are able to view all the Networks and SIM serial numbers you are paid for every month.\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"0d99ea72-a6df-416e-95eb-480d2b1c18c2\",\"title\":\"How to see paid activations and SIM serial numbers in the Awesim App?\",\"content\":\"

Paid activations and SIM serial numbers report

To view your paid activations and the SIM serial number that you were paid for, follow there easy steps:

Step 1

On the Dashboard, select \\\"Payments\\\"

Step 2:

Select the \\\"Breakdown\\\" tab

Step 3:

Select \\\"Paid Activation Serial No,

Step 4\\\"

On this page you are able to view all the Networks and SIM serial numbers you are paid for every month.

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2025-09-08T14:08:06.574+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/0d99ea72-a6df-416e-95eb-480d2b1c18c2" }, { "id": "861773f8-a2ca-4822-871a-54b23da393a2", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"861773f8-a2ca-4822-871a-54b23da393a2\",\"title\":\"Employee Personal Information Change Request\",\"content\":\"\nSCOPE/OBJECTIVE\nA quick reference guide to the Employee Personal Information Change Request Form. To ensure that all employee personal information, including proof of address, contact number, next of kin details, etc, is current and up to date on all company records, employees must ensure they complete the below form. This form must be completed and submitted to update personal information to ensure effective communication and to assist in specific situations.\nSupporting documents that are required when completing the form:\nChange of Physical/Postal Address - A proof of address (cell phone bill, municipality bill, rental agreement, etc).\nChange of Surname - Updated ID document, Marriage Certificate (if due to marriage).\nUpdate to Passport Number/Work Permit - Updated Passport/Work Permit document.\nUpdate to Level of Qualification - A proof of certificate.\nHow to use this card:\nOpen the Google Form:\nEmployee Personal Information Change Request\nComplete the Form:\nFill in all the required information.\nAttach the supporting documents:\nAttach the relevant supporting document in the form in the allocated section.\nSubmit the form:\nOnce completed, click submit, which will automatically send the completed form to HR for processing.\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"861773f8-a2ca-4822-871a-54b23da393a2\",\"title\":\"Employee Personal Information Change Request\",\"content\":\"

SCOPE/OBJECTIVE

A quick reference guide to the Employee Personal Information Change Request Form. To ensure that all employee personal information, including proof of address, contact number, next of kin details, etc, is current and up to date on all company records, employees must ensure they complete the below form. This form must be completed and submitted to update personal information to ensure effective communication and to assist in specific situations.

Supporting documents that are required when completing the form:

  • Change of Physical/Postal Address - A proof of address (cell phone bill, municipality bill, rental agreement, etc).
  • Change of Surname - Updated ID document, Marriage Certificate (if due to marriage).
  • Update to Passport Number/Work Permit - Updated Passport/Work Permit document.
  • Update to Level of Qualification - A proof of certificate.

How to use this card:

  1. Open the Google Form: Employee Personal Information Change Request
  2. Complete the Form: Fill in all the required information.
  3. Attach the supporting documents: Attach the relevant supporting document in the form in the allocated section.
  4. Submit the form: Once completed, click submit, which will automatically send the completed form to HR for processing.

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [ { "value": "form", "id": "c1059ac1-13ea-4fa1-974f-a2f39084cdd0", "categoryId": "877b2ec0-0822-48f7-ac44-e37af6584b8d", "categoryName": "Tags" }, { "value": "information", "id": "ae91cb49-430e-498e-8aa9-36ed83ca9ed7", "categoryId": "f1824c7f-80e1-44e8-9c49-e3aca58b442f", "categoryName": "HR Tags" }, { "value": "personal", "id": "60425750-fa83-4404-ae65-617b23daccc3", "categoryId": "f1824c7f-80e1-44e8-9c49-e3aca58b442f", "categoryName": "HR Tags" } ], "last_modified": "2025-09-08T08:11:04.269+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/861773f8-a2ca-4822-871a-54b23da393a2" }, { "id": "32f5c6d4-9bbb-49cb-bfeb-33bcbd0aafd5", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"32f5c6d4-9bbb-49cb-bfeb-33bcbd0aafd5\",\"title\":\"Awesim's Artificial Intelligence (AI) Policy\",\"content\":\"\nIntroduction\nAt Awesim Telecoms, we see Artificial Intelligence (AI) as a powerful tool for innovation. This policy provides clear, actionable guidelines for all employees, ensuring we use AI to its full potential. While AI offers significant opportunities to drive innovation, improve customer service, and enhance productivity, it also comes with risks, such as data breaches, ethical mistakes, and unintended actions. Our commitment is to empower employees to use AI responsibly while upholding our company values.\nImportant Definitions\nArtificial Intelligence (AI):\nA broad term for computer systems that can perform tasks that typically require human intelligence, such as learning, reasoning, problem-solving, and understanding.\nHuman oversight:\nRefers to the active and meaningful involvement of a human being in supervising, reviewing, and intervening in the operation of an AI system.\nCompany Confidential Information:\nAny non-public information related to Awesim Telecoms (Pty) Ltd (Awesim) business, including customer data, trade secrets, intellectual property, financial data, and internal strategies.\nPersonal Information:\nAny data that can be used to identify an individual, such as names, contact details, ID numbers, or financial information.\nGuiding Principles & Ethical Use\nAt Awesim, we believe AI should be a tool to enhance human capabilities, not replace them. Our use of AI is guided by the following principles:\nHuman Oversight:\nAI is a powerful assistant, but it is still prone to errors or limitations. All outputs from AI tools must be reviewed and verified by a human before being used for any external or internal purposes.\nAccountability:\nEmployees remain accountable for the final decisions, actions, and content generated with the help of AI, regardless of the tool used.\nFairness:\nEmployees should be vigilant in identifying any outputs that appear discriminatory, unfair, or biased.\nHow AI can be used to improve work\nAI offers many opportunities to enhance your work, communication, and knowledge. Awesim Telecoms (Pty) Ltd encourages the use of AI tools for the following purposes:\nImproving Productivity:\nSummarising documents: Use AI to quickly create summaries of long reports, meeting transcripts, or research projects.\nDrafting content: Generate initial drafts for internal communications, presentations, and emails. This helps provide a starting point that you can then edit and refine with your expertise.\nAutomating repetitive tasks: Streamline routine administrative work. AI can help with tasks such as categorising emails, scheduling meetings based on team availability, and organising large datasets, freeing up your time for more strategic work.\nEnhancing Communication:\nImproving writing: Get assistance with grammar, spelling, and tone to ensure your messages are clear and professional.\nTranslating content: Use AI to translate messages or documents, facilitating communication both internally and externally.\nBrainstorming ideas: Use AI as a creative partner to generate ideas for projects, marketing, or complex problem-solving. This can spark new ideas and enhance the innovation process.\nBoosting Knowledge:\nResearch: Use AI to search for and collect information, making it faster to learn about new technologies, industry trends, or business strategies.\nLearning & Development: AI-powered tools can create tailored learning plans or provide quick, accessible explanations of complex technical topics, supporting your ongoing professional development.\nWhat to Look Out For\nUsing AI comes with risks that all employees must be aware of. Violations of these rules will be taken seriously.\nData Security & Confidentiality:\nNever enter Company Confidential Information or any form of Personal Information into a public AI tool. The data you enter may be used to train the AI model, making it a severe security and privacy risk.\nThis includes, but is not limited to: customer/agent names, contact details, financial data, internal project documents, unreleased product designs, or strategic plans.\nIntellectual Property (IP):\nBe aware that content generated by AI may have been created using copyrighted material. You must never present AI-generated content as your own original work without significant editing and review.\nCompany Information Integrity:\nAI models can \\\"hallucinate,\\\" meaning they can provide false information that appears credible. You are responsible for verifying the accuracy of all AI-generated output.\nDo not use AI to make critical decisions without human validation. This includes, but is not limited to, financial forecasts, employee performance reviews, or customer service resolutions.\nDo not use AI to impersonate or create fraudulent content.\nRisk Management\nReport Issues\n: If there are any major concerns with any AI platforms being used for work purposes (e.g., bugs, bias, or security risk), report it to your line manager, Chief Technology Officer, or Chief Human Resource Officer immediately.\nLegal Compliance:\nBe mindful that all your work, including AI-generated content, must follow company policies and legal regulations. You are responsible for the final output.\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"32f5c6d4-9bbb-49cb-bfeb-33bcbd0aafd5\",\"title\":\"Awesim's Artificial Intelligence (AI) Policy\",\"content\":\"

Introduction

At Awesim Telecoms, we see Artificial Intelligence (AI) as a powerful tool for innovation. This policy provides clear, actionable guidelines for all employees, ensuring we use AI to its full potential. While AI offers significant opportunities to drive innovation, improve customer service, and enhance productivity, it also comes with risks, such as data breaches, ethical mistakes, and unintended actions. Our commitment is to empower employees to use AI responsibly while upholding our company values.

Important Definitions

  • Artificial Intelligence (AI): A broad term for computer systems that can perform tasks that typically require human intelligence, such as learning, reasoning, problem-solving, and understanding.
  • Human oversight: Refers to the active and meaningful involvement of a human being in supervising, reviewing, and intervening in the operation of an AI system.
  • Company Confidential Information: Any non-public information related to Awesim Telecoms (Pty) Ltd (Awesim) business, including customer data, trade secrets, intellectual property, financial data, and internal strategies.
  • Personal Information: Any data that can be used to identify an individual, such as names, contact details, ID numbers, or financial information.

Guiding Principles & Ethical Use

At Awesim, we believe AI should be a tool to enhance human capabilities, not replace them. Our use of AI is guided by the following principles:

  • Human Oversight: AI is a powerful assistant, but it is still prone to errors or limitations. All outputs from AI tools must be reviewed and verified by a human before being used for any external or internal purposes.
  • Accountability: Employees remain accountable for the final decisions, actions, and content generated with the help of AI, regardless of the tool used.
  • Fairness: Employees should be vigilant in identifying any outputs that appear discriminatory, unfair, or biased.

How AI can be used to improve work

AI offers many opportunities to enhance your work, communication, and knowledge. Awesim Telecoms (Pty) Ltd encourages the use of AI tools for the following purposes:

  • Improving Productivity:
    • Summarising documents: Use AI to quickly create summaries of long reports, meeting transcripts, or research projects.
    • Drafting content: Generate initial drafts for internal communications, presentations, and emails. This helps provide a starting point that you can then edit and refine with your expertise.
    • Automating repetitive tasks: Streamline routine administrative work. AI can help with tasks such as categorising emails, scheduling meetings based on team availability, and organising large datasets, freeing up your time for more strategic work.
  • Enhancing Communication:
    • Improving writing: Get assistance with grammar, spelling, and tone to ensure your messages are clear and professional.
    • Translating content: Use AI to translate messages or documents, facilitating communication both internally and externally.
    • Brainstorming ideas: Use AI as a creative partner to generate ideas for projects, marketing, or complex problem-solving. This can spark new ideas and enhance the innovation process.
  • Boosting Knowledge:
    • Research: Use AI to search for and collect information, making it faster to learn about new technologies, industry trends, or business strategies.
    • Learning & Development: AI-powered tools can create tailored learning plans or provide quick, accessible explanations of complex technical topics, supporting your ongoing professional development.

What to Look Out For

Using AI comes with risks that all employees must be aware of. Violations of these rules will be taken seriously.

  • Data Security & Confidentiality:
    • Never enter Company Confidential Information or any form of Personal Information into a public AI tool. The data you enter may be used to train the AI model, making it a severe security and privacy risk.
    • This includes, but is not limited to: customer/agent names, contact details, financial data, internal project documents, unreleased product designs, or strategic plans.
  • Intellectual Property (IP):
    • Be aware that content generated by AI may have been created using copyrighted material. You must never present AI-generated content as your own original work without significant editing and review.
  • Company Information Integrity:
    • AI models can \\\"hallucinate,\\\" meaning they can provide false information that appears credible. You are responsible for verifying the accuracy of all AI-generated output.
    • Do not use AI to make critical decisions without human validation. This includes, but is not limited to, financial forecasts, employee performance reviews, or customer service resolutions.
    • Do not use AI to impersonate or create fraudulent content.

Risk Management

Report Issues: If there are any major concerns with any AI platforms being used for work purposes (e.g., bugs, bias, or security risk), report it to your line manager, Chief Technology Officer, or Chief Human Resource Officer immediately.

Legal Compliance: Be mindful that all your work, including AI-generated content, must follow company policies and legal regulations. You are responsible for the final output.

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [ { "value": "Artificial Intelligence", "id": "0903e157-640d-4795-bc36-945da37f760b", "categoryId": "f1824c7f-80e1-44e8-9c49-e3aca58b442f", "categoryName": "HR Tags" }, { "value": "policy", "id": "4b4e383d-ef16-43ea-8781-9877bf0601e9", "categoryId": "877b2ec0-0822-48f7-ac44-e37af6584b8d", "categoryName": "Tags" } ], "last_modified": "2025-09-05T13:04:49.674+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/32f5c6d4-9bbb-49cb-bfeb-33bcbd0aafd5" }, { "id": "d7d6efcd-1918-47e0-8fcd-ac748d617606", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"d7d6efcd-1918-47e0-8fcd-ac748d617606\",\"title\":\"How can I change my SmartLoad PIN?\",\"content\":\"\nIt is important to change your SmartLoad PIN on a regular basis and to keep your handset safe.\nThis is to avoid fraudulent activities on your account.\nHow to change your Smartload Pin using the SmartLoad USSD:\nDial * 130 *\n678 #\nSelect Option\n7 \\\"More\\\"\nSelect Option\n1 \\\"Change PIN\\\"\nNow enter your\ncurrent PIN\nEnter your new PIN\nRe-Enter\nyour new PIN\nCongratulations your PIN has been changed.\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"d7d6efcd-1918-47e0-8fcd-ac748d617606\",\"title\":\"How can I change my SmartLoad PIN?\",\"content\":\"

It is important to change your SmartLoad PIN on a regular basis and to keep your handset safe.
This is to avoid fraudulent activities on your account.

How to change your Smartload Pin using the SmartLoad USSD:

  • Dial * 130 * 678 #

Select Option 7 \\\"More\\\"

  • Select Option 1 \\\"Change PIN\\\"

  • Now enter your current PIN

  • Enter your new PIN

  • Re-Enter your new PIN

Congratulations your PIN has been changed.

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2025-09-03T07:28:04.943+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/d7d6efcd-1918-47e0-8fcd-ac748d617606" }, { "id": "1b483533-254c-40bb-932b-83e05d1d0bfa", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"1b483533-254c-40bb-932b-83e05d1d0bfa\",\"title\":\"Gmail Email Signature Setup SOP\",\"content\":\"\nPurpose\nThe purpose of this Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) is to provide clear, step-by-step instructions for setting up and loading a new email signature in Gmail. It ensures consistency across all staff communications by standardising the process, helping maintain a professional company image in all outgoing emails.\nSetup Steps:\nStep 1: Set up the image in Google Drive:\nUpload\nyour email signature image to your Google Drive:\nRight-click on the three dots that appear at the far right of the image and select \\\"\nShare\n\\\":\nIn the sharing window navigate to \\\"\nGeneral access\n\\\".\nChange the setting from \\\"\nRestricted\n\\\" to \\\"\nAnyone with the link\n\\\":\nEnsure the role is set to \\\"\nViewer\n\\\".\nClick\n\\\"Done\\\":\nStep 2: Set Up the Signature in Gmail\nOpen Gmail and click the\n\\\"Settings\\\"\nicon in the top-right corner.\nClick\n\\\"See all settings\\\":\nScroll down to the\n\\\"Signature\\\"\nsection.\nClick\n\\\"Create new\\\"\nto give your signature a name:\nClick the \\\"Insert Image\\\" icon.\nIn the pop-up window, select the\n\\\"Google Drive\\\"\ntab.\nSelect the image you want to use.\nYour image will appear as\nOriginal size\nin the text box, you will need to select\nLarge.\nEnsure the new email signature you created is selected as the default for \\\"New email use\\\" and \\\"On reply/forward use\\\".\nSelect the box for \\\"Insert signature before quoted text in replies and remove the \\\"--\\\"line that precedes it.\\\":\nScroll to the bottom of the page and click\n\\\"Save Changes\\\"\n.\nStep 3: Check the changes have been implemented\nNavigate to your emails.\nStart a new email and check to ensure that the new signature appears at the bottom of your email.\nYou can adjust the size of the email signature manually to\n\\\"Best Fit\\\"\nin the options under your new email signature should you wish.\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"1b483533-254c-40bb-932b-83e05d1d0bfa\",\"title\":\"Gmail Email Signature Setup SOP\",\"content\":\"

Purpose

The purpose of this Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) is to provide clear, step-by-step instructions for setting up and loading a new email signature in Gmail. It ensures consistency across all staff communications by standardising the process, helping maintain a professional company image in all outgoing emails.

Setup Steps:

Step 1: Set up the image in Google Drive:

  • Upload your email signature image to your Google Drive:

  • Right-click on the three dots that appear at the far right of the image and select \\\"Share\\\":

  • In the sharing window navigate to \\\"General access\\\".
  • Change the setting from \\\"Restricted\\\" to \\\"Anyone with the link\\\":

  • Ensure the role is set to \\\"Viewer\\\".
  • Click \\\"Done\\\":

Step 2: Set Up the Signature in Gmail

  • Open Gmail and click the \\\"Settings\\\" icon in the top-right corner.
  • Click \\\"See all settings\\\":

  • Scroll down to the \\\"Signature\\\" section.
  • Click \\\"Create new\\\" to give your signature a name:

  • Click the \\\"Insert Image\\\" icon.

  • In the pop-up window, select the \\\"Google Drive\\\" tab.
  • Select the image you want to use.

  • Your image will appear as Original size in the text box, you will need to select Large.

  • Ensure the new email signature you created is selected as the default for \\\"New email use\\\" and \\\"On reply/forward use\\\".
  • Select the box for \\\"Insert signature before quoted text in replies and remove the \\\"--\\\"line that precedes it.\\\":

  • Scroll to the bottom of the page and click \\\"Save Changes\\\".

Step 3: Check the changes have been implemented

  • Navigate to your emails.
  • Start a new email and check to ensure that the new signature appears at the bottom of your email.
  • You can adjust the size of the email signature manually to \\\"Best Fit\\\" in the options under your new email signature should you wish.

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [ { "value": "gmail signature", "id": "d8f4ac0c-3346-4c80-9748-eadeb324ca33", "categoryId": "f1824c7f-80e1-44e8-9c49-e3aca58b442f", "categoryName": "HR Tags" } ], "last_modified": "2025-08-18T10:31:46.909+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/1b483533-254c-40bb-932b-83e05d1d0bfa" }, { "id": "8db0a4f4-11f7-4dce-8120-c9b40aa0f61f", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"8db0a4f4-11f7-4dce-8120-c9b40aa0f61f\",\"title\":\"CRM Audit Trail: Delivery Address - Geo Location Updates\",\"content\":\"\nThe CRM Audit Trail will indicate the source of each update made to the Delivery Address – Geo Location record.\nAwesim App\nLocation Share\nCustomer Care Geo Location Link sent via WhatsApp\nCRM\nHead Office manual intervention (not the default)\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"8db0a4f4-11f7-4dce-8120-c9b40aa0f61f\",\"title\":\"CRM Audit Trail: Delivery Address - Geo Location Updates\",\"content\":\"

The CRM Audit Trail will indicate the source of each update made to the Delivery Address – Geo Location record.

Awesim App

Location Share

Customer Care Geo Location Link sent via WhatsApp


CRM

Head Office manual intervention (not the default)



\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2025-08-14T08:32:28.458+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/8db0a4f4-11f7-4dce-8120-c9b40aa0f61f" }, { "id": "daef923d-b014-484d-8df5-dd1accc11cec", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"daef923d-b014-484d-8df5-dd1accc11cec\",\"title\":\"How to Update Your Delivery Address Using the Geo Location Share Link\",\"content\":\"\nOnly click on the link once\nyou are at your exact location\nfor an accurate delivery address, for our RAM Couriers to deliver your SIM card order.\nLocation Services must be turned [On]\nPlease ensure Location Services is turned\n[On]\nunder your device\n\\\"Settings\\\"\nand tap\nAllow\nto access your current location.\nHow to Enable Location Services to Share Your Delivery Address\nImportant Note:\nIf you see the error:\n\\\"User denied the request for Geolocation. Location services may be disabled.\\\"\nthis means your phone’s location access is\nturned off\nor\nblocked for the browser.\nPlease follow the steps below to enable location services:\nAndroid (Chrome Browser)\nOpen\nSettings\non your phone\nGo to\nLocation\nMake sure\nLocation Services\nis ON\nGo to\nChrome\n(or browser you're using) where 👉 webapi.awesim.co.za is already open\nTap\nOK\nor\nrefresh the page and tap\nAllow\nwhen prompted\niPhone (Safari Browser)\nOpen\nSettings\nGo to\nPrivacy & Security > Location Services\nMake sure\nLocation Services\nis ON\nGo to\nSafari\n(or browser you're using) where 👉 webapi.awesim.co.za is already open\nTap\nOK\nor\nrefresh the page and tap\nAllow\nwhen prompted\nStep 1: Click on \\\"Address Update Link\\\" within 24 Hours before the link expires\nStep 2: Confirm the Pin is correct and click the green [Update Address] button\nStep 3: Next Confirm Address Update screen, tap [Update Address]\nStep 4: Once completed a [Success!] notification will pop up and alert us once completed\nOnce successful, we will be notified and reply to reconfirm the delivery address before resolving the Service Request.\nUpdating a Pin Location on the map\nCheck the Pin Location:\nIf the red pin is not showing the correct spot for delivery, tap on the red pin on the map.\nMove the Pin:\nDrag the pin to the\nexact delivery address location\non the map.\nUpdate the Address:\nOnce the pin is in the correct place, tap the\nUpdate Address\nbutton.\nConfirm Update:\nWait for the\n“Success! Your address was updated successfully”\nnotification to appear before closing the screen.\nTraining Video: How to update a Pin Location on the map\nTraining Video_How to update a Pin Location on the map.mp4\nby Bernadine Bothwell\\\" height=\\\"607\\\" width=\\\"734\\\" data-ghq-card-content-is-full-width=\\\"false\\\" id=\\\"Zbgg2JRDIvaP\\\">\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"daef923d-b014-484d-8df5-dd1accc11cec\",\"title\":\"How to Update Your Delivery Address Using the Geo Location Share Link\",\"content\":\"

Only click on the link once you are at your exact location for an accurate delivery address, for our RAM Couriers to deliver your SIM card order.

Location Services must be turned [On]

Please ensure Location Services is turned [On] under your device \\\"Settings\\\" and tap Allow to access your current location.

How to Enable Location Services to Share Your Delivery Address

Important Note:

If you see the error:
\\\"User denied the request for Geolocation. Location services may be disabled.\\\"
this means your phone’s location access is turned off or blocked for the browser.

Please follow the steps below to enable location services:

Android (Chrome Browser)

  1. Open Settings on your phone
  2. Go to Location
  3. Make sure Location Services is ON
  4. Go to Chrome (or browser you're using) where 👉 webapi.awesim.co.za is already open
  5. Tap OK or refresh the page and tap Allow when prompted

iPhone (Safari Browser)

  1. Open Settings
  2. Go to Privacy & Security > Location Services
  3. Make sure Location Services is ON
  4. Go to Safari (or browser you're using) where 👉 webapi.awesim.co.za is already open
  5. Tap OK or refresh the page and tap Allow when prompted


Step 1: Click on \\\"Address Update Link\\\" within 24 Hours before the link expires


Step 2: Confirm the Pin is correct and click the green [Update Address] button

Step 3: Next Confirm Address Update screen, tap [Update Address]


Step 4: Once completed a [Success!] notification will pop up and alert us once completed


Once successful, we will be notified and reply to reconfirm the delivery address before resolving the Service Request.

Updating a Pin Location on the map

  1. Check the Pin Location: If the red pin is not showing the correct spot for delivery, tap on the red pin on the map.
  2. Move the Pin: Drag the pin to the exact delivery address location on the map.
  3. Update the Address: Once the pin is in the correct place, tap the Update Address button.
  4. Confirm Update: Wait for the “Success! Your address was updated successfully” notification to appear before closing the screen.

Training Video: How to update a Pin Location on the map

Training Video_How to update a Pin Location on the map.mp4 by Bernadine Bothwell\\\" height=\\\"607\\\" width=\\\"734\\\" data-ghq-card-content-is-full-width=\\\"false\\\" id=\\\"Zbgg2JRDIvaP\\\">

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2025-08-13T10:25:28.983+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/daef923d-b014-484d-8df5-dd1accc11cec" }, { "id": "2922e7e7-3380-4b88-b63d-ecf232f519d3", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"2922e7e7-3380-4b88-b63d-ecf232f519d3\",\"title\":\"Agent Training & Support – Telkom Campaign: Top Agent Competition (Aug–Dec 2025)\",\"content\":\"\nSR Handling\nTo help track the success of the campaign, please add the following if you’ve successfully completed the Service Request (SR) campaign call:\nSR Comment:\nTelkom Top Agent Comp Completed\nDropDown:\nINFO SMS\nCampaign Talking Points / SR Description:\nCheck Before Calling:\nReview the agent’s Last INV Stats. Note the recent Telkom SIM orders and the activation quantity and average recharge activity.\nConfirm Awareness:\nAsk the agent: “Are you aware of the Awesim Top Agent Competition for Telkom running from 1 August to 31 December?”\nExplain this is a support call to help them qualify and maximise their chances.\nCheck Understanding:\nIf the agent is not aware, explain the following:\n1 winner every week – announced every Friday\nPrize: Oppo A5 + Jaua Smartwatch (valued at R6000)\nHow to qualify: Sign up 10 or more REAL Telkom customers per month to count\nThe more the recharges, the better their chances to win\nEncourage them to promote Telkom airtime and data deals to drive recharges\nFree SIM & Buy Stock Allocations:\nInform the agent that based on performance, they’ve been allocated:\nExtra Free SIMs\nAdditional Buy Stock\nNew Feature on the New App – they can now combine Free and Buy Stock in one order to help meet the minimum 30 SIM shipping quantity\nPerformance-Based Incentives:\nLet the agent know they’re on the right track to qualify for the competition — and should continue to push performance to stay ahead.\nPromotion Channels:\nAsk: “Are you following us on Facebook or our WhatsApp Channel?”\nEncourage them to join — this is where we share promotions, data deals, and weekly winners.\nShare Campaign Details:\nUse Dropdown: INFO SMS to send the campaign information directly to their phone.\nWrap-Up:\nAsk if they have any questions or need support.\nSR Comment:\nTelkom Top Agent Comp Completed. DropDown: INFO SMS\nEscalate for additional training or follow-up.\nSystem updates\nSource: CROSS PLATFORM APP\nSystem indicator confirming the agent is using the new version of the Awesim App (\\\"Maui Release\\\").\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"2922e7e7-3380-4b88-b63d-ecf232f519d3\",\"title\":\"Agent Training & Support – Telkom Campaign: Top Agent Competition (Aug–Dec 2025)\",\"content\":\"

SR Handling


To help track the success of the campaign, please add the following if you’ve successfully completed the Service Request (SR) campaign call:

SR Comment: Telkom Top Agent Comp Completed
DropDown: INFO SMS


Campaign Talking Points / SR Description:

  1. Check Before Calling:
    Review the agent’s Last INV Stats. Note the recent Telkom SIM orders and the activation quantity and average recharge activity.
  2. Confirm Awareness:
    Ask the agent: “Are you aware of the Awesim Top Agent Competition for Telkom running from 1 August to 31 December?”
    Explain this is a support call to help them qualify and maximise their chances.
  3. Check Understanding:
    If the agent is not aware, explain the following:

1 winner every week – announced every Friday
Prize: Oppo A5 + Jaua Smartwatch (valued at R6000)
How to qualify: Sign up 10 or more REAL Telkom customers per month to count
The more the recharges, the better their chances to win
Encourage them to promote Telkom airtime and data deals to drive recharges

  1. Free SIM & Buy Stock Allocations:
    Inform the agent that based on performance, they’ve been allocated:

Extra Free SIMs
Additional Buy Stock
New Feature on the New App – they can now combine Free and Buy Stock in one order to help meet the minimum 30 SIM shipping quantity

  1. Performance-Based Incentives:
    Let the agent know they’re on the right track to qualify for the competition — and should continue to push performance to stay ahead.
  2. Promotion Channels:
    Ask: “Are you following us on Facebook or our WhatsApp Channel?”
    Encourage them to join — this is where we share promotions, data deals, and weekly winners.
  3. Share Campaign Details:
    Use Dropdown: INFO SMS to send the campaign information directly to their phone.
  4. Wrap-Up:
    Ask if they have any questions or need support.
    SR Comment: Telkom Top Agent Comp Completed. DropDown: INFO SMS
    Escalate for additional training or follow-up.


System updates

Source: CROSS PLATFORM APP
System indicator confirming the agent is using the new version of the Awesim App (\\\"Maui Release\\\").


\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2025-08-04T14:43:41.564+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/2922e7e7-3380-4b88-b63d-ecf232f519d3" }, { "id": "46fd1dad-8cb9-4841-9f6e-ddf36225a78d", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"46fd1dad-8cb9-4841-9f6e-ddf36225a78d\",\"title\":\"INFO SMS \",\"content\":\"\nSystem Status / DropDown:\nINFO SMS\nSMS:\nAWESIM INFO: App https://tinyurl.com/Awesim-App-Download - WhatsApp 0600702666 - SMS 43203 - visit https://awesim.co.za/ or www.facebook.com/awesimtelecoms/\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"46fd1dad-8cb9-4841-9f6e-ddf36225a78d\",\"title\":\"INFO SMS \",\"content\":\"

System Status / DropDown: INFO SMS

SMS:

AWESIM INFO: App https://tinyurl.com/Awesim-App-Download - WhatsApp 0600702666 - SMS 43203 - visit https://awesim.co.za/ or www.facebook.com/awesimtelecoms/

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2025-08-04T12:38:03.613+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/46fd1dad-8cb9-4841-9f6e-ddf36225a78d" }, { "id": "39a96f52-f4bc-4359-a60e-6593af70c763", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"39a96f52-f4bc-4359-a60e-6593af70c763\",\"title\":\"Awesim's Health & Safety Representatives\",\"content\":\"\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"39a96f52-f4bc-4359-a60e-6593af70c763\",\"title\":\"Awesim's Health & Safety Representatives\",\"content\":\"

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [ { "value": "awesim", "id": "e062ed16-069a-457e-ae83-5775eb16403a", "categoryId": "877b2ec0-0822-48f7-ac44-e37af6584b8d", "categoryName": "Tags" }, { "value": "Health", "id": "4b29693f-2f7c-4e79-8889-bcd64ae6e2fb", "categoryId": "f1824c7f-80e1-44e8-9c49-e3aca58b442f", "categoryName": "HR Tags" }, { "value": "Safety", "id": "9a380ace-2b32-491d-ab8b-716ca7ad1da1", "categoryId": "f1824c7f-80e1-44e8-9c49-e3aca58b442f", "categoryName": "HR Tags" } ], "last_modified": "2025-07-30T04:49:32.794+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/39a96f52-f4bc-4359-a60e-6593af70c763" }, { "id": "6cf9f986-6389-4d1e-bff4-096df70bc9b4", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"6cf9f986-6389-4d1e-bff4-096df70bc9b4\",\"title\":\"Delivery Address - Google Verified - \\\"Geo Location\\\" Link\",\"content\":\"\nWe are unable to search your delivery address on Google Maps.\nPlease assist us with an accurate Pin Location by following the below steps:\nOnly click on the link once\nyou are at your exact location\nfor an accurate delivery address, for our RAM Couriers to deliver your sim card order.\nPlease ensure Location Services is turned\n[On]\nunder your device\n\\\"Settings\\\".\nStep 1: Click on \\\"Address Update Link\\\" within 24 Hours before the link expires\nStep 2: Confirm the Pin is correct and click the green [Update Address} button\nStep 3: Once completed a [Success!] notification will pop up and alert us once completed\nOnce above Steps sent to the agent:\nClick:\n[Generate Location Share Link]\nButton Chat Box\nCustomer History Table will update with System Status:\nOpen Orders > System Status: LOCATION SHARING > Comment: Location share request\nsent.\nSR will return to Queue once Successful!:\nOpen Orders / Social Messages > System Status: TO SOCIAL MEDIA > Comment: Location share address update\nreceived from customer,\nawaiting user creation to complete\nReference:\nCUSTOMER INFO TABLE: ADDRESS NOTES AUTOMATICALLY UPDATED\nif new Agent:\nService Request (SR) with Geo Location Link (within the same SR)\nmust be Open (Active) in order to auto populate Customer Infomation Table when you select [New] Button\nOnce Location Share Address Update is successful with status [TO SOCIAL MEDIA] \\\"Location share address update received...\\\":\nPlease Copy & Paste Co-Ords in SR Comment for Customer History reference.\nCust Info Table with Google verified Box will be ticked with date Google Verified.\nGPS Co-ordinates will\nno longer\nappear in Extra Address Info field - but will be automatically updated on the back end RAM Waybill with GPS Co-Ordinates.\nIf the Google-verified latitude and longitude are\nincorrect,\nthere is\nno need\nto escalate for GPS coordinates to be removed.\nSimply\nresend\nthe Geo Location link and advise the agent to click on the\nnew link.\nThe new successful location pin will override (replace) the existing data.\nError Notifications\nError: Timed Out - link not actioned within the 24 Hour turn-around time.\nTrouble Shooting Actionable: Re-send Link\nError: Oops! Cannot update address, the SR has already been closed.\nTrouble Shooting Actionable: Re-send Link on open Service Request (SR)\nINCORRECT PIN LOCATION: LATITUDE AND LONGITUDE\nIf the Google-verified latitude and longitude are incorrect, there is no need to escalate for GPS coordinates to be removed.\nSimply\nresend\nthe Geo Location link and advise the agent to click on the new link.\nThe new successful location pin will\noverride (replace) the existing data.\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"6cf9f986-6389-4d1e-bff4-096df70bc9b4\",\"title\":\"Delivery Address - Google Verified - \\\"Geo Location\\\" Link\",\"content\":\"

We are unable to search your delivery address on Google Maps.

Please assist us with an accurate Pin Location by following the below steps:

Only click on the link once you are at your exact location for an accurate delivery address, for our RAM Couriers to deliver your sim card order.

Please ensure Location Services is turned [On] under your device \\\"Settings\\\".

Step 1: Click on \\\"Address Update Link\\\" within 24 Hours before the link expires



Step 2: Confirm the Pin is correct and click the green [Update Address} button




Step 3: Once completed a [Success!] notification will pop up and alert us once completed


Once above Steps sent to the agent:

Click: [Generate Location Share Link] Button Chat Box


Customer History Table will update with System Status:

  • Open Orders > System Status: LOCATION SHARING > Comment: Location share request sent.


SR will return to Queue once Successful!:

  • Open Orders / Social Messages > System Status: TO SOCIAL MEDIA > Comment: Location share address update received from customer, awaiting user creation to complete

Reference:

CUSTOMER INFO TABLE: ADDRESS NOTES AUTOMATICALLY UPDATED

if new Agent:

Service Request (SR) with Geo Location Link (within the same SR) must be Open (Active) in order to auto populate Customer Infomation Table when you select [New] Button


Once Location Share Address Update is successful with status [TO SOCIAL MEDIA] \\\"Location share address update received...\\\":

  • Please Copy & Paste Co-Ords in SR Comment for Customer History reference.

Cust Info Table with Google verified Box will be ticked with date Google Verified.

  • GPS Co-ordinates will no longer appear in Extra Address Info field - but will be automatically updated on the back end RAM Waybill with GPS Co-Ordinates.
  • If the Google-verified latitude and longitude are incorrect, there is no need to escalate for GPS coordinates to be removed.
    • Simply resend the Geo Location link and advise the agent to click on the new link.
    • The new successful location pin will override (replace) the existing data.



Error Notifications

  • Error: Timed Out - link not actioned within the 24 Hour turn-around time.
  • Trouble Shooting Actionable: Re-send Link



  • Error: Oops! Cannot update address, the SR has already been closed.
  • Trouble Shooting Actionable: Re-send Link on open Service Request (SR)


INCORRECT PIN LOCATION: LATITUDE AND LONGITUDE

  • If the Google-verified latitude and longitude are incorrect, there is no need to escalate for GPS coordinates to be removed.
  • Simply resend the Geo Location link and advise the agent to click on the new link.
  • The new successful location pin will override (replace) the existing data.

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [ { "value": "Address", "id": "357714c4-95dd-41a0-b0da-83a6b23daee8", "categoryId": "e0751ef6-b3fd-4bd0-babb-3bc7619c24e1", "categoryName": "Support Tags" }, { "value": "delivery", "id": "379ef994-09e5-4513-968d-9bc434c836d5", "categoryId": "e0751ef6-b3fd-4bd0-babb-3bc7619c24e1", "categoryName": "Support Tags" }, { "value": "Google Plus Code", "id": "0ac07686-a9d0-493f-ad93-e49d1a9ad43c", "categoryId": "e0751ef6-b3fd-4bd0-babb-3bc7619c24e1", "categoryName": "Support Tags" } ], "last_modified": "2025-07-28T07:25:20.421+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/6cf9f986-6389-4d1e-bff4-096df70bc9b4" }, { "id": "c1af8690-c1f5-4282-bffa-3471349e1baf", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"c1af8690-c1f5-4282-bffa-3471349e1baf\",\"title\":\"Medical certificate requirements (Sick notes)\",\"content\":\"\nScope/Objective\nA valid medical certificate in South Africa needs to be issued by a registered medical practitioner, contain specific information about the patient and the practitioner, and be based on a professional medical examination. It should also clearly state the employee's inability to work due to illness or injury.\nDetailed Requirements:\nIssuing Practitioner:\nThe certificate must be issued by a medical practitioner registered with the Health Professions Council of South Africa (HPCSA) or the Allied Health Professions Council of South Africa (AHPCSA).\nManagers can check if a medical practitioner is registered here:\nhttps://hpcsaonline.custhelp.com/app/i_reg_form; or\nhttps://www.pcns.co.za/Search/Verify\nPractitioner's Information:\nThe certificate should include the practitioner's name, address, and qualifications.\nPatient's Information:\nIt must state the patient's name and surname.\nExamination Details:\nThe date and time of the examination should be included.\nBasis of the Certificate:\nThe certificate should indicate whether it is based on the practitioner's personal observations during an examination or information provided by the patient. A certificate stating that the practitioner \\\"saw the patient\\\" or was \\\"informed by the patient\\\" is not considered a valid medical certificate.\nDescription of Illness:\nA description of the illness or injury, in layman's terms, should be provided with the patient's consent. If consent is not provided, the certificate should state \\\"Medical Condition.\\\"\nDuration of Sick Leave:\nThe certificate should specify the exact period of recommended sick leave.\nDate of Issue:\nThe date when the certificate was issued must be clearly stated.\nPreprinted stationary:\nIf preprinted stationery is used, a practitioner must delete words/information that are irrelevant.\nSignature:\nThe certificate must be personally and legibly signed by the practitioner. Certificates signed by anyone other than a registered medical practitioner or those that are illegible or stamped only (without a signature) are not valid.\nSick Leave approval:\nEmployee's are required to submit a valid medical certificate that meets all of the above requirements with their sick leave application in the ESS system in BCX.\nSick leave applications should be declined if any of the above requirements are missing or not legible.\nAwesim Telecoms reserves the right to reject a medical certificate if it does not meet the above legislative requirements. Failure to provide a valid medical certificate, or if a certificate is rejected, may result in the application of a \\\"no work, no pay\\\" policy and potential disciplinary action.\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"c1af8690-c1f5-4282-bffa-3471349e1baf\",\"title\":\"Medical certificate requirements (Sick notes)\",\"content\":\"

Scope/Objective

A valid medical certificate in South Africa needs to be issued by a registered medical practitioner, contain specific information about the patient and the practitioner, and be based on a professional medical examination. It should also clearly state the employee's inability to work due to illness or injury.

Detailed Requirements:

  • Issuing Practitioner: The certificate must be issued by a medical practitioner registered with the Health Professions Council of South Africa (HPCSA) or the Allied Health Professions Council of South Africa (AHPCSA).
    • Managers can check if a medical practitioner is registered here:
      • https://hpcsaonline.custhelp.com/app/i_reg_form; or
      • https://www.pcns.co.za/Search/Verify
  • Practitioner's Information: The certificate should include the practitioner's name, address, and qualifications.
  • Patient's Information: It must state the patient's name and surname.
  • Examination Details: The date and time of the examination should be included.
  • Basis of the Certificate: The certificate should indicate whether it is based on the practitioner's personal observations during an examination or information provided by the patient. A certificate stating that the practitioner \\\"saw the patient\\\" or was \\\"informed by the patient\\\" is not considered a valid medical certificate.
  • Description of Illness: A description of the illness or injury, in layman's terms, should be provided with the patient's consent. If consent is not provided, the certificate should state \\\"Medical Condition.\\\"
  • Duration of Sick Leave: The certificate should specify the exact period of recommended sick leave.
  • Date of Issue: The date when the certificate was issued must be clearly stated.
  • Preprinted stationary: If preprinted stationery is used, a practitioner must delete words/information that are irrelevant.
  • Signature: The certificate must be personally and legibly signed by the practitioner. Certificates signed by anyone other than a registered medical practitioner or those that are illegible or stamped only (without a signature) are not valid.

Sick Leave approval:

  • Employee's are required to submit a valid medical certificate that meets all of the above requirements with their sick leave application in the ESS system in BCX.
  • Sick leave applications should be declined if any of the above requirements are missing or not legible.
  • Awesim Telecoms reserves the right to reject a medical certificate if it does not meet the above legislative requirements. Failure to provide a valid medical certificate, or if a certificate is rejected, may result in the application of a \\\"no work, no pay\\\" policy and potential disciplinary action.

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [ { "value": "medical certificate", "id": "ce03fe78-4e67-4a87-aed3-7dd7366a8f51", "categoryId": "f1824c7f-80e1-44e8-9c49-e3aca58b442f", "categoryName": "HR Tags" }, { "value": "Sick note", "id": "effbe642-4e12-4c6c-b602-130640a71019", "categoryId": "f1824c7f-80e1-44e8-9c49-e3aca58b442f", "categoryName": "HR Tags" } ], "last_modified": "2025-07-16T16:52:24.534+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/c1af8690-c1f5-4282-bffa-3471349e1baf" }, { "id": "a6dd9a7e-fa09-4978-90a5-82fd3ed7c4b3", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"a6dd9a7e-fa09-4978-90a5-82fd3ed7c4b3\",\"title\":\"Awesim Returning Agent (RA) Revival Process\",\"content\":\"\nSTANDARD OPERATING PROCEDURE\nThe following is a Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) that must be followed as of the date of issue. Non-compliance to this document and/or instruction may result in disciplinary action. Should you have any queries in regard to this SOP, you are required to address same with management immediately.\nLegend\nCC\nCustomer Care\nCMS\nCustomer Management System\nCRM\nCustomer Relationship Management\nSR\nService Requests\nRA\nReturning Agent\nOTP\nOne Time Pin\nPURPOSE\nTo outline the process of restoring a dormant Awesim Returning RICA agents account to functionality.\nProcedure and Responsibilities:\nReturn agent request synopsis:\nTrigger:\nA previously registered Awesim agent intends to resume operations.\nOutcome:\nThe customer care consultant will know how to revive an Awesim Returning RICA agent from inception until closure of the SR.\nCustomer Care Consultant Procedure Methodology / Quality fundamentals.\nMonitoring\n: Check the SR's history occurrences to avoid repetition and oversights to ensure quality within the process of providing accurate responses directed to the query at hand.\nVerification\n: Confirm the RA's identity, cell phone number and verify that they meet all necessary requirements to resume operations.\nDocumentation\n: Ensure all required documentation is sent, including proof of address, identification document (ID/Passport), cell phone number and a picture of the agent holding their ID/Passport next to their face.\nSystem Entry\n: Identify and accurately input the RA's details into the system, ensuring all fields are properly completed on CMS. This is inclusive of identifying new cell phone numbers and linking chats to existing customer codes.\nConfirmation\n: Provide the agent with a confirmation of their order and the next steps in the process.\nVerify Request Details:\nThe Operations, Call Centre unit is the first in contacted for clarification if necessary.\nThe customer care consultant reviews the submitted details for accuracy.\nApproval Process:\nUpon successful documentation and ordering, the account is routed to invoicing with drop down “To Invoice”, and follows the Invoice processes.\nIf Unsuccessful:\nInform the agent for rectification of the error documents.\nProcess Steps:\nStep 1: Service Request Initiation\nAction\n: A new service request (SR) is created.\nOutcome\n: Proceed to monitor the SR history.\nStep 2: Determine SR Type & customer code Verification\nAction\n: Assess the service request type.\nVerification\n: Check the CMS customer info table to ensure the agent is verified.\nIf verified: Canned response,\nGet Guru RA \\\"Yes\\\".\nIf not verified: Canned response ,\nGet Guru RA \\\"No\\\".\nDrop Down:\nCHAT WAITING.\nSmart RICA verify\n: Is the provided / old number Smart RICA verified?\nYes: continue with\nVerify Customer Code Status\n.\nNo: Check if the number existing on any other code on CRM & complete the Smart RICA registration process.\nCanned response\nDrop Down:\nCHAT WAITING.\nNumber Change:\nIs there a request or a need to change the agents phone number?\nIf No: continue with\nVerify Customer Code Status\n.\nIf Yes: Check if the number existing on any other code on CRM, Smart RICA the new phone number & Initiate the OTP Process.\nCanned response\nDrop Down:\nCHAT WAITING.\nis the OTP process successful?\nYes: proceed to step 3\nNo: escalate using\ndrop down\n\\\"Escalate number change\\\".\nVerify Customer Code Status\n: Is the customer code place on hold?\nIf No: proceed to Step 3.\nIf Yes: What is the reason for the account to be placed on hold?\nDue to account expiry:\nUpload the verification documents on\nmy.awesim\n.\nUpdate comments section: Expired agent , please un-hold.\nDue to account RTS:\nUpload the verification documents on\nmy.awesim\n.\nUpdate comments section: RTS'ed agent , please un-hold.\nEnsure to google verify the address in case of RTS before routing to call center admin by proceeding with step 3 to 4 first.\nStep 3: Confirm Delivery Address\nAction\n: Confirm if the delivery address is home or work.\nCanned Response\n:\nDelivery Address Confirmation\nDrop Down:\nCHAT WAITING\nStep 3.1: Canned Response Based on Agent Response\nAction\n: Send relevant canned response based on the agent's input.\nHome Address:\nHome Address Canned Response\nWork Address:\nWork Address Canned Response\nStep 4: Google verify & Address Feasibility Check\nAction\n: Evaluate the provided address using Google Maps.\nOutcome\n: is the provided address available on Google maps?\nIf Yes: Proceed to Step 5.\nIf No feasible: Share\nGeo Location Sharing\nSearch for the nearest landmark visible on Google Maps that the agent is familiar with, preferably located approximately within 1 kilometre of the pinned location.\nDrop Down:\nUNHOLD ESC\nStep 5: Order Confirmation\nAction\n: Confirm the order details and send\ncanned response\nand promotional information for the requested networks (e.g., Telkom, MTN, Cell C)\nTelkom Promotion\nMTN Promotion\nCellC Promotion\ninitiate the SurveyMonkey Rating Link by ending the chat.\nDrop Down:\nTo Invoice.\nEND.\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"a6dd9a7e-fa09-4978-90a5-82fd3ed7c4b3\",\"title\":\"Awesim Returning Agent (RA) Revival Process\",\"content\":\"

STANDARD OPERATING PROCEDURE

The following is a Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) that must be followed as of the date of issue. Non-compliance to this document and/or instruction may result in disciplinary action. Should you have any queries in regard to this SOP, you are required to address same with management immediately.

Legend

CC

Customer Care

CMS

Customer Management System

CRM

Customer Relationship Management

SR

Service Requests

RA

Returning Agent

OTP

One Time Pin

PURPOSE

To outline the process of restoring a dormant Awesim Returning RICA agents account to functionality.

Procedure and Responsibilities:

Return agent request synopsis:

    • Trigger: A previously registered Awesim agent intends to resume operations.
    • Outcome: The customer care consultant will know how to revive an Awesim Returning RICA agent from inception until closure of the SR.
    • Customer Care Consultant Procedure Methodology / Quality fundamentals.
      • Monitoring: Check the SR's history occurrences to avoid repetition and oversights to ensure quality within the process of providing accurate responses directed to the query at hand.
      • Verification: Confirm the RA's identity, cell phone number and verify that they meet all necessary requirements to resume operations.
      • Documentation: Ensure all required documentation is sent, including proof of address, identification document (ID/Passport), cell phone number and a picture of the agent holding their ID/Passport next to their face.
      • System Entry: Identify and accurately input the RA's details into the system, ensuring all fields are properly completed on CMS. This is inclusive of identifying new cell phone numbers and linking chats to existing customer codes.
      • Confirmation: Provide the agent with a confirmation of their order and the next steps in the process.
  1. Verify Request Details:
    • The Operations, Call Centre unit is the first in contacted for clarification if necessary.
    • The customer care consultant reviews the submitted details for accuracy.
  2. Approval Process:
    • Upon successful documentation and ordering, the account is routed to invoicing with drop down “To Invoice”, and follows the Invoice processes.
    • If Unsuccessful:
      • Inform the agent for rectification of the error documents.

Process Steps:

Step 1: Service Request Initiation

  • Action: A new service request (SR) is created.
  • Outcome: Proceed to monitor the SR history.

Step 2: Determine SR Type & customer code Verification

  • Action: Assess the service request type.
  • Verification: Check the CMS customer info table to ensure the agent is verified.
    • If verified: Canned response, Get Guru RA \\\"Yes\\\".
    • If not verified: Canned response ,Get Guru RA \\\"No\\\".
      • Drop Down: CHAT WAITING.
  • Smart RICA verify: Is the provided / old number Smart RICA verified?
      • Yes: continue with Verify Customer Code Status.
      • No: Check if the number existing on any other code on CRM & complete the Smart RICA registration process. Canned response
      • Drop Down: CHAT WAITING.
  • Number Change: Is there a request or a need to change the agents phone number?
    • If No: continue with Verify Customer Code Status.
    • If Yes: Check if the number existing on any other code on CRM, Smart RICA the new phone number & Initiate the OTP Process. Canned response
      • Drop Down: CHAT WAITING.
      • is the OTP process successful?
        • Yes: proceed to step 3
        • No: escalate using drop down \\\"Escalate number change\\\".
  • Verify Customer Code Status: Is the customer code place on hold?
    • If No: proceed to Step 3.
    • If Yes: What is the reason for the account to be placed on hold?
      • Due to account expiry:
          • Upload the verification documents on my.awesim.
          • Update comments section: Expired agent , please un-hold.
      • Due to account RTS:
          • Upload the verification documents on my.awesim.
          • Update comments section: RTS'ed agent , please un-hold.
          • Ensure to google verify the address in case of RTS before routing to call center admin by proceeding with step 3 to 4 first.

Step 3: Confirm Delivery Address

  • Action: Confirm if the delivery address is home or work.
  • Canned Response: Delivery Address Confirmation
    • Drop Down: CHAT WAITING

Step 3.1: Canned Response Based on Agent Response

  • Action: Send relevant canned response based on the agent's input.
    • Home Address: Home Address Canned Response
    • Work Address: Work Address Canned Response

Step 4: Google verify & Address Feasibility Check

  • Action: Evaluate the provided address using Google Maps.
  • Outcome: is the provided address available on Google maps?
    • If Yes: Proceed to Step 5.
    • If No feasible: Share Geo Location Sharing
      • Search for the nearest landmark visible on Google Maps that the agent is familiar with, preferably located approximately within 1 kilometre of the pinned location.
      • Drop Down: UNHOLD ESC

Step 5: Order Confirmation

  • Action: Confirm the order details and send canned response and promotional information for the requested networks (e.g., Telkom, MTN, Cell C)
    • Telkom Promotion
    • MTN Promotion
    • CellC Promotion
  • initiate the SurveyMonkey Rating Link by ending the chat.
    • Drop Down: To Invoice. END.


\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2025-07-16T08:06:34.714+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/a6dd9a7e-fa09-4978-90a5-82fd3ed7c4b3" }, { "id": "5b971d80-878c-42ad-95ba-79581dba3ea9", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"5b971d80-878c-42ad-95ba-79581dba3ea9\",\"title\":\"Your Guide to Awesim's Star Rating \",\"content\":\"\nUnderstanding Your Awesim Star Rating\nAwesim uses a 5-star rating system to assess and reward its agents. A higher star rating means you qualify for more benefits.\nWhat are Awesim Star Ratings?\nThe Awesim Star Rating system is a performance-based evaluation for agents, ranging from 1 to 5 stars. It helps Awesim recognize and reward agents who consistently perform well and adhere to best practices.\nHow to Achieve a Higher Star Rating\nTo improve your star rating and gain more advantages, agents should focus on the following:\nRICA, Connect, and Recharge All SIMs:\nEnsure that every SIM card is properly registered (RICA'd) and connected. It is also important to regularly recharge all your SIM cards to keep them active.\nAcquire Real Customers:\nPrioritize selling SIM cards to genuine customers who will actually use them.\nAvoid Wasting SIM Cards:\nIt is crucial to manage your SIM cards properly and avoid discarding or wasting any.\nEncourage Customer Recharges:\nYour star rating is directly influenced by how frequently and consistently your customers recharge their SIM cards. Promoting regular recharges among your customers will help boost your rating.\nKeep Track of Your SIM Cards:\nRemind your customers that Awesim SIM cards never expire, and ensure they don't throw them away.\nBenefits of a Higher Star Rating\nWhen you achieve a star rating of 3, 4, or 5 stars, you become eligible for additional rewards and benefits:\nAdditional SIM Cards:\nYou will qualify to receive more SIM cards from Awesim.\nAwesim Reward Points:\nYou will earn Awesim Reward Points for every valid activation you achieve.\nThe higher your Star Rating (3, 4, or 5), the more points you'll earn.\nThese points can be used to redeem promotional items of your choice from the Awesim Store.\nYou can view your available points and place orders directly from the Awesim Store.\nReward Points are also earned through orders, good behavior, competitions, and other incentives.\nYou can get free items from the Awesim Store using these points.\nImportant Reminders\nCustomer recharges on your SIM cards directly impact your star rating.\nAwesim SIM cards do not expire, so always encourage their continued use.\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"5b971d80-878c-42ad-95ba-79581dba3ea9\",\"title\":\"Your Guide to Awesim's Star Rating \",\"content\":\"

Understanding Your Awesim Star Rating

Awesim uses a 5-star rating system to assess and reward its agents. A higher star rating means you qualify for more benefits.

What are Awesim Star Ratings?

The Awesim Star Rating system is a performance-based evaluation for agents, ranging from 1 to 5 stars. It helps Awesim recognize and reward agents who consistently perform well and adhere to best practices.

How to Achieve a Higher Star Rating

To improve your star rating and gain more advantages, agents should focus on the following:

  • RICA, Connect, and Recharge All SIMs: Ensure that every SIM card is properly registered (RICA'd) and connected. It is also important to regularly recharge all your SIM cards to keep them active.
  • Acquire Real Customers: Prioritize selling SIM cards to genuine customers who will actually use them.
  • Avoid Wasting SIM Cards: It is crucial to manage your SIM cards properly and avoid discarding or wasting any.
  • Encourage Customer Recharges: Your star rating is directly influenced by how frequently and consistently your customers recharge their SIM cards. Promoting regular recharges among your customers will help boost your rating.
  • Keep Track of Your SIM Cards: Remind your customers that Awesim SIM cards never expire, and ensure they don't throw them away.

Benefits of a Higher Star Rating

When you achieve a star rating of 3, 4, or 5 stars, you become eligible for additional rewards and benefits:

  • Additional SIM Cards: You will qualify to receive more SIM cards from Awesim.
  • Awesim Reward Points: You will earn Awesim Reward Points for every valid activation you achieve.
    • The higher your Star Rating (3, 4, or 5), the more points you'll earn.
    • These points can be used to redeem promotional items of your choice from the Awesim Store.
    • You can view your available points and place orders directly from the Awesim Store.
    • Reward Points are also earned through orders, good behavior, competitions, and other incentives.
    • You can get free items from the Awesim Store using these points.

Important Reminders

  • Customer recharges on your SIM cards directly impact your star rating.
  • Awesim SIM cards do not expire, so always encourage their continued use.

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2025-07-14T19:09:40.256+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/5b971d80-878c-42ad-95ba-79581dba3ea9" }, { "id":
