"77a0ea5e-c32b-4eca-9a51-1b2a1a3b919e", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"77a0ea5e-c32b-4eca-9a51-1b2a1a3b919e\",\"title\":\"How to Port? \",\"content\":\"\nSummary\nPorting is when a customer moves from one network\nto another while keeping their current number.\nAgents can earn up to\nR60 for each port:\nR30 for Activation\n: Paid on the\n25th\nof the month.\nR30 for\nMonth-End Port Bonus:\nPaid if the customer spends\nat least\nR150 within 3 months\nof the port.\nHow to Port:\nRICA\nthe new SIM.\nFollow the specific porting process for each network.\nDO NOT\nconnect the SIM before porting.\nDetails\nPorting is when a customer keeps their current phone number\n(MSISDN) but moves it to a different network.\nSteps for Porting:\nRICA the SIM:\nRegister the new SIM with the customer's details.\nFollow Network Process:\nEach network has specific steps to complete the port.\nDo Not Connect Early:\nEnsure the SIM is not connected before porting to avoid getting a new number.\nLet's take a look at an example:\nA customer on Cell C wants to switch to MTN, while keeping their number.\nThe agent RICAs an MTN SIM and follows the porting process.\nIf the customer spends R60 in the first 2 months and another\nR90 in the 3rd month, the agent receives a total of R60.\nHow to Port to Each Network\nPort to Cell C:\nRICA the SIM.\nSMS the 12-digit RICA serial number from the old SIM to 084 767 8287.\nReceive a verification SMS with an OTP.\nWait 24 hours and insert the new SIM.\nDial 084 140 if there are issues.\nPort to MTN:\nRICA the SIM.\nSMS \\\"PortMe#newSIMnumber\\\" from the old SIM to 083 767 8287.\nReceive a confirmation SMS.\nWait until the next day to insert the new SIM.\nDial 136 to activate.\nCall 083 135 if there are issues.\nPort to Telkom:\nRICA the SIM and visit a Telkom branch to complete the port.\nPort to Vodacom:\nRICA the SIM.\nSMS \\\"port\\\" space \\\"me\\\" space SIM number\\\" to 082 767 8287 from the customer's phone.\nReceive confirmation and porting date SMSes.\nInsert the new SIM the next day.\nDial 136 to connect.\nCall 082 17844 if there are issues.\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"77a0ea5e-c32b-4eca-9a51-1b2a1a3b919e\",\"title\":\"How to Port? \",\"content\":\"

Summary

Porting is when a customer moves from one network
to another while keeping their current number.

Agents can earn up to R60 for each port:

  • R30 for Activation: Paid on the 25th of the month.
  • R30 for Month-End Port Bonus: Paid if the customer spends
    at least R150 within 3 months of the port.

How to Port:

  1. RICA the new SIM.
  2. Follow the specific porting process for each network.
  3. DO NOT connect the SIM before porting.

Details

Porting is when a customer keeps their current phone number
(MSISDN) but moves it to a different network.

Steps for Porting:

  • RICA the SIM: Register the new SIM with the customer's details.
  • Follow Network Process: Each network has specific steps to complete the port.
  • Do Not Connect Early: Ensure the SIM is not connected before porting to avoid getting a new number.

Let's take a look at an example:

A customer on Cell C wants to switch to MTN, while keeping their number.
The agent RICAs an MTN SIM and follows the porting process.
If the customer spends R60 in the first 2 months and another
R90 in the 3rd month, the agent receives a total of R60.

How to Port to Each Network

Port to Cell C:

  1. RICA the SIM.
  2. SMS the 12-digit RICA serial number from the old SIM to 084 767 8287.
  3. Receive a verification SMS with an OTP.
  4. Wait 24 hours and insert the new SIM.
  5. Dial 084 140 if there are issues.

Port to MTN:

  1. RICA the SIM.
  2. SMS \\\"PortMe#newSIMnumber\\\" from the old SIM to 083 767 8287.
  3. Receive a confirmation SMS.
  4. Wait until the next day to insert the new SIM.
  5. Dial 136 to activate.
  6. Call 083 135 if there are issues.

Port to Telkom:

RICA the SIM and visit a Telkom branch to complete the port.

Port to Vodacom:

  1. RICA the SIM.
  2. SMS \\\"port\\\" space \\\"me\\\" space SIM number\\\" to 082 767 8287 from the customer's phone.
  3. Receive confirmation and porting date SMSes.
  4. Insert the new SIM the next day.
  5. Dial 136 to connect.
  6. Call 082 17844 if there are issues.

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2025-07-14T18:54:21.514+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/77a0ea5e-c32b-4eca-9a51-1b2a1a3b919e" }, { "id": "f571863c-973a-49ef-bde9-233bc17c6c78", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"f571863c-973a-49ef-bde9-233bc17c6c78\",\"title\":\"Ports\",\"content\":\"\nSummary\nA port is when a customer moves their phone number\n(MSISDN)\nfrom one network to another while keeping their current number.\nAgents can earn up to R60 for each port:\nR30 for\nActivation\n: Paid on the\n25th\nof the month.\nR30 for\nMonth-End Port Bonus\n: Paid if the customer spends\nat least R150 within 3 months\nof the port.\nDetailed\nA port is when a cellphone number\n(MSISDN)\nmoves from one network to another,\nso in other words a customer can keep their current cell phone number but change their network.\nHere’s an example of a port:\nA customer wants to move their number from Cell C to MTN.\nThe agent takes an Awesim MTN SIM.\nRICA's the NEW SIM with the customer's details.\nFollows the porting process for MTN.\nThe customer keeps their old number but now uses the MTN network.\nPort Payment Breakdown\nActivations\nAgents earn R30 for the activation of the ported SIM used by a\nREAL\ncustomer.\nThis payment is made on the 25th of the month.\nMonth-End Port Bonus\nAgents earn an extra R30 if the customer spends at least R150 within 3 months of the port.\nThis bonus is paid at the end of the month (30th/31st or the closest business day).\nLet's take a look at an example:\nMonth 1\nMonth 2\nMonth 3\nMonth 4\nRecharge R50\nRecharge R70\nRecharge R150\nUsage/Spend: R50\nUsage/Spend: R70\nUsage/Spend: R150\nSIM continues to recharge & spend airtime\nActivation R30\nPort Bonus R30\nPayment Confirmation\nOn the pay date an agent will receive an SMS to confirm their Port Payment has been paid.\nBy default, payments go to the\nSmartload Wallet\nor the preferred payment method and can be changed on the Awesim App under Profile > Payment Settings >\nHow do I get paid.\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"f571863c-973a-49ef-bde9-233bc17c6c78\",\"title\":\"Ports\",\"content\":\"

Summary

A port is when a customer moves their phone number (MSISDN)
from one network to another while keeping their current number.

Agents can earn up to R60 for each port:

  • R30 for Activation: Paid on the 25th of the month.
  • R30 for Month-End Port Bonus: Paid if the customer spends at least R150 within 3 months of the port.

Detailed

A port is when a cellphone number (MSISDN) moves from one network to another,
so in other words a customer can keep their current cell phone number but change their network.

Here’s an example of a port:

  1. A customer wants to move their number from Cell C to MTN.
    • The agent takes an Awesim MTN SIM.
    • RICA's the NEW SIM with the customer's details.
    • Follows the porting process for MTN.
  2. The customer keeps their old number but now uses the MTN network.

Port Payment Breakdown

  1. Activations
    • Agents earn R30 for the activation of the ported SIM used by a REAL customer.
    • This payment is made on the 25th of the month.
  2. Month-End Port Bonus
    • Agents earn an extra R30 if the customer spends at least R150 within 3 months of the port.
    • This bonus is paid at the end of the month (30th/31st or the closest business day).

Let's take a look at an example:

Month 1

Month 2

Month 3

Month 4

Recharge R50

Recharge R70

Recharge R150

Usage/Spend: R50

Usage/Spend: R70

Usage/Spend: R150

SIM continues to recharge & spend airtime

Activation R30

Port Bonus R30

Payment Confirmation

On the pay date an agent will receive an SMS to confirm their Port Payment has been paid.

By default, payments go to the Smartload Wallet or the preferred payment method and can be changed on the Awesim App under Profile > Payment Settings > How do I get paid.

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2025-07-14T18:49:12.187+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/f571863c-973a-49ef-bde9-233bc17c6c78" }, { "id": "0610e52a-e4bf-49cf-a54a-22d1fec3879a", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"0610e52a-e4bf-49cf-a54a-22d1fec3879a\",\"title\":\"How am I paid? \",\"content\":\"\nSummary\nAwesim agents earn rewards for successful\nactivations\nthrough various bonuses and competitions.\nHere’s how you get paid:\nPayment Dates:\nAwesim payments are made on three different days each month:\n25th\n:\nAll activations and network drives.\n28th\n:\nNetwork drives.\nMonth End\n: Month-End Bonuses and Port Payments.\nNote: If these dates fall on a weekend, payments are made on the closest business day possible.\nDetails\nPayment Methods\nBy default, agents are paid to their\nSmartload Wallet\nor their\npreferred payment method based on their account type.\nAwesim offers the following payment methods:\nSmartLoad Wallet (default option)\n: Dial *\n130*\n678# to view your balance.\nBank Account\nFNB eWallet\nPrepay Central\nCheck SIM Payment\nIf you are unsure if a SIM will earn you a payment,\nyou can check this on the Awesim App by following\nthe instructions in the\nCheck SIM Payment\ncard.\nSmartLoad\nAll new agents default to the Smartload Wallet,\nwhich is tied to their main cell number with Awesim.\nTo access Smartload: Dial *\n130*\n678# or see detailed instructions\nhere\n.\nBy following these guidelines, you can easily manage\nyour Awesim payments and ensure you get the most\nout of your activations and bonuses.\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"0610e52a-e4bf-49cf-a54a-22d1fec3879a\",\"title\":\"How am I paid? \",\"content\":\"

Summary

Awesim agents earn rewards for successful activations
through various bonuses and competitions.
Here’s how you get paid:

Payment Dates:

Awesim payments are made on three different days each month:

  1. 25th: All activations and network drives.
  2. 28th: Network drives.
  3. Month End: Month-End Bonuses and Port Payments.

Note: If these dates fall on a weekend, payments are made on the closest business day possible.

Details

Payment Methods

By default, agents are paid to their Smartload Wallet or their
preferred payment method based on their account type.

Awesim offers the following payment methods:

  • SmartLoad Wallet (default option): Dial *130*678# to view your balance.
  • Bank Account
  • FNB eWallet
  • Prepay Central

Check SIM Payment

If you are unsure if a SIM will earn you a payment,
you can check this on the Awesim App by following
the instructions in the Check SIM Payment card.

SmartLoad

All new agents default to the Smartload Wallet,
which is tied to their main cell number with Awesim.
To access Smartload: Dial *130*678# or see detailed instructions here.
By following these guidelines, you can easily manage
your Awesim payments and ensure you get the most
out of your activations and bonuses.

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2025-07-14T18:45:52.454+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/0610e52a-e4bf-49cf-a54a-22d1fec3879a" }, { "id": "9b4f423c-68e7-4b2d-80b0-a5aeaa979689", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"9b4f423c-68e7-4b2d-80b0-a5aeaa979689\",\"title\":\"Incentive Payments \",\"content\":\"\nAwesim offers special Network Drives to help agents earn\nextra money on top of their regular activation payments.\nThese drives are time-limited promotions where agents can\nearn additional bonuses by meeting specific recharge criteria\nfor different networks.\nDetails\nHere’s how it works:\nNetwork Drives are special promotions where agents can earn extra\nmoney by meeting specific recharge requirements for certain networks.\nAgents earn the standard R30 for each activation on the 25th of the month,\nplus an additional amount\n(varies per drive)\non the 28th\n(or the closest business day).\nHow to Learn About Drives\n:\nInformation about current Network Drives is available below:\nVoda + R10\nTelkom Winter 50/50\nNetwork Drives only relate to awesim SIMs.\nNetwork Drives will have a limited time in which they run usually 2-3 months.|\nAll Network Drives will be different in when it comes to how much is needed to recharge, which recharge and how long the drive will be valid for.\nAn agent must pay attention to how long the Network Drive is valid for.\nNetwork Drives can be found on the Homepage Dashboard of the Awesim App.\nFor Example:\nLet's take a look at two current examples:\nVoda + R10\nActivation Payment\n: R30 on the 25th\nDrive Bonus\n: Extra R10 on the 28th\nCriteria\n: First recharge of R99 or more by a\nreal customer\nPayment Timing\n: The R10 bonus is paid two months after the first recharge.\nFor example, a SIM that qualifies in March will be paid in May.\nDuration\n: This drive runs from 1 March to 31 August 2024.\nTelkom 50/50\nActivation Payment\n: R30 on the\n25th\nDrive Bonus\n: Extra R20 on the 28th\nCriteria\n: SIM must activate and spend at least R50 in the same month\nReal Customers\n: The SIM must be used by\nreal customers\nwith continuous recharges and usage.\nPayment Breakdown\n:\nR30 activation payment on the 25th of the following month\nExtra R20 paid separately before the end of the following month\nDuration\n:\nThis drive runs from 1 May to 31 July 2024.\nOnly sims that spend R50 between 1 May to 31 July.\nMay qualifiers - get paid before end of June\nJune qualifiers - get paid before end of July\nJuly qualifiers - get paid before end of August\nThe above shows an agent has 26 out of 84 Activations that reached the Telkom 50/50 promotion.\nThe agent was paid R30 for the 84 Activations and an extra R20 for the 26 activations for the Telkom Drive.\n20 x 26 = R520.00\nHow do I get paid for a Network Drive?\nPayments for Network Drives usually occur on the\n27th or 28th of the month\n(or the closest business day possible)\n.\nAgents receive payment notifications via SMS on the payment day,\nwith funds directed to the default Smartload payment or the agent's\nchosen payment method.\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"9b4f423c-68e7-4b2d-80b0-a5aeaa979689\",\"title\":\"Incentive Payments \",\"content\":\"

Awesim offers special Network Drives to help agents earn
extra money on top of their regular activation payments.
These drives are time-limited promotions where agents can
earn additional bonuses by meeting specific recharge criteria
for different networks.

Details

Here’s how it works:

Network Drives are special promotions where agents can earn extra
money by meeting specific recharge requirements for certain networks.
Agents earn the standard R30 for each activation on the 25th of the month,
plus an additional amount (varies per drive) on the 28th (or the closest business day).

How to Learn About Drives:
Information about current Network Drives is available below:

    • Voda + R10
    • Telkom Winter 50/50
  • Network Drives only relate to awesim SIMs.
  • Network Drives will have a limited time in which they run usually 2-3 months.|
  • All Network Drives will be different in when it comes to how much is needed to recharge, which recharge and how long the drive will be valid for.
  • An agent must pay attention to how long the Network Drive is valid for.
  • Network Drives can be found on the Homepage Dashboard of the Awesim App.

For Example:

Let's take a look at two current examples:

Voda + R10

Activation Payment: R30 on the 25th
Drive Bonus: Extra R10 on the 28th
Criteria: First recharge of R99 or more by a real customer
Payment Timing: The R10 bonus is paid two months after the first recharge.
For example, a SIM that qualifies in March will be paid in May.

Duration: This drive runs from 1 March to 31 August 2024.

Telkom 50/50

Activation Payment: R30 on the 25th
Drive Bonus: Extra R20 on the 28th
Criteria: SIM must activate and spend at least R50 in the same month
Real Customers: The SIM must be used by real customers with continuous recharges and usage.
Payment Breakdown:
R30 activation payment on the 25th of the following month
Extra R20 paid separately before the end of the following month

Duration:
This drive runs from 1 May to 31 July 2024.
Only sims that spend R50 between 1 May to 31 July.

  • May qualifiers - get paid before end of June
  • June qualifiers - get paid before end of July
  • July qualifiers - get paid before end of August

The above shows an agent has 26 out of 84 Activations that reached the Telkom 50/50 promotion.

The agent was paid R30 for the 84 Activations and an extra R20 for the 26 activations for the Telkom Drive.

20 x 26 = R520.00

How do I get paid for a Network Drive?

Payments for Network Drives usually occur on the
27th or 28th of the month (or the closest business day possible).
Agents receive payment notifications via SMS on the payment day,
with funds directed to the default Smartload payment or the agent's
chosen payment method.

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2025-07-14T18:41:33.653+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/9b4f423c-68e7-4b2d-80b0-a5aeaa979689" }, { "id": "d8200eb6-f193-4d79-aac8-777246a6a926", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"d8200eb6-f193-4d79-aac8-777246a6a926\",\"title\":\"Exclusions\",\"content\":\"\nSummary\nExclusions are SIMs that are not eligible for payments.\nThese exclusions can occur for several reasons, such as\npayment method issues, data SIM policies, or suspected fraud.\nHere’s a simple guide to understand the different types of exclusions and how they work:\nTypes of Exclusions\nExcluded from\nAll Payments\nExcluded from\n25th Payments\nExcluded While Waiting for Payment Details to be Corrected\nAgents can check their exclusions and the reasons in the Awesim app\nunder Payments > Exclusions or contact Awesim on WhatsApp\nat 060 070 2666 for more information.\nDetails\nExcluded from All Payments\nIf a SIM is excluded from all payments, the agent will not\nreceive any payments for that SIM on the 25th, at\nMonth-End\n,\nduring\nNetwork Drives\n, or for\nPorts\n.\nReasons:\nSuspected Fraud:\nAwesim suspects that the agent is activating SIMs without selling them to real customers.\nBlocked RICA Phone Number:\nThe agent’s phone number is blocked due to fraudulent activities.\nNot Real Customer:\nSIMs that are activated but never used by real customers.\nSmartCall Rules:\nSIMs used for international calls or USSD games.\nUnstuck SIM Cards:\nSIMs issued to specific dealers who get paid directly.\nLet's take a look at an example:\nSuspected Fraud:\nThe agent activates multiple SIMs but does not sell\nthem to\nREAL\ncustomers. Awesim blocks all future payments\nto the agent for those SIMs.\nEXCLUSION NAME\nEXCLUSION REASON\nEXAMPLE\nAwesim Suspected Fraudulent Agent\nThe agent continually commits fraud with their SIMs on a certain network or all networks.\nResult:\nThe agent will receive no further payments or stock on that network.\nThe agent takes all the Cell C Sims for 2 months loads R30 to activate the sim but doesn't sell them to Real Customers.\nAwesim blocks the agent from current and future payments on Cell C (25th, Month-End, Network Drives, Ports) .\nRICA Agent phone number is blocked\nIf we have picked up that an agent phone number has committed fraud we will block that number from being paid.\nResult:\nThe agent will receive no further payments.\nThe agent bulk Pre-RICAs the sim cards and does not RICA the SIMS for Real Customers.\nAwesim blocks the agent from receiving all current and future payments (25th, Month-End, Network Drives, Ports)\nNot Real Customer - SIM level\nA SIM is only loading enough money to activate & never becomes a\nREAL Customer\n- SIM continues to recharge & spend.\nResult:\nThe SIM is then excluded and the agent will not be paid.\nThe agent takes one of the SIMS, Pre-RICA's it with fake customer details, adds R30 to the SIM, uses the airtime and never recharges or gives it to a Real Customer.\nThe agent will not be paid for the SIM (25th, Month-End, Network Drives, Ports).\nExcluded due to international dialling/USSD games\nSIM airtime was spent on international calling or USSD games. No activation payment.\nResult:\nThe agent will not receive payment for that SIM.\nThe agent sells a SIM card to a customer.\nA customer loads R30, but the customer uses it on international calling or on USSD or WASP services.\nThe agent will not be paid for the SIM (25th, Month-End, Network Drives, Ports)\nUnstuck Sim Cards\nThese are SIMS that are issued to specific dealers who get paid directly.\nResult:\nAgent will not be paid for the SIM, it is\nexcluded\n.\nThe agent was given a SIM card from a Dealer.\nThe SIM is eligible for activation, but because it is a SIM issued specifically to the Dealer - the agent will not be paid for the activation.\nTo get in contact with Awesim, the agent can contact\nAwesim\non\nWhatsApp\non:\n060 070 2666\n.\nTo get in contact with\nSmartCall\n(SmartLoad)\non:\n011 507 4789.\nExcluded from 25th Payments\nSome SIMs are excluded from the 25th payments but\ncan still qualify for\nMonth-End Bonuses\n.\nReason:\nData SIMs:\nThese come preloaded with data bundles.\nAgents sell these SIMs for\nCASH\nand earn immediately,\nso they\nDO\nNOT\nreceive the 25th payment but will get\nmonth-end bonuses if the SIMs are used by\nREAL\ncustomers.\nLet's take a look at an example:\nData SIMs:\nOn the Payments Dashboard below, we can see:\nX 12 Paid Activations\nX 11 Exclusions\nSelect\n\\\"Exclusions\\\"\nto view detail\nOn the Exclusions Dashboard below, we can see:\nX 11 Exclusions\nReason: DATA SIMS\nWhile these Data SIMs are excluded from the 25th Payment\n(as the agent sold them for CASH), we can see on the Month-End\ntab under\n\\\"Paid Activations\\\"\nbelow - The Month-End Bonus is the:\nTotal Amount of Activations (12)\n+\nTotal Amount of Data SIMs (11)\n= 23 SIMs.\nThe agent has been paid a Bonus for his Data SIMs.\nEXCLUSION NAME\nEXCLUSION REASON\nEXAMPLE\nData Starters\n(All Networks)\nData SIMS come loaded with free Data by Awesim & should be sold for CASH by the agent.\nThese sim cards will only count towards Month End Bonuses.\nResult:\nAny Data SIMs that are eligible for activations will be excluded from payment as agent has already been paid for the amount of the pre-loaded data. Agent will be paid on Month-End Bonuses.\nThe agent receives 11 x Voda Social Sims. Each is loaded with 5G.\nThe agent RICA's & sells each SIM for CASH to a REAL Customer for R80.\nThe customers' use the sims enough to be considered an activation.\nThe agent will not be paid on the 25th, as they sold these SIMS for CASH.\nThe agent is paid a Month-End Bonus.\nTo get in contact with Awesim, the agent can contact\nAwesim\non\nWhatsApp\non:\n060 070 2666\n.\nTo get in contact with\nSmartCall\n(Smartload)\non:\n011 507 4789.\nExcluded While Waiting for Payment Details to be Corrected\nThese exclusions are\ntemporary\nand can be resolved by\nupdating payment details or correcting issues.\nReasons:\nInactive Smartload Account:\nThe agent hasn’t used their SmartLoad account for a long time.\nBlocked Smartload Account:\nDue to multiple incorrect PIN attempts or suspected fraudulent activity.\nIncomplete Documentation:\nThe agent needs to submit verification documents.\nLet's take a look at an example:\nInactive Account:\nThe agent hasn’t used Smartload for six months. They need to reactivate their account to receive payments.\nEXCLUSION\nEXCLUSION REASON\nEXAMPLE\nAgent/Dealer blocked from transacting on Smartload\nThe agent or dealer's Smartload account has been blocked for some reason (i.e incorrect password entered etc).\nOnce the\nSmartload\naccount is unblocked with\nSmartcall\nwe\ncan pay agent.\nResult:\nCurrent and future Payments are blocked until resolved.\nThe agent forgets the smartload pin.\nThe agent tried 3 times to enter it and now blocks the account.\nAwesim is unable to pay the money due to the agent into a blocked Smartload account.\nThe agent needs to call\nSmartload\non\n011 507 4789\nto get themselves unblocked.\nOnce the agent has unblocked his account with Smartload they can contact\nAwesim\non\nWhatsApp\non\n060 070 2666\n.\nThe agent will then be paid by Awesim.\nInactive in the last 6 months\nSmartload account is inactive.\nIf Agent can prove the Smartload account is active again, Awesim can pay them.\nResult:\nCurrent and future Payments are blocked until resolved.\nThe agent has not been on Smartload or SmartRica for 6 months.\nThe agent has not cashed out in 6 months and not bought any airtime, bundles or data.\nSmartload blocked the account due to inactivity.\nAwesim is unable to pay money into a blocked Smartload account.\nThe agent needs to call\nSmartload\non\n011 507 4789\nto get the account unblocked.\nOnce the agent has unblocked his account with Smartload they can contact\nAwesim\non\nWhatsApp\non\n060 070 2666\n.\nThe agent will then be paid by Awesim.\nSmartRICA Account to be confirmed\nAgent or Dealer needs to confirm the Smartload account with Smartcall as there is an issue.\nIssues due to:\nInvalid pin used 3 times\nnot active on smartload for the past 3 months\nnot active on smartrica for the past 3 months\nSmartcall suspects fraudulent activities\nPassport has expired.\nOnce issue is resolved, Awesim can pay the agent.\nResult:\nCurrent and future Payments are blocked until resolved.\nThe agents account has been suspected of fraud on his smartload account.\nSmartload blocks the account.\nAwesim is unable to pay into a blocked account.\nThe agent needs to call Smartload on 011 507 4789 to unblock the account.\nOnce the agent has unblocked his account with Smartload they can contact\nAwesim\non\nWhatsApp\non\n060 070 2666\n.\nThe agent will then be paid by Awesim.\nBlock Payment - New customer without Documentation\nThe agent has been created with Agent Onboarding & still needs to submit their verification documents.\nOnce verification documents have been submitted & verified Awesim can pay the agent.\nResult:\nCurrent and future Payments are blocked until resolved.\nThe agent has onboarded as an agent.\nThe agent has forgotten to send through the proof of address to the Sales Rep or to the Call Centre.\nAwesim is unable to pay the agent until the documents are sent through.\nThe agent contacts\nAwesim\non\nWhatsapp\non\n060 070 2666,\nsend the documents through and explains this has blocked the payment.\nAwesim will resolve the issue on their side and pay the agent.\nTo get in contact with Awesim, the agent can contact\nAwesim\non\nWhatsApp\non:\n060 070 2666\n.\nTo get in contact with\nSmartcall\n(Smartload)\non:\n011 507 4789.\nNeed Help?\nIf you have any questions or need assistance with exclusions, contact:\nAwesim\non\nWhatsApp:\n060 070 2666\nSmartLoad\n(Smartcall) on\n:\n011 507 4789\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"d8200eb6-f193-4d79-aac8-777246a6a926\",\"title\":\"Exclusions\",\"content\":\"

Summary

Exclusions are SIMs that are not eligible for payments.
These exclusions can occur for several reasons, such as
payment method issues, data SIM policies, or suspected fraud.

Here’s a simple guide to understand the different types of exclusions and how they work:

Types of Exclusions

  1. Excluded from All Payments
  2. Excluded from 25th Payments
  3. Excluded While Waiting for Payment Details to be Corrected

Agents can check their exclusions and the reasons in the Awesim app
under Payments > Exclusions or contact Awesim on WhatsApp
at 060 070 2666 for more information.

Details

Excluded from All Payments

If a SIM is excluded from all payments, the agent will not
receive any payments for that SIM on the 25th, at Month-End,
during Network Drives, or for Ports.

Reasons:

  • Suspected Fraud: Awesim suspects that the agent is activating SIMs without selling them to real customers.
  • Blocked RICA Phone Number: The agent’s phone number is blocked due to fraudulent activities.
  • Not Real Customer: SIMs that are activated but never used by real customers.
  • SmartCall Rules: SIMs used for international calls or USSD games.
  • Unstuck SIM Cards: SIMs issued to specific dealers who get paid directly.

Let's take a look at an example:

Suspected Fraud:

The agent activates multiple SIMs but does not sell
them to REAL customers. Awesim blocks all future payments
to the agent for those SIMs.

EXCLUSION NAME

EXCLUSION REASON

EXAMPLE

Awesim Suspected Fraudulent Agent

The agent continually commits fraud with their SIMs on a certain network or all networks.

Result: The agent will receive no further payments or stock on that network.

  1. The agent takes all the Cell C Sims for 2 months loads R30 to activate the sim but doesn't sell them to Real Customers.
  2. Awesim blocks the agent from current and future payments on Cell C (25th, Month-End, Network Drives, Ports) .

RICA Agent phone number is blocked

If we have picked up that an agent phone number has committed fraud we will block that number from being paid.

Result: The agent will receive no further payments.

  1. The agent bulk Pre-RICAs the sim cards and does not RICA the SIMS for Real Customers.
  2. Awesim blocks the agent from receiving all current and future payments (25th, Month-End, Network Drives, Ports)

Not Real Customer - SIM level

A SIM is only loading enough money to activate & never becomes a REAL Customer - SIM continues to recharge & spend.

Result: The SIM is then excluded and the agent will not be paid.

  1. The agent takes one of the SIMS, Pre-RICA's it with fake customer details, adds R30 to the SIM, uses the airtime and never recharges or gives it to a Real Customer.
  2. The agent will not be paid for the SIM (25th, Month-End, Network Drives, Ports).

Excluded due to international dialling/USSD games

SIM airtime was spent on international calling or USSD games. No activation payment.

Result: The agent will not receive payment for that SIM.

  1. The agent sells a SIM card to a customer.
  2. A customer loads R30, but the customer uses it on international calling or on USSD or WASP services.
  3. The agent will not be paid for the SIM (25th, Month-End, Network Drives, Ports)

Unstuck Sim Cards

These are SIMS that are issued to specific dealers who get paid directly.

Result: Agent will not be paid for the SIM, it is excluded.

  1. The agent was given a SIM card from a Dealer.
  2. The SIM is eligible for activation, but because it is a SIM issued specifically to the Dealer - the agent will not be paid for the activation.

To get in contact with Awesim, the agent can contact Awesim on WhatsApp on: 060 070 2666.

To get in contact with SmartCall (SmartLoad) on: 011 507 4789.

Excluded from 25th Payments

Some SIMs are excluded from the 25th payments but
can still qualify for Month-End Bonuses.

Reason:

Data SIMs: These come preloaded with data bundles.

Agents sell these SIMs for CASH and earn immediately,
so they DO NOT receive the 25th payment but will get
month-end bonuses if the SIMs are used by REAL customers.

Let's take a look at an example:

Data SIMs:

  1. On the Payments Dashboard below, we can see:
    • X 12 Paid Activations
    • X 11 Exclusions
  2. Select \\\"Exclusions\\\" to view detail

  1. On the Exclusions Dashboard below, we can see:
    • X 11 Exclusions

Reason: DATA SIMS

While these Data SIMs are excluded from the 25th Payment
(as the agent sold them for CASH), we can see on the Month-End
tab under \\\"Paid Activations\\\" below - The Month-End Bonus is the:

Total Amount of Activations (12) + Total Amount of Data SIMs (11) = 23 SIMs.

  • The agent has been paid a Bonus for his Data SIMs.

EXCLUSION NAME

EXCLUSION REASON

EXAMPLE

Data Starters

(All Networks)

  • Data SIMS come loaded with free Data by Awesim & should be sold for CASH by the agent.
  • These sim cards will only count towards Month End Bonuses.

Result: Any Data SIMs that are eligible for activations will be excluded from payment as agent has already been paid for the amount of the pre-loaded data. Agent will be paid on Month-End Bonuses.

  1. The agent receives 11 x Voda Social Sims. Each is loaded with 5G.
  2. The agent RICA's & sells each SIM for CASH to a REAL Customer for R80.
  3. The customers' use the sims enough to be considered an activation.
  4. The agent will not be paid on the 25th, as they sold these SIMS for CASH.
  5. The agent is paid a Month-End Bonus.

To get in contact with Awesim, the agent can contact Awesim on WhatsApp on: 060 070 2666.

To get in contact with SmartCall (Smartload) on: 011 507 4789.

Excluded While Waiting for Payment Details to be Corrected

These exclusions are temporary and can be resolved by
updating payment details or correcting issues.

Reasons:

  • Inactive Smartload Account: The agent hasn’t used their SmartLoad account for a long time.
  • Blocked Smartload Account: Due to multiple incorrect PIN attempts or suspected fraudulent activity.
  • Incomplete Documentation: The agent needs to submit verification documents.

Let's take a look at an example:

Inactive Account:

  • The agent hasn’t used Smartload for six months. They need to reactivate their account to receive payments.

EXCLUSION

EXCLUSION REASON

EXAMPLE

Agent/Dealer blocked from transacting on Smartload

  • The agent or dealer's Smartload account has been blocked for some reason (i.e incorrect password entered etc).
  • Once the Smartload account is unblocked with Smartcall we can pay agent.

Result: Current and future Payments are blocked until resolved.

  1. The agent forgets the smartload pin.
  2. The agent tried 3 times to enter it and now blocks the account.
  3. Awesim is unable to pay the money due to the agent into a blocked Smartload account.
  4. The agent needs to call Smartload on 011 507 4789 to get themselves unblocked.
  5. Once the agent has unblocked his account with Smartload they can contact Awesim on WhatsApp on 060 070 2666.
  6. The agent will then be paid by Awesim.

Inactive in the last 6 months

  • Smartload account is inactive.
  • If Agent can prove the Smartload account is active again, Awesim can pay them.

Result: Current and future Payments are blocked until resolved.

  1. The agent has not been on Smartload or SmartRica for 6 months.
  2. The agent has not cashed out in 6 months and not bought any airtime, bundles or data.
  3. Smartload blocked the account due to inactivity.
  4. Awesim is unable to pay money into a blocked Smartload account.
  5. The agent needs to call Smartload on 011 507 4789 to get the account unblocked.
  6. Once the agent has unblocked his account with Smartload they can contact Awesim on WhatsApp on 060 070 2666.
  7. The agent will then be paid by Awesim.

SmartRICA Account to be confirmed

Agent or Dealer needs to confirm the Smartload account with Smartcall as there is an issue.

Issues due to:

  • Invalid pin used 3 times
  • not active on smartload for the past 3 months
  • not active on smartrica for the past 3 months
  • Smartcall suspects fraudulent activities
  • Passport has expired.

Once issue is resolved, Awesim can pay the agent.

Result: Current and future Payments are blocked until resolved.

  1. The agents account has been suspected of fraud on his smartload account.
  2. Smartload blocks the account.
  3. Awesim is unable to pay into a blocked account.
  4. The agent needs to call Smartload on 011 507 4789 to unblock the account.
  5. Once the agent has unblocked his account with Smartload they can contact Awesim on WhatsApp on 060 070 2666.
  6. The agent will then be paid by Awesim.

Block Payment - New customer without Documentation

  • The agent has been created with Agent Onboarding & still needs to submit their verification documents.
  • Once verification documents have been submitted & verified Awesim can pay the agent.

Result: Current and future Payments are blocked until resolved.

  1. The agent has onboarded as an agent.
  2. The agent has forgotten to send through the proof of address to the Sales Rep or to the Call Centre.
  3. Awesim is unable to pay the agent until the documents are sent through.
  4. The agent contacts Awesim on Whatsapp on 060 070 2666, send the documents through and explains this has blocked the payment.
  5. Awesim will resolve the issue on their side and pay the agent.

To get in contact with Awesim, the agent can contact Awesim on WhatsApp on: 060 070 2666.

To get in contact with Smartcall (Smartload) on: 011 507 4789.

Need Help?

If you have any questions or need assistance with exclusions, contact:

  • Awesim on WhatsApp: 060 070 2666
  • SmartLoad (Smartcall) on: 011 507 4789

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2025-07-14T18:28:14.355+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/d8200eb6-f193-4d79-aac8-777246a6a926" }, { "id": "85663551-4ee7-45ed-9755-f827058d8e67", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"85663551-4ee7-45ed-9755-f827058d8e67\",\"title\":\"What is Rewind? \",\"content\":\"\nSummary\nAWESIM sims never expire.\nRewind is a promotion for AWESIM agents.\nIt applies to any sims that are more than one year old.\nThese sims, when they qualify for their R30 Activation payment (on the 25th), earn an extra R10.\nAgents need to opt-in to the promotion, but only once.\nThey do this on our USSD (*130*43203#).\nDetails\nAWESIM agents can opt-in to the Rewind promotion by:\nDialing *130*43203#,\nthen selecting\nPayments\n,\nthen\nCheck Sim Payment\n,\nthen\nRegister for Rewind\n.\nAgents only need to register for Rewind\nonce\n.\nRewind payment example:\nJohn has registered for the Rewind promotion.\nA sim that was invoiced to him over a year ago, activates in June.\nJohn will be paid R30 for its activation on the 25th of July. He will also be paid R10 because he registered for Rewind.\nHis total payment on the 25th will be R30 + R10 = R40.\nAgents can view their Rewind payment(s) on the AWESIM App.\nThis is an example of how it would look:\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"85663551-4ee7-45ed-9755-f827058d8e67\",\"title\":\"What is Rewind? \",\"content\":\"

Summary

AWESIM sims never expire.
Rewind is a promotion for AWESIM agents.
It applies to any sims that are more than one year old.
These sims, when they qualify for their R30 Activation payment (on the 25th), earn an extra R10.
Agents need to opt-in to the promotion, but only once.
They do this on our USSD (*130*43203#).

Details

AWESIM agents can opt-in to the Rewind promotion by:
Dialing *130*43203#,
then selecting Payments,
then Check Sim Payment,
then Register for Rewind.

Agents only need to register for Rewind once.

Rewind payment example:
John has registered for the Rewind promotion.
A sim that was invoiced to him over a year ago, activates in June.
John will be paid R30 for its activation on the 25th of July. He will also be paid R10 because he registered for Rewind.
His total payment on the 25th will be R30 + R10 = R40.

Agents can view their Rewind payment(s) on the AWESIM App.
This is an example of how it would look:

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2025-07-14T18:24:45.815+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/85663551-4ee7-45ed-9755-f827058d8e67" }, { "id": "de3e91f2-e5f1-4660-8d52-748766e4742c", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"de3e91f2-e5f1-4660-8d52-748766e4742c\",\"title\":\"What is 25th Payment?\",\"content\":\"\nActivation Payment\nAt Awesim agents are paid R30 per\nactivation\non the 25th of every month.\nAgents are paid for Activations from the month before (eg. Activations in June, are paid in July).\nAwesim does not pay for\n1st Recharges\nAn activation can occur in 1 - 4 months, depending on customer recharges and usage.\nWhat is the Payments Calculator?\nThe Payments Calculator helps you estimate your potential earnings for your\n25th Payment\n.\nThis payment is based on the number of SIM cards you activated in the\nprevious month.\nTap here to use the\npayment calculator:\nhttps://awesim.co.za/Payments\nHow to Check Your Activations?\nYou can check your activations directly on the\nAwesim app\n.\nAlternatively, you can use\nUSSD\nby dialing *\n130*\n43203#\nand selecting Option 1\nOn the payment date, agents receive an SMS confirming their 25th payment.\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"de3e91f2-e5f1-4660-8d52-748766e4742c\",\"title\":\"What is 25th Payment?\",\"content\":\"

Activation Payment

  • At Awesim agents are paid R30 per activation on the 25th of every month.
  • Agents are paid for Activations from the month before (eg. Activations in June, are paid in July).
  • Awesim does not pay for 1st Recharges
  • An activation can occur in 1 - 4 months, depending on customer recharges and usage.

What is the Payments Calculator?

  • The Payments Calculator helps you estimate your potential earnings for your 25th Payment.
  • This payment is based on the number of SIM cards you activated in the previous month.
  • Tap here to use the payment calculator: https://awesim.co.za/Payments

How to Check Your Activations?    

  • You can check your activations directly on the Awesim app.   
  • Alternatively, you can use USSD by dialing *130*43203# and selecting Option 1
  • On the payment date, agents receive an SMS confirming their 25th payment.

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2025-07-14T18:15:56.499+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/de3e91f2-e5f1-4660-8d52-748766e4742c" }, { "id": "6e5e5647-23e5-4306-a184-eb33810bc8af", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"6e5e5647-23e5-4306-a184-eb33810bc8af\",\"title\":\"Payment Dates \",\"content\":\"\nWe pay the best.\nOn time.\nEvery month.\nWe make payments as soon as we can on PAY DAYS.\nIt takes time for us to pay\nas much as we do;\nto as many agents as we do;\nin all the ways we do.\nPayments will always be processed and outbound SMSes sent by 5:00 PM* on the scheduled dates:\n💸 Activation \\\"25th\\\" Payments: processed on the\n25th of every month\n. If the 25th falls on a weekend or Public Holiday, payment will be made on the nearest business day.\n💸 Month-end Bonus Payments: 30th/31st of every month\n*\nWe use PayAccSys for bank payments, which will reflect the same day just after 6pm, regardless of the bank.\nRemember to check your payment method:\nSmartload Wallet?\nBank Account?\nFNB eWallet Card?\nPayCentral Card?\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"6e5e5647-23e5-4306-a184-eb33810bc8af\",\"title\":\"Payment Dates \",\"content\":\"

We pay the best.
On time.
Every month.


We make payments as soon as we can on PAY DAYS.

It takes time for us to pay

  • as much as we do;
  • to as many agents as we do;
  • in all the ways we do.

Payments will always be processed and outbound SMSes sent by 5:00 PM* on the scheduled dates:

💸 Activation \\\"25th\\\" Payments: processed on the 25th of every month. If the 25th falls on a weekend or Public Holiday, payment will be made on the nearest business day.

💸 Month-end Bonus Payments: 30th/31st of every month

*We use PayAccSys for bank payments, which will reflect the same day just after 6pm, regardless of the bank.


Remember to check your payment method:

  • Smartload Wallet?
  • Bank Account?
  • FNB eWallet Card?
  • PayCentral Card?

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [ { "value": "payment date", "id": "1b2050e1-43e0-4663-bfd3-1e45ea0d7b53", "categoryId": "e0751ef6-b3fd-4bd0-babb-3bc7619c24e1", "categoryName": "Support Tags" } ], "last_modified": "2025-07-14T18:10:19.956+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/6e5e5647-23e5-4306-a184-eb33810bc8af" }, { "id": "c6066151-4c8e-40df-9135-6023707f3e62", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"c6066151-4c8e-40df-9135-6023707f3e62\",\"title\":\"What is an Activation? \",\"content\":\"\nWhat is an Activation?\nAn activation is a SIM that is registered to the network (assigned a MSISDN) and;\nrecharges with the required amount of airtime by a\nREAL customer\nwithin the specified number of months.\nThe recharge amount needed varies by network but is typically\naround R30.\nAt Awesim we pay R30 per successful activation on the\n25th of every month\n.\nNetwork Specific Activation Requirements:\nThe SIM card must be activated within a certain period from the date\nthe SIM Connects: receives its phone number (MSISDN).\nTime allowed to use the airtime:\n3 calendar months\nLet's take a look at an example:\nMonth 1\nMonth 2\nMonth 3\nTotal\nMonth 4\nRecharge R10\n1st Recharge\nRecharge R15\nRecharge R5\nTotal Recharged: R30\nUsage/Spend: R5\nUsage/Spend: R10\nUsage/Spend: R15\nTotal Used: R30\nSIM continues to recharge & use airtime/data\nSIM ACTIVATED\nACTIVATION PAID 25TH of MONTH 4\nBy the end of\nMonth 3\n, the SIM has\nrecharged and used R30 by a REAL Customer\n, and is a successful activation,\ntherefore an activation payment of R30 is made on the 25th of Month 4.\nImportant Reminders:\nIt can take time for a SIM to activate as the customer needs to recharge enough airtime/data\nand\nuse it all.\nThis can take a few months depending on how much the customer uses the SIM.\nA SIM can activate in 1 month OR 2 months OR 3 months OR 4 months etc.\nIt just depends how quickly the customer RECHARGES and USES the airtime/data.\nFor more information, please refer to the company's\nTerms and Conditions\n, specifically the \\\"\nActivation rules as per the respective networks (subject to change at any time by the network)\n\\\" section.\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"c6066151-4c8e-40df-9135-6023707f3e62\",\"title\":\"What is an Activation? \",\"content\":\"

What is an Activation?

  • An activation is a SIM that is registered to the network (assigned a MSISDN) and;
  • recharges with the required amount of airtime by a REAL customer within the specified number of months.
  • The recharge amount needed varies by network but is typically around R30.
  • At Awesim we pay R30 per successful activation on the 25th of every month.

Network Specific Activation Requirements:

  • The SIM card must be activated within a certain period from the date
  • the SIM Connects: receives its phone number (MSISDN).
  • Time allowed to use the airtime: 3 calendar months

Let's take a look at an example:

Month 1

Month 2

Month 3

Total

Month 4

Recharge R10
1st Recharge

Recharge R15

Recharge R5

Total Recharged: R30

Usage/Spend: R5

Usage/Spend: R10

Usage/Spend: R15

Total Used: R30

SIM continues to recharge & use airtime/data

SIM ACTIVATED

ACTIVATION PAID 25TH of MONTH 4

By the end of Month 3, the SIM has recharged and used R30 by a REAL Customer, and is a successful activation,
therefore an activation payment of R30 is made on the 25th of Month 4.



Important Reminders:

  • It can take time for a SIM to activate as the customer needs to recharge enough airtime/data and use it all.
  • This can take a few months depending on how much the customer uses the SIM.
  • A SIM can activate in 1 month OR 2 months OR 3 months OR 4 months etc.
  • It just depends how quickly the customer RECHARGES and USES the airtime/data.


For more information, please refer to the company's Terms and Conditions, specifically the \\\"Activation rules as per the respective networks (subject to change at any time by the network)\\\" section.

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2025-07-14T17:42:48.844+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/c6066151-4c8e-40df-9135-6023707f3e62" }, { "id": "9095aef7-b90e-44f4-a0dc-30c61dfb7f71", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"9095aef7-b90e-44f4-a0dc-30c61dfb7f71\",\"title\":\"What is a 1st Recharge? \",\"content\":\"\nWhat is a 1st Recharge?\nA 1st Recharge is the\nfirst time a customer loads\nairtime/data to a SIM after it has been RICA'd and connected.\nAwesim\ndoes not\npay for a 1st Recharge.\nWe pay for SIMs that have successfully activated\nand\nare used by REAL customers that continue to recharge and use the SIM afterwards. Awesim only pays activations and\nNOT 1st Recharges.\nA 1st recharge does not guarantee an activation.\nNot all 1st recharges become activations in the same month or months after the 1st recharge.\nLet's take a look at an example:\nAn agent sells a SIM to a customer and suggests the best airtime/data deals.\nThe customer buys R10 airtime with the SIM.\nAfter the SIM is RICA'd, the agent loads the airtime onto the customer’s phone.\nThe R10 in the above case is the 1st Recharge\n.\nA SIM can activate in 1 month/2 months/3 months or 4 months.\nMonth 1\nMonth 2\nMonth 3\nTotal\nMonth 4\nRecharge R10\n1st Recharge\nRecharge R15\nRecharge R5\nTotal Recharged: R30\nUsage/Spend: R5\nUsage/Spend: R10\nUsage/Spend: R15\nTotal Used: R30\nSIM continues to recharge & use airtime/data\nSIM ACTIVATED\nACTIVATION PAID 25TH of MONTH 4\nBy the end of\nMonth 3\n, the SIM has\nrecharged and used R30 by a REAL Customer\n, and is a successful activation,\ntherefore an activation payment of R30 is made on the 25th of Month 4.\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"9095aef7-b90e-44f4-a0dc-30c61dfb7f71\",\"title\":\"What is a 1st Recharge? \",\"content\":\"

What is a 1st Recharge?

  • A 1st Recharge is the first time a customer loads airtime/data to a SIM after it has been RICA'd and connected.
  • Awesim does not pay for a 1st Recharge.
  • We pay for SIMs that have successfully activated and are used by REAL customers that continue to recharge and use the SIM afterwards. Awesim only pays activations and NOT 1st Recharges.
  • A 1st recharge does not guarantee an activation.
  • Not all 1st recharges become activations in the same month or months after the 1st recharge.


Let's take a look at an example:

An agent sells a SIM to a customer and suggests the best airtime/data deals.
The customer buys R10 airtime with the SIM.
After the SIM is RICA'd, the agent loads the airtime onto the customer’s phone.

The R10 in the above case is the 1st Recharge.

A SIM can activate in 1 month/2 months/3 months or 4 months.

Month 1

Month 2

Month 3

Total

Month 4

Recharge R10
1st Recharge

Recharge R15

Recharge R5

Total Recharged: R30

Usage/Spend: R5

Usage/Spend: R10

Usage/Spend: R15

Total Used: R30

SIM continues to recharge & use airtime/data

SIM ACTIVATED

ACTIVATION PAID 25TH of MONTH 4

By the end of Month 3, the SIM has recharged and used R30 by a REAL Customer, and is a successful activation,
therefore an activation payment of R30 is made on the 25th of Month 4.



\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2025-07-14T11:42:04.229+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/9095aef7-b90e-44f4-a0dc-30c61dfb7f71" }, { "id": "527ab849-d75f-41c7-a400-5812442bc5f1", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"527ab849-d75f-41c7-a400-5812442bc5f1\",\"title\":\"How do I order SIM cards from Awesim?\",\"content\":\"\nHow many SIMs can I order?\nThe number of SIMs you can order is based on your\nallowed balance\n.\nThis balance is directly tied to your performance as an agent.\nThe more SIMs you RICA and sell to REAL customers, and the more those customers recharge and use data or airtime (leading to activations), the more stock you will be allowed to order.\nHow do I order?\nOnce you are\nregistered and have an Awesim account\n, you have several easy ways to order:\nAwesim App:\nOrder directly through the app.\nDownload the Awesim app: Android and Huawei Links\nUSSD:\nDial *\n130*43203#\nand follow the prompts.\nSMS:\nText \\\"Call\\\" to\n43203\n, and we'll call you back.\nWhatsApp:\nMessage us at\n0600702666\n.\nDirect Call:\nCall us at\n0112681348\n.\nDo I get free shipping?\nYes, we offer free shipping on your SIM card orders. To qualify for free shipping, your order must be for\n30 or more SIMs\n.\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"527ab849-d75f-41c7-a400-5812442bc5f1\",\"title\":\"How do I order SIM cards from Awesim?\",\"content\":\"

How many SIMs can I order?

  • The number of SIMs you can order is based on your allowed balance.
  • This balance is directly tied to your performance as an agent.
  • The more SIMs you RICA and sell to REAL customers, and the more those customers recharge and use data or airtime (leading to activations), the more stock you will be allowed to order.

How do I order?

Once you are registered and have an Awesim account, you have several easy ways to order:

  • Awesim App: Order directly through the app. Download the Awesim app: Android and Huawei Links
  • USSD: Dial *130*43203# and follow the prompts.
  • SMS: Text \\\"Call\\\" to 43203, and we'll call you back.
  • WhatsApp: Message us at 0600702666.
  • Direct Call: Call us at 0112681348.

Do I get free shipping?

Yes, we offer free shipping on your SIM card orders. To qualify for free shipping, your order must be for 30 or more SIMs.


\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2025-07-14T09:15:45.115+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/527ab849-d75f-41c7-a400-5812442bc5f1" }, { "id": "9ea5ea6c-ac86-457b-b244-1ebbfd7137c6", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"9ea5ea6c-ac86-457b-b244-1ebbfd7137c6\",\"title\":\"How do I get my SIM cards?\",\"content\":\"\nFree SIM cards, delivered to your door.\nYour order will be delivered by one of two methods:\nRAM Couriers\nor\nLocal Sales Representative\nassigned to your area.\n1. RAM Couriers\nHow long will it take for my SIM cards to be delivered?\nOnce you've successfully placed your order,\nyou can expect your SIM cards to arrive within\n3 to 5 working days\nMonday to Friday, 8 a.m. to 5 p.m.\nOur courier, RAM,\ndoes not\ndeliver on weekends or Public Holidays.\nHow will I know when my order is arriving?\nYou will receive a SMS from our courier, RAM, with a Secure Link, in order to Track your Parcel.\nThe SMS will be sent to the Main Telephone number on your Agent Code.\nRAM will also call you, so please be sure to answer calls from private, unknown, or 087 numbers.\nImportant Delivery Instructions and Warnings:\nKeep your delivery address up to date\nDo not sign for or take delivery of stock that is not yours. Only accept stock that is yours.\nDo not let anyone swap or take your stock\nWhat should I do if my stock is lost or damaged?\nIt's important to report any lost, stolen, or damaged stock immediately.\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"9ea5ea6c-ac86-457b-b244-1ebbfd7137c6\",\"title\":\"How do I get my SIM cards?\",\"content\":\"

Free SIM cards, delivered to your door.
Your order will be delivered by one of two methods:

  1. RAM Couriers or
  2. Local Sales Representative assigned to your area.

1. RAM Couriers

How long will it take for my SIM cards to be delivered?

  • Once you've successfully placed your order,
  • you can expect your SIM cards to arrive within 3 to 5 working days
  • Monday to Friday, 8 a.m. to 5 p.m.
  • Our courier, RAM, does not deliver on weekends or Public Holidays.

How will I know when my order is arriving?

  • You will receive a SMS from our courier, RAM, with a Secure Link, in order to Track your Parcel.
  • The SMS will be sent to the Main Telephone number on your Agent Code.
  • RAM will also call you, so please be sure to answer calls from private, unknown, or 087 numbers.



Important Delivery Instructions and Warnings:    

  • Keep your delivery address up to date
  • Do not sign for or take delivery of stock that is not yours. Only accept stock that is yours.
  • Do not let anyone swap or take your stock


What should I do if my stock is lost or damaged?

  • It's important to report any lost, stolen, or damaged stock immediately.


\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2025-07-14T08:04:41.795+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/9ea5ea6c-ac86-457b-b244-1ebbfd7137c6" }, { "id": "a956a926-e54b-427a-bc0a-316fb7718bb4", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"a956a926-e54b-427a-bc0a-316fb7718bb4\",\"title\":\"Awesim - Our Story \",\"content\":\"\nWelcome to Awesim!\nFounded in late 2010 in an old house in Joburg with no agents on our books, Awesim started small. A handful of us offloaded SIM cards, shipped parcels and created agents. As the team grew, we built systems from scratch and moved to larger offices in 2013.\nNow with more than 80 staff, Awesim remains a family-oriented company, offering anybody an opportunity to earn through hard work. Committed to our purpose of doing the best for our agents and staff, our daily goal is to understand how we can make our agents’ lives better.\nWe prioritise our agents and understand that their hard work, along with our support, is how we grow - together. Transparency is key and feedback is actively welcomed.\nWe believe in continuous improvement; harbouring dreams to benefit both staff and agents and inviting others to join us on this collective path to success.\nWith\nover 20,000 agents nationwide\n, Awesim is proud to distribute SIMs for all Mobile Network Operators.\nJoin Us!\nFor more info visit:\nHome page - Awesim\nTerms & Conditions\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"a956a926-e54b-427a-bc0a-316fb7718bb4\",\"title\":\"Awesim - Our Story \",\"content\":\"


Welcome to Awesim!

Founded in late 2010 in an old house in Joburg with no agents on our books, Awesim started small. A handful of us offloaded SIM cards, shipped parcels and created agents. As the team grew, we built systems from scratch and moved to larger offices in 2013.

Now with more than 80 staff, Awesim remains a family-oriented company, offering anybody an opportunity to earn through hard work. Committed to our purpose of doing the best for our agents and staff, our daily goal is to understand how we can make our agents’ lives better.

We prioritise our agents and understand that their hard work, along with our support, is how we grow - together. Transparency is key and feedback is actively welcomed.

We believe in continuous improvement; harbouring dreams to benefit both staff and agents and inviting others to join us on this collective path to success.

With over 20,000 agents nationwide, Awesim is proud to distribute SIMs for all Mobile Network Operators.

Join Us!

For more info visit: Home page - Awesim
Terms & Conditions



\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [ { "value": "about us", "id": "70852105-60b0-4d9c-bc5c-6bc25fb35f5d", "categoryId": "e0751ef6-b3fd-4bd0-babb-3bc7619c24e1", "categoryName": "Support Tags" }, { "value": "awesim", "id": "e062ed16-069a-457e-ae83-5775eb16403a", "categoryId": "877b2ec0-0822-48f7-ac44-e37af6584b8d", "categoryName": "Tags" } ], "last_modified": "2025-07-14T07:18:12.597+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/a956a926-e54b-427a-bc0a-316fb7718bb4" }, { "id": "8f43beb2-b94f-4ab8-9e71-052561424bd0", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"8f43beb2-b94f-4ab8-9e71-052561424bd0\",\"title\":\"Awesim RICA Agent - Getting Started! \",\"content\":\"\nWe are excited to hear that you want to join Awesim as a RICA agent!\nHOW WE WORK\nSign Up and become a RICA agent\nWe ship you a SIM cards Starter Package from all the networks (Vodacom / MTN / Cell C / Telkom)\nfor FREE!\nYou RICA, Recharge and sell these SIM cards\nAgents earn R30 per activation, paid on the 25th of the following month.\nAn activation is when a SIM card is recharged and used by a\nREAL\ncustomer\nThe recharge amount is typically R30 but varies by network.\nAWESIM PAYS BEST\nClick here to see how much you could earn:\nhttps://awesim.co.za/Payments\nNEXT STEPS: BECOME A RICA AGENT\nTo\nsign up\n, please send us the below information:\nYour cellphone number that you'll use to RICA SIM cards\nA clear photo of your ID / valid Passport\nA clear photo of you holding your ID / Passport next to your face\nProof of address, which can be any of the following:\nAccount statement\nBank statement\nLetter from the tribal office\nOr an affidavit stating your address\nIt must display\nyour name\nand be\nno older than 3 months\n.\nFor more info visit:\nHome page - Awesim\nTerms & Conditions\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"8f43beb2-b94f-4ab8-9e71-052561424bd0\",\"title\":\"Awesim RICA Agent - Getting Started! \",\"content\":\"

We are excited to hear that you want to join Awesim as a RICA agent!

HOW WE WORK

  1. Sign Up and become a RICA agent
  2. We ship you a SIM cards Starter Package from all the networks (Vodacom / MTN / Cell C / Telkom) for FREE!
  3. You RICA, Recharge and sell these SIM cards
  4. Agents earn R30 per activation, paid on the 25th of the following month.

An activation is when a SIM card is recharged and used by a REAL customer
The recharge amount is typically R30 but varies by network.

AWESIM PAYS BEST

Click here to see how much you could earn: https://awesim.co.za/Payments


NEXT STEPS: BECOME A RICA AGENT

To sign up, please send us the below information:

  1. Your cellphone number that you'll use to RICA SIM cards
  2. A clear photo of your ID / valid Passport
  3. A clear photo of you holding your ID / Passport next to your face
  4. Proof of address, which can be any of the following:
  5. Account statement
  6. Bank statement
  7. Letter from the tribal office
  8. Or an affidavit stating your address

It must display your name and be no older than 3 months.

For more info visit: Home page - Awesim
Terms & Conditions

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2025-07-14T07:14:15.345+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/8f43beb2-b94f-4ab8-9e71-052561424bd0" }, { "id": "c9b1a68b-36c8-491c-b895-c9ae51ed50a6", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"c9b1a68b-36c8-491c-b895-c9ae51ed50a6\",\"title\":\"Delivery Address - Google Plus Code (Temp) \",\"content\":\"\nImportant Note:\nCMS - SR Comment needs to be updated with GPS Co-ords if Google Plus Codes used.\nDue to the current error \\\"Oops! The ROLLBACK TRANSACTION\\\", please follow the new instructions below:\nOnly click on the link once\nyou are at your exact location\nfor an accurate delivery address, for our RAM Couriers to deliver your sim card order.\nPlease ensure Location Services is turned\n[On]\nunder your device\n\\\"Settings\\\",\nand then click on the Google Plus Codes link:\nhttps://plus.codes/map\nStep 1: Click on \\\"up\\\" arrow\nStep 2: Click WhatsApp to share Delivery Address Location\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"c9b1a68b-36c8-491c-b895-c9ae51ed50a6\",\"title\":\"Delivery Address - Google Plus Code (Temp) \",\"content\":\"


Important Note:
CMS - SR Comment needs to be updated with GPS Co-ords if Google Plus Codes used.


Due to the current error \\\"Oops! The ROLLBACK TRANSACTION\\\", please follow the new instructions below:

  • Only click on the link once you are at your exact location for an accurate delivery address, for our RAM Couriers to deliver your sim card order.
  • Please ensure Location Services is turned [On] under your device \\\"Settings\\\", and then click on the Google Plus Codes link:

https://plus.codes/map

Step 1: Click on \\\"up\\\" arrow


Step 2: Click WhatsApp to share Delivery Address Location

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [ { "value": "google", "id": "93a85081-4315-40c7-ad8f-91b4150d9bb5", "categoryId": "e0751ef6-b3fd-4bd0-babb-3bc7619c24e1", "categoryName": "Support Tags" }, { "value": "plus code", "id": "515b1aa4-f1f1-4e06-819b-7f99387a29e9", "categoryId": "e0751ef6-b3fd-4bd0-babb-3bc7619c24e1", "categoryName": "Support Tags" } ], "last_modified": "2025-06-26T12:20:23.242+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/c9b1a68b-36c8-491c-b895-c9ae51ed50a6" }, { "id": "22389aaf-bc30-4f08-8a9e-e0ef3589f373", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"22389aaf-bc30-4f08-8a9e-e0ef3589f373\",\"title\":\"Quality Assurance (QA) Scorecard\",\"content\":\"\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"22389aaf-bc30-4f08-8a9e-e0ef3589f373\",\"title\":\"Quality Assurance (QA) Scorecard\",\"content\":\"

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [ { "value": "quality assurance", "id": "b63e76ac-b900-4915-bf3c-881ce1028aa3", "categoryId": "e0751ef6-b3fd-4bd0-babb-3bc7619c24e1", "categoryName": "Support Tags" }, { "value": "scorecard", "id": "f90bf2d0-b848-4a7b-a316-489fefeaec0f", "categoryId": "e0751ef6-b3fd-4bd0-babb-3bc7619c24e1", "categoryName": "Support Tags" } ], "last_modified": "2025-06-10T13:37:36.210+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/22389aaf-bc30-4f08-8a9e-e0ef3589f373" }, { "id": "c900222d-dd46-4690-b8bd-59e47f665222", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"c900222d-dd46-4690-b8bd-59e47f665222\",\"title\":\"Employee Bank Details Change Request Form\",\"content\":\"\nSCOPE/OBJECTIVE\nA quick reference guide to the Employee Bank Details Change Request Form. Employee remuneration/salaries are paid via EFT into the bank account details provided to HR. It is essential that bank details are kept up to date and that HR is informed promptly of when they are changed to avoid payment into the wrong or obsolete bank account.\nIn the event an employee needs to change their bank account details, this form must be completed and submitted by COB the 8th of the month for that month's salary to be paid into the new bank account. If this Form is received after COB the 08th, salary payments into the new bank account will only take affect the following month.\nSupporting documents required when completing the form:\nA\nBank Statement\nor a copy of the\nOriginal Stamped Bank Confirmation Letter\ncontaining the bank details must accompany this form.\nHow to use this card:\nOpen the Google Form:\nEmployee Bank Details Change Request Form\nComplete the Form:\nFill in all the required information.\nAttach the supporting documents:\nAttach the bank statement or stamped bank confirmation letter in the form in the allocated section.\nSubmit the form:\nOnce completed, click submit, which will automatically send the completed for to HR for processing.\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"c900222d-dd46-4690-b8bd-59e47f665222\",\"title\":\"Employee Bank Details Change Request Form\",\"content\":\"

SCOPE/OBJECTIVE

A quick reference guide to the Employee Bank Details Change Request Form. Employee remuneration/salaries are paid via EFT into the bank account details provided to HR. It is essential that bank details are kept up to date and that HR is informed promptly of when they are changed to avoid payment into the wrong or obsolete bank account.

In the event an employee needs to change their bank account details, this form must be completed and submitted by COB the 8th of the month for that month's salary to be paid into the new bank account. If this Form is received after COB the 08th, salary payments into the new bank account will only take affect the following month.

Supporting documents required when completing the form:

  • A Bank Statement or a copy of the Original Stamped Bank Confirmation Letter containing the bank details must accompany this form. 

How to use this card:

  1. Open the Google Form: Employee Bank Details Change Request Form
  2. Complete the Form: Fill in all the required information.
  3. Attach the supporting documents: Attach the bank statement or stamped bank confirmation letter in the form in the allocated section.
  4. Submit the form: Once completed, click submit, which will automatically send the completed for to HR for processing.

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [ { "value": "bank", "id": "323c1437-4818-4f0a-8de8-fbdd2eff17e0", "categoryId": "f1824c7f-80e1-44e8-9c49-e3aca58b442f", "categoryName": "HR Tags" }, { "value": "employee", "id": "6136097e-9606-4691-bcda-66e5bc2a25ea", "categoryId": "877b2ec0-0822-48f7-ac44-e37af6584b8d", "categoryName": "Tags" }, { "value": "form", "id": "c1059ac1-13ea-4fa1-974f-a2f39084cdd0", "categoryId": "877b2ec0-0822-48f7-ac44-e37af6584b8d", "categoryName": "Tags" } ], "last_modified": "2025-06-09T05:56:17.792+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/c900222d-dd46-4690-b8bd-59e47f665222" }, { "id": "5263791b-08f1-4d54-b867-c39c13bc956d", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"5263791b-08f1-4d54-b867-c39c13bc956d\",\"title\":\"Finance Department Contact List - Call Transfer(s)\",\"content\":\"\nThe table below serves as a Contact List for the Finance Department, aiding in the accurate routing of calls based on inquiries.\nInitiate contact via\nphone call\nas the\nprimary communication method.\nIf\nunreachable\nthrough phone call:\nCommunicate via Slack.\nProvide the necessary contact information, for a return response.\nSlack:\nHi,\nPlease return the below call, as I was unable to reach you.\nContact Info\nCompany:\nContact Name and Surname:\nContact Number:\nEmail (if applicable):\nQuery\nResponsible Person\nRole\nExtension\nCreditor Payment(s) - monies owing\nOther Company Expense Payment(s)\n*This is not agent Commission Payment(s)\nSethabile Zulu\nFinancial Accountant\n401\nFleet\nTyra Daniels\nFleet Administrator\n402\nMaintenance\nPoint of Sale (POS)\nHilary Vuma\nProcurement Officer\n105\n1st Point of Contact\nInsurance\nBanking\nEscalations or complaints\nSethabile Zulu\nFinancial Accountant\n401\n2nd Point of Contact\nInsurance\nBanking\nEscalations or complaints\nSean Gilbride\nChief Financial Officer\n27834198928\n*All agent Commission Payment(s) queries must be routed via Customer Care, and then Escalated (if required) TO FINANCE via CMS , for assistance - to accommodate for any language barriers.\nOther helpful Card(s):\nTransfer of Internal Calls - Euphoria Telecom\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"5263791b-08f1-4d54-b867-c39c13bc956d\",\"title\":\"Finance Department Contact List - Call Transfer(s)\",\"content\":\"

The table below serves as a Contact List for the Finance Department, aiding in the accurate routing of calls based on inquiries.

  1. Initiate contact via phone call as the primary communication method.
  2. If unreachable through phone call:
  3. Communicate via Slack.
  4. Provide the necessary contact information, for a return response.

Slack:

Hi,
Please return the below call, as I was unable to reach you.
Contact Info
Company:
Contact Name and Surname:
Contact Number:
Email (if applicable):

Query

Responsible Person

Role

Extension

  • Creditor Payment(s) - monies owing
  • Other Company Expense Payment(s)

*This is not agent Commission Payment(s)

Sethabile Zulu

Financial Accountant

401

  • Fleet

Tyra Daniels

Fleet Administrator

402

  • Maintenance
  • Point of Sale (POS)

Hilary Vuma

Procurement Officer

105

1st Point of Contact

  • Insurance
  • Banking
  • Escalations or complaints

Sethabile Zulu

Financial Accountant

401

2nd Point of Contact

  • Insurance
  • Banking
  • Escalations or complaints

Sean Gilbride

Chief Financial Officer

27834198928


*All agent Commission Payment(s) queries must be routed via Customer Care, and then Escalated (if required) TO FINANCE via CMS , for assistance - to accommodate for any language barriers.

Other helpful Card(s):

  • Transfer of Internal Calls - Euphoria Telecom

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [ { "value": "finance", "id": "671ca2d4-afab-4fcb-b304-086e1a194a56", "categoryId": "e0751ef6-b3fd-4bd0-babb-3bc7619c24e1", "categoryName": "Support Tags" }, { "value": "transfer", "id": "2dac0379-54a2-4d27-b04c-3b4d3735c935", "categoryId": "e0751ef6-b3fd-4bd0-babb-3bc7619c24e1", "categoryName": "Support Tags" } ], "last_modified": "2025-06-02T11:50:15.221+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/5263791b-08f1-4d54-b867-c39c13bc956d" }, { "id": "e0e4b5fa-e20b-4703-914e-8d80ae2ce295", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"e0e4b5fa-e20b-4703-914e-8d80ae2ce295\",\"title\":\"Cell C Data Load Errors\",\"content\":\"\nCanned Response:\nThere is currently a delay in loading bundles. After inserting and connecting the SIM, please wait at least 2 minutes before attempting to load Social/Data Bundles using the USSD code *130*70001#.\nif you encounter any further delays or errors, please let us know. Thank you.\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"e0e4b5fa-e20b-4703-914e-8d80ae2ce295\",\"title\":\"Cell C Data Load Errors\",\"content\":\"

Canned Response: There is currently a delay in loading bundles. After inserting and connecting the SIM, please wait at least 2 minutes before attempting to load Social/Data Bundles using the USSD code *130*70001#.

if you encounter any further delays or errors, please let us know. Thank you.

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2025-05-23T12:36:42.129+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/e0e4b5fa-e20b-4703-914e-8d80ae2ce295" }, { "id": "59837a81-fdae-40c5-8819-cec482914ee0", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"59837a81-fdae-40c5-8819-cec482914ee0\",\"title\":\"Air Conditioning & Heaters Policy\",\"content\":\"\nSCOPE/OBJECTIVE\nThe purpose of this policy is to establish guidelines for the safe and effective management of air conditioners within Awesim’s offices, in compliance with South African health and safety legislation. This policy aims to create a comfortable working environment whilst optimising energy usage to manage operational costs.\nOFFICE ENVIRONMENT OVERVIEW\nThere is a combination of private and shared/open-plan offices within Awesim’s office building. An office space is considered private when it has been allocated to one (1) employee as their dedicated space to conduct work. An office space is considered shared/open-plan when the space has been allocated to two (2) or more employees as their dedicated space to conduct work.\nAIR CONDITIONER UNIT OVERVIEW\nThe below table indicates the different types of devices used to control the air conditioning units in the various areas/regions:\nDevice Type\nArea/Region\nDevice Image\nWall-mounted panel\nRAM, Invoicing & Sticking\nBuilt-in panel on the wall-mounted unit\nVarious\nRemote-controlled unit (Type 1)\nStores\nRemote-controlled unit (Type 2)\nIndividual Offices\nUSE OF HEATERS & ADDITIONAL WARMING METHODS\nThe use of floor or oil heaters is not permitted in the office due to safety risks and energy inefficiency. Exceptions have only been made for specific areas approved by management, where open-plan areas (e.g. reception) have no carpeting and air conditioning units are ineffective or not available.\nIf the allocated air conditioning settings during cold seasons do not provide adequate warmth, staff are encouraged to:\nWear additional layers of clothing;\nWrap a blanket around their legs while seated;\nUse a hot water bottle.\nHot Water Bottle Safety Precautions:\nUse bottles that comply with BS1970:2012 standards or equivalent;\nFill the bottle with hot (not boiling) water to avoid splitting or burns;\nDo not overfill – fill to about two-thirds capacity;\nExpel excess air before sealing tightly;\nAlways use a cover or wrap the bottle in a towel to avoid direct contact with skin;\nNever sit, lie on, or apply pressure to the hot water bottle;\nCheck the bottle regularly for signs of wear or leaks.\nEmployees are expected to take personal responsibility for using warming methods safely and appropriately. Misuse or unsafe practices may lead to disciplinary action.\nNOMINATED RESPONSIBLE EMPLOYEE\nThe diverse preferences and comfort levels of individuals working in private and shared/open-plan offices make it essential to have a management process in place. Striking the right balance ensures that the office remains a welcoming and accommodating space for everyone, promoting a collaborative and harmonious work atmosphere.\nAs such, Awesim will nominate a responsible person per area/region of the office who will be responsible for the management and control of all the air conditioners allocated within their allocated area/region. The nominated responsible people will take on this responsibility for a period of 12 consecutive months. HR will reallocate this responsibility annually.\nResponsibilities of each nominated employee:\nHave full control over the remote/panel for your allocated section (No other employee is allowed to change the temperature or make use of the aircon);\nLiaise with staff in private offices to manage those air conditioners within your area/region;\nControl the temp of the air conditioning in shared/open-plan offices in accordance with this policy;\nEnsure that private offices are using their air conditioners in accordance with this policy;\nSafekeeping & care of the air conditioners remotes for your allocated area/region;\nTurn off all air conditioners immediately if requested by management/IT;\nEnsure all air conditioners are switched off at the end of the business day before leaving the premises;\nIf there was load shedding during the end of the business day and municipal power was not restored before the end of the day, ensure all air conditioners are switched off to ensure that they do not run unnecessarily through the evening when the power is restored after business closure;\nArrange with your line manager to nominate a temporary person to manage these responsibilities on days you are not in the office (Sick leave, annual leave, WFH, etc.);\nOverall management of the air conditioners - report any issues & faults to the Procurement Officer immediately;\nEnsure that no floor/oil heaters are being used in unauthorised area's;\nEnsure the overall compliance with this policy witin their designated area's.\nNominated responsible employees' for 2025:\nTyra Daniels - Finance, Canteen/kitchen & Admin area's located around the canteen area\nLiona Govender - HR, IT, admin area, Jo's Office & floating desk area's\nJabulile Dlamini - CC Department & reception area's\nBongani Moumakwe - RAM, Invoicing, Sticking & stores office area's\nTEMPERATURE SETTINGS/CONTROL\nThe table below indicates the temperature ranges that all air-conditioning units must remain within during the different seasons. These temperatures are guided by health & safety legislation. The temperatures specified herein are applicable to both private and shared/open-plan offices.\nOnly the nominated responsible employee is permitted to change/adjust the air conditioners temperatures in shared/open-plan offices.\nTemperature units:\nSeason\nMonths\nMin Temp\nMax Temp\nSummer\nDecember - February\n21°C\n24°C\nAutumn\nMarch - May\n22°C\n24°C\nWinter\nJune - August\n24°C\n26°C\nSpring\nSeptember - November\n22°C\n24°C\nWall mounted panel units:\nSeason\nMonths\nSetting Gage\n(Top rotation dial)\nTemperature Gage (Bottom rotation dial)\nImage/Diagram\nAutumn & Winter\nMarch -August\nHeating\n(See red star marking)\n30 degree mark from far left following the blue indicator.\nSpring & Summer\nSeptember - February\nCool Low\n(See black star marking)\n150 degree mark from far left following the blue indicator.\nSHARED/OPEN-PLAN OFFICES\nIn shared and open-plan office spaces, employees must collectively agree on designated times for the air conditioning to be switched on or off, in line with the company's standardised temperature settings. If employees cannot reach an agreement, the manager responsible for the department will make a final decision and implement the decision accordingly.\nEmployees are encouraged to dress appropriately for varying office temperatures. This includes keeping suitable clothing, such as a jacket or extra layers, at the office to ensure personal comfort.\nIf an employee experiences discomfort due to their proximity to an air conditioning unit, they may request a seating change with their line manager.
