Avoid repetitive or irrelevant questions and focus on providing accurate, relevant assistance

CLEAR AND ACCURATE INFORMATION AND SOLUTIONS

  • Respond promptly by asking relevant questions to fully understand the query and provide accurate, customer-friendly responses that directly resolve the agent’s specific query.
  • Communicate product and service information in clear, simple language, mindful that customers may have varying levels of understanding of the service offering.
  • Address agent inquiries directly, avoiding unnecessary or irrelevant questions, and focus on delivering solutions that are clear, actionable, and relevant.

STANDARDS FOR USING PRE-WRITTEN RESPONSES

  • Appropriate Use: Use verified canned responses only when they accurately address the customer's query, based on resources such as the knowledge base, CMS, CRM, and other internal resources.
  • Customization: Adapt canned responses to fit the specific customer query, incorporating insights about account information, to provide well-informed, supportive responses.

PROFESSIONAL AND COURTEOUS COMMUNICATION

Maintain a respectful, helpful, and customer-friendly tone in all responses, using language that aligns with company standards.

DOCUMENT ALL ACTIONS

  • Service Request Comments: Ensure all Service Request (SR) comments are clear and complete to support consistency, avoid duplication, and prevent delays in future interactions. This helps ensure colleagues require no further clarification.
  • Accuracy in CRM Updates: Ensure all information entered into the CMS and/or CRM is accurate, complete, and up-to-date, reflecting the details of each interaction and any actions taken.

TROUBLESHOOTING AND PROBLEM SOLVING GUIDELINES

  • Thorough Knowledge: Maintain a strong understanding of troubleshooting steps and potential solutions for common product or service issues to effectively assist customers.
  • Document and Escalate Issues: Log any issues, concerns, or recurring trends, including technical issues such as hardware or software problems. Ensure these are reported immediately with supporting images and detailed descriptions so they can be addressed promptly.

ESCALATION AND RESOLUTION PROTOCOLS

  • Escalation Process: If the issue cannot be resolved promptly, is complex, or beyond your expertise, follow escalation protocols to engage the appropriate support teams or supervisors, ensuring all relevant details are thoroughly documented. Clearly communicate the customer’s issue and actions taken so far to the next agent or team, providing a concise summary to prevent the customer from having to repeat information and to ensure a smooth transition.
  • Inform the Customer: Notify the customer that you are connecting them with a team member who can provide additional assistance and inform them of the expected escalation turnaround time.
  • Error Management and Escalation Protocol: If you identify an error, whether it is your own or one made by a colleague, immediately document the details in the CMS SR Comments and take steps to rectify it. Ensure all relevant information is clearly and transparently recorded; errors must not be concealed or covered up. Adhere to established escalation protocols to engage with the appropriate supervisors, as necessary.

CLOSING STANDARDS

  • Confirm Satisfaction: Before ending the interaction, ensure the customer has no additional questions and is satisfied with the solution provided.
  • Offer Further Assistance: Encourage the customer to reach out if they need additional help. For example, say, “If you have any more questions, please don’t hesitate to contact us.”


ADHERENCE TO SOP GUIDELINES

Follow all established SOPs to maintain consistency, quality, and professionalism in every interaction, including handling ad hoc Service Requests (SRs).

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2024-11-27T12:01:59.617+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/d63c01f8-a24f-4640-a46a-9f8964f47417" }, { "id": "9e586d9e-257d-4b88-9f92-f6dd02b05b7d", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"9e586d9e-257d-4b88-9f92-f6dd02b05b7d\",\"title\":\"Buy SIMs Stock Code Flag(s) \",\"content\":\"\nMost agents are able to buy extra SIMs.\nAn agent could not qualify for Buy SIMs or they could be blocked from receiving Buy SIMs.\nThere are only 2 x flags that block an agent from Buying SIMs: Block Buy Stock and Fraud.\nAn agent could still be able to order SIMs even if a flag such as high connect and limit stock is on their free SIMs.\nPlease see as per below:\nAgent cannot order because they do not qualify for any buy SIMS:\nAgent can solve this buy RICA, Connecting and Recharging Right.\nAgent is only blocked on buy stock. If an agent is blocked on buy stock they are also going to be blocked on free stock.\nAgent is flagged for limit stock but is not blocked to buy SIMs on that stock code:\nSee below for Cell C and for Telkom:\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"9e586d9e-257d-4b88-9f92-f6dd02b05b7d\",\"title\":\"Buy SIMs Stock Code Flag(s) \",\"content\":\"

Most agents are able to buy extra SIMs.

An agent could not qualify for Buy SIMs or they could be blocked from receiving Buy SIMs.

There are only 2 x flags that block an agent from Buying SIMs: Block Buy Stock and Fraud.

An agent could still be able to order SIMs even if a flag such as high connect and limit stock is on their free SIMs.

Please see as per below:

  • Agent cannot order because they do not qualify for any buy SIMS:

Agent can solve this buy RICA, Connecting and Recharging Right.

  • Agent is only blocked on buy stock. If an agent is blocked on buy stock they are also going to be blocked on free stock.

Agent is flagged for limit stock but is not blocked to buy SIMs on that stock code:

See below for Cell C and for Telkom:

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2024-11-19T06:33:07.853+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/9e586d9e-257d-4b88-9f92-f6dd02b05b7d" }, { "id": "9360c69e-dd6a-486c-89dc-900045ac7327", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"9360c69e-dd6a-486c-89dc-900045ac7327\",\"title\":\"Buy SIMs\",\"content\":\"\nAgents can now buy Extra SIMs with their Free SIMs order.\nAgents need a minimum of 30 Free SIMs to buy Extra SIMs.\nOnly available on the app:\nOrder Free SIMs\nAdd free SIMs\nSelect Next\nAgent will be asked to add reward items (if they do not already have a pending cart) . If an agent selects Yes or No they will still navigate to Buy Extra SIMs\nAgent will receive a pop up with \\\"Would you like to buy extra SIM Cards with Reward Points\\\".\nSelect \\\"YES\\\"\nAgent will see any stock code they can buy Extra SIMs.\nAgents receive a\nmonthly\nallowed balance.\nIf they order all their monthly SIMs in the first order of the month, they will not qualify for any more Extra SIMs if they try order again in the same month.\nEach price per SIM can change by stock code and by Agent Code.\nThe price is based on how well an agent performs.\nIf an agent performs well = lower price per SIM.\nAgents are able to edit their quantities as desired. The amount of points will change as well.\nAs below - agent has an allowed quantity of 12. They have edited the quantity to 10. The Points have changed from 36 to 30 points.\nIf an agent is blocked from a stock category or does not qualify the stock code will be greyed out. To learn more why and the rules about flags see here\n(link to flag card)\nAgent will see the total amount of SIMs they want to purchase and the Amount of Points.\nThe agent can see their current Reward Balance & the Paid for SIMs Point amount along with their new reward balance. If the agent has enough Reward Points, the agent can Add to Order.\nIf an Agent does not have enough points, they have the option to the Buy Points needed for the order.\nThe agent will be navigated to Buy Points - with the amount needed in the \\\"Buy Reward Points\\\".\nAgent can find steps to Buy Points\nhere.\nAdd to order: If an agent has enough points or has just bought enough points - they will be able to add to order.\nOrder Confirmation Screen:\nAgent will be able to see the amount of Free SIMs and the amount of Paid SIMs with the point amount of each stock code.\nIf an agent has any Reward Items, they will show here.\nAgent will Order as normal:\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"9360c69e-dd6a-486c-89dc-900045ac7327\",\"title\":\"Buy SIMs\",\"content\":\"

Agents can now buy Extra SIMs with their Free SIMs order.

Agents need a minimum of 30 Free SIMs to buy Extra SIMs.

Only available on the app:

  1. Order Free SIMs

  1. Add free SIMs

  1. Select Next

  1. Agent will be asked to add reward items (if they do not already have a pending cart) . If an agent selects Yes or No they will still navigate to Buy Extra SIMs

  1. Agent will receive a pop up with \\\"Would you like to buy extra SIM Cards with Reward Points\\\".

Select \\\"YES\\\"

  1. Agent will see any stock code they can buy Extra SIMs.

Agents receive a monthly allowed balance.

If they order all their monthly SIMs in the first order of the month, they will not qualify for any more Extra SIMs if they try order again in the same month.

Each price per SIM can change by stock code and by Agent Code.

The price is based on how well an agent performs.

If an agent performs well = lower price per SIM.

  1. Agents are able to edit their quantities as desired. The amount of points will change as well.

As below - agent has an allowed quantity of 12. They have edited the quantity to 10. The Points have changed from 36 to 30 points.

  1. If an agent is blocked from a stock category or does not qualify the stock code will be greyed out. To learn more why and the rules about flags see here (link to flag card)

  1. Agent will see the total amount of SIMs they want to purchase and the Amount of Points.

  1. The agent can see their current Reward Balance & the Paid for SIMs Point amount along with their new reward balance. If the agent has enough Reward Points, the agent can Add to Order.

  1. If an Agent does not have enough points, they have the option to the Buy Points needed for the order.

  1. The agent will be navigated to Buy Points - with the amount needed in the \\\"Buy Reward Points\\\".

Agent can find steps to Buy Points here.

  1. Add to order: If an agent has enough points or has just bought enough points - they will be able to add to order.

  1. Order Confirmation Screen:

Agent will be able to see the amount of Free SIMs and the amount of Paid SIMs with the point amount of each stock code.

If an agent has any Reward Items, they will show here.

  1. Agent will Order as normal:

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [ { "value": "buy stock", "id": "b656599a-ef44-4ba1-9097-fc0cfbee90f0", "categoryId": "877b2ec0-0822-48f7-ac44-e37af6584b8d", "categoryName": "Tags" } ], "last_modified": "2024-11-19T06:31:10.232+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/9360c69e-dd6a-486c-89dc-900045ac7327" }, { "id": "1b920566-6e5e-44ba-bc82-72a2c2c21c02", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"1b920566-6e5e-44ba-bc82-72a2c2c21c02\",\"title\":\"Smartcall RICA Registration Submission\",\"content\":\"\nWe have submitted your documents to SmartRICA for verification, and once processed you will get an SMS confirmation. Please confirm once you get the SMS confirming you are a RICA agent.\nIf you have not received the SMS within 4 hours, please let us know so we can follow up or;\nIf you receive an SMS indicating that your registration needs\ncorrection\n, please respond to us, in order to assist you.\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"1b920566-6e5e-44ba-bc82-72a2c2c21c02\",\"title\":\"Smartcall RICA Registration Submission\",\"content\":\"

We have submitted your documents to SmartRICA for verification, and once processed you will get an SMS confirmation. Please confirm once you get the SMS confirming you are a RICA agent.

  • If you have not received the SMS within 4 hours, please let us know so we can follow up or;
  • If you receive an SMS indicating that your registration needs correction, please respond to us, in order to assist you.

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [ { "value": "Registration", "id": "d05b4718-fce6-46a3-af06-dfb4d5867331", "categoryId": "e0751ef6-b3fd-4bd0-babb-3bc7619c24e1", "categoryName": "Support Tags" }, { "value": "RICA", "id": "cf03fec7-cd13-4081-9ace-b67fe64d147a", "categoryId": "e0751ef6-b3fd-4bd0-babb-3bc7619c24e1", "categoryName": "Support Tags" }, { "value": "Smartcall", "id": "b7531587-da30-4fe7-96c7-601a39357b33", "categoryId": "e0751ef6-b3fd-4bd0-babb-3bc7619c24e1", "categoryName": "Support Tags" }, { "value": "SmartRICA", "id": "48f14913-9ff3-4040-94af-bee5eb2d766b", "categoryId": "e0751ef6-b3fd-4bd0-babb-3bc7619c24e1", "categoryName": "Support Tags" }, { "value": "submission", "id": "30d58bdd-4e6b-4cee-9d32-43f433c452bd", "categoryId": "e0751ef6-b3fd-4bd0-babb-3bc7619c24e1", "categoryName": "Support Tags" } ], "last_modified": "2024-11-12T07:28:52.810+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/1b920566-6e5e-44ba-bc82-72a2c2c21c02" }, { "id": "ccb96f7a-0082-4642-b466-0b1e55ee9cd3", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"ccb96f7a-0082-4642-b466-0b1e55ee9cd3\",\"title\":\"CMS - Customer Info Table - Delivery Address Fields \",\"content\":\"\nStandard Operating Procedure (SOP): Delivery Address Fields\nAddress Line 1:\nNumber & Street Name\nHouse or Stand No as it appears on Google Maps\nIf unable to locate the Delivery Address on Google Maps\nExample: Village\nMake use of\nGoogle Plus Code\nto assist you; and\nask: Is the House /Stand No and Street\nclearly marked with signage\n(visible from the street)?\nAddress Line 1:\nNumber\n& Street Name\nAddress Notes:\nOnly\nif Address Line 1 requires an additional\nLandmark to locate on Google Maps\nThe [\nAddress Notes]\nfield is used\nonly\nfor the nearest\nLandmark\nwhen the address is not located on Google Maps.\nAddress Notes is in order to help the driver locate Address Line 1 (Number and Street) - especially if agent is not available telephonically.\nCharacter Limit [50 Characters]\nPlease\ndo not\nuse this field for telephone numbers or notes - it is for Delivery Address Landmarks only.\nExample (informed by Google Plus Code or GPS Co-ordinates):\nAdditional Fields:\nSuburb / Area:\nCity:\nProvince:\nPostal Code:\nPlease note that RAM\ndo not\ndeliver to the below addresses, and a\nThird Party Meeting Point(s)\nwill be required:\nHostel(s)\nTaxi Rank(s)\nHigh Risk Area(s) Example (as communicated by RAM): Thembisa\nWhat is a Third Party Meeting Point:\nPolice Station or\nanother safe location: Example: School\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"ccb96f7a-0082-4642-b466-0b1e55ee9cd3\",\"title\":\"CMS - Customer Info Table - Delivery Address Fields \",\"content\":\"

Standard Operating Procedure (SOP): Delivery Address Fields

Address Line 1: Number & Street Name

  • House or Stand No as it appears on Google Maps
  • If unable to locate the Delivery Address on Google Maps
    Example: Village
    Make use of Google Plus Code to assist you; and
    ask: Is the House /Stand No and Street clearly marked with signage (visible from the street)?
  • Address Line 1: Number & Street Name

Address Notes:
Only if Address Line 1 requires an additional Landmark to locate on Google Maps

  • The [Address Notes] field is used only for the nearest Landmark when the address is not located on Google Maps.
  • Address Notes is in order to help the driver locate Address Line 1 (Number and Street) - especially if agent is not available telephonically.
  • Character Limit [50 Characters]
  • Please do not use this field for telephone numbers or notes - it is for Delivery Address Landmarks only.

    Example (informed by Google Plus Code or GPS Co-ordinates):



Additional Fields:

Suburb / Area:
City:
Province:
Postal Code:

Please note that RAM do not deliver to the below addresses, and a Third Party Meeting Point(s) will be required:

  • Hostel(s)
  • Taxi Rank(s)
  • High Risk Area(s) Example (as communicated by RAM): Thembisa

What is a Third Party Meeting Point:

  • Police Station or
  • another safe location: Example: School

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2024-08-28T06:54:19.620+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/ccb96f7a-0082-4642-b466-0b1e55ee9cd3" }, { "id": "92ec1c61-aa8d-4955-ad35-d5616c1c667e", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"92ec1c61-aa8d-4955-ad35-d5616c1c667e\",\"title\":\"Return to Sender (RTS) \",\"content\":\"\nPlease note that your account was placed On Hold (deactivated) because your last order was returned to sender (RTS) due to non-delivery. Please ensure you are available at the given delivery address to take collection, to avoid a RTS and your account being blocked from receiving stock.\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"92ec1c61-aa8d-4955-ad35-d5616c1c667e\",\"title\":\"Return to Sender (RTS) \",\"content\":\"

Please note that your account was placed On Hold (deactivated) because your last order was returned to sender (RTS) due to non-delivery. Please ensure you are available at the given delivery address to take collection, to avoid a RTS and your account being blocked from receiving stock.

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [ { "value": "return to sender", "id": "50e34d47-8e9c-413a-b36a-7754091930fc", "categoryId": "e0751ef6-b3fd-4bd0-babb-3bc7619c24e1", "categoryName": "Support Tags" }, { "value": "rts", "id": "497fff17-c8dc-462d-af56-3f1802a4dbc9", "categoryId": "e0751ef6-b3fd-4bd0-babb-3bc7619c24e1", "categoryName": "Support Tags" }, { "value": "RTSed", "id": "4057be1f-0476-4399-9d27-b60622bd51cf", "categoryId": "e0751ef6-b3fd-4bd0-babb-3bc7619c24e1", "categoryName": "Support Tags" } ], "last_modified": "2024-08-21T05:53:33.934+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/92ec1c61-aa8d-4955-ad35-d5616c1c667e" }, { "id": "79d177a4-e2f2-4aef-b11a-767addf4e13b", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"79d177a4-e2f2-4aef-b11a-767addf4e13b\",\"title\":\"Disciplinary Appeal Policy\",\"content\":\"\nSCOPE/OBJECTIVE\nTo ensure that all Awesim Telecoms (Pty) Ltd employees are aware of their rights in regards to the standardised appeal policy and procedure when involved in a disciplinary inquiry proceeding.\nLEGAL PRINCIPLES\nThe following legislation is applicable to this policy:\nBasic Conditions of Employment Act, Act 75 of 1997;\nLabour Relations Act, Act 66 of 1995;\nEmployment Equity Act, Act 55 of 1998; and\nDepartment of Labour Code of Good Practice, 2004.\nPOLICY/PROCEDURE\nAn employee who has been found guilty of any act of misconduct and in respect of whom a penalty has been imposed, or proposed, may within three (3) working days after the date of such imposition, lodge an appeal against such finding of guilty or the penalty/proposed penalty.\nAn Appeal will only be considered on the basis of one or more of the following grounds:\nAlleged procedural irregularities that may have prejudiced the employee.\nNew facts that became available after the inquiry/meeting (Can be by both the employer or the employee).\nHarshness of the sanction or is unprecedented for the misconduct.\nTo lodge an appeal, the employee must complete the\nAppeal Application Form\nwithin the required time frame. The completed form will be submitted to the HR Department for review and consideration.\nShould the HR Department deem that the reason and information provided in the appeal application is warranted, they will inform parties and schedule an appeal inquiry.\nAn appeal inquiry can be conducted in one of the following manners depending on the circumstances at hand:\nInformal Inquiry:\nThe appointed chairperson will review the disciplinary inquiry documentation, notes, ruling, imposed sanction and facts/information in regard to the appeal. Thereafter, the chairperson will make a final ruling.\nFormal Inquiry:\nThe formal appeal inquiry will be held whereby parties will have the opportunity to present the new evidence and/or arguments in regard to the appeal request (de novo case). Thereafter, the chairperson will make a final ruling.\nIn both the aforementioned processes, a formal written outcome will be issued by the appeal chairperson to both the employer and the applicant on their final ruling.\nIn regard to cases where the disciplinary outcome/penalty was dismissal: if the outcome of the appeal hearing is that the dismissal is overturned, then the employee is to be reinstated and the relevant outcome/penalty to be issued. If the appeal chairperson upholds the dismissal, then the employee remains dismissed from the original date of termination.\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"79d177a4-e2f2-4aef-b11a-767addf4e13b\",\"title\":\"Disciplinary Appeal Policy\",\"content\":\"

SCOPE/OBJECTIVE

To ensure that all Awesim Telecoms (Pty) Ltd employees are aware of their rights in regards to the standardised appeal policy and procedure when involved in a disciplinary inquiry proceeding.

LEGAL PRINCIPLES

The following legislation is applicable to this policy:

  1. Basic Conditions of Employment Act, Act 75 of 1997;
  2. Labour Relations Act, Act 66 of 1995;
  3. Employment Equity Act, Act 55 of 1998; and
  4. Department of Labour Code of Good Practice, 2004.

POLICY/PROCEDURE

An employee who has been found guilty of any act of misconduct and in respect of whom a penalty has been imposed, or proposed, may within three (3) working days after the date of such imposition, lodge an appeal against such finding of guilty or the penalty/proposed penalty.

An Appeal will only be considered on the basis of one or more of the following grounds:

  • Alleged procedural irregularities that may have prejudiced the employee.
  • New facts that became available after the inquiry/meeting (Can be by both the employer or the employee).
  • Harshness of the sanction or is unprecedented for the misconduct.

To lodge an appeal, the employee must complete the Appeal Application Form within the required time frame. The completed form will be submitted to the HR Department for review and consideration.

Should the HR Department deem that the reason and information provided in the appeal application is warranted, they will inform parties and schedule an appeal inquiry.

An appeal inquiry can be conducted in one of the following manners depending on the circumstances at hand:

  1. Informal Inquiry: The appointed chairperson will review the disciplinary inquiry documentation, notes, ruling, imposed sanction and facts/information in regard to the appeal. Thereafter, the chairperson will make a final ruling.
  1. Formal Inquiry: The formal appeal inquiry will be held whereby parties will have the opportunity to present the new evidence and/or arguments in regard to the appeal request (de novo case). Thereafter, the chairperson will make a final ruling.

In both the aforementioned processes, a formal written outcome will be issued by the appeal chairperson to both the employer and the applicant on their final ruling.

In regard to cases where the disciplinary outcome/penalty was dismissal: if the outcome of the appeal hearing is that the dismissal is overturned, then the employee is to be reinstated and the relevant outcome/penalty to be issued. If the appeal chairperson upholds the dismissal, then the employee remains dismissed from the original date of termination.

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [ { "value": "Appeal", "id": "d27d2a69-5053-4beb-8378-19b8374f1051", "categoryId": "f1824c7f-80e1-44e8-9c49-e3aca58b442f", "categoryName": "HR Tags" }, { "value": "Discipline", "id": "cfbd10cb-9200-4858-8c7e-48a16eef2e1e", "categoryId": "f1824c7f-80e1-44e8-9c49-e3aca58b442f", "categoryName": "HR Tags" }, { "value": "policy", "id": "4b4e383d-ef16-43ea-8781-9877bf0601e9", "categoryId": "877b2ec0-0822-48f7-ac44-e37af6584b8d", "categoryName": "Tags" } ], "last_modified": "2024-08-07T10:23:43.277+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/79d177a4-e2f2-4aef-b11a-767addf4e13b" }, { "id": "9f04042b-7359-4231-ae7d-606a3cc2075d", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"9f04042b-7359-4231-ae7d-606a3cc2075d\",\"title\":\"Block Stock: Cell C - Scam \",\"content\":\"\nCell C have reported that sim cards from certain agents have been sold / given away to people who are now using them in an international number scam.\nWe have been given the serials and we have identified the accounts that have been affected.\nSMSes:\nBlocked SMS:\nAWESIM: CellC have reported sims on your account being sold that are being fraudulently used. CellC stock has been blocked. To apply to unblock contact Awesim.\nWarning SMS:\nAWESIM: CellC have reported sims on your account being sold that are being fraudulently used. To avoid your account being blocked only sell to real customers.\nAgent's that have been blocked can apply to Awesim to be unblocked. To do that, they need to do the following:\nContact call center or their sales rep\nThe CC or rep would need to get the following:\nWhat is the reason you sold / gave away sims without RICA'ing them to a REAL customer?\nHow many sims were sold / given away?\nIf they were paid for the sim cards:\nHow much where you paid?\nIf none of the above happened, then the description of what happened to their sims?\nThese reasons will need to be entered by the rep/CC into the\nStock Code FLAG Query\nworkflow which is on Slack.\nIt can be entered under the question \\\"\nWhat is the problem with the flag and why?\\\"\n.\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"9f04042b-7359-4231-ae7d-606a3cc2075d\",\"title\":\"Block Stock: Cell C - Scam \",\"content\":\"

Cell C have reported that sim cards from certain agents have been sold / given away to people who are now using them in an international number scam.
We have been given the serials and we have identified the accounts that have been affected.

SMSes:

Blocked SMS:

AWESIM: CellC have reported sims on your account being sold that are being fraudulently used. CellC stock has been blocked. To apply to unblock contact Awesim.


Warning SMS:
AWESIM: CellC have reported sims on your account being sold that are being fraudulently used. To avoid your account being blocked only sell to real customers.


Agent's that have been blocked can apply to Awesim to be unblocked. To do that, they need to do the following:

  • Contact call center or their sales rep

The CC or rep would need to get the following:

  1. What is the reason you sold / gave away sims without RICA'ing them to a REAL customer?
  2. How many sims were sold / given away?
  3. If they were paid for the sim cards: How much where you paid?
  4. If none of the above happened, then the description of what happened to their sims?


These reasons will need to be entered by the rep/CC into the Stock Code FLAG Query workflow which is on Slack.
It can be entered under the question \\\"What is the problem with the flag and why?\\\".



\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2024-07-12T11:07:26.931+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/9f04042b-7359-4231-ae7d-606a3cc2075d" }, { "id": "4beb36b6-d640-48a9-842e-21bc281d197e", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"4beb36b6-d640-48a9-842e-21bc281d197e\",\"title\":\"Want to join the Awesim Team? \",\"content\":\"\nGood Day,\nThank you for your interest in wanting to join the Awesim Team.\nPlease note that we do not have any vacant positions at this current time. However, should you wish for your details to be loaded onto our candidate database for possible future consideration, please complete a one-way video application through Wamly.\nThe one-way video application will require you to answer various questions, some via video recording, and attach your CV.\nBy completing this application, you give Awesim and Wamly permission to obtain, store and use your personal information for internal purposes in accordance with the Protection of Personal Information Act.\nawesim GOALS 2024\nOne way video application:\nmy.wamly.io/link/AwesimTelecomsPtyLtd/5c865dc2\n(Copy and paste the above link into your internet browser)\nPlease note that completing this interview does not guarantee employment or consideration for specific role/s within Awesim. However, your CV will be loaded onto our database for possible future vacancies that may arise.\nTechnical requirements needed before completing the video interview:\nInternet Speed Requirements:\nYou will need an upload speed of at least 300kb/s\nDevice Requirements:\nAny device with a working microphone and camera\nSoftware Requirements:\nDesktop:\nSupported Operating System:\nWindows 7+\n·        OS X El Capitan+\nSupported Browsers:\n·        Chrome: 80+\n·        Safari: 13.1+\n·        Edge: 80+\n·        Opera: 68+\n·        Firefox: 74+\nAndroid:\nSupported Operating System:\n·        7.1.1+\nSupported Browsers:\n·        Chrome: 80+\n·        Edge: 80+\n·        Opera: 72+\n·        Firefox: 79+\n·        Samsung Internet: 115+\nApple:\nSupported Operating System:\n·        iOS / iPadOS 15.2+\nSupported Browsers:\n·        Safari: 13.5+\n·        Chrome: 92+\n·        Edge: 92+\n·        Firefox: 105+\n·        Opera: 4+\nFor iOS 15.2 and lower, please try enabling these options if you experience any difficulties\n•    Tap the Settings icon on the Home page\n•    In the Settings screen that appears, tap Safari\n•    All Safari’s settings appear\n•    Select Advanced\n•    Select Experimental Features\n•    Toggle Media Recorder on\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"4beb36b6-d640-48a9-842e-21bc281d197e\",\"title\":\"Want to join the Awesim Team? \",\"content\":\"

Good Day,

Thank you for your interest in wanting to join the Awesim Team.

Please note that we do not have any vacant positions at this current time. However, should you wish for your details to be loaded onto our candidate database for possible future consideration, please complete a one-way video application through Wamly.

The one-way video application will require you to answer various questions, some via video recording, and attach your CV.

By completing this application, you give Awesim and Wamly permission to obtain, store and use your personal information for internal purposes in accordance with the Protection of Personal Information Act.

awesim GOALS 2024

One way video application:

my.wamly.io/link/AwesimTelecomsPtyLtd/5c865dc2

(Copy and paste the above link into your internet browser)

Please note that completing this interview does not guarantee employment or consideration for specific role/s within Awesim. However, your CV will be loaded onto our database for possible future vacancies that may arise.

Technical requirements needed before completing the video interview:

Internet Speed Requirements:

You will need an upload speed of at least 300kb/s

Device Requirements:

Any device with a working microphone and camera

Software Requirements:

Desktop:

Supported Operating System:

  • Windows 7+

·        OS X El Capitan+

Supported Browsers:

·        Chrome: 80+

·        Safari: 13.1+

·        Edge: 80+

·        Opera: 68+

·        Firefox: 74+

Android:

Supported Operating System:

·        7.1.1+

Supported Browsers:

·        Chrome: 80+

·        Edge: 80+

·        Opera: 72+

·        Firefox: 79+

·        Samsung Internet: 115+

Apple:

Supported Operating System:

·        iOS / iPadOS 15.2+

Supported Browsers:

·        Safari: 13.5+

·        Chrome: 92+

·        Edge: 92+

·        Firefox: 105+

·        Opera: 4+

For iOS 15.2 and lower, please try enabling these options if you experience any difficulties

•    Tap the Settings icon on the Home page

•    In the Settings screen that appears, tap Safari

•    All Safari’s settings appear

•    Select Advanced

•    Select Experimental Features

•    Toggle Media Recorder on

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [ { "value": "join awesim", "id": "e41b3690-fdc8-4357-a098-ac52ee8acfe4", "categoryId": "e0751ef6-b3fd-4bd0-babb-3bc7619c24e1", "categoryName": "Support Tags" } ], "last_modified": "2024-06-24T12:19:37.074+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/4beb36b6-d640-48a9-842e-21bc281d197e" }, { "id": "388f92ef-3101-44fe-b2ad-36f46aeaac29", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"388f92ef-3101-44fe-b2ad-36f46aeaac29\",\"title\":\"Shopping Vouchers (My.Awesim Rewards Store) \",\"content\":\"\nThank you for your question and suggestion.\nWe do not include shopping vouchers on the Rewards Store with purpose.\nRewards are there to help you grow your business, so we try to list items that can be resold by Agents to make more money - that is why all items on the Rewards Store is at cost price.\nTherefore, we will not be including shopping vouchers on the Rewards Store at this stage, for that reason.\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"388f92ef-3101-44fe-b2ad-36f46aeaac29\",\"title\":\"Shopping Vouchers (My.Awesim Rewards Store) \",\"content\":\"

Thank you for your question and suggestion.

We do not include shopping vouchers on the Rewards Store with purpose.

Rewards are there to help you grow your business, so we try to list items that can be resold by Agents to make more money - that is why all items on the Rewards Store is at cost price.

Therefore, we will not be including shopping vouchers on the Rewards Store at this stage, for that reason.

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [ { "value": "voucher", "id": "3262eca5-8d62-4bdc-9d0b-0d4bee121d90", "categoryId": "e0751ef6-b3fd-4bd0-babb-3bc7619c24e1", "categoryName": "Support Tags" } ], "last_modified": "2024-06-11T14:31:17.458+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/388f92ef-3101-44fe-b2ad-36f46aeaac29" }, { "id": "fb2969eb-27ae-4828-aea6-452dcea0e105", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"fb2969eb-27ae-4828-aea6-452dcea0e105\",\"title\":\"Block Stock: Vodacom - Scam \",\"content\":\"\nVodacom\nhave also reported that sim cards from certain agents have been sold / given away to people who are now using them in an international number scam.\nWe have been given the serials and we have identified the accounts that have been affected.\nSMSes:\nBlocked SMS:\nAWESIM: Voda have reported sims on your account being sold that are being fraudulently used. Voda stock has been blocked. To apply to unblock contact Awesim.\nWarning SMS:\nAWESIM: Voda have reported sims on your account being sold that are being fraudulently used. To avoid your account being blocked only sell to real customers.\nAgent's that have been blocked can apply to Awesim to be unblocked. To do that, they need to do the following:\nContact call center or their sales rep\nThe CC or rep would need to get the following:\nWhat is the reason you sold / gave away sims without RICA'ing them to a REAL customer?\nHow many sims were sold / given away?\nIf they were paid for the sim cards:\nHow much where you paid?\nIf none of the above happened, then the description of what happened to their sims?\nThese reasons will need to be entered by the rep/CC into the\nStock Code FLAG Query\nworkflow which is on Slack.\nIt can be entered under the question \\\"\nWhat is the problem with the flag and why?\\\"\n.\nPLEASE NOTE:\nWe have a zero tolerance policy on agent's wasting and selling our stock to others. We have paid for the stock and it costs Awesim money. For agent's to sell this off and make some quick cash themselves loses Awesim a huge amount of money. This is not acceptable and we do not want to work with agents who are not prepared to value what Awesim gives them for free.\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"fb2969eb-27ae-4828-aea6-452dcea0e105\",\"title\":\"Block Stock: Vodacom - Scam \",\"content\":\"

Vodacom have also reported that sim cards from certain agents have been sold / given away to people who are now using them in an international number scam.
We have been given the serials and we have identified the accounts that have been affected.

SMSes:

Blocked SMS:

AWESIM: Voda have reported sims on your account being sold that are being fraudulently used. Voda stock has been blocked. To apply to unblock contact Awesim.




Warning SMS:

AWESIM: Voda have reported sims on your account being sold that are being fraudulently used. To avoid your account being blocked only sell to real customers.


Agent's that have been blocked can apply to Awesim to be unblocked. To do that, they need to do the following:

  • Contact call center or their sales rep

The CC or rep would need to get the following:

  1. What is the reason you sold / gave away sims without RICA'ing them to a REAL customer?
  2. How many sims were sold / given away?
  3. If they were paid for the sim cards: How much where you paid?
  4. If none of the above happened, then the description of what happened to their sims?


These reasons will need to be entered by the rep/CC into the Stock Code FLAG Query workflow which is on Slack.
It can be entered under the question \\\"What is the problem with the flag and why?\\\".

PLEASE NOTE:
We have a zero tolerance policy on agent's wasting and selling our stock to others. We have paid for the stock and it costs Awesim money. For agent's to sell this off and make some quick cash themselves loses Awesim a huge amount of money. This is not acceptable and we do not want to work with agents who are not prepared to value what Awesim gives them for free.

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [ { "value": "scam", "id": "b94f5acf-a15c-4e8d-884d-2aaa531b183a", "categoryId": "e0751ef6-b3fd-4bd0-babb-3bc7619c24e1", "categoryName": "Support Tags" }, { "value": "vodacom", "id": "8e99f24d-bf05-47dc-b095-b8dc82526158", "categoryId": "e0751ef6-b3fd-4bd0-babb-3bc7619c24e1", "categoryName": "Support Tags" } ], "last_modified": "2024-06-05T06:43:40.321+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/fb2969eb-27ae-4828-aea6-452dcea0e105" }, { "id": "76574592-5d98-4da7-85b7-84ea0fa469d4", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"76574592-5d98-4da7-85b7-84ea0fa469d4\",\"title\":\"SSoT Workflow\",\"content\":\"\nVideo Demo\nStep #1 - Author - create a card\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"76574592-5d98-4da7-85b7-84ea0fa469d4\",\"title\":\"SSoT Workflow\",\"content\":\"


Video Demo

Step #1 - Author - create a card

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2024-05-31T13:19:30.406+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/76574592-5d98-4da7-85b7-84ea0fa469d4" }, { "id": "554a42f1-bed8-4f46-87c2-5244d79242de", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"554a42f1-bed8-4f46-87c2-5244d79242de\",\"title\":\"Our Awesim - App Support Dashboard Login\",\"content\":\"\nLink:\nhttp://appi/our\nUsername:\nMicrosoft User\nPassword:\nMy.Awesim Password\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"554a42f1-bed8-4f46-87c2-5244d79242de\",\"title\":\"Our Awesim - App Support Dashboard Login\",\"content\":\"


Link:
http://appi/our

Username: Microsoft User
Password: My.Awesim Password


\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [ { "value": "Our Awesim", "id": "c4435b72-258c-471a-bdab-ece7abec804f", "categoryId": "e0751ef6-b3fd-4bd0-babb-3bc7619c24e1", "categoryName": "Support Tags" } ], "last_modified": "2024-05-31T10:33:11.431+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/554a42f1-bed8-4f46-87c2-5244d79242de" }, { "id": "2ab81abc-e474-48f1-a541-eb6b9c7c6df2", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"2ab81abc-e474-48f1-a541-eb6b9c7c6df2\",\"title\":\"What is SmartLoad? \",\"content\":\"\nWe use a Third Party App, SmartLoad. SmartLoad enables you to sell prepaid airtime, data, electricity and more. By using SmartLoad, your money is not tied up to one network - this means that you are able to use your money in your wallet for any of the products and services offered on the SmartLoad platforms.\nGetting Started\nDial: *130*678# or go to Smartcall Online – This service is Toll Free (not a subscription service).\nIt is important that you change your default SmartLoad PIN, and keep the pin safe. Awesim cannot access your Smartload eWallet or password.\nIf you need assistance with your SmartLoad, please contact Smartcall Customer Care:\nPhone: 011 507 4777\nEmail: support@smartcall.co.za\nWhatsApp: 064 670 8975\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"2ab81abc-e474-48f1-a541-eb6b9c7c6df2\",\"title\":\"What is SmartLoad? \",\"content\":\"

We use a Third Party App, SmartLoad. SmartLoad enables you to sell prepaid airtime, data, electricity and more. By using SmartLoad, your money is not tied up to one network - this means that you are able to use your money in your wallet for any of the products and services offered on the SmartLoad platforms.


Getting Started

  • Dial: *130*678# or go to Smartcall Online – This service is Toll Free (not a subscription service).
  • It is important that you change your default SmartLoad PIN, and keep the pin safe. Awesim cannot access your Smartload eWallet or password.
  • If you need assistance with your SmartLoad, please contact Smartcall Customer Care:
  • Phone: 011 507 4777
  • Email: support@smartcall.co.za
  • WhatsApp: 064 670 8975


\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [ { "value": "SmartLoad", "id": "ef28444e-0fd4-4dfb-981c-a9a13349bb09", "categoryId": "e0751ef6-b3fd-4bd0-babb-3bc7619c24e1", "categoryName": "Support Tags" }, { "value": "SmartLoad Pin", "id": "279dada9-cee4-49df-8b31-2d6feaf108c4", "categoryId": "e0751ef6-b3fd-4bd0-babb-3bc7619c24e1", "categoryName": "Support Tags" } ], "last_modified": "2024-05-13T14:03:41.335+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/2ab81abc-e474-48f1-a541-eb6b9c7c6df2" }, { "id": "d3035b5b-d03a-4d61-9d1b-b50fdda2e606", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"d3035b5b-d03a-4d61-9d1b-b50fdda2e606\",\"title\":\"awesim GOALS 2024\",\"content\":\"\nTimeframes:\nGoal 1:\n1 October 2023 - 31 July 2024\nGoals 2 & 3:\n1 October 2023 - 31 August 2024\nGoal 1: total new paid agents\nThe number of agents who received their\nfirst payment\nfrom awesim in a current month.\nAgent Creation does not = New Paid Agents\nDelay between Agent Creation, performance on Starter Package and the Agent receiving their first payment\nLast Year = 6 591\nTarget = 7 500\nGoal 2: total 1st recharged sims\nThe total number of sims recharged for the first time by REAL Customer(s) with R5 or more (not once off)\nReal Customer = achieve an increase in the total value of recharges of 15% or more\nLast Year = 3 710 000\nTarget = 5 000 000\nGoal 3: total my.awesim / app orders\nThe total number of agents who order on My.Awesim and / or New App\nShift from USSD >> My.Awesim / App\nLast Year = 22 556\nTarget = 36 600\nDetails:\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"d3035b5b-d03a-4d61-9d1b-b50fdda2e606\",\"title\":\"awesim GOALS 2024\",\"content\":\"

Timeframes:
Goal 1:

1 October 2023 - 31 July 2024

Goals 2 & 3:

1 October 2023 - 31 August 2024

Goal 1: total new paid agents

The number of agents who received their first payment from awesim in a current month.
Agent Creation does not = New Paid Agents
Delay between Agent Creation, performance on Starter Package and the Agent receiving their first payment
  • Last Year = 6 591
  • Target = 7 500

Goal 2: total 1st recharged sims

The total number of sims recharged for the first time by REAL Customer(s) with R5 or more (not once off)
Real Customer = achieve an increase in the total value of recharges of 15% or more
  • Last Year = 3 710 000
  • Target = 5 000 000



Goal 3: total my.awesim / app orders

The total number of agents who order on My.Awesim and / or New App
Shift from USSD >> My.Awesim / App
  • Last Year = 22 556
  • Target = 36 600




Details:

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [ { "value": "awesim", "id": "e062ed16-069a-457e-ae83-5775eb16403a", "categoryId": "877b2ec0-0822-48f7-ac44-e37af6584b8d", "categoryName": "Tags" }, { "value": "goal", "id": "31392e8c-271f-4415-b83c-be5259c02414", "categoryId": "877b2ec0-0822-48f7-ac44-e37af6584b8d", "categoryName": "Tags" } ], "last_modified": "2024-05-09T07:40:44.095+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/d3035b5b-d03a-4d61-9d1b-b50fdda2e606" }, { "id": "35392166-9aaf-47ca-b0dd-de07327bd479", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"35392166-9aaf-47ca-b0dd-de07327bd479\",\"title\":\"SmartRICA Verify Check - Number NOT Registered\",\"content\":\"\nWe have checked your number\n[MSISDN]\nand can confirm that you are\nnot\nyet registered as a RICA agent, in order to register new prepaid starters for RICA. In order for us to send you sim cards, please send us the following documents so that we can register you as a RICA agent:·\nA clear photo of your ID / Passport (please make sure that the important details, is clear and readable).\nA picture of you holding your ID / Passport next to your face.\nProof of address (it should be listed under your name and not be older than 3 months).\nProof of address can be either of the following:\nAccount statement\nBank statement\nLetter from the tribal office\nOr an affidavit stating your address\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"35392166-9aaf-47ca-b0dd-de07327bd479\",\"title\":\"SmartRICA Verify Check - Number NOT Registered\",\"content\":\"

We have checked your number [MSISDN] and can confirm that you are not yet registered as a RICA agent, in order to register new prepaid starters for RICA. In order for us to send you sim cards, please send us the following documents so that we can register you as a RICA agent:·

  • A clear photo of your ID / Passport (please make sure that the important details, is clear and readable).
  • A picture of you holding your ID / Passport next to your face.
  • Proof of address (it should be listed under your name and not be older than 3 months).

Proof of address can be either of the following:

  • Account statement
  • Bank statement
  • Letter from the tribal office
  • Or an affidavit stating your address

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [ { "value": "number", "id": "08b8441a-5785-47ce-b2ae-9ac3c8b411d9", "categoryId": "e0751ef6-b3fd-4bd0-babb-3bc7619c24e1", "categoryName": "Support Tags" }, { "value": "SmartRICA", "id": "48f14913-9ff3-4040-94af-bee5eb2d766b", "categoryId": "e0751ef6-b3fd-4bd0-babb-3bc7619c24e1", "categoryName": "Support Tags" } ], "last_modified": "2024-04-30T05:41:47.582+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/35392166-9aaf-47ca-b0dd-de07327bd479" }, { "id": "36eee994-2c0b-4729-be3f-07a51dd80e47", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"36eee994-2c0b-4729-be3f-07a51dd80e47\",\"title\":\"Requesting Proof of Address (SmartRICA) \",\"content\":\"\nPlease send us proof of address - which can be either of the following:\nAccount statement\nBank statement\nLetter from the tribal office\nOr an affidavit stating your address\nIt should be listed under your name and not be older than 3 months.\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"36eee994-2c0b-4729-be3f-07a51dd80e47\",\"title\":\"Requesting Proof of Address (SmartRICA) \",\"content\":\"

Please send us proof of address - which can be either of the following:

  • Account statement

  • Bank statement

  • Letter from the tribal office

  • Or an affidavit stating your address

It should be listed under your name and not be older than 3 months.

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2024-04-30T05:40:35.991+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/36eee994-2c0b-4729-be3f-07a51dd80e47" }, { "id": "16d76d3b-78f2-4130-9df4-6b70ea9d2581", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"16d76d3b-78f2-4130-9df4-6b70ea9d2581\",\"title\":\"New Agent (RICA Registered) Verification Documents\",\"content\":\"\nWe have confirmed that you are a RICA Agent using\n[MSISDN]\n. In order for us to place an order for you, please send us the following docs for verification:\nA clear photo of your ID / Passport (please make sure that the important details, is clear and readable)\nA picture of you holding your ID / Passport next to your face.\n​\n​\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"16d76d3b-78f2-4130-9df4-6b70ea9d2581\",\"title\":\"New Agent (RICA Registered) Verification Documents\",\"content\":\"

We have confirmed that you are a RICA Agent using[MSISDN]. In order for us to place an order for you, please send us the following docs for verification:

  • A clear photo of your ID / Passport (please make sure that the important details, is clear and readable)

  • A picture of you holding your ID / Passport next to your face.

​

​


\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2024-04-30T05:38:46.148+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/16d76d3b-78f2-4130-9df4-6b70ea9d2581" }, { "id": "e3b821ee-b549-4d38-8b27-cb639aafaec7", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"e3b821ee-b549-4d38-8b27-cb639aafaec7\",\"title\":\"Call Back \",\"content\":\"\nIf you require us to call you, please SMS the word \\\"CALL\\\" to 43203 and we will call you back. Thank you. \\n\n\\n\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"e3b821ee-b549-4d38-8b27-cb639aafaec7\",\"title\":\"Call Back \",\"content\":\"

If you require us to call you, please SMS the word \\\"CALL\\\" to 43203 and we will call you back. Thank you. \\n

\\n

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [ { "value": "43203", "id": "c70af3ec-07ff-490d-b817-56ad2bde3f8d", "categoryId": "e0751ef6-b3fd-4bd0-babb-3bc7619c24e1", "categoryName": "Support Tags" }, { "value": "CALL", "id": "73862aee-7da8-4b5e-b14d-75d1609be053", "categoryId": "e0751ef6-b3fd-4bd0-babb-3bc7619c24e1", "categoryName": "Support Tags" }, { "value": "SMS", "id": "647e2f6e-00af-4132-9cbd-b737d9fe421e", "categoryId": "e0751ef6-b3fd-4bd0-babb-3bc7619c24e1", "categoryName": "Support Tags" } ], "last_modified": "2024-04-30T05:31:55.268+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/e3b821ee-b549-4d38-8b27-cb639aafaec7" }, { "id": "89784413-4e42-448b-b7fe-e6f976982634", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"89784413-4e42-448b-b7fe-e6f976982634\",\"title\":\"One Time Pin (OTP) Delays \",\"content\":\"\nWe can confirm that the One Time Pin (OTP) was sent\n[insert: Date & Timestamp]\nThere may be a delay in the network, which is unfortunately out of our control.\nPlease try again in the next 30 minutes, and if still unsuccessful please let us know.\nThank you\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"89784413-4e42-448b-b7fe-e6f976982634\",\"title\":\"One Time Pin (OTP) Delays \",\"content\":\"

We can confirm that the One Time Pin (OTP) was sent [insert: Date & Timestamp]

There may be a delay in the network, which is unfortunately out of our control.

Please try again in the next 30 minutes, and if still unsuccessful please let us know.

Thank you

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [ { "value": "OTP", "id": "72aed9b0-c1c9-4fbc-9a27-08804b136173", "categoryId": "e0751ef6-b3fd-4bd0-babb-3bc7619c24e1", "categoryName": "Support Tags" } ], "last_modified": "2024-04-29T07:32:58.653+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/89784413-4e42-448b-b7fe-e6f976982634" }, { "id": "750f7098-0b4a-48ff-bc42-d0360f218670", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"750f7098-0b4a-48ff-bc42-d0360f218670\",\"title\":\"One Time Pin (OTP) Number Change \",\"content\":\"\nAre you available in the next 2 minutes to answer our call? We will request a One Time Pin (OTP) over the phone, to make the change.\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"750f7098-0b4a-48ff-bc42-d0360f218670\",\"title\":\"One Time Pin (OTP) Number Change \",\"content\":\"

Are you available in the next 2 minutes to answer our call? We will request a One Time Pin (OTP) over the phone, to make the change.

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [ { "value": "Number Change", "id": "fc94af9c-ef1c-43b2-982c-9e9e37930cf7", "categoryId": "e0751ef6-b3fd-4bd0-babb-3bc7619c24e1", "categoryName": "Support Tags" }, { "value": "One Time Pin", "id": "146c82b4-eb6c-4dbb-91ef-0b1e69cfa814", "categoryId": "e0751ef6-b3fd-4bd0-babb-3bc7619c24e1", "categoryName": "Support Tags" }, { "value": "OTP", "id": "72aed9b0-c1c9-4fbc-9a27-08804b136173", "categoryId": "e0751ef6-b3fd-4bd0-babb-3bc7619c24e1", "categoryName": "Support Tags" } ], "last_modified": "2024-04-29T07:03:39.513+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/750f7098-0b4a-48ff-bc42-d0360f218670" }, { "id": "f5672fed-2a67-4788-8cc8-c109763ba770", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"f5672fed-2a67-4788-8cc8-c109763ba770\",\"title\":\"One Time Pin (OTP) - Escalation for manual number change\",\"content\":\"\nThank you for sending through a photo of your ID and profile photo, to verify your account.\nBecause you do not have access to your current number on your account, we cannot change your number using the One Time Pin (OTP) process. We are going to send the request to our manager to update your number manually. You will get an SMS to confirm once your number has been updated.\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"f5672fed-2a67-4788-8cc8-c109763ba770\",\"title\":\"One Time Pin (OTP) - Escalation for manual number change\",\"content\":\"

Thank you for sending through a photo of your ID and profile photo, to verify your account.

Because you do not have access to your current number on your account, we cannot change your number using the One Time Pin (OTP) process. We are going to send the request to our manager to update your number manually. You will get an SMS to confirm once your number has been updated.

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2024-04-29T07:03:23.705+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/f5672fed-2a67-4788-8cc8-c109763ba770" }, { "id": "612e4bcd-39f4-4541-a77c-6ebb4da61c34", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"612e4bcd-39f4-4541-a77c-6ebb4da61c34\",\"title\":\"CMS - Escalation(s) Handling \",\"content\":\"\nSlack Channel:\n#ops_sales\nData Accuracy (Customer Info Table)\nCustomer History\nAny ESC changes to Customer Info Fields must be documented in CMS\nComment: 27711997656 replaced with 27661101428. [Checked: not on any other code(s) in CRM]. (27661101428) is a SmartCall RICA Agent.\nDropDown: RESOLVED / ROUTE TO CORRECT DEPARTMENT\nBase Change\nStep-by-step process\nSalesPerson\n: [GEN] In House -\nDropDown\n: BASE CHANGE - Routed to Customer Care\n*ESC checks to be done:\n1. Correct process followed with Source: Base Change\n2. CC Confirmation Courtesy Call - See Customer History\n3. Updated Verification (File Upload Verification)\n4. No Base Change to be logged and /or actioned whilst order in queue. Place order after Base Change.\n5. ESC Comment: Base Change from XXX to XXX. Delivery Method updated to XXX. -\nDropDown\n: RETURN TO SALES\nSALES REP IS MADE AWARE OF UPDATE AND PLACE AN ORDER (IF REQ)\nManual number change\nIMPORTANCE - add any additional info on agent Creation - Add Tel & Email Address)\nOne Time Pin (OTP) process is\nnot\npossible\n*ESC checks to be done:\n1. Service Request (SR) to include detailed request in Comment:\nOld Number Status + OLD number telephonic validation, New Number, NEW Verification DOCS UPLOADED and SmartRICA Verify (RICA registered), Checked: not on any other code(s) in CRM\nSalesPerson DropDown\n: TO CALL CENTRE SUP - Routed to Customer Care - Done -\nDropDown\n: ESCALATED\n2. OLD number telephonic validation\n3. Updated Verification (\nNEW\nFile UploadS - ID & PROFILE PHOTO)\n4. Checked: not on any other code(s) in CRM\nID / Passport Manual change\nNeed to investigate the reason behind the ID / Passport number change - CRM Audit Function\nUpdated Verification (File Upload Verification)\nChange or correct = Checked: not on any other code(s) in CRM\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"612e4bcd-39f4-4541-a77c-6ebb4da61c34\",\"title\":\"CMS - Escalation(s) Handling \",\"content\":\"


Slack Channel: #ops_sales

  • Data Accuracy (Customer Info Table)
  • Customer History
  • Any ESC changes to Customer Info Fields must be documented in CMS

    Comment: 27711997656 replaced with 27661101428. [Checked: not on any other code(s) in CRM]. (27661101428) is a SmartCall RICA Agent.
    DropDown: RESOLVED / ROUTE TO CORRECT DEPARTMENT


Base Change
Step-by-step process

  • SalesPerson: [GEN] In House - DropDown: BASE CHANGE - Routed to Customer Care

*ESC checks to be done:
1. Correct process followed with Source: Base Change
2. CC Confirmation Courtesy Call - See Customer History
3. Updated Verification (File Upload Verification)
4. No Base Change to be logged and /or actioned whilst order in queue. Place order after Base Change.
5. ESC Comment: Base Change from XXX to XXX. Delivery Method updated to XXX. - DropDown: RETURN TO SALES
SALES REP IS MADE AWARE OF UPDATE AND PLACE AN ORDER (IF REQ)


Manual number change

IMPORTANCE - add any additional info on agent Creation - Add Tel & Email Address)
One Time Pin (OTP) process is not possible

*ESC checks to be done:

1. Service Request (SR) to include detailed request in Comment:

Old Number Status + OLD number telephonic validation, New Number, NEW Verification DOCS UPLOADED and SmartRICA Verify (RICA registered), Checked: not on any other code(s) in CRM

SalesPerson DropDown: TO CALL CENTRE SUP - Routed to Customer Care - Done - DropDown: ESCALATED

2. OLD number telephonic validation
3. Updated Verification (NEW File UploadS - ID & PROFILE PHOTO)
4. Checked: not on any other code(s) in CRM

ID / Passport Manual change

  1. Need to investigate the reason behind the ID / Passport number change - CRM Audit Function
  2. Updated Verification (File Upload Verification)
  3. Change or correct = Checked: not on any other code(s) in CRM

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2024-04-24T13:41:18.089+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/612e4bcd-39f4-4541-a77c-6ebb4da61c34" }, { "id": "f90c0b06-8683-409f-9446-ee5c1d9c0efc", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"f90c0b06-8683-409f-9446-ee5c1d9c0efc\",\"title\":\"awesim Network Drive: Telkom (increased sim allocations) \",\"content\":\"\nIf agent(s) query this extra stock, effective from April 25th, 2024.\nWell done! You have been selected as a Top Performer on Telkom Normal SIMs, and received bonus Telkom SIMs as a PRIZE.\nImportant to continue to Rica REAL Customers who continue to load (recharge) and use airtime to qualify for more SIMs (and possible pre-loaded LTE data sims - which can be sold for cash).\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"f90c0b06-8683-409f-9446-ee5c1d9c0efc\",\"title\":\"awesim Network Drive: Telkom (increased sim allocations) \",\"content\":\"

If agent(s) query this extra stock, effective from April 25th, 2024.

Well done! You have been selected as a Top Performer on Telkom Normal SIMs, and received bonus Telkom SIMs as a PRIZE.
Important to continue to Rica REAL Customers who continue to load (recharge) and use airtime to qualify for more SIMs (and possible pre-loaded LTE data sims - which can be sold for cash).

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [ { "value": "allocation", "id": "1a4be8f1-3b52-41fa-a517-8c93465fdb64", "categoryId": "e0751ef6-b3fd-4bd0-babb-3bc7619c24e1", "categoryName": "Support Tags" }, { "value": "prize", "id": "36a0d092-3c57-44ba-b4e2-b66256ef0e8a", "categoryId": "e0751ef6-b3fd-4bd0-babb-3bc7619c24e1", "categoryName": "Support Tags" }, { "value": "Telkom", "id": "56efb4ed-0f90-4d14-b2fd-cb730b3d2b9a", "categoryId": "e0751ef6-b3fd-4bd0-babb-3bc7619c24e1", "categoryName": "Support Tags" } ], "last_modified": "2024-04-23T14:49:31.237+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/f90c0b06-8683-409f-9446-ee5c1d9c0efc" }, { "id": "1d4f5fc6-02c0-4f47-ba63-90324e41aa25", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"1d4f5fc6-02c0-4f47-ba63-90324e41aa25\",\"title\":\"Request for Data Sim Cards\",\"content\":\"\nData sims cannot be requested or bought. Data sims are automatically allocated to well performing agents who are doing well on normal sims, by the system. We encourage you to continue to distribute sims to Real Customers.\nReal Customers perform\ncontinuous subsequent recharges\nafter the required amount (value) of recharges\nneeded to activate the respective sim card has been loaded and used by the customer as per the activation criteria.\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"1d4f5fc6-02c0-4f47-ba63-90324e41aa25\",\"title\":\"Request for Data Sim Cards\",\"content\":\"

Data sims cannot be requested or bought. Data sims are automatically allocated to well performing agents who are doing well on normal sims, by the system. We encourage you to continue to distribute sims to Real Customers.

  • Real Customers perform continuous subsequent recharges after the required amount (value) of recharges needed to activate the respective sim card has been loaded and used by the customer as per the activation criteria.

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2024-04-23T14:40:17.470+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/1d4f5fc6-02c0-4f47-ba63-90324e41aa25" }, { "id": "480e44f0-ca75-40d7-a375-fdd6e8feb9ce", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"480e44f0-ca75-40d7-a375-fdd6e8feb9ce\",\"title\":\"Smartload Cash Out Fees\",\"content\":\"\nIMPORTANT\n: Fees to cash out with smartload.\nSmartcall charges R10 for any cash out.\nAfter that there is another charge by the banks to withdraw the money. Attached is what FNB charges.\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"480e44f0-ca75-40d7-a375-fdd6e8feb9ce\",\"title\":\"Smartload Cash Out Fees\",\"content\":\"

IMPORTANT: Fees to cash out with smartload.

Smartcall charges R10 for any cash out.

After that there is another charge by the banks to withdraw the money. Attached is what FNB charges.

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2024-04-02T05:55:30.157+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/480e44f0-ca75-40d7-a375-fdd6e8feb9ce" }, { "id": "d4712b2e-4c13-4400-be77-fc95af0c1dee", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"d4712b2e-4c13-4400-be77-fc95af0c1dee\",\"title\":\"Transfer of Internal Calls - Euphoria Telecom \",\"content\":\"\nStep by Step Guide to an Internal Call transfer:\nSelect [\nAnswer\n] - upon evaluating the nature of the inquiry needed for an internal transfer\nPlease ask for the caller to hold whilst you\ncheck availability. Select [II] On Hold button\nCall Script:-\nWe will confirm availability, and if available you will be transferred directly. Please hold.\nYou must directly engage with internal calls; blind transfers are not permitted.\nSelect\n[Transfer]\nto call the extension and /or mobile number first, to confirm availability\nType the Ext #\nOR\nname if you are unsure of the extension number, and the Ext will pop up\nOR\nmobile number\nClick\n[Call First]\nPlease advise Ext about the purpose of the call.\nIf available to accept, select Transfer\n[Arrows]\n*If not available, select [x]\nRemove call from\n[II] On Hold\nThank the caller for holding and follow Standard Operating Procedure (SOP).\nOther helpful Card(s):\nFinance Department Contact List - Call Transfer(s)\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"d4712b2e-4c13-4400-be77-fc95af0c1dee\",\"title\":\"Transfer of Internal Calls - Euphoria Telecom \",\"content\":\"

Step by Step Guide to an Internal Call transfer:

  1. Select [Answer] - upon evaluating the nature of the inquiry needed for an internal transfer
  2. Please ask for the caller to hold whilst you check availability. Select [II] On Hold button

    Call Script:-
    We will confirm availability, and if available you will be transferred directly. Please hold.

You must directly engage with internal calls; blind transfers are not permitted.

  1. Select [Transfer] to call the extension and /or mobile number first, to confirm availability
  2. Type the Ext # OR name if you are unsure of the extension number, and the Ext will pop up OR mobile number
  3. Click [Call First]
  4. Please advise Ext about the purpose of the call.
  5. If available to accept, select Transfer [Arrows]

*If not available, select [x]

  1. Remove call from [II] On Hold
  2. Thank the caller for holding and follow Standard Operating Procedure (SOP).

Other helpful Card(s):

  • Finance Department Contact List - Call Transfer(s)

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [ { "value": "Euphoria", "id": "039fb205-8a0e-48e7-9888-8105b5c26c9e", "categoryId": "e0751ef6-b3fd-4bd0-babb-3bc7619c24e1", "categoryName": "Support Tags" } ], "last_modified": "2024-02-19T12:40:06.959+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/d4712b2e-4c13-4400-be77-fc95af0c1dee" }, { "id": "d32c7bdb-c2b8-40f7-8e2b-63626b62ebcc", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"d32c7bdb-c2b8-40f7-8e2b-63626b62ebcc\",\"title\":\"MyAwesim Leaderboard \",\"content\":\"\nLeaders are chosen by the\ntotal highest star rating points issued for the month\n(points are normally issued around the 25th of the month).\nThe\ntotal star rating points\nare determined by the\nnumber of activations\nand\nyour star rating\n. The less you waste stock, the higher your star rating and the higher your star rating points.\nActivations are calculated by taking all your paid activations from the 25th payment plus any data sim activations less any exclusions.\nNational rankings\nTops 3 of Top 20 National\n1: 750 points\n2: 500 points\n3: 250 points\nMost Improved: 300 points\nprovincial rankings\nTop 3 of Top 10 Provincial (per province)\n1: 300 points\n2: 200 points\n3: 100 points\nMost Improved: 100 points\nrankings for men\nTop 3 Men\n1: 300 points\n2: 200 points\n3: 100 points\nrankings for women\nTop 3 Women\n1: 300 points\n2: 200 points\n3: 100 points\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"d32c7bdb-c2b8-40f7-8e2b-63626b62ebcc\",\"title\":\"MyAwesim Leaderboard \",\"content\":\"

Leaders are chosen by the total highest star rating points issued for the month (points are normally issued around the 25th of the month).

The total star rating points are determined by the number of activations and your star rating. The less you waste stock, the higher your star rating and the higher your star rating points.

Activations are calculated by taking all your paid activations from the 25th payment plus any data sim activations less any exclusions.

National rankings

Tops 3 of Top 20 National

  • 1: 750 points

  • 2: 500 points

  • 3: 250 points

  • Most Improved: 300 points

provincial rankings

Top 3 of Top 10 Provincial (per province)

  • 1: 300 points

  • 2: 200 points

  • 3: 100 points

  • Most Improved: 100 points

rankings for men

Top 3 Men

  • 1: 300 points

  • 2: 200 points

  • 3: 100 points

rankings for women

Top 3 Women

  • 1: 300 points

  • 2: 200 points

  • 3: 100 points

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [ { "value": "leaderboard", "id": "47f6ba7a-9b0c-41f3-9770-0999bb73a801", "categoryId": "e0751ef6-b3fd-4bd0-babb-3bc7619c24e1", "categoryName": "Support Tags" } ], "last_modified": "2023-12-07T10:11:59.948+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/d32c7bdb-c2b8-40f7-8e2b-63626b62ebcc" }, { "id": "ba59494d-5aaf-4242-8187-94b6c9d96631", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"ba59494d-5aaf-4242-8187-94b6c9d96631\",\"title\":\"Base Change Request: from Sales to RAM \",\"content\":\"\nThank you for your request. Before we send your request to update your delivery method, is there a specific reason you want your sims to be delivered by RAM and not by our local Sales Rep,\n[Name]\n?\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"ba59494d-5aaf-4242-8187-94b6c9d96631\",\"title\":\"Base Change Request: from Sales to RAM \",\"content\":\"

Thank you for your request. Before we send your request to update your delivery method, is there a specific reason you want your sims to be delivered by RAM and not by our local Sales Rep, [Name]?

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2023-09-19T14:52:19.153+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/ba59494d-5aaf-4242-8187-94b6c9d96631" }, { "id": "b5bd0d8b-2eba-4e2c-93a5-8c09cc9d87aa", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"b5bd0d8b-2eba-4e2c-93a5-8c09cc9d87aa\",\"title\":\"LTE Coverage Check\",\"content\":\"\nCell C -\ncellc.co.za/cellc/coverage-map\nTelkom -\ntelkom.co.za/check-coverage/\nMTN -\nmtn.co.za/home/coverage/\nVodacom -\nvccoverage.afrigis.co.za/#/\nLTE (4G) means faster downloads\nIt's much better for customers that use a lot of data\nGet an awesim sim; RICA and Connect it; then change it to that network's LTE tariff.\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"b5bd0d8b-2eba-4e2c-93a5-8c09cc9d87aa\",\"title\":\"LTE Coverage Check\",\"content\":\"

Cell C - cellc.co.za/cellc/coverage-map
Telkom - telkom.co.za/check-coverage/
MTN - mtn.co.za/home/coverage/
Vodacom - vccoverage.afrigis.co.za/#/

LTE (4G) means faster downloads
It's much better for customers that use a lot of data
Get an awesim sim; RICA and Connect it; then change it to that network's LTE tariff.

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [ { "value": "LTE", "id": "907d7edc-36e0-421f-9c5a-f80135aab620", "categoryId": "877b2ec0-0822-48f7-ac44-e37af6584b8d", "categoryName": "Tags" } ], "last_modified": "2023-09-15T16:28:55.418+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/b5bd0d8b-2eba-4e2c-93a5-8c09cc9d87aa" }, { "id": "1e78cc9e-7815-4741-aa39-cf5044331024", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"1e78cc9e-7815-4741-aa39-cf5044331024\",\"title\":\"How to Buy Reward Points (RPs) \",\"content\":\"\nDial our USSD on *130*43203#\nSelect Rewards\nSelect Buy Points\nSelect payment method\nDeposit into our bank account or make a Smartload transfer, min R50. No refunds R1 = 1 point.\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"1e78cc9e-7815-4741-aa39-cf5044331024\",\"title\":\"How to Buy Reward Points (RPs) \",\"content\":\"

Dial our USSD on *130*43203#

  • Select Rewards
  • Select Buy Points
  • Select payment method

Deposit into our bank account or make a Smartload transfer, min R50. No refunds R1 = 1 point.

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [ { "value": "Buy RPs", "id": "7385f853-e925-4890-b777-e20bb1396d50", "categoryId": "e0751ef6-b3fd-4bd0-babb-3bc7619c24e1", "categoryName": "Support Tags" } ], "last_modified": "2023-08-01T11:39:39.484+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/1e78cc9e-7815-4741-aa39-cf5044331024" }, { "id": "f8abe7e0-5ea4-4f9f-90fd-d0891af0d5af", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"f8abe7e0-5ea4-4f9f-90fd-d0891af0d5af\",\"title\":\"Payment Exclusions \",\"content\":\"\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"f8abe7e0-5ea4-4f9f-90fd-d0891af0d5af\",\"title\":\"Payment Exclusions \",\"content\":\"

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [ { "value": "payment exclusion", "id": "0528966f-0792-4090-b01c-cf28f63fa678", "categoryId": "e0751ef6-b3fd-4bd0-babb-3bc7619c24e1", "categoryName": "Support Tags" } ], "last_modified": "2023-06-23T09:44:08.756+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/f8abe7e0-5ea4-4f9f-90fd-d0891af0d5af" }, { "id": "f738e123-dea6-483b-a36a-79a1327ec0be", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"f738e123-dea6-483b-a36a-79a1327ec0be\",\"title\":\"OLD ACCOUNT ON PAID TO RICA\",\"content\":\"\nPlease note that your payment method will default to SmartLoad and this will be paid to the\nmain number\nlisted on your account\nPAY TO RICA -We pay to the number that has rica'd the activated simcard\nPAY TO CODE- Means the owner of the simcards get paid regardless of who\nRICA'S his simcards.\nYour account is currently on PAY TO RICA, Would you like to change to PAY TO CODE?\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"f738e123-dea6-483b-a36a-79a1327ec0be\",\"title\":\"OLD ACCOUNT ON PAID TO RICA\",\"content\":\"
  • Please note that your payment method will default to SmartLoad and this will be paid to the main number listed on your account

    PAY TO RICA -We pay to the number that has rica'd the activated simcard
    PAY TO CODE- Means the owner of the simcards get paid regardless of who
    RICA'S his simcards.

    Your account is currently on PAY TO RICA, Would you like to change to PAY TO CODE?

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2023-06-02T14:54:08.645+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/f738e123-dea6-483b-a36a-79a1327ec0be" }, { "id": "035e5d85-6239-4462-9819-13d9a71ab785", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"035e5d85-6239-4462-9819-13d9a71ab785\",\"title\":\"Difference between Connection/1st Recharge/Activation.\",\"content\":\"\nConnections\nare different to\n1st Recharges\nwhich are different to\nActivations\n:\nConnections\n- when a sim connects to the network and gets a cell phone number. Some networks require there to be some sort of activity before the show a connection (a call or SMS), others (like Vodacom) don't. Hopefully most connections will have a 1st Recharge but not all do.\n1st Recharges:\n- This is when a sim recharges for the first time ever. It can be any amount , so even R1. We don't pay for a 1st recharge. We pay for sims that have activated AND are REAL customers. A 1st recharge does not guarantee an activation. Not all 1st recharges become activations in the same month or in months after the 1st recharge.\nActivations -\nAn activation is a sim that has recharged AND used (spent) the required amount of airtime within the required number of months (different per network). A REAL customer means the sim is used by a real person, who continues to use and recharge the sim on a regular basis after an activation has been reached.\nPLEASE NOTE:\nIt can take time for a sim to activate as the customer needs to recharge enough airtime/data AND use it all. This can take a few months depending on how much the customer uses the sim. A sim can activate in 1 month OR 2 months OR 3 months OR 4 months etc. It just depends how quickly the customer RECHARGES and USES the airtime/data.\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"035e5d85-6239-4462-9819-13d9a71ab785\",\"title\":\"Difference between Connection/1st Recharge/Activation.\",\"content\":\"

Connections are different to 1st Recharges which are different to Activations:

  • Connections - when a sim connects to the network and gets a cell phone number. Some networks require there to be some sort of activity before the show a connection (a call or SMS), others (like Vodacom) don't. Hopefully most connections will have a 1st Recharge but not all do.
  • 1st Recharges: - This is when a sim recharges for the first time ever. It can be any amount , so even R1. We don't pay for a 1st recharge. We pay for sims that have activated AND are REAL customers. A 1st recharge does not guarantee an activation. Not all 1st recharges become activations in the same month or in months after the 1st recharge.
  • Activations - An activation is a sim that has recharged AND used (spent) the required amount of airtime within the required number of months (different per network). A REAL customer means the sim is used by a real person, who continues to use and recharge the sim on a regular basis after an activation has been reached.

PLEASE NOTE: It can take time for a sim to activate as the customer needs to recharge enough airtime/data AND use it all. This can take a few months depending on how much the customer uses the sim. A sim can activate in 1 month OR 2 months OR 3 months OR 4 months etc. It just depends how quickly the customer RECHARGES and USES the airtime/data.

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2023-05-19T07:09:16.074+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/035e5d85-6239-4462-9819-13d9a71ab785" }, { "id": "d041b019-22e9-4920-a6de-84e41c81010f", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"d041b019-22e9-4920-a6de-84e41c81010f\",\"title\":\"Default Order Type (DOT): Paid to CODE - Expired / Returning Agents \",\"content\":\"\nPlease note that your payment method will default to SmartLoad and this will be paid to the\nmain number\nlisted on your account (Paid to CODE).\nThis means, that on the 25th and End of each month, all activations invoiced to your Code, will be paid to the agents chosen payment method.\nRemember, agents can change their chosen method (where they want to be paid) at any time by logging onto\nmy.awesim.co.za\nand selecting your\nPayment Method.\nVisit\nmy.awesim.co.za\n- Menu - Select Payment Options\nfor a c\nomparison of all the payment options available at Awesim. This can be SmartLoad or bank or visa cards (if you qualify).\nWhat is SmartLoad?\nWe use a Third Party App, SmartLoad. SmartLoad enables you to sell prepaid airtime, data, electricity and more. By using SmartLoad, your money is not tied up to one network - this means that you are able to use your money in your wallet for any of the products and services offered on the SmartLoad platforms.\nGetting Started\nDial: *130*678# or go to Smartcall Online – This service is Toll Free (not a subscription service).\nIt is important that you change your default SmartLoad PIN, and keep the pin safe. Awesim cannot access your Smartload eWallet or password.\nIf you need asssistance with your SmartLoad, please contact Smartcall Customer Care:\nPhone:\n011 507 4789\nor Email:\nsupport@smartcall.co.za\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"d041b019-22e9-4920-a6de-84e41c81010f\",\"title\":\"Default Order Type (DOT): Paid to CODE - Expired / Returning Agents \",\"content\":\"
  • Please note that your payment method will default to SmartLoad and this will be paid to the main number listed on your account (Paid to CODE).
  • This means, that on the 25th and End of each month, all activations invoiced to your Code, will be paid to the agents chosen payment method.
  • Remember, agents can change their chosen method (where they want to be paid) at any time by logging onto my.awesim.co.za and selecting your Payment Method.
  • Visit my.awesim.co.za - Menu - Select Payment Options for a comparison of all the payment options available at Awesim. This can be SmartLoad or bank or visa cards (if you qualify).

What is SmartLoad?
We use a Third Party App, SmartLoad. SmartLoad enables you to sell prepaid airtime, data, electricity and more. By using SmartLoad, your money is not tied up to one network - this means that you are able to use your money in your wallet for any of the products and services offered on the SmartLoad platforms.


Getting Started

  • Dial: *130*678# or go to Smartcall Online – This service is Toll Free (not a subscription service).
  • It is important that you change your default SmartLoad PIN, and keep the pin safe. Awesim cannot access your Smartload eWallet or password.
  • If you need asssistance with your SmartLoad, please contact Smartcall Customer Care:
    Phone: 011 507 4789 or Email: support@smartcall.co.za

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [ { "value": "DOT", "id": "39ce5db6-f9b9-460a-b443-ed10e80d9b4b", "categoryId": "e0751ef6-b3fd-4bd0-babb-3bc7619c24e1", "categoryName": "Support Tags" }, { "value": "Payment Method", "id": "f17d6e71-68e4-4b7c-97f8-8998b463d701", "categoryId": "e0751ef6-b3fd-4bd0-babb-3bc7619c24e1", "categoryName": "Support Tags" }, { "value": "SmartLoad", "id": "ef28444e-0fd4-4dfb-981c-a9a13349bb09", "categoryId": "e0751ef6-b3fd-4bd0-babb-3bc7619c24e1", "categoryName": "Support Tags" } ], "last_modified": "2023-04-04T07:57:24.546+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/d041b019-22e9-4920-a6de-84e41c81010f" }, { "id": "4dd6d98f-97f2-4138-b389-943459fcfc9d", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"4dd6d98f-97f2-4138-b389-943459fcfc9d\",\"title\":\"High Connect on Voda \",\"content\":\"\nPlease avoid to Pre rica and bulk Rica on your Vodacom sim cards it is not allowed, you need to Rica sim cards using your customer's details to avoid your stock being placed on hold, we will monitor the usage of the sim cards .\\n\nPlease check after 2-3 working days if you qualify for Vodacom sim cards.\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"4dd6d98f-97f2-4138-b389-943459fcfc9d\",\"title\":\"High Connect on Voda \",\"content\":\"
