Please avoid to Pre rica and bulk Rica on your Vodacom sim cards it is not allowed, you need to Rica sim cards using your customer's details to avoid your stock being placed on hold, we will monitor the usage of the sim cards .\\n

Please check after 2-3 working days if you qualify for Vodacom sim cards.

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2023-01-17T13:05:45.427+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/4dd6d98f-97f2-4138-b389-943459fcfc9d" }, { "id": "6b045686-5903-43df-b971-29d546a48d1a", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"6b045686-5903-43df-b971-29d546a48d1a\",\"title\":\"SmartRICA Verify Check - Number Successfully Registered\",\"content\":\"\nWe have checked your number and can confirm that you are successfully registered as a RICA agent and able to register new prepaid starters for RICA.\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"6b045686-5903-43df-b971-29d546a48d1a\",\"title\":\"SmartRICA Verify Check - Number Successfully Registered\",\"content\":\"

We have checked your number and can confirm that you are successfully registered as a RICA agent and able to register new prepaid starters for RICA.

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2023-01-04T13:13:38.725+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/6b045686-5903-43df-b971-29d546a48d1a" }, { "id": "79005072-ee2f-4164-9400-2490279e423c", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"79005072-ee2f-4164-9400-2490279e423c\",\"title\":\"Hello / Greeting an existing agent \",\"content\":\"\nHello\nname\n, Thank you for contacting us. How can we assist you today?\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"79005072-ee2f-4164-9400-2490279e423c\",\"title\":\"Hello / Greeting an existing agent \",\"content\":\"

Hello name, Thank you for contacting us. How can we assist you today?

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [ { "value": "contact", "id": "aba4f513-9d41-4cd3-b63c-07588007988c", "categoryId": "e0751ef6-b3fd-4bd0-babb-3bc7619c24e1", "categoryName": "Support Tags" }, { "value": "Good Day", "id": "dddf364b-39d2-4026-a227-6a78fcd3e585", "categoryId": "e0751ef6-b3fd-4bd0-babb-3bc7619c24e1", "categoryName": "Support Tags" }, { "value": "greeting", "id": "aa3f86ba-23ae-4106-af31-c6ae2008b2f2", "categoryId": "e0751ef6-b3fd-4bd0-babb-3bc7619c24e1", "categoryName": "Support Tags" }, { "value": "Hello", "id": "1ed9f17c-0a1d-45ec-88c3-e1e1ffd516eb", "categoryId": "e0751ef6-b3fd-4bd0-babb-3bc7619c24e1", "categoryName": "Support Tags" } ], "last_modified": "2023-01-03T13:51:26.287+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/79005072-ee2f-4164-9400-2490279e423c" }, { "id": "190dabed-c0b4-4b3d-87cb-3dce61563364", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"190dabed-c0b4-4b3d-87cb-3dce61563364\",\"title\":\"Star Rating \",\"content\":\"\nWe have a\nStar Rating\nsystem that checks all the SIMs we have sent you and the quality of the bona fide paying customer(s) you acquire.\nThese stats are compared to all of our agents’ performance.\nYou will be allocated a star rating, and you will qualify for stock for the month based on that rating.\nThe higher your star rating, the more stock you will qualify for.\n1* is the lowest (worst) rating, up to 5* which is the highest (best).\nWe want to send more stock to agents that put better customers on their sims and that don’t waste their stock.\nYou can view your Star Ratings by logging into the MyAwesim App.\nhttps://my.awesim.co.za\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"190dabed-c0b4-4b3d-87cb-3dce61563364\",\"title\":\"Star Rating \",\"content\":\"

  • We have a Star Rating system that checks all the SIMs we have sent you and the quality of the bona fide paying customer(s) you acquire.

  • These stats are compared to all of our agents’ performance.

  • You will be allocated a star rating, and you will qualify for stock for the month based on that rating.

  • The higher your star rating, the more stock you will qualify for.

  • 1* is the lowest (worst) rating, up to 5* which is the highest (best).

  • We want to send more stock to agents that put better customers on their sims and that don’t waste their stock.

You can view your Star Ratings by logging into the MyAwesim App.
https://my.awesim.co.za

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [ { "value": "star rating", "id": "4975ef30-46bd-46b9-9569-942ad94c32ee", "categoryId": "e0751ef6-b3fd-4bd0-babb-3bc7619c24e1", "categoryName": "Support Tags" } ], "last_modified": "2023-01-03T13:26:36.360+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/190dabed-c0b4-4b3d-87cb-3dce61563364" }, { "id": "296ad92f-fa9a-4918-8ec7-aa7d0c7fbff2", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"296ad92f-fa9a-4918-8ec7-aa7d0c7fbff2\",\"title\":\"Greeting a new agent \",\"content\":\"\nGood day, thank you for contacting Awesim Telecoms. How can we assist you?\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"296ad92f-fa9a-4918-8ec7-aa7d0c7fbff2\",\"title\":\"Greeting a new agent \",\"content\":\"

Good day, thank you for contacting Awesim Telecoms. How can we assist you?

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [ { "value": "greeting", "id": "aa3f86ba-23ae-4106-af31-c6ae2008b2f2", "categoryId": "e0751ef6-b3fd-4bd0-babb-3bc7619c24e1", "categoryName": "Support Tags" }, { "value": "Hello", "id": "1ed9f17c-0a1d-45ec-88c3-e1e1ffd516eb", "categoryId": "e0751ef6-b3fd-4bd0-babb-3bc7619c24e1", "categoryName": "Support Tags" }, { "value": "new", "id": "e5b6159a-6170-4066-9e08-5d5b5df6b381", "categoryId": "e0751ef6-b3fd-4bd0-babb-3bc7619c24e1", "categoryName": "Support Tags" }, { "value": "New Agent", "id": "6616c6f6-a0c5-4239-a985-bd98148d7470", "categoryId": "e0751ef6-b3fd-4bd0-babb-3bc7619c24e1", "categoryName": "Support Tags" } ], "last_modified": "2023-01-03T13:25:39.879+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/296ad92f-fa9a-4918-8ec7-aa7d0c7fbff2" }, { "id": "a6fb2ccc-13b0-461b-9c3d-1b4abe0ede97", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"a6fb2ccc-13b0-461b-9c3d-1b4abe0ede97\",\"title\":\"MyAwesim App password reset\",\"content\":\"\nYour password has been reset. Please re-register on\nmy.awesim.co.za\nand keep the answer to the Security Question secure for future.\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"a6fb2ccc-13b0-461b-9c3d-1b4abe0ede97\",\"title\":\"MyAwesim App password reset\",\"content\":\"

Your password has been reset. Please re-register on my.awesim.co.za and keep the answer to the Security Question secure for future.

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2023-01-03T13:04:33.345+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/a6fb2ccc-13b0-461b-9c3d-1b4abe0ede97" }, { "id": "bcb3ea86-4d80-4e6c-b0bf-1d07747c9275", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"bcb3ea86-4d80-4e6c-b0bf-1d07747c9275\",\"title\":\"SmartLoad Transfer to Awesim (Bank or Smartload Number) \",\"content\":\"\nIn order to Buy Points, we have two options:\nDeposit into our bank account or make a Smartload transfer, min R100. No refunds R1 = 1 point\nTo access our bank account details or SmartLoad number:\n-Dial our USSD *130*43203#\n-Select [Rewards]\n-Select [Buy Points]\n-Select Payment Option 1. Bank Details 2. SmartLoad Number\nAccess SmartLoad by simply dialling *130*678# and follow the prompts, should you wish to make payment using SmartLoad Transfer.\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"bcb3ea86-4d80-4e6c-b0bf-1d07747c9275\",\"title\":\"SmartLoad Transfer to Awesim (Bank or Smartload Number) \",\"content\":\"

In order to Buy Points, we have two options:
Deposit into our bank account or make a Smartload transfer, min R100. No refunds R1 = 1 point

To access our bank account details or SmartLoad number:
-Dial our USSD *130*43203#
-Select [Rewards]
-Select [Buy Points]
-Select Payment Option 1. Bank Details 2. SmartLoad Number

Access SmartLoad by simply dialling *130*678# and follow the prompts, should you wish to make payment using SmartLoad Transfer.

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [ { "value": "payment", "id": "ae80ed9f-236c-444e-8502-38fb7bec080a", "categoryId": "e0751ef6-b3fd-4bd0-babb-3bc7619c24e1", "categoryName": "Support Tags" }, { "value": "SmartLoad", "id": "ef28444e-0fd4-4dfb-981c-a9a13349bb09", "categoryId": "e0751ef6-b3fd-4bd0-babb-3bc7619c24e1", "categoryName": "Support Tags" } ], "last_modified": "2023-01-03T13:04:12.561+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/bcb3ea86-4d80-4e6c-b0bf-1d07747c9275" }, { "id": "c6629c84-e81e-405d-a3af-89d7c9f43961", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"c6629c84-e81e-405d-a3af-89d7c9f43961\",\"title\":\"RICA ISSUES \",\"content\":\"\nPlease send the following so we can investigate further\nWhat system is the agent using to RICA?\nWhat is the RICA Agent's cell number?\nWhat date did the error happened?\nWhat network is the sim that has an error?\nWhat is the sim serial?\nWhat did the error message say?\nWas the error message on USSD or sent via SMS?\nID/Passport no. of person being RICA'ed?\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"c6629c84-e81e-405d-a3af-89d7c9f43961\",\"title\":\"RICA ISSUES \",\"content\":\"

  • Please send the following so we can investigate further
    What system is the agent using to RICA?

    What is the RICA Agent's cell number?

    What date did the error happened?

    What network is the sim that has an error?

    What is the sim serial?

    What did the error message say?

    Was the error message on USSD or sent via SMS?

    ID/Passport no. of person being RICA'ed?

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [ { "value": "rica issue", "id": "550dab32-85bc-40ec-8130-a16316081198", "categoryId": "877b2ec0-0822-48f7-ac44-e37af6584b8d", "categoryName": "Tags" } ], "last_modified": "2022-11-02T12:22:44.170+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/c6629c84-e81e-405d-a3af-89d7c9f43961" }, { "id": "3b7a2ae5-2bc2-426d-a2c6-a167067ccad1", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"3b7a2ae5-2bc2-426d-a2c6-a167067ccad1\",\"title\":\"Rewards Points (RPs) Balance \",\"content\":\"\nPlease note that Rewards Points are only allocated once payment reflects in our account. Turn around time for RP's to be allocated, once reflected is 2 working days.\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"3b7a2ae5-2bc2-426d-a2c6-a167067ccad1\",\"title\":\"Rewards Points (RPs) Balance \",\"content\":\"

Please note that Rewards Points are only allocated once payment reflects in our account. Turn around time for RP's to be allocated, once reflected is 2 working days.

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [ { "value": "Buy RPs", "id": "7385f853-e925-4890-b777-e20bb1396d50", "categoryId": "e0751ef6-b3fd-4bd0-babb-3bc7619c24e1", "categoryName": "Support Tags" }, { "value": "Rewards", "id": "56735c7c-c794-480f-8b72-5fbcbb664289", "categoryId": "e0751ef6-b3fd-4bd0-babb-3bc7619c24e1", "categoryName": "Support Tags" } ], "last_modified": "2022-10-31T13:08:36.620+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/3b7a2ae5-2bc2-426d-a2c6-a167067ccad1" }, { "id": "dd71071a-8a7f-430f-91fb-21c81bc4d5e6", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"dd71071a-8a7f-430f-91fb-21c81bc4d5e6\",\"title\":\"Day After Delivery\",\"content\":\"\nThank you for getting back to us.\nWe called to check if you have received your stock from Awesim Telecoms, and if you know how to RICA?\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"dd71071a-8a7f-430f-91fb-21c81bc4d5e6\",\"title\":\"Day After Delivery\",\"content\":\"

Thank you for getting back to us.

We called to check if you have received your stock from Awesim Telecoms, and if you know how to RICA?

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2022-10-11T10:43:07.291+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/dd71071a-8a7f-430f-91fb-21c81bc4d5e6" }, { "id": "1b94e15a-8239-4f80-860f-b1a7f392e9ec", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"1b94e15a-8239-4f80-860f-b1a7f392e9ec\",\"title\":\"How to become a dealer \",\"content\":\"\nThis is the criteria that we usually use in the first stage of the dealer application just to get an idea of how he performs.\\n\n\\n\nPlease provide me with the following information for your dealership request:\\n\nNumber of agents you have working under you\\n\nStats of your previous performance with the company you were distributing for.\\n\nAreas which you work in\\n\nWhich network do you work with mostly\\n\nBusiness plan of your distribution of sim cards.\\n\nAs soon as we have this information we will review and provide you with a suitable deal.\\n\n\\n\nPlease send the above information to dealers@awesim.co.za\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"1b94e15a-8239-4f80-860f-b1a7f392e9ec\",\"title\":\"How to become a dealer \",\"content\":\"

This is the criteria that we usually use in the first stage of the dealer application just to get an idea of how he performs.\\n

\\n

Please provide me with the following information for your dealership request:\\n

Number of agents you have working under you\\n

Stats of your previous performance with the company you were distributing for.\\n

Areas which you work in\\n

Which network do you work with mostly\\n

Business plan of your distribution of sim cards.\\n

As soon as we have this information we will review and provide you with a suitable deal.\\n

\\n

Please send the above information to dealers@awesim.co.za

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2022-09-21T07:24:58.711+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/1b94e15a-8239-4f80-860f-b1a7f392e9ec" }, { "id": "874a0937-7cd5-4535-a555-ede857969c0e", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"874a0937-7cd5-4535-a555-ede857969c0e\",\"title\":\"AWARENESS \",\"content\":\"\nThis was a courtesy call to check if you are still a rica agent and if you would like awesim to supply you with simcards, if so please send the following so we can open a profile for you\n-A picture of your ID or Passport\nA picture of you holding you ID or Passport close to your face\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"874a0937-7cd5-4535-a555-ede857969c0e\",\"title\":\"AWARENESS \",\"content\":\"

This was a courtesy call to check if you are still a rica agent and if you would like awesim to supply you with simcards, if so please send the following so we can open a profile for you

-A picture of your ID or Passport

A picture of you holding you ID or Passport close to your face

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [ { "value": "awareness", "id": "bbcacfbe-c49d-4868-98d6-a93608daa3f7", "categoryId": "877b2ec0-0822-48f7-ac44-e37af6584b8d", "categoryName": "Tags" } ], "last_modified": "2022-09-20T07:19:10.382+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/874a0937-7cd5-4535-a555-ede857969c0e" }, { "id": "65ffbf12-f1b1-4aa4-a2ba-c0633cfccd11", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"65ffbf12-f1b1-4aa4-a2ba-c0633cfccd11\",\"title\":\"Changing address\",\"content\":\"\nIn order for us to change your address, please send us the following documents for verification.\n-A picture of your ID/Passport\n_A picture of yourself holding your ID/Passport close to your face.\nPlease see example below.\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"65ffbf12-f1b1-4aa4-a2ba-c0633cfccd11\",\"title\":\"Changing address\",\"content\":\"

In order for us to change your address, please send us the following documents for verification.

-A picture of your ID/Passport
_A picture of yourself holding your ID/Passport close to your face.

Please see example below.

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2022-09-09T13:41:50.998+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/65ffbf12-f1b1-4aa4-a2ba-c0633cfccd11" }, { "id": "3e6ee694-f60c-410d-8e70-86b1301c08c7", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"3e6ee694-f60c-410d-8e70-86b1301c08c7\",\"title\":\"Expiry Date \",\"content\":\"\nThe expiry date for your passport has to be 6 months or older for us to register you on smartcall online\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"3e6ee694-f60c-410d-8e70-86b1301c08c7\",\"title\":\"Expiry Date \",\"content\":\"

The expiry date for your passport has to be 6 months or older for us to register you on smartcall online

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2022-09-09T08:54:29.502+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/3e6ee694-f60c-410d-8e70-86b1301c08c7" }, { "id": "39f949b6-3311-4eac-b9f4-981425b6008b", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"39f949b6-3311-4eac-b9f4-981425b6008b\",\"title\":\"Request to Reactivate Dealer Account [Expired Accounts (04)]\",\"content\":\"\nYour Account has Expired, and therefore a new Dealer Agreement must be signed in order to reactivate your Account. This must be done via your dedicated Sales Representative\n[Sales Rep Name]\nand Dealer Department. Please contact your\n[Sales Rep Name]\ndirectly on\n[Sales Rep Number]\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"39f949b6-3311-4eac-b9f4-981425b6008b\",\"title\":\"Request to Reactivate Dealer Account [Expired Accounts (04)]\",\"content\":\"

Your Account has Expired, and therefore a new Dealer Agreement must be signed in order to reactivate your Account. This must be done via your dedicated Sales Representative [Sales Rep Name] and Dealer Department. Please contact your [Sales Rep Name] directly on [Sales Rep Number]

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [ { "value": "dealer", "id": "a8f570d9-6d7e-48ea-a341-b06d31c5d6ae", "categoryId": "e0751ef6-b3fd-4bd0-babb-3bc7619c24e1", "categoryName": "Support Tags" }, { "value": "expired", "id": "ec1585bc-6033-4d82-b0f0-929fc13b3ef2", "categoryId": "e0751ef6-b3fd-4bd0-babb-3bc7619c24e1", "categoryName": "Support Tags" } ], "last_modified": "2022-09-01T13:32:02.835+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/39f949b6-3311-4eac-b9f4-981425b6008b" }, { "id": "362ea5ee-e4b0-4e6e-851b-4813a38746a4", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"362ea5ee-e4b0-4e6e-851b-4813a38746a4\",\"title\":\"Change of Address \",\"content\":\"\nIn order for us to change your address , \\n\nyou need to send us the following docs for verification:\\n\n-A clear picture of your ID/passport \\n\n-A picture of you holding your ID/passport next to your face.\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"362ea5ee-e4b0-4e6e-851b-4813a38746a4\",\"title\":\"Change of Address \",\"content\":\"

In order for us to change your address , \\n

you need to send us the following docs for verification:\\n

-A clear picture of your ID/passport \\n

-A picture of you holding your ID/passport next to your face.

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2022-09-01T13:09:34.668+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/362ea5ee-e4b0-4e6e-851b-4813a38746a4" }, { "id": "a95726bc-ea38-4270-b0bb-b2520d60735b", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"a95726bc-ea38-4270-b0bb-b2520d60735b\",\"title\":\"New agent\",\"content\":\"\nThank you for contacting us. We have checked using your cellphone number and we noticed that you are not a registered RICA agent. You need to be a registered RICA agent in order for us to send you sim cards. Please send us the following documents so that we can register you as a RICA agent:·\nA clear picture of your ID\nYour proof of address (it has to be in your name and should not be older than 3 months)\nA picture of you holding your ID next to your face\nThe Cellphone number that you want to register.Please send these documents via Whatsapp. Our Whatsapp number is\n060 070 2666\n.\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"a95726bc-ea38-4270-b0bb-b2520d60735b\",\"title\":\"New agent\",\"content\":\"

Thank you for contacting us. We have checked using your cellphone number and we noticed that you are not a registered RICA agent. You need to be a registered RICA agent in order for us to send you sim cards. Please send us the following documents so that we can register you as a RICA agent:·      

  A clear picture of your ID

 Your proof of address (it has to be in your name and should not be older than 3 months)

A picture of you holding your ID next to your face

The Cellphone number that you want to register.Please send these documents via Whatsapp. Our Whatsapp number is 060 070 2666.

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2022-09-01T12:08:32.109+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/a95726bc-ea38-4270-b0bb-b2520d60735b" }, { "id": "039cac7f-66c2-439c-89f5-09f3fe32f9fd", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"039cac7f-66c2-439c-89f5-09f3fe32f9fd\",\"title\":\"Courtesy check up \",\"content\":\"\nGood day , it was a courtesy call from Awesim to check how are you doing with the sim cards ?\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"039cac7f-66c2-439c-89f5-09f3fe32f9fd\",\"title\":\"Courtesy check up \",\"content\":\"

Good day , it was a courtesy call from Awesim to check how are you doing with the sim cards ?

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2022-09-01T06:51:12.837+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/039cac7f-66c2-439c-89f5-09f3fe32f9fd" }, { "id": "7c6929a0-e7eb-4994-a327-f9f428005069", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"7c6929a0-e7eb-4994-a327-f9f428005069\",\"title\":\"Requesting Customer Information \",\"content\":\"\nPlease reply with your cellphone number and ID /passport number\n\\n\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"7c6929a0-e7eb-4994-a327-f9f428005069\",\"title\":\"Requesting Customer Information \",\"content\":\"

Please reply with your cellphone number and ID /passport number

\\n

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2022-08-30T06:57:31.520+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/7c6929a0-e7eb-4994-a327-f9f428005069" }, { "id": "b0dd2276-bcac-403e-9994-823dd802a977", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"b0dd2276-bcac-403e-9994-823dd802a977\",\"title\":\"Place an order to earn points\",\"content\":\"\nIf you order via our USSD (*130*43203#) you will earn 30 Reward Points.\nIf you order via my.awesim.co.za you will earn 60 Reward Points.Would you rather order through USSD or my.awesim?If not, reply to this and we'll process your order for you, but you won't earn any points\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"b0dd2276-bcac-403e-9994-823dd802a977\",\"title\":\"Place an order to earn points\",\"content\":\"

If you order via our USSD (*130*43203#) you will earn 30 Reward Points.
If you order via my.awesim.co.za you will earn 60 Reward Points.Would you rather order through USSD or my.awesim?If not, reply to this and we'll process your order for you, but you won't earn any points

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2022-08-30T06:57:30.837+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/b0dd2276-bcac-403e-9994-823dd802a977" }, { "id": "d32e0fa4-1ea5-407f-9963-c771e6bb453a", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"d32e0fa4-1ea5-407f-9963-c771e6bb453a\",\"title\":\"Payment preference\",\"content\":\"\nYou need to download the awesim App to change your payment preference from smartload to your back account\nSelect My details\nPayment preferences\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"d32e0fa4-1ea5-407f-9963-c771e6bb453a\",\"title\":\"Payment preference\",\"content\":\"

You need to download the awesim App to change your payment preference from smartload to your back account

Select My details
Payment preferences

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2022-08-30T06:57:29.566+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/d32e0fa4-1ea5-407f-9963-c771e6bb453a" }, { "id": "499defd9-bf8b-43f2-a225-c2d11e032c36", "title": "", "content_text": "{\"id\":\"499defd9-bf8b-43f2-a225-c2d11e032c36\",\"title\":\"How to Migrate to Telkom LTE data bundle \",\"content\":\"\nSteps:\nDial *180#\nPress # to go to next page\nSelect option 9\nSelect option 2\nSelect option 2 again\nand then select option 1\n(this must be done)\nOnce the change is done\\n\nremember to dial *130*70001# to load the bundle again.\n\"}", "content_html": "{\"id\":\"499defd9-bf8b-43f2-a225-c2d11e032c36\",\"title\":\"How to Migrate to Telkom LTE data bundle \",\"content\":\"

Steps:

  • Dial *180#

  • Press # to go to next page

  • Select option 9

  • Select option 2

  • Select option 2 again

  • and then select option 1 (this must be done)

  • Once the change is done\\n
    remember to dial *130*70001# to load the bundle again.

\"}", "collection_id": "", "collection_name": "", "tags": [], "last_modified": "2022-08-30T06:57:29.212+0000", "url": "https://app.getguru.com/cards/499defd9-bf8b-43f2-a225-c2d11e032c36" } ] }
